ErrorCode.Description: 初始化失败(修复错误后需重启生效)
Initialization failed (Reboot required after error is fixed).
ErrorCode.Reason: 1.PF文件创建或打开失败；\n2.PF文件解析失败；
1. PF file creation or opening failed; \n2. PF file parsing failed.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 重新启动，检查是否恢复正常，否则请联系厂家。
Restart controller.

ErrorCode.Description: 示教器通讯模块调度失败(修复错误后需重启生效)
Starting teach pendant communication failed (Reboot required after error is fixed).
ErrorCode.Reason: 1.没有正常启动示教器线程；
1. The teach pendant thread was not started properly.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 重新启动，检查是否恢复正常，否则请联系厂家。
Restart controller.

ErrorCode.Description: 视觉通讯模块调度失败(修复错误后需重启生效)
Starting vision communication failed (Reboot required after error is fixed).
ErrorCode.Reason: 1.没有正常启动视觉通讯线程；
1. The vision communication thread was not started properly.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 重新启动，检查是否恢复正常，否则请联系厂家。
Restart controller.

ErrorCode.Description: 内部通信模块调度失败(修复错误后需重启生效)
Starting internal communication thread failed (Reboot required after error is fixed).
ErrorCode.Reason: 1.没有正常启动DSP通讯线程；
1. The DSP communication thread was not started properly.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 重新启动，检查是否恢复正常，否则请联系厂家。
Restart controller.

ErrorCode.Description: 自动、手动功能模块调度失败(修复错误后需重启生效)
Automatic and manual function module scheduling failed (Reboot required after error is fixed).
ErrorCode.Reason: 1.没有正常启动ARM调度线程；
1. The ARM scheduling thread not started properly.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 重新启动，检查是否恢复正常，否则请联系厂家。
Restart controller.

ErrorCode.Description: 数据插补模块调度失败(修复错误后需重启生效)
Starting interpolation test failed (Reboot required after error is fixed).
ErrorCode.Reason: 1.没有正常启动插补线程；
1. The interpolation thread not started properly.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 重新启动，检查是否恢复正常，否则请联系厂家。
Restart controller.

ErrorCode.Description: EtherCAT通信打开失败(修复错误后需重启生效)
Opening EtherCAT communication failed (Reboot required after error is fixed).
ErrorCode.Reason: 1.配置文件错误；\n2.EtherCAT从站与系统配置不符
1. Configuration file error; \N2. EtherCAT slave does not match system configuration.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 第一步：检查监控页面EtherCAT连接状态是否异常;\n第二步：请联系厂家
1: Check if the EtherCAT connection status is abnormal; \N2: Contact the manufacturer.

ErrorCode.Description: 打开参数配置文件失败
Opening parameter configuration file failed.
ErrorCode.Reason: 1.参数配置文件打开失败；\n2.参数配置文件损坏
1. Failed to open parameter configuration file; \n2. Parameter configuration file was corrupted.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 系统配置文件错误，请联系厂家
Contact the manufacturer.

ErrorCode.Description: 译码错误
Decoding error
ErrorCode.Reason: 程序语法错误
Program syntax error
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查程序是否有语法错误，详细错误信息参考输出栏提示信息
Check the program for syntax errors.

ErrorCode.Description: 程序行号不合理
Program line invalid
ErrorCode.Reason: 示教器发送的指令行号超出范围
The program line number sent by the teach pendant is out of range.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查示教器蓝色光标所在行是否超出程序范围或者重新选择启动行号
Check if the line where the blue cursor is located exceeds the program range or reselect the start line number.

ErrorCode.Description: Wait指令等待超时
Wait instruction timeout
ErrorCode.Reason: Wait指令等待的时间超出设置时间
The wait time exceeds the set range.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 1.检查Wait条件；\n2.重新设置wait指令等待时间
1. Check Wait conditions; \n2. Reset the wait time.

ErrorCode.Description: 读取指令错误
Instruction reading error
ErrorCode.Reason: 1.示教文件损坏\n2.示教文件编写不符合规范
1. The teaching program was corrupted; n2. The teaching program does not meet the specifications.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 1.重新示教文件\n2.检查示教程序编写规范
1. Rewrite the teaching program; \n2. Check the teaching program.

ErrorCode.Description: 子程序不容许嵌套调用
Nested call of subroutine is not allowed.
ErrorCode.Reason: 子程序有嵌套调用
Nested call of subroutine occurs.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查Call指令是否嵌套调用子程序
Check if the Call instruction is nested to subroutines.

ErrorCode.Description: 运动指令译码错误
Motion instruction decoding error
ErrorCode.Reason: 运动指令译码错误
Error decoding motion instruction
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查示教程序
Check the teaching program.

ErrorCode.Description: 配置文件操作失败
Configuration file operation failed.
ErrorCode.Reason: 1.配置文件保存失败;\n2.配置文件恢复失败；
1. Configuration file save failed;\n2. Configuration file restore failed.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 1.恢复出厂默认值，并重新上电;\n2.断电重新启动
1. Restore to the factory defaults and power on again; \N2. Power off and restart.

ErrorCode.Description: 创建轴插补线程失败
Creating coordinate interpolation thread failed.
ErrorCode.Reason: 1.插补线程创建失败；\n2.内部测试功能没有开放；
1. Creating coordinate interpolation thread failed; \n2. The internal test function is not open.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 1.更换硬件\n2.更换软件版本
1. Replace hardware.\ n2. Update software.

ErrorCode.Description: jump 指令失败
Jump instruction failed.
ErrorCode.Reason: jump指令中点数据计算错误
Point data calculation error exists in the Jump instruction.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 重新选取示教点
Reselect the teaching point.

ErrorCode.Description: IR-Link 初始化失败(修复错误后需重启生效)
IR-Link initialization failed (Reboot required after error is fixed).
ErrorCode.Reason: 1.IR-Link从站个数配置错误\n2.IR-Link从站顺序配置错误；
1. The number of IR-Link slaves was configured incorrectly; \n2. The sequence of IR-Link slaves was configured incorrectly.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 重新确认IR-Link配置
Confirm the IR-Link configuration.

ErrorCode.Description: 示教程序保存失败
Saving teaching program failed.
ErrorCode.Reason: 存储卡松动或无法识别
The memory card is loose or not recognized.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查存储卡
Check the memory card.

ErrorCode.Description: 系统内部与运动模块通信错误
Motion module communication error.
ErrorCode.Reason: DSP软件运行错误
DSP software running error
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 控制器重新上电
Restart the controller.

ErrorCode.Description: 内部使能错误
Enable error
ErrorCode.Reason: DSP软件运行错误
DSP software running error
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 控制器重新上电
Restart the controller.

ErrorCode.Description: 系统运动模块程序运行错误
Internal program running error
ErrorCode.Reason: DSP软件运行错误
DSP software running error
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 控制器重新上电
Restart the controller.

ErrorCode.Description: 回零失败
Homing failed.
ErrorCode.Reason: 回零运动失败
Homing motion failed.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 重新进行回零
Perform homing again.

ErrorCode.Description: 使能缺失
Enablement lost
ErrorCode.Reason: 运行状态丢失使能
The enablement of the running state is lost.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查系统是否使能状态
Check whether the system is in enabled state.

ErrorCode.Description: 检测到伺服参数错误
Servo parameter error detected.
ErrorCode.Reason: 设置的参数与实际的伺服参数不匹配
The set parameters do not match the actual servo parameters.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 更改使用伺服面板或伺服后台按照出厂参数更改伺服参数。若实际参数和出厂参数不一致，请更换电机或伺服
Change servo parameters using operating panel or software. If the actual parameters do not match the factory defaults, replace the motor or servo.

ErrorCode.Description: 运动状态获取异常
Error getting motion state.
ErrorCode.Reason: 1.系统内部处理繁忙；\n2.系统运动固件损坏
1. System busy; \n2. Motion firmware damaged.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 1、断电重新启动；\n2、联系厂家。
1. Restart the controller; \n2. Contact the manufacturer.

ErrorCode.Description: 配置未成功，PLC配置与实际柜型冲突
The configuration is failed, the PLC configuration is in conflict with the actual cabinet type.
ErrorCode.Reason: PLC配置与实际柜型冲突
The PLC configuration conflicts with the actual controller model.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查PLC配置参数与实际柜型是否匹配
Check that the PLC configuration parameters match the actual controller model.

ErrorCode.Description: 老版本PLC配置，部分功能受影响
Some functions are affected because of old version of PLC configuration
ErrorCode.Reason: 老版本PLC配置
Old version PLC configuration
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 二次开发版本号和机器人二次开发版本号是不匹配，请联系厂家
The secondary development version number and the robot secondary development version number do not match, please contact the manufacturer.

ErrorCode.Description: 伺服规划位置和反馈位置校验错误
Error verifying planned servo position and feedback position
ErrorCode.Reason: arm-dsp通道设置伺服位置时,设置(规划位置)和取回的值(编码器反馈位置)校验不一致
The planned servo position and the encoder feedback position are inconsistent.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 系统故障，请联系厂家
System fault, please contact the manufacturer.

ErrorCode.Description: 位置同步错误(修复错误后需重启生效)
Position synchronization error (Reboot required after error is fixed).
ErrorCode.Reason: 控制器与伺服位置同步时出错
Error in synchronizing position between controller and servo.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 1、断电重新启动；\n2、联系厂家。
1. Restart the controller; \n2. Contact the manufacturer.

ErrorCode.Description: 启动时机器人不允许处于运动状态
Robot not allowed to start when in motion.
ErrorCode.Reason: 启动时机器人处于运动状态
The robot is moving when started.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 等待机器人停止后再启动机器人
Restart the robot after it is stopped.

ErrorCode.Description: 传入参数错误(修复错误后需重启生效)
Parameter passing in error (Reboot required after error is fixed).
ErrorCode.Reason: 传入参数错误
The parameters passed in are incorrect.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查系统基本参数设置
Check the basic system settings.

ErrorCode.Description: 找不到指令行
Command line not found.
ErrorCode.Reason: 输入行号超出范围
The line number entered is out of range.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 选择运行的指令行
Select a command line that is running.

ErrorCode.Description: 找不到点数据
Point data not found.
ErrorCode.Reason: 点未定义
The points are not defined.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查点是否定义
Check if the points are defined.

ErrorCode.Description: 数据逆解计算错误
Inverse kinematics error
ErrorCode.Reason: 该点在机器人的奇异点
The point is a singular point.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 修改该点的坐标
Modify the coordinates of the point.

ErrorCode.Description: 点数据坐标系参数错误
Point data coordinate error
ErrorCode.Reason: 坐标系值超出范围
The coordinate values are out of range.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 重新取点
Get the point again.

ErrorCode.Description: 直线或圆弧指令臂参数不允许突变
Armtype in MOVL/MOVC cannot be changed.
ErrorCode.Reason: MOVL MOVC JUMPL指令不允许臂参数突变
Armtype in MOVL/MOVC/JUMPL cannot be changed.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 重新取点或者增加关节过渡点
Get the point again or add joint transition points.

ErrorCode.Description: V参数超出范围
V parameter out of range
ErrorCode.Reason: V参数超出范围（1-100）
The V parameter is out of range (1-100).
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 修改V参数
Modify the V parameter.

ErrorCode.Description: Z参数超出范围
Z parameter out of range
ErrorCode.Reason: Z参数超出范围（0-5）
The Z parameter is out of range (0-5).
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 修改Z参数
Modify the Z parameter.

ErrorCode.Description: TOOL参数超出范围
TOOL parameter out of range
ErrorCode.Reason: TOOL参数超出范围(0-15)
The TOOL parameter is out of range (0-15).
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 修改Tool参数
Modify the TOOL parameter.

ErrorCode.Description: Wobj参数超出范围
Wobj parameter out of range
ErrorCode.Reason: Wobj参数超出范围(0-15)
The Wobj parameter is out of range (0-15).
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 修改User参数
Modify the User parameter.

ErrorCode.Description: ACC 参数超出范围
ACC parameter out of range
ErrorCode.Reason: ACC参数超出范围(1-100)
The ACC parameter is out of range (1-100).
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 修改Acc参数
Modify the ACC parameter.

ErrorCode.Description: until 参数超出范围
until parameter out of range
ErrorCode.Reason: I/O号超出范围(0-255)
The I/O number is out of range (0-255).
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 修改Until In参数
Modify the Until In parameter.

ErrorCode.Description: Pallet 参数错误
Pallet parameter error
ErrorCode.Reason: Pallet（PNo,i,j,k）,PNo,i,j,k大于等于0
PNo,i,j,k in Pallet（PNo,i,j,k) is smaller than 0.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 修改Pallet参数
Modify the Pallet parameter

ErrorCode.Description: 托盘未定义
Pallet not defined.
ErrorCode.Reason: 托盘序号未定义
The pallet number is not defined.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 托盘定义后使用
Define the pallet before use.

ErrorCode.Description: Repeat 参数错误
Repeat parameter error
ErrorCode.Reason: Repeat参数超出范围
The Repeat parameter is not defined.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 修改Repeat参数
Modify the Repeat parameter.

ErrorCode.Description: 运行译码错误
Running decoding error
ErrorCode.Reason: 运行过程中指令解析出错
Error in instruction parsing during running
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查运行的指令，根据提示修改
Check the running instructions and modify them according to the prompts.

ErrorCode.Description: 基坐标系寸动时数据逆解运算错误
Inverse kinematics calculation error in CART
ErrorCode.Reason: 基坐标系下寸动目标位置超出运行空间或处于奇异区
The jog motion destination is out of the motion space or in singularity.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 1.检查寸动步长大小;\n2.检查寸动方向
1. Check the step of jog motion; \N2. Check the direction of jog motion.

ErrorCode.Description: 工具坐标系寸动时数据逆解运算错误
Inverse kinematics calculation error in TOOL
ErrorCode.Reason: 工具坐标系下寸动目标位置超出运行空间或处于奇异区
The jog motion destination is out of the motion space or in singularity.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 1.检查寸动步长大小;\n2.检查寸动方向
1. Check the step of jog motion; \N2. Check the direction of jog motion.

ErrorCode.Description: 工件坐标系寸动时数据逆解运算错误
Inverse kinematics calculation error in Wobj
ErrorCode.Reason: 工件坐标系下寸动目标位置超出运行空间或处于奇异区
The jog motion destination is out of the motion space or in singularity.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 1.检查寸动步长大小;\n2.检查寸动方向
1. Check the step of jog motion; \N2. Check the direction of jog motion.

ErrorCode.Description: 工具负载参数设置超限
Tool load parameter out of range
ErrorCode.Reason: 工具负载参数设置值超出范围
The value of Tool load parameter is out of range.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 修改工具负载参数
Modify the Tool load parameter.

ErrorCode.Description: 负载参数设置超限
Load parameter out of range
ErrorCode.Reason: 负载参数设置值超出范围
The value of load parameter is out of range.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 修改负载参数
Modify the load parameter.

ErrorCode.Description: 臂上负载参数设置超限
Arm load parameter out of range
ErrorCode.Reason: 臂上负载参数设置超限
The value of arm load parameter is out of range.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 修改臂上负载参数
Modify the arm load parameter.

ErrorCode.Description: 参数设置错误
Parameter setting error
ErrorCode.Reason: 参数设置值不在限制范围内
The parameter setting value is out of range.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 请检查设置的参数范围是否符合要求
Check that the set parameter meets the range.

ErrorCode.Description: API初始化失败(修复错误后需重启生效)
API initialization failed (Reboot required after error is fixed).
ErrorCode.Reason: 没有正常启动API通讯线程
The API communication thread was not started properly.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 1、断电重新启动；\n2、联系厂家。
1. Restart the controller; \n2. Contact the manufacturer.

ErrorCode.Description: 硬件加密授权失败，系统不可用
Authentication failure, system is not available.
ErrorCode.Reason: 板载硬件加密授权失败
Fail to authenticate the hardware encryption.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 请联系厂商解决
Contact the manufacture.

ErrorCode.Description: MC模块进程不存在错误
MC module process does not exist.
ErrorCode.Reason: 运动模块进程崩溃，不存在
The MC module process does not exist.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 请刷伺服固件
Update the servo firmware.

ErrorCode.Description: 机器人系统参数重置，请重启控制器
Robot system parameter reset, please restart the controller.
ErrorCode.Reason: 机器人系统参数重置（配置文件加载/恢复出厂设置/存储卡格式化/系统升级/系统降级）
The robot system parameters are reset (configuration file loading/factory settings restore/memory card formatting/system upgrade/system degrade).
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 控制器重新上电
Restart the controller.

ErrorCode.Description: 软浮动参数初始化异常，需要重启
Exception initializing soft float parameters, please restart the controller.
ErrorCode.Reason: 软浮动参数初始化异常
The soft float parameter initialization is abnormal.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 需要重启
Restart the controller.

ErrorCode.Description: 初始化平衡杠参数失败
Failed to initialize balance bar parameters.
ErrorCode.Reason: 开机初始化参数平衡杠参数异常
Balance bar parameters are abnormal during power-on initialization.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 导入正确的平衡杠参数
Import the correct balance bar parameters.

ErrorCode.Description: 触发系统诊断
Trigger system diagnostics
ErrorCode.Reason: 触发系统诊断
Trigger system diagnostics
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 无需处理，清楚即可
No need to deal with it, just make it clear

ErrorCode.Description: 存在重复网段IP，请重新配置
Duplicate network segment IP exists, please reconfigure
ErrorCode.Reason: 配置的网络中，存在相同网段的IP地址
In the configured network, there are IP Addresses in the same network segment
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 配置合理网段的IP地址
Configure the IP Address of a reasonable network segment

ErrorCode.Description: 运行模式急停按下后，DSP异常未响应。
DSP fails to respond after the emergency stop button is pressed in the running mode
ErrorCode.Reason: 运行模式急停按下后，DSP异常未响应。
DSP fails to respond after the emergency stop button is pressed in the running mode
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 1、断电重新启动；\n2、联系厂家。
1. Restart the controller; \n2. Contact the manufacturer.

ErrorCode.Description: 运行模式掉使能后，DSP异常未响应。
DSP fails to respond after the running mode is disabled.
ErrorCode.Reason: 运行模式掉使能后，DSP异常未响应。
DSP fails to respond after the running mode is disabled.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 1、断电重新启动；\n2、联系厂家。
1. Restart the controller; \n2. Contact the manufacturer.

ErrorCode.Description: 存储卡挂载失败
Failed to mount memory card.
ErrorCode.Reason: 存储卡挂载失败
Failed to mount memory card.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 1.断电重启；\n2.重新插拔存储卡；\n3.更换存储卡
1. Restart the controller; \N2. Reinstall the memory card; \N3. Replace the memory card.

ErrorCode.Description: 绑定的端口号与IP地址存在复用
Duplicate port or IP address
ErrorCode.Reason: 绑定的端口号或IP地址存在复用
The bound port or IP address is reused.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 更换端口号或IP地址
Change port or IP address.

ErrorCode.Description: 以太网通信出错
EtherNet communication error
ErrorCode.Reason: 以太网通信出错
EtherNet communication error
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查通信线路环境，重新传输数据
Check the network connection and retransmit the data.

ErrorCode.Description: 网络被干扰
Network is disturbed.
ErrorCode.Reason: 以太网被多个终端连接
Multiple terminals are connected to one controller.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查是否有多个终端连接同一个控制器
Check if multiple terminals are connected to one controller.

ErrorCode.Description: 网络通讯端口打开失败
Network communication port opening failed
ErrorCode.Reason: 网络通讯指令打开错误
Network communication open instruction error
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查网络通讯指令
Check the network communication instructions.

ErrorCode.Description: 存储卡未识别
Memory card not identified.
ErrorCode.Reason:
1、 存储卡未插入控制权
2、 存储卡接触不良
3、 存储卡损坏
4、 存储卡上电初始化有问题

1. Memory card is not inserted. 
2. Poor contact with memory Card. 
3. Memory card is damaged. 
 4. Memory card has a problem with the power-on initialization.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查系统硬件；断电重新启动
Check the system hardware; restart the controller.

ErrorCode.Description: EtherCAT断开
EtherCAT disconnected.
ErrorCode.Reason: EtherCAT连接后断开
EtherCAT communication is disconnected.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查EtherCAT通信情况
Check the EtherCAT communication.

ErrorCode.Description: IR-Link断开
IR-Link disconnected.
ErrorCode.Reason: IR-Link连接后断开
IR-Link communication is disconnected.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查IR-Link通信情况
Check the IR-Link communication.

ErrorCode.Description: 启动和暂停相隔时间太短
Too short interval between start and pause.
ErrorCode.Reason: 启动和暂停间隔时间短
The interval between start and pause is too short.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 重新启动运行
Restart run

ErrorCode.Description: 获取视觉特征值失败
Failed to acquire vision feature values.
ErrorCode.Reason: 执行指令时视觉特征值获取失败
Failed to acquire vision feature values while executing the instruction.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查视觉处理后重新获取视觉特征值
Check the vision process and acquire the vision feature values again.

ErrorCode.Description: 译码未完成
Decoding not finished.
ErrorCode.Reason: 程序可能存在指令符号或语法错误
The program may have instruction symbols or syntax errors.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查编辑程序的指令语法
Check the instruction syntax of the edited program.

ErrorCode.Description: 机器人类型错误
Robot type error
ErrorCode.Reason: 机器人没有相关的类型固件
The robot has no associated type firmware.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 重启或检查DSP固件
Restart or check the DSP firmware.

ErrorCode.Description: FPGA固件加载失败(修复错误后需重启生效)
FPGA firmware loading error (Reboot required after error is fixed).
ErrorCode.Reason: FPGA固件错误或启动异常
FPGA firmware error or startup exception.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 重启或检查FPGA固件
Restart or check the FPGA firmware.

ErrorCode.Description: DSP固件加载失败(修复错误后需重启生效)
DSP firmware loading error (Reboot required after error is fixed).
ErrorCode.Reason: DSP固件错误或启动异常
DSP firmware error or startup exception.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 重启或检查DSP固件
Restart or check the DSP firmware.

ErrorCode.Description: 模式切换，系统状态错误
System error after mode change.
ErrorCode.Reason: 切为连续示教或自动模式后，检测工程未正常编译完成或配置文件未正常完成
After switching to the play mode, it was detected that the project was not properly compiled or the configuration file was not completed properly.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 系统内部错误，请联系厂家
Internal system error, please contact the manufacturer.

ErrorCode.Description: 设置I/O参数错误
I/O parameter setting error
ErrorCode.Reason: I/O相关参数设置错误
Error setting I/O parameters
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 请检查指令中设置I/O参数范围是否合理
Check the I/O parameter settings.

ErrorCode.Description: IP地址错误
IP address error
ErrorCode.Reason: IP地址获取或者设置错误
Error getting or setting IP address
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查网线连接情况
Check the network connection.

ErrorCode.Description: 示教器无IR-Link配置权
Teach pendant has no authority to configure IR-Link.
ErrorCode.Reason: 二次开发平台已经配置IR-Link
The secondary development platform has been configured with IR-Link.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 使用当前配置，或者取消二次开发配置
Use the current configuration, or cancel the secondary development configuration.

ErrorCode.Description: 共享内存映射错误
Shared memory mapping error
ErrorCode.Reason: RC与PLC的共享内存映射错误
Shared memory mapping error between robot and PLC.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 联系技术支持
Contact the technical support.

ErrorCode.Description: 数据流模式未关闭
Data stream mode not closed.
ErrorCode.Reason: 系统处于数据流模式
The system is in data stream mode.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 解除数据流模式
Close the data stream mode.

ErrorCode.Description: 急停报警
Emergency stop alarm
ErrorCode.Reason: 急停键被按下
The emergency stop was pressed.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 解除急停，清除报警
Release the emergency stop and clear the alarm.

ErrorCode.Description: 无后退数据
No reverse movement data found.
ErrorCode.Reason: 后退数据已经执行完毕
The reverse movement data has been executed.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 终止后退操作
Terminate the reverse movement.

ErrorCode.Description: 关闭端口号错误
Port number closing error
ErrorCode.Reason: 端口号不在设定范围或端口号根本没有被打开过
The port number is not within the range or the port has not been opened.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查端口号
Check the port number.

ErrorCode.Description: TCP端口溢出
TCP port overflow.
ErrorCode.Reason: 外围TCP应用连接过多
Excessive peripheral TCP application connections.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 关闭无用的TCP连接
Close unused TCP connections.

ErrorCode.Description: API通讯处理错误
API communication processing error
ErrorCode.Reason: API通道被其它应用长时间暂用或之前的API应用处理出现故障阻塞
The API channel is occupied by other applications for a long time or has been blocked due to faults in previous API application processing.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 关闭或减少之前API应用工艺
Close or reduce previous API application processes.

ErrorCode.Description: 圆弧轨迹不可控
Arc trajectory uncontrollable
ErrorCode.Reason: 圆弧起始点是不确定的点
The arc start point is uncertain.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 原来：圆弧指令前后要增加其它运动指令
Add other motion instructions before and after the arc instruction.

ErrorCode.Description: 版本信息不匹配，请使用与控制器版本相匹配的软件
Version information does not match, please use software that matches your controller version.
ErrorCode.Reason: 示教器或InoRobotLab的版本与控制器的版本不匹配
The version of the InoTeachPad or InoRobotLab does not match the controller version.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 使用与控制器的版本相匹配的示教器或InoRobotLab
Use the InoTeachPad or InoRobotLab that matches the version of the controller.

ErrorCode.Description: IP冲突
IP conflict
ErrorCode.Reason: IP设置冲突
IP settings conflict.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 重新设置IP
Reset the IP address.

ErrorCode.Description: 存储卡未识别到正确的文件系统
File system not identified in the memory card.
ErrorCode.Reason: 存储卡上的文件系统不正确
The file system on the memory card is incorrect.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 在示教器上重新格式化存储卡
Reformat the memory card on the teach pendant.

ErrorCode.Description: 伺服参数读取失败
Reading servo parameter failed.
ErrorCode.Reason: 控制器读取伺服参数失败
The controller fails to read servo parameters.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 优化伺服与控制器连接环境
Optimize the connection between the servo and the controller.

ErrorCode.Description: 参数超出范围
Parameter out of range.
ErrorCode.Reason: 参数超出范围
Parameter out of range.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 设置范围内的参数
Set the parameters within the range.

ErrorCode.Description: 不合法的I/O配置
Illegal I/O configuration
ErrorCode.Reason: 配置的I/O被PLC控制或不存在
Configured I/O is controlled by a PLC or does not exist.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 重新配置I/O
Reset I/O.

ErrorCode.Description: 不合法的I/O设置操作
Illegal I/O setup operation
ErrorCode.Reason: 设置的I/O缺少I/O控制权
The set I/O lacks the I/O control.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查I/O控制权
Check the I/O control.

ErrorCode.Description: I/O不存在
I/O does not exist.
ErrorCode.Reason: 锁螺丝启动参数发送至伺服端失败
Failed to send screw locking startup parameters to the servo.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 1、检查电批伺服固件是否和控制器匹配\n2、清零重启
1. Check that the electric screwdriver servo firmware matches with the controller. \n2. Clear parameters and restart the system.

ErrorCode.Description: 拧紧启动失败
Failed to start tightening.
ErrorCode.Reason: 锁螺丝启动参数发送至伺服端失败
Failed to send screw locking startup parameters to the servo.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 1、检查电批伺服固件是否和控制器匹配\n2、清零重启
1. Check that the electric screwdriver servo firmware matches with the controller. \n2. Clear parameters and restart the system.

ErrorCode.Description: 电批停止失败
Failed to stop electric screwdriver.
ErrorCode.Reason: 锁螺丝停止参数发送至伺服端失败
Failed to send screw locking stop parameters to the servo.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 1、检查电批伺服固件是否和控制器匹配\n2、清零重启
1. Check that the electric screwdriver servo firmware matches with the controller. \n2. Clear parameters and restart the system.

ErrorCode.Description: 螺丝状态检测失败
Screw status detection failed.
ErrorCode.Reason: 从伺服端读取锁螺丝锁状态失败
Failed to read screw locking status from the servo.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 1、检查电批伺服固件是否和控制器匹配\n2、清零重启
1. Check that the electric screwdriver servo firmware matches with the controller. \n2. Clear parameters and restart the system.

ErrorCode.Description: 读拧紧设置参数失败
Failed to read screw tightening parameters.
ErrorCode.Reason: 从伺服端读取锁螺丝设置参数失败
Failed to read screw locking setting parameters from the servo
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 1、检查电批伺服固件是否和控制器匹配\n2、清零重启
1. Check that the electric screwdriver servo firmware matches with the controller. \n2. Clear parameters and restart the system.

ErrorCode.Description: 写拧紧设置参数失败
Failed to write screw tightening parameters
ErrorCode.Reason: 往伺服端写锁螺丝设置参数失败
Failed to write screw locking setting parameters to the servo.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 1、检查电批伺服固件是否和控制器匹配\n2、清零重启
1. Check that the electric screwdriver servo firmware matches with the controller. \n2. Clear parameters and restart the system.

ErrorCode.Description: 锁螺丝数据显示失败
Screw data display failed.
ErrorCode.Reason: 从伺服端获取锁螺丝显示数据失败
Failed to obtain screw locking display data from the servo.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 1、检查电批伺服固件是否和控制器匹配\n2、清零重启
1. Check that the electric screwdriver servo firmware matches with the controller. \n2. Clear parameters and restart the system.

ErrorCode.Description: 锁螺丝计数清零失败
Failed to reset screw tightening count.
ErrorCode.Reason: 往伺服端写清锁螺丝计数器标志失败
Failed to write a screw tightening counter clearing flag to the servo.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 1、检查电批伺服固件是否和控制器匹配\n2、清零重启
1. Check that the electric screwdriver servo firmware matches with the controller. \n2. Clear parameters and restart the system.

ErrorCode.Description: 伺服错误获取线程失败
Failed to get thread for servo error.
ErrorCode.Reason: 伺服错误获取线程死掉
Failed to get thread for servo error.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 重新启动机器人
Restart the robot.

ErrorCode.Description: 拧松启动失败
Failed to start loosening.
ErrorCode.Reason: 拆螺丝启动参数发送至伺服端失败
Failed to send screw removal startup parameters to the servo.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 1、检查电批伺服固件是否和控制器匹配\n2、清零重启
1. Check that the electric screwdriver servo firmware matches with the controller. \n2. Clear parameters and restart the system.

ErrorCode.Description: 写拧松设置参数失败
Failed to write screw loosening parameters.
ErrorCode.Reason: 往伺服端写拆螺丝设置参数失败
Failed to write screw removal setting parameters to the servo.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查电批伺服固件是否和控制器匹配
Check that the electric screwdriver servo firmware matches with the controller.

ErrorCode.Description: 读拧松设置参数失败
Failed to read screw loosening parameters.
ErrorCode.Reason: 从伺服端获取拆螺丝设置数据失败
Failed to obtain screw removal setting data from the servo.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查电批伺服固件是否和控制器匹配
Check that the electric screwdriver servo firmware matches with the controller.

ErrorCode.Description: 拧松回退点设置超限
Fallback point setting out of range.
ErrorCode.Reason: 回退点设置超限
The fallback point is out of range.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 将拧松回退点设置在限位范围内
Set the fallback point for screw loosening within the range.

ErrorCode.Description: 跟随工艺数据初始化失败
Failed to initialize tracking process data.
ErrorCode.Reason: 跟随工艺数据存在错误或者系统繁忙
There are errors in the tracking process data or the system is busy.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查参数是否错误
Check for parameter errors.

ErrorCode.Description: 中断运行结束，尝试恢复原任务运动轨迹失败
The interrupted operation is over, and the attempt to restore the original task trajectory failed.
ErrorCode.Reason: 原任务轨迹恢复时,被异常终止,导致恢复失败;

During the recovery of the original task trajectory, itDuring the recovery of the original task trajectory, it terminated due to an an it was abruptly terminated due to an anomaly, resulting in a failure to recover.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 重新设置启动行/返回起始行或者重新同步工程
Reset start line/return to start line or re-synchronise project.

ErrorCode.Description: 中断队列已满
Interrupt queue is full
ErrorCode.Reason: 中断队列已被中断任务填满
The interrupt queue has been filled with interrupt tasks
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 1.检查中断触发条件是否过快，导致中断任务来不及处理；2.返回任务启动行，同步工程等操作可清除中断队列中的所有中断任务

1. Check whether the interrupt triggering condition is too fast, causing the interrupt task to be unable to process in time; 2. Return to the task start line, synchronize the project, and other operations can clear all interrupt tasks in the interrupt queue

ErrorCode.Description: 出中断时，未回到中断前停止的点位
When an interruption occurs, it does not return to the point where it stopped before the interruption
ErrorCode.Reason: 出中断时，没有调用指令将机器人恢复到进中断时的点位
When an interrupt occurs, no command is called to restore the robot to the point at which the interrupt occurred
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 出中断时，恢复到中断前的点位
When there is an interruption, restore to the point before the interruption

ErrorCode.Description: 读写的TCP端口未打开
TCP port for reading and writing is not open.
ErrorCode.Reason: TCP端口未开启
The TCP port is not open.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 请确保Tcp端口已经正确连接
Make sure that the TCP port is properly connected.

ErrorCode.Description: 动态网络通讯端口未关闭
Dynamic network communication port not closed.
ErrorCode.Reason: 动态网络通讯没有关闭情况下使用普通网络通讯
Regular network communication is used without dynamic network communication being turned off.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 请通过指令CNVVIOSION OFF关闭动态网络通讯
Turn off dynamic network communication using instruction CNVVIOSION OFF.

ErrorCode.Description: 传送带错误或相机像素错误
Conveyor error or camera pixel error
ErrorCode.Reason: 传送带或相机的传输数据类型错误
The conveyor number is incorrect or the transfer data type of the camera is incorrect.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 重新设置传送带号或相机传输数据类型
Reset the conveyor number or camera data transfer type.

ErrorCode.Description: 动态视觉坐标转换错误
Dynamic vision coordinates conversion error.
ErrorCode.Reason: 动态视觉像素和相机坐标系转换出错
Error converting dynamic vision pixels to camera coordinate system.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 首先检查视觉发送过来的像素是否正确，否则需要重新标定相机
Check that the pixels sent from vision equipment are correct, otherwise the camera needs to be recalibrated.

ErrorCode.Description: 无后退数据
No reverse movement data found.
ErrorCode.Reason: 没有可以后退的数据
There is no reverse movement data.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 清除报错
Clear the error.

ErrorCode.Description: 圆弧运动前缺乏运动指令
Lack of motion instructions before arc instruction
ErrorCode.Reason: 圆弧运动前一条指令不是Movj或Movl（仅在单步示教时出现）
The instruction before arc motion is not Movj or Movl (This occurs only in the single-step teaching.)
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 保证圆弧指令前一条指令是为Movj或Movl
Ensure that the instruction before the arc instruction is Movj or Movl.

ErrorCode.Description: 找不到指定文件
Specified file not found.
ErrorCode.Reason: 文件不存在或文件路径错误
The file does not exist or the file path is incorrect.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查文件是否存在或文件路径是否正确
Check that the file exists or the file path is correct.

ErrorCode.Description: 保存诊断信息错误
Error saving diagnostic information
ErrorCode.Reason: 保存诊断信息错误过程中相关文件不存在
The relevant files do not exist during the process of saving diagnostic information.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 系统内部错误，请联系厂家
Internal system error, please contact the manufacturer.

ErrorCode.Description: 导出诊断信息错误
Error exporting diagnostic information
ErrorCode.Reason: 导出诊断信息错误过程中相关文件不存在
The relevant files do not exist during the process of exporting diagnostic information.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 首先请检查USB设备是否正常，否则为系统内部错误，请联系厂家
Check that the USB device is normal; otherwise it is an internal system error, please contact the manufacturer.

ErrorCode.Description: 文件数量超限或内存卡空间不足
The number of files exceeds the limit or the SD card is out of space.
ErrorCode.Reason: 1./media/sdcard1/文件夹下文件（含文件夹）数量过多 2.SD卡剩余可使用空间过小
1. There are too many files (including folders) in /media/sdcard1. 2. The remaining usable space of the SD card is too small.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 1.删除过多的文件，保证单个文件夹下的文件+文件夹数目不超过100个 2.清理SD卡数据
1. Delete excessive files and ensure the number of files plus folders in a single folder is not greater than 100. 2. Clean up the SD card.

ErrorCode.Description: 暂停缓冲区数据发送失败
Pause buffer data sending failed.
ErrorCode.Reason: 从暂停到启动时，缓冲数据发送失败
Failed to send buffer data when going from pause to start.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 重新从停止开始启动
Restart from stop.

ErrorCode.Description: 多任务编号不存在
Multitasking number does not exist.
ErrorCode.Reason: 任务编号写错或使用范围不对
Multitasking number is written incorrectly or in the wrong range.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查任务编号
Check the task number.

ErrorCode.Description: 多任务编号错误或被占用
Multitasking number incorrect or occupied.
ErrorCode.Reason: 任务编号错误或已经被占用
The multitasking number is incorrect or has been occupied.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查任务编号
Check the task number.

ErrorCode.Description: 多任务创建失败
Multitasking creation failed.
ErrorCode.Reason: 系统繁忙；任务已经在运行或者暂中再次启动；非远程I/O权限下启动0号任务；
The system is busy; the task is already running or has been restarted; task 0 was started under non-remote I/O permissions.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: (1)重新运行XQT指令，检查是否正常运行；\n(2)停止当前多任务后再启动；\n(3)切换到远程权限再启动任务0；
1. Re-run the XQT command to check that it runs normally. \n2. Stop the current multitasking and start it again. \n3. Switch to remote I/O permissions and restart task 0.

ErrorCode.Description: 开启或关闭位置锁存功能失败
Failed to open or close the position latching function.
ErrorCode.Reason: 硬件未连接或伺服未就绪
The hardware is not connected or the servo is not ready.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查硬件连接和伺服配置
Check the hardware connections and servo configuration.

ErrorCode.Description: 控制器调试功能调用失败
Failed to call the controller debug function.
ErrorCode.Reason: 控制器调试功能模块失效
The controller debug function module failed.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查控制器调试开关的配置是否正确
Check that the configuration of the controller debug switch is correct.

ErrorCode.Description: 负载参数设置失败
Failed to set load parameters.
ErrorCode.Reason: 系统繁忙或参数超出范围
The system is busy or the parameter is out of range.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 重新设置或检查参数
Reset or check the parameter.

ErrorCode.Description: 串口号或波特率错误
Serial port or baud rate error
ErrorCode.Reason: 1. 串口号输入范围不合适；\n 2. 串口未关闭的情况下，开启相同串口号不同波特率的串口。
1. The input serial port number is out of range. \n 2. With the serial port not closed, another serial port with the same number but different baud rate is opened.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 1. 检查串口号输入范围是否合适\n 2. 使用close指令关闭串口，再用open指令开启新的波特率串口
1. Check that the input serial port number is within the range. \n 2. Close the serial port via the close instruction and open a serial port with new baud rate via the close instruction.

ErrorCode.Description: Modbus参数读写错误
Modbus parameter read-write error
ErrorCode.Reason: Modbus读写执行失败
Modbus read-write execution failed
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 请更新软件版本
Update the software version.

ErrorCode.Description: P变量修改失败
Failed to modify P variable
ErrorCode.Reason: P变量所在的程序文件打开失败或写入失败
Failed to open or write the program file where the P variable is located.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 重新修改一次、更新软件版本
Re-modify it or update the software version.

ErrorCode.Description: 网络通讯异常:客户端与服务器未建立连接
Abnormal network communication: Client and server connection error.
ErrorCode.Reason: 机器人与目标设备的通讯被中断
The communication between the robot and the target device has been interrupted.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 重新建立连接后再进行通讯
Reestablish the connection.

ErrorCode.Description: 网络通讯异常:机器人发送数据出错
Abnormal network communication: Robot sending data error.
ErrorCode.Reason: 机器人网络通讯发送数据时断网或者传输数据时出错
The network was disconnected while the robot was sending data or there was an error while transmitting data.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查网络连接是否正常
Check that the network connection is normal.

ErrorCode.Description: 姿态校正计算错误
Orientation correction calculation error
ErrorCode.Reason: 工具选择错误或处于对准位置是奇异位置
Wrong tool was selected or the alignment position is a singularity.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 1. 检查工具是否选择有误\n 2. 检查机器人需要对准位置是否处于奇异
1. Check that the tool selection is correct. \n 2. Check that the position that the robot needs to align with is not a singularity.

ErrorCode.Description: Modbus模式下，切换工位程序错误
Error in switching station program in Modbus mode
ErrorCode.Reason: Modbus模式下，当前工位程序处于非停止状态时,切换工位程序。
In Modbus mode, the station program is switched when the current station program is not stopped.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 将当前工位程序设为停止状态，再切换工位程序。
Set the current station program to the stop state, and then switch the station program.

ErrorCode.Description: 系统瞬间掉电错误
Supply voltage error
ErrorCode.Reason: 系统运行过程中突然断电
The system suddenly loses power during operation.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 清除报警
Clear the alarm.

ErrorCode.Description: InoRobShop轴配置不合法
Illegal InoRobShop axis configuration.
ErrorCode.Reason: InoRobShop配置的轴的数量或者类型不匹配
The number or type of axes configured by InoRobShop does not match the actual condition.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 1、 在InRobShop重新配置正确的轴；\n 2、 在示教器【设置】-【其他设置】清空PLC配置（注意：内置PLC程序也会丢失）
1. Reconfigure the correct axis in InRobShop. \n 2. In InoTeachPad, go to Set > System > Others > Clear PLC-CFG and clear the PLC configuration (Note: The built-in PLC program will also be cleared.)

ErrorCode.Description: Modbus模式下，选择多个程序错误
Error selecting multiple programs in Modbus mode
ErrorCode.Reason: Modbus模式下，同时选择多个工位程序
In Modbus mode, multiple station programs are selected simultaneously.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 只选择一个工位程序。
Select only one program.

ErrorCode.Description: 示教器控制权下，手动模式运动过程中网络连接断开
Network disconnected during motion in teach mode under teach pendant control.
ErrorCode.Reason: 当机器人在控制器权限下，且在手动模式，运动过程中检测到示教器与控制器的网络连接断开
When the robot is under the control of teach pendant and operating in teach mode, it is detected that the network connection between the teach pendant and the controller is disconnected.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 重连后清除报警即可
Clear the alarm after reconnecting the teach pendant and the controller.

ErrorCode.Description: 读写的串口未打开
The read-write serial port is not opened.
ErrorCode.Reason: 读写的串口未打开
The read-write serial port is not opened.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 在控制器参数配置中打开串口，或者执行打开串口指令
Open the serial port by configuring the controller parameter or by executing the open instruction.

ErrorCode.Description: 未选择工位程序或程序运行过程中不允许修改P变量
P variable cannot be changed before a program is selected or when the program is running.
ErrorCode.Reason: 未选择工位程序或程序运行过程中不允许修改P变量
P variable cannot be changed before a program is selected or when the program is running.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 请选择工位程序，或者确保当前处于停止状态
Select a program or make sure that the robot is stopped.

ErrorCode.Description: 客户端与服务器通讯超时，网络连接断开
Client-server communication timeout, network connection lost.
ErrorCode.Reason: 客户端与服务器通讯超时，网络连接断开
Client-server communication timeout, network connection lost.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 请检查网络环境
Check the network connection.

ErrorCode.Description: 对方服务器已关闭，网络连接断开
Peer server shutdown, network connection lost.
ErrorCode.Reason: 对方服务器已关闭，网络连接断开
Opposite server has closed, network disconnected.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 打开服务器
Open the server.

ErrorCode.Description: 检测J1伺服参数错误(修复错误后需重启生效)
J1 servo parameter error detected (Reboot required after error is fixed).
ErrorCode.Reason: J1一个或多个伺服参数错误
One or more servo parameters of J1 are wrong.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 修改错误的伺服参数值后重启机器人
Reboot the robot after modifying the wrong servo parameter values.

ErrorCode.Description: 检测J2伺服参数错误(修复错误后需重启生效)
J2 servo parameter error detected (Reboot required after error is fixed).
ErrorCode.Reason: J2一个或多个伺服参数错误
One or more servo parameters of J2 are wrong.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 修改错误的伺服参数值后重启机器人
Reboot the robot after modifying the wrong servo parameter values.

ErrorCode.Description: 检测J3伺服参数错误(修复错误后需重启生效)
J3 servo parameter error detected (Reboot required after error is fixed).
ErrorCode.Reason: J3一个或多个伺服参数错误
One or more servo parameters of J3 are wrong.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 修改错误的伺服参数值后重启机器人
Reboot the robot after modifying the wrong servo parameter values.

ErrorCode.Description: 检测J4伺服参数错误(修复错误后需重启生效)
J4 servo parameter error detected (Reboot required after error is fixed).
ErrorCode.Reason: J4一个或多个伺服参数错误
One or more servo parameters of J4 are wrong.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 修改错误的伺服参数值后重启机器人
Reboot the robot after modifying the wrong servo parameter values.

ErrorCode.Description: 检测J5伺服参数错误(修复错误后需重启生效)
J5 servo parameter error detected (Reboot required after error is fixed).
ErrorCode.Reason: J5一个或多个伺服参数错误
One or more servo parameters of J5 are wrong.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 修改错误的伺服参数值后重启机器人
Reboot the robot after modifying the wrong servo parameter values.

ErrorCode.Description: 检测J6伺服参数错误(修复错误后需重启生效)
J6 servo parameter error detected (Reboot required after error is fixed).
ErrorCode.Reason: J6一个或多个伺服参数错误
One or more servo parameters of J6 are wrong.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 修改错误的伺服参数值后重启机器人
Reboot the robot after modifying the wrong servo parameter values.

ErrorCode.Description: 机器人软件版本和伺服版本不匹配
Robot software version and servo version do not match.
ErrorCode.Reason: 机器人软件版本和伺服版本不匹配
Robot software version and servo version do not match
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 升级和机器人软件匹配的伺服版本
Upgrade the servo version to match the robot software.

ErrorCode.Description: MC读M寄存器错误
The MC failed to read the M register.
ErrorCode.Reason: 1、MC未连接上；\n2、对端设备反馈报文格式错误。
1. MC not connected. \N2. The format of the feedback message from the peer device is incorrect.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 1、检查对端PLC设置的协议类型、ip地址和端口号，以及确认机器人端设置的地址和端口号；
1. Check the protocol type, IP address, and port number set by the peer PLC, and confirm the address and port number set by the robot end.

ErrorCode.Description: MC写M寄存器错误
The MC failed to write the M register.
ErrorCode.Reason: 1、MC未连接上；\n2、对端设备反馈报文格式错误。
1. MC not connected. \N2. The format of the feedback message from the peer device is incorrect.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 1、检查对端PLC设置的协议类型、ip地址和端口号，以及确认机器人端设置的地址和端口号；
1. Check the protocol type, IP address, and port number set by the peer PLC, and confirm the address and port number set by the robot end.

ErrorCode.Description: MC读D寄存器错误
The MC failed to read the D register.
ErrorCode.Reason: 1、MC未连接上；\n2、对端设备反馈报文格式错误。
1. MC not connected. \N2. The format of the feedback message from the peer device is incorrect.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 1、检查对端PLC设置的协议类型、ip地址和端口号，以及确认机器人端设置的地址和端口号；
1. Check the protocol type, IP address, and port number set by the peer PLC, and confirm the address and port number set by the robot end.

ErrorCode.Description: MC写D寄存器错误
The MC failed to write the D register.
ErrorCode.Reason: 1、MC未连接上；\n2、对端设备反馈报文格式错误。
1. MC not connected. \N2. The format of the feedback message from the peer device is incorrect.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 1、检查对端PLC设置的协议类型、ip地址和端口号，以及确认机器人端设置的地址和端口号；
1. Check the protocol type, IP address, and port number set by the peer PLC, and confirm the address and port number set by the robot end.

ErrorCode.Description: 伺服加速度参数设置失败
Failed to set servo acceleration parameter.
ErrorCode.Reason: 伺服加速度参数设置失败
Servo acceleration parameter setting failed.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查伺服模块状态
Check the servo module status.

ErrorCode.Description: 恢复系统配置文件失败
Failed to recover system configuration profile.
ErrorCode.Reason: 恢复配置文件失败
Failed to recover system configuration profile.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 重新保存配置文件或重启机器人
Re-save the configuration file or restart the robot.

ErrorCode.Description: 自动模式下或程序运行过程中不允许修改P变量
P variables are not allowed to be modified in play mode or during program execution.
ErrorCode.Reason: 在远程Modbus权限下，自动模式或者程序运行过程中修改P变量
P-variable was modified in play mode or during program execution under the remote Modbus control.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 停止程序，并切到手动模式后再修改P变量
Stop the program and switch to teach mode before modifying the P variable.

ErrorCode.Description: P变量修改失败
Failed to modify P variables.
ErrorCode.Reason: 修改内存中的P变量失败,或者修改文件中的P变量失败
Failed to modify P variable in memory or failed to modify P variable in file.
ErrorCode.Resolvent:
1、尝试再次修改
2、检查修改的GP变量在文件中是否存在
3、更新软件版本
4、联系厂家

1. Try to modify again. 
2. Check that the GP variable to be modified exists in the file. 
3. Update the software version. 
4. Contact the manufacturer.

ErrorCode.Description: 配置的I/O程序不存在
Configured I/O program does not exist.
ErrorCode.Reason: 配置的I/O程序不存在
Configured I/O program does not exist.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查配置的I/O程序文件是否存在
Check that the configured I/O program file exists.

ErrorCode.Description: 对端设备发送的数据长度超限
The length of data sent by the peer device exceeds the limit.
ErrorCode.Reason: socket或串口通讯时，对端发送的数据长度超限
The length of the data sent by the peer device exceeds the limit when communicating via socket or serial port.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 减少对端发送的数据长度
Reduce the length of data sent by the peer.

ErrorCode.Description: Modbus下输入的BRD变量范围超限
The BRD variables entered under Modbus control are out of range.
ErrorCode.Reason: modbus权限下，设置BRD变量范围超限
The BRD variables entered under Modbus control are out of range.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查通过modbus设置BRD值的范围
Check the range of BRD values set via Modbus.

ErrorCode.Description: P变量的计算值不合法
The calculated P value is illegal.
ErrorCode.Reason: 系统内部错误
Internal system error.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 1、尝试重新修改P变量\n2、联系厂家处理
1. Try to modify the P variable again. \n2. Contact the manufacturer.

ErrorCode.Description: P变量输入值不合法
The input P value is illegal.
ErrorCode.Reason: 输入的P变量的臂参数不合法
The arm parameter of the entered P variable is illegal.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查输入的P变量的臂参数
Check the arm parameter of the entered P variable.

ErrorCode.Description: GetCurPoint指令获取当前位置失败
GetCurPoint instruction failed to get current location.
ErrorCode.Reason: GetCurPoint指令获取当前位置失败
GetCurPoint instruction failed to get current location.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 适当减少GetCurPoint指令调用的频率
Reduce the frequency of GetCurPoint instruction calls as appropriate.

ErrorCode.Description: 启动位置偏离运动中断点位置过大
Start position deviates too much from the motion interrupt position.
ErrorCode.Reason: 远程控制权限，自动模式下运动中断，再次启动时，检测当前位置和中断位置差值超过以下阈值：Scara:5° 5° 500° 3°（任一关节角） Six：5° 5° 5° 5° 5° 5°

Under the remote control, the motion was interrupted in play mode. When the motion was restarted, it was detected that the difference between the current position and the interrupt position exceeds the following thresholds: SCARA robot: 5° 5° 500° 3° (any joint angle); 6-axis robot: 5° 5° 5° 5° 5° 5° 5° 5°.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 1、手动挪动机器人到中断点位置\n2、返回起始行再次运行
1. Manually move the robot to the interrupt position. \n2. Return to the start line of the program and run the program again.

ErrorCode.Description: 清除轨迹数据失败
Failed to clear trajectory data.
ErrorCode.Reason: 轨迹数据清空失败；
Failed to clear trajectory data.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 请联系厂家；
Contact the manufacturer.

ErrorCode.Description: 伺服参数写入失败
Failed to write servo parameters.
ErrorCode.Reason: 控制器写伺服参数失败
Failed to write the servo parameters into the controller.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 优化伺服与控制器环境
Optimize the connection between the servo and the controller.

ErrorCode.Description: 直接运动点位不可达
Direct motion point not reachable.
ErrorCode.Reason: 1、直接运动的目标点位超限\n2、直接运动的目标点位是否为奇异点
1. The target point of direct motion exceeds the limit. \n2. The target point of direct motion is a singular point.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 1、检查直接运动的目标点位范围以及是否在奇异点位置
1. Check the range of the target point and whether the target point is a singular point.

ErrorCode.Description: 编码器多圈值已清除，请重启
Encoder multi-turn value has been cleared, please restart
ErrorCode.Reason: 编码器多圈值过多，回零时将其清除完毕，需要重启
The encoder multi-turn value is too large and is cleared when the encoder is zeroed. A reboot is required.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 重启电柜
Restart the controller.

ErrorCode.Description: FPGA-SERVO周期同步错误
Periodic synchronization error between FPGA and servo.
ErrorCode.Reason: 伺服版本不正确，请刷伺服固件
The servo version is incorrect, please update the servo firmware.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 请刷伺服固件
Update the servo firmware.

ErrorCode.Description: 驱动器和编码器（电机）SN码不匹配
SN mismatch between drive and encoder (motor).
ErrorCode.Reason: 1、编码器电压过低\n2、断电期间，未接电池
1. The encoder voltage is too low. \n2. The battery is not connected during power-off.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 1、更换编码器线缆；更换新的电压匹配的电池；\n2、设置“绝对值编码器复位使能”功能码为1清除故障
1. Replace the encoder cable; replace a new battery with matching voltage. \n2. Set the parameter "Absolute encoder reset enable" to 1 to clear the fault.

ErrorCode.Description: 母线电压欠压
Bus undervoltage.
ErrorCode.Reason:
1、主回路电源电压较低
2、运行中电源电压下降
3、电源线不符合规格
4、主回路电源掉电
5、电柜故障

1. The main circuit power supply voltage is low. 
2. The power supply voltage drops during operation. 
3. The power cord does not meet the specifications. 
4. Main circuit powder supply dropout. 
5. Controller fault.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 1、检查电源电压大小及是否稳定，更换或调整电源；\n2、若电源电压正常，检查空气开关处电压，若较低，排查电源线是否符合规格，并更换电源线至控制柜用户手册推荐的线缆；\n3、降低运行速度。

1. Check the voltage and stability of the power supply, replace or regulate the power supply. \n2. If the voltage is normal, check the voltage at the air-break switch. If it is low, check if the power cord meets the specifications and replace it if necessary. \n3. Reduce operating speed.

ErrorCode.Description: 母线电压过压
Bus overvoltage.
ErrorCode.Reason:
1、主回路输入电过高
2、电源处于不稳定状态，或受到了雷击影响
3、电机运行于急加减速状态，最大制动能量超过可吸收值
4、母线电压采样值有较大偏差
5、电柜故障

1. The voltage input to the main circuit is too high. 
2. The power supply is unstable or affected by lightning. 
3. The motor is in abrupt deceleration status and the maximum braking energy exceeds the energy absorption value. 
4. The bus voltage sampling value deviates greatly from the measured value. 
5. Controller fault.
ErrorCode.Resolvent:
1、按照有效值220V-240V，允许偏差-10%~10%(198V~264V)规格，更换或调整电源
2、接入浪涌抑制器后，再接通控制电和主回路电， 若仍然发生故障时，则更换伺服驱动器。
3、首先确保主回路输入电压在规格范围内，其次在允许情况下增大加减速时间。
4、咨询我司技术支持
5、更换电柜

1. Replace or adjust the power supply according to the following specifications: 220V-240V±10% (198V to 264V). 
2. Connect a surge protection device and then switch on the main circuit and control circuit power supplies again. If the fault persists, replace the servo drive. 
3. After confirming the input voltage of the main circuit is within the specified range, increase the acceleration/deceleration time if the operating conditions allow. 
4. Contact the technical support. 
5. Replace the controller.

ErrorCode.Description: 主回路断开
Main circuit open.
ErrorCode.Reason: 市电供电不稳定，出现了电压波动情况
Mains power supply is unstable with voltage fluctuations.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查供电系统是否稳定、电压范围是否存在波动
Check if the power supply system is stable and if there are fluctuations in the voltage range.

ErrorCode.Description: 控制器和驱动电源欠压
Controller and drive power undervoltage.
ErrorCode.Reason: 电柜故障
Controller fault.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 更换电柜
Replace the controller.

ErrorCode.Description: 控制器和驱动电源过压
Controller and drive power overvoltage
ErrorCode.Reason: 电柜故障
Controller fault.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 更换电柜
Replace the controller.

ErrorCode.Description: 抱闸和I/O供电异常
Abnormal brake and I/O power supply.
ErrorCode.Reason: 电柜故障
Controller fault.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 更换电柜
Replace the controller.

ErrorCode.Description: 系统电源检测故障
System power detection error
ErrorCode.Reason: 伺服模块检测到掉电，但控制器模块并未检测到掉电，电源检测模块故障。
A power loss was detected by the servo module, but not by the controller module, and the power detection module is faulty.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查电源稳定性确定稳定后，重新启动系统
Ensure the stability of the power supply and restart the system.

ErrorCode.Description: 当前工况功率超出电柜限制
The power under current operating conditions exceeds the limit of the controller.
ErrorCode.Reason: 电柜功率不足
The controller power is insufficient.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 降低运行速度
Reduce the operating speed.

ErrorCode.Description: 专用动作执行失败
Dedicated action execution failed.
ErrorCode.Reason:
1. The current dedicated action is not activated. 
2. No dedicated actions configured. 
3. Not in the safety zone. 
4. Dedicated I/O setup failed.
ErrorCode.Resolvent:
1. Check whether the dedicated action function is activated. 
2. Check whether dedicated actions are used incorrectly or whether related dedicated actions have been configured. 
3. Check whether the executed action is within the safety zone. 
4. Check whether the I/O related to the action is normal.

ErrorCode.Description: 电源缺相报警
Power phrase loss
ErrorCode.Reason: 请参考伺服使用手册
Please refer to the servo manual.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 请参考伺服使用手册
Please refer to the servo manual.

ErrorCode.Description: 轨迹恢复信息异常
Trajectory recovery information anomaly
ErrorCode.Reason: 内部错误
Internal error.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 请联系厂家（如需恢复运动，请返回起始行，重新执行运动）
Please contact the manufacturer (if you need to resume exercise, please return to the starting line and re execute the exercise).

ErrorCode.Description: 不支持连续后退
Continuous backward is not supported.
ErrorCode.Reason: 预编译行指令不支持连续后退
The instruction at the pre-processing cursor does not support continuous backward.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 请参考用户手册，检查当前预编译行指令是否支持连续后退
Please refer to the user manual to check whether the instruction at the pre-processing cursor supports continuous backward.

ErrorCode.Description: 不支持单步后退
Single-step backward is not supported.
ErrorCode.Reason: 1. The instruction type of the current line or the next line is a non-motion instruction; 2. Trigger single-step backward of a non-primary task order.
Single-step backward is not supported.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 1.检查当前行指令类型和下一行指令类型是否为运动指令;2.主任务才支持单步后退.
1. Check whether the instruction type of the current line and the next line are motion instructions; 2. Only the main task supports single-step backward movement.

ErrorCode.Reason: 1、编码器电压过低\n2、断电期间，未接电池

ErrorCode.Resolvent: 1、更换编码器线缆；更换新的电压匹配的电池；\n2、设置“绝对值编码器复位使能”功能码为1清除故障

ErrorCode.Description: 伺服加速度参数设置失败
Servo acceleration parameter setting failed.
ErrorCode.Reason: 1、伺服SDO通道不畅\n2、伺服出现硬件或软件故障
1. The servo SDO channel is not smooth. \n2. The servo has a hardware or software fault.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 1、尝试再次保存加速度参数\n2、联系厂商更新伺服软件版本
1. Try to save the acceleration parameters again. \n2. Contact the manufacturer to update the servo software.

ErrorCode.Description: 恢复系统配置文件失败
Failed to recover system configuration profile.
ErrorCode.Reason: 文件系统损坏，或系统内部通道损坏
The file system is corrupted, or the internal channel of the system is damaged.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 尝试再次保存加速度参数或重启机器人
Try to save the acceleration parameters again or restart the robot.

ErrorCode.Description: 返回起始行失败报警
Failed to return to the starting line.
ErrorCode.Reason: 返回起始行失败
Failed to return to the starting line.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 确保工程无编译报错，不缺少文件后同步至重试
Ensure that there are no compilation errors or missing files in the project and try again.

ErrorCode.Description: E1外部轴编码器电池电量过低报警
E1 external shaft encoder battery low alarm
ErrorCode.Reason: 外部轴编码器电池电量过低或外部轴未接电池导致
The battery level of the external shaft encoder is too low or the external shaft is not connected to the battery.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 外部轴接上电池重启电控柜和外部轴即可
Connect the battery to the external shaft and restart the controller and external shaft.

ErrorCode.Reason: 外部轴编码器电池电量过低或外部轴未接电池导致

E1 external shaft encoder overtemperature alarm
ErrorCode.Reason: 外部轴编码器温度过高

ErrorCode.Description: 零点校准传感器连接中断
Zero calibration sensor connection interrupted
ErrorCode.Reason: 通讯中断或者不稳定
Communication interruption or instability
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 正确连接传感器，检测连接是否异常
Connect the sensor correctly and check if the connection is abnormal

ErrorCode.Description: 零点校准传感器清零失败
Zero calibration sensor reset failed
ErrorCode.Reason: 通讯中断或者不稳定
Communication interruption or instability
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 正确连接传感器，检测连接是否异常
Check if the sensor is damaged and contact the manufacturer for assistance

ErrorCode.Description: 零点校准串口打开失败
Zero calibration serial port opening failed
ErrorCode.Reason: 系统打开文件失败
System failed to set terminal properties
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 重新校准该轴
Recalibrate the axis

ErrorCode.Description: 零点校准串口参数设置失败
Zero calibration serial port setting failed
ErrorCode.Reason: 系统设置终端属性失败
System failed to set terminal properties
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 重新校准该轴
Recalibrate the axis

ErrorCode.Description: 零点校准串口关闭失败
Zero calibration serial port shutdown failed
ErrorCode.Reason: 系统关闭文件失败
System failed to set terminal properties
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 重新校准该轴
Recalibrate the axis

ErrorCode.Description: 零点校准下发运动段号失败
Zero point calibration failed to issue motion segment number
ErrorCode.Reason: 下发给DSP信息失败
Failed to send information to DSP
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 重新校准该轴
Recalibrate the axis

ErrorCode.Description: 零点校准工件和工具都为夹持状态或都为非夹持状态
Zero calibration workpiece and tool are both in a clamped state or non clamped state
ErrorCode.Reason: 工件和工具都为夹持状态或非夹持状态
The workpiece and tool are both in a clamped or non clamped state
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 设置中避免工件和工具都为夹持状态或都为非夹持状态
Avoid setting both the workpiece and tool to be in a clamped or non clamped state during setup

ErrorCode.Description: 零点校准功能与总线功能冲突
Zero calibration function conflicts with bus function
ErrorCode.Reason: 总线功能开启情况下进行零点校准
Perform zero calibration with the bus function enabled
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 关闭总线功能再进行零点校准
Turn off the bus function and perform zero calibration again

ErrorCode.Description: 零点校准串口与程序中串口冲突
Zero point calibration serial port conflicts with the serial port in the program
ErrorCode.Reason: 程序中使用OpenCom指令打开了串口
The OpenCom instruction was used in the program to open the serial port
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 使用CloseCom指令关闭已经打开的串口
Use the CloseCom instruction to close an open serial port

ErrorCode.Description: 程序中串口与零点校准串口冲突
The serial port in the program conflicts with the zero calibration serial port
ErrorCode.Reason: 零点校准功能打开了串口
The zero calibration function has enabled the serial port
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 退出零点校准功能
Exit zero calibration function

ErrorCode.Description: 零点校准设置软限位失败
Zero point calibration setting joint soft limit failed
ErrorCode.Reason: 机器人处在运动状态，设置软限位失败
The robot is still in motion and the soft limit setting has failed
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 重现校准或手动设置正确的系统关节软限位
Reproduce calibration or manually set the correct system joint soft limit

ErrorCode.Description: 零点校准串口尚未打开
The zero point calibration serial port has not been opened yet
ErrorCode.Reason: 上位机软件误判传感器已连接
The upper computer software misjudges that the sensor has been connected
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 重新打开上位机软件后再进行校准
Re open the upper computer software and perform calibration again

ErrorCode.Description: 机器人当前位置与该运动行的目标点不一致
The robot's actual position deviates from the intended movement target
ErrorCode.Reason: 启动位置校验失败
Start position verification failed
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 切换到手动/自动模式，进行启动位置校验
Switch to manual or automatic mode and perform start position verification

ErrorCode.Description: 启动位置校验不支持该指令
Start position verification does not support this command
ErrorCode.Reason: 该指令无法进行启动位置校验
This command cannot perform start position verification
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 指定其他运动指令为启动行，重新运行
Designate another motion command as the startup command and restart

ErrorCode.Description: 启动位置校验时，查询工艺指令目标点失败
Failed to query the target point of the craft cmd during the start position verification
ErrorCode.Reason: 查询工艺指令目标点失败
Failed to query the target point of the craft cmd
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查工艺指令参数是否正确
Check if the craft cmd parameters are correct

ErrorCode.Description: 目录存在重复创建
Duplicate directory.
ErrorCode.Reason: 将要创建目录此路径下已经存在
The directory to be created already exists.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 更换要创建的目录名
Rename the directory to be created.

ErrorCode.Description: 内存操作错误，不存在前级目录
Memory operation error, parent directory does not exist.
ErrorCode.Reason: 当前创建的目录不存在父目录
The currently created directory has no parent directory.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 更换路径重新创建目录
Recreate the directory in another path.

ErrorCode.Description: 重命名原目录不存在
Renamed directory does not exist.
ErrorCode.Reason: 为不存在的目录重命名
The directory to be renamed does not exist.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 刷新目录，检查目录是否存在
Refresh the directory and check that the directory exists.

ErrorCode.Description: 删除目录不存在
Deleted directory does not exist.
ErrorCode.Reason: 将要删除的目录不存在
The directory to be deleted does not exist.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 刷新目录，检查目录是否存在
Refresh the directory and check that the directory exists.

ErrorCode.Description: 发送目录错误(不是目录或者不存在)
Error sending directory (not a directory or the directory does not exist).
ErrorCode.Reason: 被要求发送给上位机的目录不合法
The directory to be sent to the host is illegal.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 刷新目录，检查目录是否存在
Refresh the directory and check that the directory exists.

ErrorCode.Description: 创建文件，内存出错，路径错误
Memory error and path error in creating file.
ErrorCode.Reason: 创建路径有错
Error creating path
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 刷新文件，检查创建路径
Refresh the file and check the path.

ErrorCode.Description: 重命名原文件不存在
Renamed file does not exist.
ErrorCode.Reason: 为不存在的文件重命名
The file to be renamed does not exist.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 刷新文件，检查文件是否存在
Refresh the file and check that the file exists.

ErrorCode.Description: 删除文件不存在或者是路径不存在
Deleted file does not exist or the path does not exist.
ErrorCode.Reason: 删除文件不存在
The file to be deleted does not exist.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 刷新文件，检查文件是否存在
Refresh the file and check that the file exists.

ErrorCode.Description: 文件的给定路径不存在
The given path to the file does not exist.
ErrorCode.Reason: 给定创建的文件路径不合法
The given file path is illegal.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查创建路径的合法性
Check the path.

ErrorCode.Description: 发送的是非文件
Non-file sent.
ErrorCode.Reason: 发送的文件不是文件
What is to be sent is not a file.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 手持盒端检查要求发送的是否是文件
Check on the handheld teach pendant whether the object to send is a file.

ErrorCode.Description: 发送的是非目录
Non-directory sent.
ErrorCode.Reason: 发送的目录不是目录
What is to be sent is not a directory.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 手持盒端检查要求发送的是否是目录
Check on the handheld teach pendant whether the object to send is a directory.

ErrorCode.Description: 帧顺序错误
Frame sequence error.
ErrorCode.Reason: 大文件发送过程中帧顺序错误
Frame sequence error in the process of sending a large file.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 重新保存或打开文件
Resave or open the file.

ErrorCode.Description: 设备运行异常,主动断开网络连接
The device is not functioning properly and is actively disconnected from the network.
ErrorCode.Reason: 1.不按正常操作关闭手持盒；2.异常的断网
1. The handheld teach pendant is not closed according to normal operations. 2. The network is disconnected abnormally.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 1.非正常操作的错误，请在关闭时候主动断开；2.异常要结合目前已有的错误码检查错误原因
1. For any error due to abnormal operations, please actively disconnect the network cable. 2. For abnormality, check the error causes in conjunction with the existing error codes.

ErrorCode.Description: 设置时间格式错误
Time format setting error.
ErrorCode.Reason: 设置时间格式错误
Time format setting error.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 按照用户手册给出正确的时间格式
Set the time according to correct format.

ErrorCode.Description: 执行系统校时出错
System time correction error.
ErrorCode.Reason: 系统计算时间回路有错
System time calculation circuit error.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查当前网络连接环境
Check the network connection.

ErrorCode.Description: 执行RTC校时出错
RTC time correction error
ErrorCode.Reason: RTC外部电池不存在或者电量不足
RTC external batteries do not exist or are low.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 重新更换电池或者检查当前硬件
Replace batteries or check the current hardware.

ErrorCode.Description: 执行拷贝出错
Copy error
ErrorCode.Reason: 拷贝文件过程操作不当
Misoperation during file copying.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 参考用户手册重新执行拷贝操作
Perform copy operations again by referring to the user manual.

ErrorCode.Description: 执行剪切出错
Cut error
ErrorCode.Reason: 剪切文件过程操作不当
Misoperation during file cutting.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 参考用户手册重新执行剪切操作
Perform cut operations again by referring to the user manual.

ErrorCode.Description: 文件加密失败
File encryption failed.
ErrorCode.Reason: 加密文件时有错误
Error encrypting file.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 再次尝试加密
Try to encrypt the file again.

ErrorCode.Description: 未知通讯码
Unknown communication code
ErrorCode.Reason: 版本不匹配
Version mismatch
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 使用匹配版本的示教器与控制器
Ensure the teach pendant and the controller match in version.

ErrorCode.Description: Eth1网络物理链路断开
Eth1 physical link down.
ErrorCode.Reason: Eth1网络线路不通
Eth1 line not working.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 1.检查网线是否插好或者接触不良；2.硬件失效，联系厂家
1. Check if the network cable is plugged in or not in good contact. 2. Hardware failure, contact the manufacturer.

ErrorCode.Description: Eth2网络物理链路断开
Eth2 physical link down.
ErrorCode.Reason: Eth2网络线路不通
Eth2 line not working.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 1.检查网线是否插好或者接触不良；2.硬件失效，联系厂家
1.Check if the network cable is plugged in or not in good contact. 2.Hardware failure, contact the manufacturer.

ErrorCode.Description: 控制柜风扇1故障
Controller fan 1 error.
ErrorCode.Reason: FAN1风扇堵转
FAN1 blocked.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 1、检查柜体前腔体FAN1风扇是否有异物堵塞导致风扇无法运转；\n 2、风扇本身故障，更换新的风扇；
1. Check if there are foreign objects blocking FAN1 in the front chamber of the cabinet, which prevents the fan from running. \n2. The fan itself is faulty, replace it with a new fan.

ErrorCode.Description: 控制柜风扇2故障
Controller fan 2 error.
ErrorCode.Reason: FAN2风扇堵转
FAN2 blocked
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 1、检查柜体前腔体FAN1风扇是否有异物堵塞导致风扇无法运转；\n 2、风扇本身故障，更换新的风扇；
1. Check if there are foreign objects blocking FAN1 in the front chamber of the cabinet, which prevents the fan from running. \n2. The fan itself is faulty, replace it with a new fan.

ErrorCode.Description: 控制柜柜顶温度过高
The temperature on the top of the controller is too high.
ErrorCode.Reason: ST1环温超过60℃
ST1 ambient temperature exceeds 60℃.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 1、检查前腔体FAN1是否正常运转，风扇罩防尘棉是否有严重堵塞；\n 2、排查前腔体是否有温度异常部件，温控开关环温降到45±5℃会自动复位；\n 3、温控开关故障，更换新的温控开关；

1. Check whether FAN1 in the front chamber operates normally and whether the dust-proof cotton of the fan cover is seriously blocked. \n2. Check whether there are any components with abnormal temperature in the front chamber. The temperature control switch automatically resets when the ambient temperature drops to 45±5℃. \n3. The temperature control switch is faulty, replace it with a new one.

ErrorCode.Description: 变压器温度过高
Transformer overtemperature.
ErrorCode.Reason: 变压器ST2温度超过140℃
The transformer ST2 temperature exceeds 140℃.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 1、检查后腔体FAN2是否正常运转，风扇罩防尘棉是否有严重堵塞；\n2、排查QF2断路器是否故障，变压器二次侧是否有异常大负载，变压器B相线圈降温到105±15℃温控开关会自动复位；\n3、变压器损坏，更换新的变压器；

1. Check whether FAN2 in the rear chamber operates normally and whether the dust-proof cotton of the fan cover is seriously blocked. \n2. Check whether the QF2 circuit breaker is faulty, and whether there is an abnormally large load on the secondary side of the transformer. The temperature control switch automatically resets when the B-phase coil of the transformer cools down to 105±15℃. \n3. The transformer is damaged, replace it with a new one.

ErrorCode.Description: 输出I/O过流故障
Output I/O overcurrent.
ErrorCode.Reason: 输出I/O过流
Output I/O overcurrent
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查硬件线路
Check the hardware line.

ErrorCode.Description: 风扇未安装故障
Fan not installed.
ErrorCode.Reason: 风扇未安装或接触不良
The fan is not installed or has poor contact.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查风扇安装情况
Check the fan installation.

ErrorCode.Description: 柜内温度过高报警
Controller overtemperature alarm
ErrorCode.Reason: 柜内温度过高
The temperature inside the controller is too high.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 降温重启
Cooling and restart.

ErrorCode.Description: 柜内温度过高警告
Controller overtemperature warning
ErrorCode.Reason: 柜内温度过高
The temperature inside the controller is too high.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 降温重启
Cooling and restart.

ErrorCode.Description: 示波器功能线程启动失败
Oscilloscope function thread startup failed.
ErrorCode.Reason: 系统故障
System fault
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 重新上电
Re-power

ErrorCode.Description: 系统检测到市电波动
Mains power fluctuations detected.
ErrorCode.Reason: 市电供电不稳定，出现了电压波动情况
Mains power supply is unstable with voltage fluctuations.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查供电系统是否稳定、电压范围是否存在波动
Check if the power supply system is stable and if there are fluctuations in the voltage range.

ErrorCode.Description: J1抱闸断线
J1 brake offline
ErrorCode.Reason:
1、动力线未接
2、功能码H02-16配置错误
3、抱闸断线
4、抱闸电源异常

1. The Power line is not connected. 
2. Parameter H02-16 is incorrectly configured. 
3. The brake is disconnected. 
4. The power supply of the brake is abnormal.
ErrorCode.Resolvent:
1、断电后，接上动力线再上电
2、非抱闸电机H02-16配置为0
3、更换线缆
4、更换电柜

1. Turn off the power supply, connect the power line and power up again. 
2. For motors without brake function, set H02-16 to 0. 
3. Replace the cable. 
4. Replace the controller.

ErrorCode.Description: J2抱闸断线
J2 brake offline
ErrorCode.Reason:
1、动力线未接
2、功能码H02-16配置错误
3、抱闸断线
4、抱闸电源异常

1. The Power line is not connected. 
2. Parameter H02-16 is incorrectly configured. 
3. The brake is disconnected. 
4. The power supply of the brake is abnormal.
ErrorCode.Resolvent:
1、断电后，接上动力线再上电
2、非抱闸电机H02-16配置为0
3、更换线缆
4、更换电柜

1. Turn off the power supply, connect the power line and power up again. 
2. For motors without brake function, set H02-16 to 0. 
3. Replace the cable. 
4. Replace the controller.

J3 brake offline
ErrorCode.Reason:
1、动力线未接
2、功能码H02-16配置错误
3、抱闸断线
4、抱闸电源异常

1. The Power line is not connected. 
2. Parameter H02-16 is incorrectly configured. 
3. The brake is disconnected. 
4. The power supply of the brake is abnormal.
ErrorCode.Resolvent:
1、断电后，接上动力线再上电
2、非抱闸电机H02-16配置为0
3、更换线缆
4、更换电柜

1. Turn off the power supply, connect the power line and power up again. 
2. For motors without brake function, set H02-16 to 0. 
3. Replace the cable. 
4. Replace the controller.

J4 brake offline
ErrorCode.Reason:
1、动力线未接
2、功能码H02-16配置错误
3、抱闸断线
4、抱闸电源异常

1. The Power line is not connected. 
2. Parameter H02-16 is incorrectly configured. 
3. The brake is disconnected. 
4. The power supply of the brake is abnormal.
ErrorCode.Resolvent:
1、断电后，接上动力线再上电
2、非抱闸电机H02-16配置为0
3、更换线缆
4、更换电柜

1. Turn off the power supply, connect the power line and power up again. 
2. For motors without brake function, set H02-16 to 0. 
3. Replace the cable. 
4. Replace the controller.

J5 brake offline
ErrorCode.Reason:
1、动力线未接
2、功能码H02-16配置错误
3、抱闸断线
4、抱闸电源异常

1. The Power line is not connected. 
2. Parameter H02-16 is incorrectly configured. 
3. The brake is disconnected. 
4. The power supply of the brake is abnormal.
ErrorCode.Resolvent:
1、断电后，接上动力线再上电
2、非抱闸电机H02-16配置为0
3、更换线缆
4、更换电柜

1. Turn off the power supply, connect the power line and power up again. 
2. For motors without brake function, set H02-16 to 0. 
3. Replace the cable. 
4. Replace the controller.
