J6 brake offline
ErrorCode.Reason:
1、动力线未接
2、功能码H02-16配置错误
3、抱闸断线
4、抱闸电源异常

1. The Power line is not connected. 
2. Parameter H02-16 is incorrectly configured. 
3. The brake is disconnected. 
4. The power supply of the brake is abnormal.
ErrorCode.Resolvent:
1、断电后，接上动力线再上电
2、非抱闸电机H02-16配置为0
3、更换线缆
4、更换电柜

1. Turn off the power supply, connect the power line and power up again. 
2. For motors without brake function, set H02-16 to 0. 
3. Replace the cable. 
4. Replace the controller.

ErrorCode.Description: 安全门触发报警
Safety door alarm
ErrorCode.Reason: 安全回路断开，安全门打开
The safety circuit is open and the safety door is open.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 关闭安全门或闭合安全门信号
Close the safety circuit or the safety door.

ErrorCode.Description: 系统掉电未完全，可能导致系统问题，请重新上电系统
System is not fully powered off and may cause system problems, power the system on again.
ErrorCode.Reason: 伺服24V驱动电掉了，导致逆变模块供电异常，报警N相过流，故障不可恢复，只能重新上电

The servo’s 24V drive power is cut off, causing abnormal power supply to the inverter module, resulting in an N-phase overcurrent alarm. The fault cannot be recovered and the system must be powered on again.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 重新上电系统
Re-power the system.

ErrorCode.Description: 程序目录文件路径不存在
Program directory file path does not exist.
ErrorCode.Reason: 程序目录丢失
The program directory is missing.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 请联系厂家
Contact the manufacturer.

ErrorCode.Description: 程序文件路径不存在
Program file path does not exist.
ErrorCode.Reason: 指定的程序文件丢失
The specified program file is missing.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 1、检查程序是否存在\n2、联系厂家
1. Check that the program exists. \n2. Contact the manufacturer.

ErrorCode.Description: 变量值设置无效
Invalid variable setting.
ErrorCode.Reason: 变量设置的变量名或者值描述错误
Incorrect variable name or value.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 1、检查变量名或者标签是否为P、B、R、D、Str，且下标是否合理；\n 2、检查值的类型符合且在范围内：
1. Check if the variable name or label is P, B, R, D, Str, and whether the subscript is reasonable. \n2. Check that the type of the value matches and is within the range.

ErrorCode.Description: 自学习振动抑制功能数据文件丢失
Self-learning vibration suppression data file missing.
ErrorCode.Reason: 开机后，自学习振动抑制功能数据文件被删除了；
The self-learning vibration suppression data file is deleted after the robot is turned on.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 1、重启机器人，自动恢复出厂默认的自学习振动抑制功能数据文件；\n2、从外部导入自学习振动抑制功能数据文件。
1. Restart the robot to automatically restore the self-learning vibration suppression data file. \n2. Import the self-learning vibration suppression data file from outside.

ErrorCode.Description: 打印消息过于频繁，缓冲区已满，可能会丢失打印信息
The print message (from the “Print” instruction) may be lost, because of too many items.
ErrorCode.Reason: 在指令中使用 Print 指令打印信息过于频繁，导致打印信息太多，输出至缓冲区已满
Too many print message.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 降低程序中的 Print 指令打印频率或打印量，避免打印消息丢失
Reduce the frequency of message print.

ErrorCode.Description: 设备正在使用中
The device is busy.
ErrorCode.Reason: 该设备正在被使用
The device is busy.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 关闭可能使用该设备的所有程序或窗口，然后重试
The device is busy, please check and close the program or the window which is used in this device/partition.

ErrorCode.Description: 机器人电控柜风扇堵转
Controller fan rotor locked.
ErrorCode.Reason: 风扇被异物卡住；
The fan is blocked by foreign matter.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 断电后清除风扇内异物或联系售后处理
Turn off the power and remove the foreign matter, or contact the manufacturer.

ErrorCode.Description: 轴数不匹配或者从站数不匹配
The number of axes does not match or the number of slave stations does not match
ErrorCode.Reason: 轴数不匹配或者从站数不匹配
The number of axes does not match or the number of slave stations does not match
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查配置轴数(从站)数量
Check the number of configured axes (slaves)

ErrorCode.Description: 软浮动功能已开启，不允许开启自学习振动抑制功能
The soft float function has been enabled. The self-learning vibration suppression function cannot be enabled.
ErrorCode.Reason: 软浮动功能与自学习振动抑制功能互斥
The soft float function and self-learning vibration suppression function are mutually exclusive.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 关闭软浮动功能后再开启自学习振动抑制功能
Disable the soft float function and enable the self-learning vibration suppression function.

ErrorCode.Description: Ecat从站模块状态有误
The state of the Ecat-Slave is error
ErrorCode.Reason: Ecat从站模块掉线或模块内部异常
Ecat slave module disconnected or module internal exception
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查Ecat通信线是否正常，且尝试清除报警
Check if the Ecat communication line is normal and try to clear the alarm

ErrorCode.Description: Ecat总线从站激活数量或类型和扫描数量或类型不匹配
Ecat bus slave activation count or type and scan count or type do not match
ErrorCode.Reason: Ecat总线从站激活数量或类型和扫描数量或类型不匹配
Ecat bus slave activation count and scan count do not match
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查Ecat从站数量
Check the total number of Ecat Slaves

ErrorCode.Description: Ecat总线从站别名异常
Ecat bus slave alias exception
ErrorCode.Reason: Ecat总线从站别名异常
Ecat bus slave alias exception
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查从站别名是否正确，可尝试重新开启从站管理功能解决问题
Check whether the slave alias is correct and try to restart the slave management function to solve the problem

ErrorCode.Description: 自学习振动抑制配置文件不存在
The self-learning vibration suppression profile does not exist.
ErrorCode.Reason: 开机后，自学习振动抑制配置文件被误删除
The self-learning vibration suppression profile is deleted by mistake after the robot is turned on.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 1、重启机器人，自动恢复出厂默认的自学习振动抑制功能数据文件；\n2、从外部导入自学习振动抑制功能数据文件。
1. Restart the robot to automatically restore the data file for self-learning vibration suppression function. \n2. Import the data file for self-learning vibration suppression function from outside.

ErrorCode.Description: 清除所有自学习振动抑制配置文件失败
Failed to clear all self-learning vibration suppression data.
ErrorCode.Reason: 1、机器人系统繁忙\n2、文件系统被破坏
1. The robot system is busy. \n2. The file system is corrupted.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 1、尝试再次清除\n2、联系厂家处理
1. Try clearing again. \n2. Contact the manufacturer.

ErrorCode.Description: 清除当前自学习振动抑制配置文件失败
Failed to clear self-learning vibration suppression data file for current position.
ErrorCode.Reason: 1、机器人系统繁忙\n2、文件系统被破坏
1. The robot system is busy. \n2. The file system is corrupted.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 1、尝试再次清除\n2、联系厂家处理
1. Try clearing again. \n2. Contact the manufacturer.

ErrorCode.Description: 自学习振动抑制功能数据文件损坏
Self-learning vibration suppression data file corrupted.
ErrorCode.Reason: 可能原因：机器人名称、文件版本、文件类型、校验码不匹配
Possible cause: Mismatch in robot name, file version, file type, and verification code.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 在上位机界面点击恢复默认参数，并重启机器人
Restore default parameters on the host controller and restart the robot.

ErrorCode.Description: 创建自学习振动抑制数据文件失败
Failed to create self-learning vibration suppression data file
ErrorCode.Reason: 文件系统异常或其他系统异常
File system exception or other system exception.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 联系厂家处理
Contact the manufacturer.

ErrorCode.Description: 导入自学习振动抑制数据文件失败
Failed to import self-learning vibration suppression data file
ErrorCode.Reason: 1、导入的文件内容不合法\n2、通道繁忙导致设置给DSP参数时失败
1. The contents of the imported file are illegal. \n2. Channels are busy, causing failure in setting DSP parameters.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 1、重新导入一个合法的文件\n2、尝试重启机器人
1. Re-import a legal file. \n2. Try to restart the robot.

ErrorCode.Description: 自学习振动抑制数据文件版本不匹配
Self-learning vibration suppression data file version mismatch.
ErrorCode.Reason: 自学习振动抑制数据文件版本不是最新版本
The elf-learning vibration suppression data file is not the latest version.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 使用PC平台进行文件升级后重新加载
Update the data file on PC and reload the file.

ErrorCode.Description: 编码器电池电压过低
Encoder battery voltage too low.
ErrorCode.Reason: 编码器电池电量即将耗尽
Encoder battery is about to deplete.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 请更换编码器电池，并在机器人维护保养界面，点击“更换电池”按钮，并进行相关操作
Replace the encoder battery and perform corresponding operations in the robot maintenance interface.

ErrorCode.Description: 丝杆油脂不足
Insufficient grease on the lead screw.
ErrorCode.Reason: 丝杆油脂不足
Insufficient grease on the lead screw.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 请给丝杆加注油脂，并在设置机器人维护保养界面，点击“加注油脂”按钮，并进行相关操作
Refill the grease and perform corresponding operations in the robot maintenance interface.

ErrorCode.Description: 控制器系统时间有误,如需开启维保提醒功能，需正确设置控制器时间并重启控制器
The controller system time is wrong. To enable the maintenance reminder function, you need to set the controller time correctly and restart the controller.
ErrorCode.Reason: 控制器系统时间有误,如需开启维保提醒功能，需正确设置控制器时间并重启控制器
The controller system time is wrong. To enable the maintenance reminder function, you need to set the controller time correctly and restart the controller.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 控制器系统时间有误,如需开启维保提醒功能，需正确设置控制器时间并重启控制器
The controller system time is wrong. To enable the maintenance reminder function, you need to set the controller time correctly and restart the controller.

ErrorCode.Description: 丝杆损耗比即将达到阈值上限
Screw depletion is about to fail
ErrorCode.Reason: 丝杆损耗比即将达到阈值上限
Screw depletion is about to fail
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 更换丝杆
Replacement screw

ErrorCode.Description: 丝杆润滑油脂即将失效
Screw grease is about to fail
ErrorCode.Reason: 丝杆润滑油脂即将失效
Screw grease is about to fail
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 为丝杆注油
Oil the lead screw

ErrorCode.Description: 同步带剩余使用时间即将为0
The synchronization tape is about to expire
ErrorCode.Reason: 同步带剩余使用时间即将为0
The synchronization tape is about to expire
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 更换同步带
Replace the synchronization belt

ErrorCode.Description: 减速机润滑油脂即将失效
Reducer grease is about to fail
ErrorCode.Reason: 减速机润滑油脂即将失效
Reducer grease is about to fail
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 为减速机注油
Oil the reducer

ErrorCode.Description: 减速机损耗比即将达到上限
Reducer loss ratio is about to reach its upper limit
ErrorCode.Reason: 减速机损耗比即将达到上限
Reducer loss ratio is about to reach its upper limit
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 更换减速机
Change reducer

ErrorCode.Description: 预维保功能禁止加载不同机型的维保配置文件，若需更换机型，请清空维保数据
The pre-maintenance function does not allow you to load the maintenance configuration file of different models. If the model has been replaced, clear the maintenance data
ErrorCode.Reason: 加载了不同机型的维保配置文件
The maintenance configuration files for different models are loaded
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 进行维保数据清空
Clear maintenance data

ErrorCode.Description: 编码器电池剩余使用时间即将为0
Encoder battery is running low
ErrorCode.Reason: 编码器电池剩余使用时间即将为0
Encoder battery is running low
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 更换编码器电池
Replace encoder battery

ErrorCode.Description: 机械单元配置失败
Failed to configure mechanical unit.
ErrorCode.Reason: 机械单元配置错误
Mechanical unit configuration error.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 根据诊断提示信息重新配置机械单元
Reconfigure the mechanical unit based on diagnostic prompts.

ErrorCode.Description: 机械单元（外部轴）伺服类型不匹配或伺服校验失败
Mechanical unit (external axis) servo type mismatch or servo verification failure
ErrorCode.Reason: 机械单元伺服类型设置与配置类型不匹配，外部轴ecat未连接或者外部轴电子齿轮比等参数不合法
The mechanical unit servo type setting does not match the configuration type，External axis ecat not connected or external axis electronic gear ratio and other parameters are illegal
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 1）确保伺服类型配置正确；2）确保上电时ecat线缆连接正常；3）确保外部轴电子齿轮比设置正确；
1) Ensure that the servo type configuration is correct;2) Ensure that the ecat cable is connected properly when powered on;3) Ensure that the external axis electronic gear ratio is set correctly;

ErrorCode.Description: 选择的机械单元不存在
The selected mechanical unit does not exist.
ErrorCode.Reason: 选择的机械单元在配置中不存在
The selected mechanical unit does not exist.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查输入的机械单元信息是否有误
Check that the input mechanical unit information is correct.

ErrorCode.Description: 机械单元传入参数错误
Incorrect parameter passed to the mechanical unit.
ErrorCode.Reason: 机械单元传入参数错误
Incorrect parameter passed to the mechanical unit.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 联系厂家
Contact the manufacturer.

ErrorCode.Description: 机械单元传入可移动导轨序号错误
Incorrect serial number of the movable guide rail passed to the mechanical unit.
ErrorCode.Reason: 机械单元传入可移动导轨序号错误
Incorrect serial number of the movable guide rail passed to the mechanical unit.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 确保机器人放置到正确的导轨上或联系厂家
Ensure that the robot is placed on the correct guide rail or contact the manufacturer.

ErrorCode.Description: 机械单元传入轴逻辑错误
Incorrect axis logic passed to the mechanical unit.
ErrorCode.Reason: 机械单元的轴逻辑错误
Axis logic error in the mechanical unit.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 请输入正确的机械单元轴逻辑
Enter the correct mechanical unit axis logic.

ErrorCode.Description: 机械单元传入机械单元类型和传动方式不匹配
Mismatch in type and transmission mode passed to the mechanical unit.
ErrorCode.Reason: 机械单元传入机械单元类型和传动方式不匹配
Mismatch in type and transmission mode passed to the mechanical unit.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查机械单元的类型与传动方式是否匹配
Check whether the type of mechanical unit matches the transmission mode.

ErrorCode.Description: 机械单元传入参数时轴处于运动状态
The axis is in motion when the mechanical unit is fed with parameters.
ErrorCode.Reason: 保存外部轴参数时，检测到附加轴处于运动状态
When saving the external axis parameters, it is detected that the additional axis is in motion.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 请确保附加的轴处于静止时再保存机械单元
Make sure that the additional axis is at rest before saving the mechanical unit.

ErrorCode.Description: 机械单元轴属性错误
Mechanical unit axis attribute error.
ErrorCode.Reason: 机械单元轴属性参数错误
Mechanical unit axis attribute parameter error.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 联系厂家
Contact the manufacturer.

ErrorCode.Description: 编码器位置数据高低位组合校验失败
The high and low position combination verification of the encoder position data failed.
ErrorCode.Reason: 编码器位置数据存在跳变
There is a jump in the encoder position data.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 联系厂家
Contact the manufacturer.

ErrorCode.Description: 激活的工具和工件参数不匹配
The active tool and workobject parameters do not match.
ErrorCode.Reason: 激活的工具和工件的RobHold相同
The active too and the workobject have the same RobHold parameter.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 1、切换RobHold参数匹配的激活工具、工件号\n2、修改工具、工件的RobHold参数为不同的值
1. Switch the active tool and workobject matching the RobHold parameter. \2. Modify the RobHold parameter of the active tool and workobject to be different.

ErrorCode.Description: 工件参数不匹配
The wobj parameters do not match.
ErrorCode.Reason: 工件参数不匹配，RobHold 为 true，UFFix为False
RobHold is True, while UFFix is False.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: RobHold 为 true，UFFix为False，此种配置不合法，修改为其他合法配置
Modify the configuration.

ErrorCode.Description: 工具号切换失败
The tool number fails to be switched
ErrorCode.Reason: 当系统切换工具时，非tool0的工具负载为0
When the system switches tools, the tool load for non-tool0 is 0
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 设置待切换工具号的负载质量，再切换工具号
Set the load quality of the tool number to be switched, and then switch the tool number

ErrorCode.Description: 负载号切换失败
The load number fails to be switched
ErrorCode.Reason: 当系统切换夹持负载时，非load0的夹持负载为0
When the system switches load, the load for non-load0 is 0
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 设置待切换负载号的负载质量，再切换负载号
Set the load quality of the load number to be switched, and then switch the load number

ErrorCode.Description: 机器人安装形态已切换，需重启生效
The installation mode of the robot has been switched and requires restart to take effect
ErrorCode.Reason: 机器人安装形态已切换，需重启生效
The installation mode of the robot has been switched and requires restart to take effect
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 重启控制器
Restart the controller

ErrorCode.Description: FPGA版本较低，请重新升级
FPGA version is lower, please upgrade again
ErrorCode.Reason: FPGA版本较低，请重新升级
FPGA version is lower, please upgrade again
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 升级到正确的FPGA版本
Upgrade to the correct FPGA version

ErrorCode.Description: 软浮动功能关闭异常
Soft floating function disabled abnormally
ErrorCode.Reason: 软浮动功能关闭异常
Soft floating function disabled abnormally
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 重新关闭软浮动
Close soft float again

ErrorCode.Description: 外部轴E1电子齿轮比校验出错
External axis E1 electronic gear ratio verification failed.
ErrorCode.Reason: 外部轴E1电子齿轮比校验失败
External axis E1 electronic gear ratio verification failed.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 正确设置机械单元伺服参数，检查电子齿轮比等参数是否合法
Correctly set the servo parameters of the mechanical unit and check whether the electronic gear ratio and other parameters are legal.

ErrorCode.Description: 外部轴E2电子齿轮比校验出错
External axis E2 electronic gear ratio verification failed.
ErrorCode.Reason: 外部轴E2电子齿轮比校验失败
External axis E2 electronic gear ratio verification failed.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 正确设置机械单元伺服参数，检查电子齿轮比等参数是否合法
Correctly set the servo parameters of the mechanical unit and check whether the electronic gear ratio and other parameters are legal.

ErrorCode.Description: 外部轴E3电子齿轮比校验出错
External axis E3 electronic gear ratio verification failed.
ErrorCode.Reason: 外部轴E3电子齿轮比校验失败
External axis E3 electronic gear ratio verification failed.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 正确设置机械单元伺服参数，检查电子齿轮比等参数是否合法
Correctly set the servo parameters of the mechanical unit and check whether the electronic gear ratio and other parameters are legal.

ErrorCode.Description: 工件关联的机械单元不存在
The machine unit associated with the workobject does not exist.
ErrorCode.Reason: 工件关联的机械单元不存在
The machine unit associated with the workobject does not exist.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 取消现有关联或重新关联已配置的机械单元
Cancel existing association or re-associate configured mechanical unit.

ErrorCode.Description: 设置伺服回零方式失败
Failed to set homing method of servo.
ErrorCode.Reason: 设置伺服回零方式时伺服反馈异常
Servo feedback error when setting the servo homing method.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 确认伺服存在并状态正常及联系厂家处理
Check that the servo exists and is in normal condition, or contact the manufacturer.

ErrorCode.Description: 系统中存在独立轴，不支持轴示教
Axis teaching is not allowed because of the presence of independent axes in the system.
ErrorCode.Reason: 系统中存在独立轴，不支持轴示教
Axis teaching is not allowed because of the presence of independent axes in the system.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 如需示教请将所有轴复位为正常轴再进行操作
If teaching is required, reset all axes to normal axes before operation.

ErrorCode.Description: 请将所有轴切为正常轴后，再使用自学习振动抑制
Set all axes to normal axes before using self-learning vibration suppression.
ErrorCode.Reason: 不支持独立轴使用自学习振动抑制
The independent axis is not supported to use self-learning vibration suppression.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 请将所有轴切为正常轴后，再使用自学习振动抑制
Reset all axes to normal axes before using self-learning vibration suppression.

ErrorCode.Description: 机器人轴运动中，启动无效
When the robot axis is moving, the start is invalid.
ErrorCode.Reason: 机器人轴运动中，启动无效
When the robot axis is moving, the start is invalid.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 机器人轴运动中，启动无效，请重新启动
When the robot axis is moving, the start is invalid, please restart.

ErrorCode.Description: 机械单元配置完毕，需重启生效
Mechanical unit needs to be restarted to take effect after configuration.
ErrorCode.Reason: 机械单元配置完毕，需重启生效
Mechanical unit needs to be restarted to take effect after configuration.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 机械单元配置完毕，需重启生效
Mechanical unit needs to be restarted to take effect after configuration.

ErrorCode.Description: 读取伺服机械绝对位置失败
Failure to read mechanical absolute position of servo.
ErrorCode.Reason: 读取伺服机械绝对位置失败
Failure to read mechanical absolute position of servo.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 优化伺服与控制器连接环境
Optimize the connection between servo and controller.

ErrorCode.Description: 总线I/O映射配置文件校验失败
Bus I/O mapping profile verification failed.
ErrorCode.Reason: 总线I/O映射配置文件内容校验失败
Bus I/O mapping profile verification failed.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 重新进行I/O映射配置
Reconfigure the I/O mapping.

ErrorCode.Description: 总线I/O映射配置文件版本不匹配
Bus I/O mapping profile version mismatch.
ErrorCode.Reason: 总线I/O映射配置文件版本不匹配
Bus I/O mapping profile version mismatch.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 重新进行I/O映射配置
Reconfigure the I/O mapping.

ErrorCode.Description: 机械单元配置文件校验失败
Machine unit configuration file verification failed.
ErrorCode.Reason: 机械单元配置文件内容校验失败
Machine unit configuration file verification failed.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 重新进行机械单元配置
Reconfigure the mechanical unit.

ErrorCode.Description: 机械单元配置文件文件版本不匹配
Machine unit configuration file version mismatch.
ErrorCode.Reason: 机械单元配置文件版本不匹配
Machine unit configuration file version mismatch.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 重新进行机械单元配置
Reconfigure the mechanical unit.

ErrorCode.Description: 外部轴功能不支持使用20位的编码器的电机
The external axis function does not support motors using 20-bit encoders.
ErrorCode.Reason: 外部轴功能不支持使用20位的编码器的电机
The external axis function does not support motors using 20-bit encoders.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 外部轴功能不支持使用20位的编码器的电机理
The external axis function does not support motors using 20-bit encoders.

ErrorCode.Description: 获取直线电机极距失败
Failed to obtain the pole distance of the linear motor
ErrorCode.Reason: 获取直线电机极距失败
Failed to obtain the pole distance of the linear motor
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查从站是都正确配置或接线
Check that the slave stations are correctly configured or wired

ErrorCode.Description: 独立轴不支持零点校准功能
Independent axis does not support zero calibration function
ErrorCode.Reason: 当前校准轴为独立轴
The current calibration axis is an independent axis
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 将当前校准轴设置为非独立轴后再进行校准
Set the current calibration axis to a non-independent axis before calibration

ErrorCode.Description: 控制器CPU温度超过报警温度
Controller CPU temperature exceeds alarm threshold.
ErrorCode.Reason: 控制器CPU温度超过报警温度
Controller CPU temperature exceeds alarm threshold.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 减少控制器任务或停机一段时间
Decrease controller tasks or take a break for some time

ErrorCode.Description: 控制器CPU温度超过预警温度
Controller CPU temperature exceeds warning threshold.
ErrorCode.Reason: 控制器CPU温度超过预警温度
Controller CPU temperature exceeds warning threshold.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 减少控制器任务或停机一段时间
Decrease controller tasks or take a break for some time

ErrorCode.Description: 柜内纽扣电池电压过低，请及时更换电池
The voltage of the button battery inside the cabinet is too low. Please replace the battery in time.
ErrorCode.Reason: 柜内纽扣电池电压过低
The voltage of the button battery inside the cabinet is too low.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 更换纽扣电池
Replace the button battery.

ErrorCode.Description: 柜内核心板温度超过70摄氏度
The temperature of the core board inside the cabinet is too high.
ErrorCode.Reason: 柜内核心板温度超过阀值70
The temperature of the core board inside the cabinet exceeds the threshold of 70.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 1. 检查柜内扰流风扇是否损耗;2. 检查散热块安装是否到位
1. Check if the spoiler fan inside the cabinet is worn out;2. Check if the heat sink is installed properly.

ErrorCode.Description: 柜内核心板温度超过75摄氏度
The temperature of the core board inside the cabinet is too high.
ErrorCode.Reason: 柜内核心板温度超过阀值75
The temperature of the core board inside the cabinet exceeds the threshold of 75.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 1. 检查柜内扰流风扇是否损耗;2. 检查散热块安装是否到位.
1. Check if the spoiler fan inside the cabinet is worn out;2. Check if the heat sink is installed properly.

ErrorCode.Description: 网络物理链路断开
Network physical link disconnected.
ErrorCode.Reason: 网络线路不通
Network line is not connected.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 1. 检查网线是否插好或者接触不良；2. 硬件失效，联系厂家.
1. Check if the network cable is properly plugged in or has poor contact; 2. The hardware has failed, contact the manufacturer.

ErrorCode.Description: 超级电容板电压异常
Abnormal voltage of supercapacitor board.
ErrorCode.Reason: 超级电容的储能电压值低于设定值
The energy storage voltage value of the supercapacitor is lower than the set value.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 请检查接线，更换超级电容模块
Please check the wiring and replace the supercapacitor module.

ErrorCode.Description: 超级电容寿命即将超过使用年限
The lifespan of supercapacitors is about to exceed their service life.
ErrorCode.Reason: 超级电容寿命即将超过使用年限
The lifespan of supercapacitors is about to exceed their service life.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 请尽快更换超级电容模块
Please replace the supercapacitor module as soon as possible.

ErrorCode.Description: 超级电容寿命达到使用年限
The lifespan of supercapacitors has reached the end of their service life.
ErrorCode.Reason: 超级电容寿命达到使用年限
The lifespan of supercapacitors has reached the end of their service life.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 请立即更换超级电容模块
Please replace the supercapacitor module immediately.

ErrorCode.Description: 柜内扰流风扇寿命超限，请及时更换
The lifespan of the internal cabinet spoiler fan has exceeded the limit, please replace it in a timely manner.
ErrorCode.Reason: 柜内扰流风扇寿命超过72000h
The service life of the internal spoiler fan exceeds 72,000 hours.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 更换扰流风扇
Replace the spoiler fan.

ErrorCode.Description: 独立风道内风扇寿命超限，请及时更换
The fan in the independent air duct has exceeded its service life, please replace it in time.
ErrorCode.Reason: 独立风道内风扇寿命超过72000h
The lifespan of the fan in the independent air duct exceeds 72,000 hours.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 更换独立风道风扇
Replace the independent air duct fan.

ErrorCode.Description: 内部交换的数据长度无效
Invalid length of data exchanged internally.
ErrorCode.Reason: 向DSP请求数据时， DSP未按要求返回有效数据
When requested to provide data, the DSP does not return valid data as required.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查dsp软件版本或更换硬件
Check the DSP software version or replace the hardware.

ErrorCode.Description: 内部交换的数据校验错误
Verification error for data exchanged internally.
ErrorCode.Reason: 向DSP请求数据时， DSP未按要求返回有效数据或返回数据有误码
When requested to provide data, the DSP does not return valid data as required.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查dsp软件版本或更换硬件
Check the DSP software version or replace the hardware.

ErrorCode.Description: 写入块数据出错
Error writing block data.
ErrorCode.Reason: GPMC通道异常
The GPMC channel is abnormal.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查dsp软件版本或更换硬件
Check the DSP software version or replace the hardware.

ErrorCode.Description: 读取块数据出错
Error reading block data.
ErrorCode.Reason: GPMC通道异常
The GPMC channel is abnormal.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查dsp软件版本或更换硬件
Check the DSP software version or replace the hardware.

ErrorCode.Description: 系统内部块数据缓冲区满
Block data buffer full.
ErrorCode.Reason: FPGA缓冲区已满，不能接受新数据
The FPGA buffer is full and cannot accept new data.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 延时一段时间后再次尝试写入数据
Retry to write data after delay for a period of time.

ErrorCode.Description: 内部通道打开错误：异常或被占用
Channel opening error: The channel is abnormal or has been occupied.
ErrorCode.Reason: GPMC通道异常或已经被占用
The GPMC channel is abnormal or has been occupied.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 重启控制器
Restart the controller.

ErrorCode.Description: 内部通道打开错误：异常或被关闭
Channel opening error: The channel is abnormal or has been occupied.
ErrorCode.Reason: GPMC通道异常或已经被关闭
The GPMC channel is abnormal or has been closed.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 重启控制器
Restart the controller.

ErrorCode.Description: 系统内部繁忙
System busy
ErrorCode.Reason: DSP对机器人指令不做回应
The DSP does not respond to robot instructions.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 1.过一段时间后重试2.重启机器人3.检查DSP状态是否被暂停或终止运行4.将长轨迹运动进行分段运行
1. Retry after a while. 2. Restart the robot. 3. Check if the DSP has been suspended or terminated. 4. Divide long trajectory motion into multiple segments.

ErrorCode.Description: 系统内部试图获取通道资源错误
Channel resource getting error.
ErrorCode.Reason: CPMC通道被频繁占用，当前不能申请使用CPMC资源
The CPMC channel is frequently occupied so that currently the system cannot apply for use of CPMC resources.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 延时一段时间后再次尝试使用
Retry to use them after delay for a period of time.

ErrorCode.Description: 等待运动模块应答超时
Timeout waiting for motion module response.
ErrorCode.Reason: DSP对机器人指令应答时间超过设置最大等待时间
The response time to robot instructions from the DSP exceeds the set maximum waiting time.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 1.过一段时间后重试2.重启机器人3.检查DSP状态是否被暂停或终止运行
1. Retry after a while. 2. Restart the robot. 3. Check if the DSP has been suspended or terminated.

ErrorCode.Description: 系统运动模块未能有效执行指令
Motion module failed to execute the command sent by ARM.
ErrorCode.Reason: DSP对机器人指令执行不成功
The DSP failed to execute the robot instructions.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查当前操作是否合法或检查dsp软件版本
Check if the current operation is legal or check the DSP software version.

ErrorCode.Description: 设置给运动模块的参数非法
Illegal parameters set for motion module.
ErrorCode.Reason: 机器人设置给DSP的参数不正确，如超出参数范围
Parameters set by the robot for the DSP are incorrect, e.g. out of the parameter range.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查函数调用接口的参数，确保参数无误
Check that function call interface parameters are correct.

ErrorCode.Description: 设置给运动模块的命令非法
Illegal parameters set for motion module.
ErrorCode.Reason: 机器人向DSP请求的命令无效
Commands requested by the robot to the DSP are invalid.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查命令字，确保DSP中有对该命令的处理
Check the command word and ensure that there is processing on this command in the DSP.

ErrorCode.Description: 系统配置的轴数和在线扫描的轴数不一致
The number of axes configured for the system is inconsistent with the number of online scanned axes.
ErrorCode.Reason: 机型不匹配或者伺服有掉线
The model is not matched or servo is disconnected.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查机型及伺服连线，确保当前使用机器人和配置的机器人一致
Check the model and servo connection to ensure that the current robot is consistent with the configured robot.

ErrorCode.Description: 设置的轴数据和再次从运动模块获取的轴数据不一致
The axis data sent is inconsistent with the data read.
ErrorCode.Reason: 数据校验出错
Data check error.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查软件版本或联系厂商
Check the software version or contact the manufacturer.

ErrorCode.Description: 设置的I/O数据和再次从运动模块获取的轴数据不一致
The I/O data sent is inconsistent with the data read.
ErrorCode.Reason: 数据校验出错
Data check error.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查软件版本或联系厂商
Check the software version or contact the manufacturer.

ErrorCode.Description: EtherCAT指令控制伺服进入Homing模式时出错
Error in servo entering homing mode via EtherCAT instructions.
ErrorCode.Reason: 伺服无法进入Homing模式
The servo cannot enter the homing mode.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查软件版本或联系厂商
Check the software version or contact the manufacturer.

ErrorCode.Description: EtherCAT指令控制伺服退出Homing模式时出错
Error in servo exiting homing mode via EtherCAT instructions.
ErrorCode.Reason: 伺服无法退出Homing模式
The servo cannot exit the homing mode.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查软件版本或联系厂商
Check the software version or contact the manufacturer.

ErrorCode.Description: EtherCAT指令在设置伺服Homing参数时出错
Error in setting homing parameters for the servo via EtherCAT instructions.
ErrorCode.Reason: 所设置Homing参数伺服不接受
The set homing parameters are not accepted by servo.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查软件版本或联系厂商
Check the software version or contact the manufacturer.

ErrorCode.Description: 系统设置参数校验错误
System parameter check error.
ErrorCode.Reason: 数据校验出错
Data check error
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查软件版本或联系厂商
Check the software version or contact the manufacturer.

ErrorCode.Description: 打开数据通道错误
Error opening data channel.
ErrorCode.Reason: GPMC通道号不正确
The GPMC channel number is incorrect.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 默认通道为0，确保通道号正确
The default channel is 0. Ensure that the channel number is correct.

ErrorCode.Description: 数据通道映射错误
Data channel mapping error.
ErrorCode.Reason: GPMC数据通道无法映射至内存
The GPMC data channel cannot map data to the memory.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查软件版本或联系厂商
Check the software version or contact the manufacturer.

ErrorCode.Description: 数据通道映射错误
Data channel mapping error.
ErrorCode.Reason: GPMC通道异常
The GPMC channel is abnormal.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查软件版本或联系厂商
Check the software version or contact the manufacturer.

ErrorCode.Description: 数据通道映射错误
Data channel mapping error.
ErrorCode.Reason: GPMC通道异常
The GPMC channel is abnormal.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查软件版本或联系厂商
Check the software version or contact the manufacturer.

ErrorCode.Description: 设备错误
Device error.
ErrorCode.Reason: GPMC通道异常
The GPMC channel is abnormal.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查软件版本或联系厂商
Check the software version or contact the manufacturer.

ErrorCode.Description: 数据通道打开错误
Error opening data channel.
ErrorCode.Reason: GPMC通道异常
The GPMC channel is abnormal.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查软件版本或联系厂商
Check the software version or contact the manufacturer.

ErrorCode.Description: 数据通信不一致
Data communication discrepancy.
ErrorCode.Reason: GPMC通道异常
The GPMC channel is abnormal.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查软件版本或联系厂商
Check the software version or contact the manufacturer.

ErrorCode.Description: 数据通信不一致
Data communication discrepancy.
ErrorCode.Reason: GPMC通道异常
The GPMC channel is abnormal.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查软件版本或联系厂商
Check the software version or contact the manufacturer.

ErrorCode.Description: 系统申请内存出错
Error system requesting memory.
ErrorCode.Reason: 系统无法分配所要求内存
The system cannot assign requested memory.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 查看系统内存是否接近消耗极限或申请内存是否过大
Check whether the system memory is close to the limit or whether the requested memory is too large.

ErrorCode.Description: IR-LINK总线上配置I/O数据偏置信息出错
Error configuring I/O data bias information on the IR-LINK bus.
ErrorCode.Reason: 数据校验出错
Data check error
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查软件版本或联系厂商
Check the software version or contact the manufacturer.

ErrorCode.Description: IR-LINK总线上配置AD数据偏置信息出错
Error configuring AD data bias information on the IR-LINK bus.
ErrorCode.Reason: 数据校验出错
Data check error
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查软件版本或联系厂商
Check the software version or contact the manufacturer.

ErrorCode.Description: IR-LINK总线上配置DA数据偏置信息出错
Error configuring DA data bias information on the IR-LINK bus
ErrorCode.Reason: 数据校验出错
Data check error
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查软件版本或联系厂商
Check the software version or contact the manufacturer.

ErrorCode.Description: IR-LINK总线上配置Encoder数据偏置信息出错
Error configuring encoder data bias information on the IR-LINK bus
ErrorCode.Reason: 数据校验出错
Data check error
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查软件版本或联系厂商
Check the software version or contact the manufacturer.

ErrorCode.Description: IR-LINK总线上配置AD参数（量程）出错
Error configuring AD parameter (range) on IR-LINK bus.
ErrorCode.Reason: 数据校验出错
Data check error
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查软件版本或联系厂商
Check the software version or contact the manufacturer.

ErrorCode.Description: IR-LINK总线上配置DA参数（量程）出错
Error configuring DA parameter (range) on IR-LINK bus
ErrorCode.Reason: 数据校验出错
Data check error
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查软件版本或联系厂商
Check the software version or contact the manufacturer.

ErrorCode.Description: IR-LINK总线上设置模块数码出错
Error configuring module number on IR-LINK bus.
ErrorCode.Reason: 数据校验出错
Data check error
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查软件版本或联系厂商
Check the software version or contact the manufacturer.

ErrorCode.Description: 将控制器规划位置与编码器反馈位置进行同步时出错
Error synchronizing controller planning position with encoder feedback position.
ErrorCode.Reason: 当前轴不存在或者GPMC通道异常或DSP固件异常
The current axis does not exist or the GPMC channel or DSP firmware is abnormal
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查软件版本或联系厂商
Check the software version or contact the manufacturer.

ErrorCode.Description: 整圆指令参数设置须一致
The parameters for the full circle command must be consistent.
ErrorCode.Reason: 整圆指令参数未设置一致
The circular interpolation command parameters are not set consistently.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 调整整圆指令参数
Adjust the parameters of the full circle command.

ErrorCode.Description: 整圆运动前缺乏运动指令
Lack of motion instructions before circular motion.
ErrorCode.Reason: 整圆运动前无运动指令
No motion command before circular motion.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 新增相应的运动指令
Add corresponding motion commands.

ErrorCode.Description: 请先执行第一条整圆指令
Please execute the first full circle instruction first.
ErrorCode.Reason: 未执行第一条整圆指令
Please execute the first full circle instruction first.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 执行第一条整圆指令
Execute the first full circle instruction.

ErrorCode.Description: 跟随工艺不支持整圆指令
Following the process does not support the full circle instruction.
ErrorCode.Reason: 跟随工艺功能不支持整圆指令
The following process function does not support the full circle instruction.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 调整整圆指令参数
Adjust the parameters of the full circle command.

ErrorCode.Description: 整圆运动指令暂不支持导轨或变位机运动,请重新示教整圆点位
Full circle motion is unsupported with rail/positioner,Please reselect teaching points.
ErrorCode.Reason: 示教点位不合理
Improper selection of teaching points.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 重新示教点位
Reselect teaching points.

ErrorCode.Description: 运动模块未取发送点位
Motion module failed to get the position.
ErrorCode.Reason: 内部发生错误
Internal error
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 重新运行或联系厂商
Run again or contact the manufacturer.

ErrorCode.Description: 系统内部尝试获取运动模块次数超限
The number of attempts to obtain the motion module within the system has exceeded the limit.
ErrorCode.Reason: 运动数据发送失败
Sports data cannot be successfully sent
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 重新运行或联系厂商
Run again or contact the manufacturer.

ErrorCode.Description: 通道数据地址超出范围
The Address of data is out of range in Channel
ErrorCode.Reason: 通道数据地址超出范围
The Address of data is out of range in Channel
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查软件版本或联系厂商
Check the software version or contact the vendor

ErrorCode.Description: EcatPdo初始化参数错误
Ecat Pdo initialization error
ErrorCode.Reason: Pdo数据错误
Pdo data verification error
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 重新运行或联系厂商
Check the software version or contact the vendor

ErrorCode.Description: EcatPdo初始化参数错误
Ecat Pdo initialization error
ErrorCode.Reason: Pdo数据错误
Pdo data verification error
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 重新运行或联系厂商
Check the software version or contact the vendor

ErrorCode.Description: 虚拟控制器暂不支持此指令
This command is not currently supported by the virtual controller
ErrorCode.Reason: 虚拟控制器暂不支持此指令
This command is not currently supported by the virtual controller
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 不在虚拟控制器中使用此指令
Do not use thr command in the virtual controller

ErrorCode.Description: 检测到连续碰撞且电机可能过热，请确认是否发生碰撞并移除碰撞物；本次延时报警需要10s才可清除
Continuous collision is detected and the motor may be overheated, please confirm whether there is collision and remove the collision object; this delayed alarm will take 10s to be cleared.
ErrorCode.Reason: 检测到连续碰撞且电机可能过热
Continuous collision detected and motor may overheat
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 在10s延时报警后可清除报警；请移除碰撞物
Alarm can be cleared after 10s delayed alarm; please remove collision object.

ErrorCode.Description: 上使能时机器人处于急停状态
Robot in emergency stop state when enabled.
ErrorCode.Reason: 上使能命令下发时机器人正处于急停状态
The robot is in an emergency stop when the enable command is issued.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检测急停按钮状态，并清除急停状态，重新上使能
Check the emergency stop button, clear the emergency stop status and re-enable the robot.

ErrorCode.Description: 上使能时机器人关节位置波动过大
Excessive fluctuation in robot joint position when the robot is enabled.
ErrorCode.Reason: 机器人此时处于振动或被拖动状态
The robot is currently in a vibrating or dragged state.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 减小机器人关节振动，待机器人平稳后上使能
Reduce the joint vibration of the robot and enable it after the robot stabilizes.

ErrorCode.Description: 上使能时机器人存在伺服报警
Servo alarm present when the robot is enabled.
ErrorCode.Reason: 机器人上使能时存在伺服报警
The robot has a servo alarm when enabled.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 清除伺服报警，重新上使能
Clear the servo alarm and re-enable the robot.

ErrorCode.Description: 下使能后上使能过快
Robot enabled too quickly after being disabled.
ErrorCode.Reason: 机器人下使能后上使能过快
The robot is enabled too quickly after it is disabled.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 清除报警后重新上使能
Clear the alarm and re-enable the robot.

ErrorCode.Description: 上使能时除关节超限外有其他报警
Alarms other than joint overrun present when robot is enabled.
ErrorCode.Reason: 除关节超限外有其他报警
There are other alarms besides joint overrun.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 点击清除报警按钮，清除报警后重新上使能
Clear the alarm and re-enable the robot.

ErrorCode.Description: 取零点时机器人关节位置波动过大
Excessive fluctuation in robot joint position when getting zero point.
ErrorCode.Reason: 机器人此时处于振动或被拖动状态
The robot is currently in a vibrating or dragged state.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 减小机器人关节振动，待机器人平稳后取零点
Reduce the joint vibration of the robot and get the zero point after the robot stabilizes.

ErrorCode.Description: 软浮动指令运行超时
Soft float instruction timed out.
ErrorCode.Reason: 软浮动指令阻塞超时
Soft float instruction blocking timeout.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 重新执行指令
Re-execute the instruction.

ErrorCode.Description: 当前为急停状态，不允许使能操作
The system is currently in emergency stop state and does not allow enable operations.
ErrorCode.Reason: 当前为急停状态，不允许使能操作
The system is currently in emergency stop state and does not allow enable operations.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查当前是否为急停状态
Check if the current state is an emergency stop.

ErrorCode.Description: 段数据重合
Segment data overlap.
ErrorCode.Reason: 前次输入和本次输入的目标点一样
The previously input target point is the same with the currently input target point.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 重复点问题，请重新示教点位
Reteach the robot with different points.

ErrorCode.Description: 圆弧输入参数计算错误
Error calculating input arc parameters.
ErrorCode.Reason: 无法计算出圆弧插补信息 (1)至少两点距离过近(2)三点近似共线(3)姿态变化过大(4)奇异点附近过渡

Circular arc interpolation information cannot be calculated because: (1) At least two points are too close; (2) Three points are approximately in the same line; (3) Pose change is too large; (4) Transition is performed near a singularity.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 重新示教其他点计算圆弧
Re-teach the robot with other points to calculate the circular arc.

ErrorCode.Description: 直线输入参数计算错误
Error calculating input linear parameters.
ErrorCode.Reason: 无法计算出直线插补信息(1)姿态变化过大(2)奇异点附近过渡
Linear interpolation information cannot be calculated because: (1) Pose change is too large; (2) Transition is performed near a singularity.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 重新示教其他点计算直线
Re-teach other points to calculate the line.

ErrorCode.Description: 逆解运算错误:机器人处于奇异区或者超出可达范围
Reverse kinematics calculation error:The robot is in a singular configuration or outside the reachable workspace
ErrorCode.Reason: 机器人处于奇异区或者超出可达范围
The robot is in a singular configuration or outside the reachable workspace
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 下使能切换至关节模式，将机器人移至奇异区外，或者将点位更改至可达范围内
Disable the robot, switch to the joint mode and then move the robot out of the singularity, or change the target points to those that can be arrived.

ErrorCode.Description: 奇异位置错误报警
Singular position error
ErrorCode.Reason: 机器人运动至奇异区域
The robot moves to a singular position.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 切换至关节模式，移动机器人离开奇异位置
Switch to the joint mode and move the robot out of the singular position.

ErrorCode.Description: 自动运动中出现掉伺服
Servo disabled during automatic running
ErrorCode.Reason: (1)某个轴驱动器掉电(2)某个轴驱动器接线错误(3)某个轴驱动器故障
1. Power failure of a drive occurs. 2. A drive is wired incorrectly. 3. A drive fails.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查驱动器是否出现异常
Check that the drive is normal.

ErrorCode.Description: 保留
Reserved
ErrorCode.Reason: 保留
Reserved
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 保留
Reserved

ErrorCode.Description: I/O的序号访问范围超出
I/O index out of range.
ErrorCode.Reason: I/O访问物理端不存在
The physical I/O module does not exist.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查是否有对应的物理I/O模块
Check that the corresponding physical I/O module exists.

ErrorCode.Description: jump参数设置错误
Jump parameter setting error
ErrorCode.Reason: MH设置参数在第3轴限位之外
MH parameter is beyond the limit of J3 axis.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 修改限高或者重新选取起始位置、终点位置
Modify the limit height or reselect a start or end point.

ErrorCode.Description: 臂型参数错误
Arm type parameter error
ErrorCode.Reason: 直线或圆弧运动时，终点前三个臂参数和起点不一致
Three arm type parameters before the end point are not consistent with those of the start point in linear or circular motion.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 修改运动为关节运动或者重新取点保证臂型一致
Modify the motion to joint motion or reselect points to ensure consistent arm type.

ErrorCode.Description: 设置运动特性参数不合理
Inappropriate motion characteristic parameters.
ErrorCode.Reason: 运动参数输入范围不合理
The motion parameter input range is unreasonable.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 重新修改速度以及加速度等运动参数
Modify motion parameters such as speed and acceleration.

ErrorCode.Description: DA 操作错误
DA operation error.
ErrorCode.Reason: 通道配置成电流输出，但使用了电压指令，或配置成电压，使用电流指令操作
The channel is configured as current output, but the voltage command is used. Or the channel is configured as voltage output, but the current command is used.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 使用与配置一致的指令操作DA端口
Operate the DA port using a command consistent with the configuration.

ErrorCode.Description: 发出伺服使能命令，但实际反馈未使能
The command to enable servo was sent, but the servo was not enabled actually.
ErrorCode.Reason: (1)伺服主电未上(2)关节是否在减速过程中(3)关节还处在运动状态，没有到位
1. The main power supply of the servo is not switched on. 2. The joint may be in deceleration process. 3. The joint is in motion state and does not arrive at the position.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: (1)检查控制柜的强电按钮是否按下(2)停止和启动或上伺服之间的间隔时间太短(3)检查关节是否到位。放大到位误差，或调整伺服参数。(4)状态字反馈过慢；

1. Check whether the strong current button of the controller is pressed down. 2. The interval between servo stop and start or enable is too short. 3. Check whether the joint arrives at the position. Amplify the arrival error or adjust the servo parameters. 4. Status word feedback is too slow.

ErrorCode.Description: 关节运动输入参数错误
Joint motion parameter input error
ErrorCode.Reason: (1)针对delta机型，在空间范围外(2)MoveJ与MOVL或MOVC在奇异附近过渡
1. The points are beyond the space range for the Delta robots. 2. MoveJ and MOVL or MOVC performs transition near a singularity.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: (1)针对delta机型，检查点位是否在空间范围外(2)检查MoveJ与MOVL或MOVC是否在奇异附近过渡
1. Check whether the points are beyond the space range for the Delta robots. 2. Check whether MoveJ and MOVL or MOVC performs transition near a singularity.

ErrorCode.Description: 机器人未回零
Robot not returned to zero.
ErrorCode.Reason: 使用增量编码器时机器人未进行回零操作
The robot does not perform the homing operation when an incremental encoder is used.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 对于增量编码器，先进行回零操作
For incremental encoder, perform the homing operation first.

ErrorCode.Description: 机器人半径方向越界
Robot radial direction out of bound.
ErrorCode.Reason: 机器人末端X、Y合成半径大于设定的半径
The X and Y combined radius at the end of the robot is greater than the set radius.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 在直角坐标系下，jog使机器人末端X、Y合成半径减小的方向运动
Under the rectangular coordinate system, step so that the robot end moves in the direction of reduction of the X and Y combined radius.

ErrorCode.Description: 机器人 Z 正方向越界
Robot Z positive direction out of bound.
ErrorCode.Reason: 机器人末端Z大于设定值
The Z at the end of the robot is greater than the setpoint.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 在直角坐标系下，jog使机器人末端朝Z负方向运动
Under the rectangular coordinate system, step so that the robot end moves in the negative direction of Z.

ErrorCode.Description: 机器人 Z 负方向越界
Robot Z negative direction out of bound.
ErrorCode.Reason: 机器人末端Z小于设定值
The Z at the end of the robot is smaller than the setpoint.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 在直角坐标系下，jog使机器人末端朝Z正方向运动
Under the rectangular coordinate system, step so that the robot end moves in the negative direction of Z.

ErrorCode.Description: 机器人越界
Robot out of bound.
ErrorCode.Reason: 在线运行时，示教点越界
The teaching point exceeds the boundary.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 更改点位，使点处于机器人工作空间内
Change the teaching points so that they are within the work space of the robot.

ErrorCode.Description: 系统线程优先级异常
System thread priority exception.
ErrorCode.Reason: 运行过程中监测到系统线程优先级异常
System thread priority exception detected during operation.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 请导出诊断信息，联系厂家处理
Export the diagnostic information and contact the manufacturer.

ErrorCode.Description: 实时任务同步超时
Real time task synchronization timeout.
ErrorCode.Reason: 实时任务同步超时
Real time task synchronization timeout.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 请导出诊断信息，联系厂家处理
Export the diagnostic information and contact the manufacturer.

ErrorCode.Description: 码垛机器人的2、3轴夹角太小
The included angle between J2 and J3 axes of the palletizing robot is too small.
ErrorCode.Reason: 码垛机器人的2、3轴夹角太小
The included angle between J2 and J3 axes of the palletizing robot is too small.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 手动模式下，正向转动第3轴，或负向转动第2轴
In the manual mode, rotate the J3 axis positively or the J2 axis negatively.

ErrorCode.Description: 码垛机器人的2、3轴夹角太大
The included angle between J2 and J3 axes of the palletizing robot is too large.
ErrorCode.Reason: 码垛机器人的2、3轴夹角太大
The included angle between J2 and J3 axes of the palletizing robot is too large.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 手动模式下，正向转动第3轴，或负向转动第2轴
In the manual mode, rotate the J3 axis positively or the J2 axis negatively.

ErrorCode.Description: 机器人速度异常
Abnormal robot speed.
ErrorCode.Reason: 机器人关节速度超出了允许的最大速度的两倍
The robot joint speed exceeds twice the allowable maximum speed.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: (1)确保设置界面的关节最大允许速度和关节最大允许加速度设置合理(2)确保机器人不在在奇异位置附近(3)降低直线运动的速度
1. Ensure that the allowable maximum speed and acceleration of joints are reasonably set. 2. Ensure that the robot is not near a singularity. 3. Reduce the linear motion speed.

ErrorCode.Description: 运动参数错误
Motion parameter error.
ErrorCode.Reason: 运动规划参数异常
The motion planning parameters are abnormal.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查运动参数（速度、加速度）的设置是否合理
Check that the motion parameters (speed, acceleration) are reasonable.

ErrorCode.Description: 机器人位置速度或姿态速度超过设定值
The position speed or orientation speed exceeds the setting value.
ErrorCode.Reason: 机器人末端运动速度超出了设定的位置速度或姿态速度
The robot end motion exceeds the set position or orientation speed.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: (1)如果使用了MoveJ指令，请将MoveJ速度系数设小(2)检查设置的姿态速度与J4关节速度是否一致
1. If the MoveJ instruction is used, set the MoveJ speed coefficient to a smaller value. 2. Check whether the set orientation speed is consistent with the J4 joint speed.

ErrorCode.Description: 换臂型错误
Arm type change error.
ErrorCode.Reason: 在奇异附近，不支持换臂型指令（Scara专用）
The arm type change instruction (specially used for SCARA robots) is not supported near a singularity.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 替换成一个远离奇异区域的点，再调用换臂型指令
Replace the point with a point far from the singularity and then call the arm type change instruction.

ErrorCode.Description: 机器人加速度异常
The robot acceleration is abnormal.
ErrorCode.Reason: 机器人关节速度超出了允许的最大加速度的50倍
The robot joint speed exceeds 50 times the allowable maximum acceleration.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: (1)确保设置页面的关节最大允许速度和关节最大允许加速度设置合理(2)确保机器人不在奇异位置附近(3)降低直线运动的速度和加速度

1. Ensure that the allowable maximum speed and acceleration of joints are reasonably set. 2. Ensure that the robot is not near a singularity. 3. Reduce the speed and acceleration of the linear motion.

ErrorCode.Description: 速度设置异常
Speed setting error
ErrorCode.Reason: DSP内部存储区不足
Insufficient internal storage in DSP.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 降低直角设置速度，或增加关节设置速度
Decrease the Cartesian speed or increase the joint speed.

ErrorCode.Description: 速度设置异常
The setting velocity is abnormal.
ErrorCode.Reason: DSP内部样条存储区不足
Insufficient internal spline storage in DSP.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 降低位置姿态设置速度，或增加关节设置速度
Reduce the position and orientation speed, or increase the joint speed.

ErrorCode.Description: 机器人工作下界设置过大或者停止距离设置过小
The lower worksapce boundary is too large or the stop distance is too small.
ErrorCode.Reason: 跟随中机器人工作下界过大或者停止距离过小
The lower worksapce boundary is too large or the stop distance is too small for the tracking process.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 优先减小下界，其次选择增大机器人停止距离
Decrease the lower worksapce boundary, and then increase the stop distance.

ErrorCode.Description: 机器人超出工作范围下界
Robot out of lower worksapce boundary.
ErrorCode.Reason: 在跟随过程中超出了设定的工作范围
The robot exceeds the set workspace in the tracking process.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 根据传输带参数设置说明，调整工作下界、拾取上界；提高机器人速度；降低传送带速度。
Adjust the lower worksapce boundary and the upper pickup boundary; increase the robot speed; reduce the conveyor speed.

ErrorCode.Description: 传送带速度过大
Conveyor speed too large.
ErrorCode.Reason: 传送带速度超出合理范围
The conveyor speed exceeds a reasonable range.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 传输带速度超出最大速度限制（线性传输带最大1m/s，旋转传输盘最大180度/s）
The conveyor speed exceeds the maximum speed limit (1 m/s for the linear conveyor and 180°/s for the turntable conveyor).

ErrorCode.Description: 传送带速度波动过大
Conveyor speed fluctuation too large
ErrorCode.Reason: 传送带速度波动
The conveyor speed fluctuates excessively.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查传输带电机是否存在速度波动过大或者传输带有异常
Check that the conveyor motor speed does not fluctuate excessively or that the conveyor is abnormal.

ErrorCode.Description: 机器人工件参数类型错误
Workobject parameter type error.
ErrorCode.Reason: 跟随运动中使用了带有Wobj参数的运动指令，或普通运动中使用了带有Cnv参数的运动指令
A motion instruction with Wobj parameter is used in tracking motion，or a motion instruction with Cnv parameter is used in normal motion.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 处于跟随状态下的运动指令的工件参数需修改为Cnv，处于普通运动中的运动指令的工件参数需修改为Wobj

The workobject parameter of the motion instruction in the tracking motion shall be modified to Cnv, and the workobject parameter of the motion instruction in the normal motion shall be modified to Wobj.

ErrorCode.Description: 动态点坐标错误
Dynamic point coordinate error.
ErrorCode.Reason: 给定的动态目标位置错误、奇异或出界
The given dynamic target position is incorrect, singular or out of bounds.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查视觉给出的做坐标是否在合理范围内
Check that the coordinate given by vision is within a reasonable range.

ErrorCode.Description: 传送带跟随命令语法错误
Syntax error in conveyor tracking instruction.
ErrorCode.Reason: 连续使用了Refsys Convyor或Refsys Base
Refsys Convyor or Refsys Base is used continuously.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查是否Refsys Convyor和Refsys Base配对使用
Check that RefConvyor and RefBase are jointly used.

ErrorCode.Description: 建立抓取工件坐标系失败
Failed to establish coordinate system for grasping the work object.
ErrorCode.Reason: 没执行GetCnvObject就执行Refsys Convyor
The Refsys Convyor instruction is executed before the GetCnvObject instruction is executed.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 先调用GetCnvObject指令，后跟随
Call the GetCnvObject instruction first.

ErrorCode.Description: 不允许单步示教
Single-step teaching is not allowed.
ErrorCode.Reason: 传送带跟随相关指令不允许单步示教
The conveyor tracking-related instructions do not allow single-step teaching.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 不允许对Refsys Convyor和Refsys Base之间的指令进行单步操作
Single-step operation on instructions between Refsys Convyor and Refsys Base is not allowed.

ErrorCode.Description: 跟随过程中不允许PTP运动
PTP motion is not allowed in the tracking process.
ErrorCode.Reason: 跟随工艺中使用了MovJ，JumP等关节运动
Joint motions such as MovJ and JumP are used in the tracking process.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查Refsys Convyor和Refsys Base之间是否使用了MovJ或者jump指令
Check whether the MovJ or jump instruction is used between Refsys Convyor and Refsys Base.

ErrorCode.Description: 传送带方向错误
The conveyor belt is in the wrong direction
ErrorCode.Reason: 传送带方向错误
The conveyor belt is in the wrong direction
ErrorCode.Resolvent: (1)检查传输带界面中的编码器的方向参数是否正确(2)检查传输带是否有打滑现象
1. Check that the encoder direction parameter on the conveyor setting interface is correct. 2. Check that the conveyor is not slipping.

ErrorCode.Description: 直角示教启动的位置在奇异无法逆解的位置
The start position for teaching in Cartesian system is at a singular position where inverse kinematic solution cannot be executed.
ErrorCode.Reason: 直角示教启动的位置在奇异位置，无法逆解
The start position for teaching in Cartesian system is at a singular position where inverse kinematic solution is impossible.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 切换关节模式移出奇异位置
Switch to joint mode and move out of the singular position.

ErrorCode.Description: 各轴锁存计数器不一致
Inconsistent latch counters.
ErrorCode.Reason: 锁存机器人位置时，各轴锁存计数器不一致，伺服反馈的锁存状态有误，可能是锁存I/O在静态、动态、xqt任务中有被调用

The robot position latching counters of the respective axes are inconsistent, resulting in incorrect latch state feedback from the servo. The latch I/O may have been called in static, dynamic, or xqt task.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 请检查各轴的锁存信号是否有效，检查锁存I/O在静态、动态、xqt任务中有被调用，若被调用，请将其他任务中用到的锁存I/O换用
Check that the latching signals of the respective axes are active. Check if the latch I/O has been called in static, dynamic, or xqt task. If it is called, change the latch I/O used in other tasks.

ErrorCode.Description: 锁存缓存已满
Latching buffer full.
ErrorCode.Reason: 锁存机器人位置时，锁存缓存已满
When the robot position is latched, the latching buffer is full.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 锁存速度太快，或者锁存太多并未使用
The latching speed is too fast, or there are too many latched positions that are not used.

ErrorCode.Description: J1或J2关节运动范围超过180度
The motion range of J1 or J2 exceeds 180°.
ErrorCode.Reason: 倒装scara插补运动时，轴1、轴2关节运动范围超过180°，无法保证插补运动终点角度与预定角度一致

When the inverted SCARA robot performs interpolation motion, the motion range of J1 or J2 axis exceeds 180°, making it impossible to ensure that the termination angle of interpolation motion is consistent with the predetermined angle.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 避免出现上述情形
Avoid the above situations.

ErrorCode.Description: J2关节运动范围穿越奇异点
The motion range of J2 passes through the singular point.
ErrorCode.Reason: 倒装scara插补运动时，轴2关节运动范围穿越奇异点，无法保证插补运动终点角度与预定角度一致

When the inverted SCARA robot performs interpolation motion, the J1 axis moves through the singularity, making it impossible to ensure that the termination angle of interpolation motion is consistent with the predetermined angle.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 避免出现上述情形
Avoid the above situations.

ErrorCode.Description: EtherCAT通信反馈异常
EtherCAT communication feedback error.
ErrorCode.Reason: EtherCAT总线反馈数据丢失
EtherCAT bus feedback data is missing.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 查看Ethercat网线是否松动，是否因外部原因对信号造成干扰
Check that the EtheCAT cable is properly connected and there is no external interference.

ErrorCode.Description: 平衡缸弹簧已到维保时间
Balance cylinder spring has reached maintenance time
ErrorCode.Reason: 平衡缸弹簧已达设定寿命阈值，若继续使用可能存在器件损坏风险
The balance cylinder spring has reached the set lifespan threshold, and there may be a risk of component damage if continued use
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 请及时联系厂家维保
Please contact the manufacturer for maintenance in a timely manner

ErrorCode.Description: 位置锁存超时
Position latch timeout.
ErrorCode.Reason: 1、伺服未正确配置探针功能；\n2、未触发正确I/O沿信号；\n3、硬件干扰；
1. The servo is not properly configured with probe function. \n2. The correct I/O edge signal is not triggered. \n3. Hardware interference.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 1、检查是否输出有效沿信号；\n2、检查伺服探针是否配置；\n3、检查硬件干扰；
1. Check if a valid edge signal is output. \n2. Check if the servo probe is configured. \n3. Check for hardware interference.

ErrorCode.Description: 存在无法正解的位置
forward kinematics error
ErrorCode.Reason: 存在无法正解的位置
forward kinematics error
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查工具工件参数是否正确
Check whether the tool and wobj parameters are correct

ErrorCode.Description: 规划轨迹中有触发限位
Limit-triggering point present in planned trajectory.
ErrorCode.Reason: 规划的轨迹触发限位
The planned trajectory includes points that may trigger the limit.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查对应段的规划轨迹，中间过程点是否有触发限位
Check the corresponding motion segment for points that may trigger limit.

ErrorCode.Description: 轨迹速度约束过小
The constraint of velocity in trajectory is very low.
ErrorCode.Reason: (1)规划中，计算出的空间速度约束过小，速度参数设置不正确(2)轨迹中接近奇异区
1. In the planning, the calculated spatial velocity constraint is too small, and the velocity parameters are set incorrectly. 2. The trajectory is close to a singularity.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: (1)调整设置的速度参数(2)调整轨迹远离奇异区
1. Adjust the set speed parameters. 2. Adjust the trajectory away from the singularity.

ErrorCode.Description: 规划轨迹中有无法逆解的位置
Path planning: inverse kinematics error.
ErrorCode.Reason: 规划轨迹中间点无法逆解计算
Inverse kinematic solution cannot be executed at an intermediate point of the planned trajectory.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 修改出错段的位置取点
Modify points in the erroneous section of trajectory.

ErrorCode.Description: 动态跟随预处理位置超出工作下界
The position goes beyond the lower operating boundary during the dynamic tracking preprocessing.
ErrorCode.Reason: 动态跟随预处理时检测到目标点超出工作下界
The target point is detected to go beyond the lower operating boundary during the dynamic tracking preprocessing.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: (1)检查接收到的视觉数据点是否在合理范围内(2)检查给定的运动指令动态坐标是否超出工作下界
1. Check that the received vision data point is within a reasonable range. 2. Check that the dynamic coordinates in the given motion instruction are not out of the lower operating boundary.

ErrorCode.Description: 规划轨迹中第1关节触发限位
Path planning: J1 out of range.
ErrorCode.Reason: 轨迹中第1关节触发限位
A limit is triggered at J1 in the planned trajectory.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查对应段的规划轨迹，中间过程点是否有触发限位
Check the corresponding motion segment for points that may trigger limit.

ErrorCode.Description: 规划轨迹中第2关节触发限位
Path planning: J2 out of range.
ErrorCode.Reason: 轨迹中第2关节触发限位
A limit is triggered at J2 in the planned trajectory.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查对应段的规划轨迹，中间过程点是否有触发限位
Check the corresponding motion segment for points that may trigger limit.

ErrorCode.Description: 规划轨迹中第3关节触发限位
Path planning: J3 out of range.
ErrorCode.Reason: 轨迹中第3关节触发限位
A limit is triggered at J3 in the planned trajectory.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查对应段的规划轨迹，中间过程点是否有触发限位
Check the corresponding motion segment for points that may trigger limit.

ErrorCode.Description: 规划轨迹中第4关节触发限位
Path planning: J4 out of range.
ErrorCode.Reason: 轨迹中第4关节触发限位
A limit is triggered at J4 in the planned trajectory.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查对应段的规划轨迹，中间过程点是否有触发限位
Check the corresponding motion segment for points that may trigger limit.

ErrorCode.Description: 规划轨迹中第5关节触发限位
Path planning: J5 out of range.
ErrorCode.Reason: 轨迹中第5关节触发限位
A limit is triggered at J5 in the planned trajectory.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查对应段的规划轨迹，中间过程点是否有触发限位
Check the corresponding motion segment for points that may trigger limit.

ErrorCode.Description: 规划轨迹中第6关节触发限位
Path planning: J6 out of range.
ErrorCode.Reason: 轨迹中第6关节触发限位
A limit is triggered at J6 in the planned trajectory.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查对应段的规划轨迹，中间过程点是否有触发限位
Check the corresponding motion segment for points that may trigger limit.

ErrorCode.Description: 规划轨迹中第7关节有触发限位
Path planning: J7 out of range.
ErrorCode.Reason: 规划轨迹中第7关节有触发限位
A limit is triggered at J7 in the planned trajectory.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 更换运动点位
Change the motion points.

ErrorCode.Description: 规划轨迹中第8关节有触发限位
Path planning: J8 out of range.
ErrorCode.Reason: 规划轨迹中第8关节有触发限位
A limit is triggered at J8 in the planned trajectory.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 更换运动点位
Change the motion points.

ErrorCode.Description: 规划轨迹中第9关节有触发限位
Path planning: J9 out of range.
ErrorCode.Reason: 规划轨迹中第9关节有触发限位
A limit is triggered at J9 in the planned trajectory.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 更换运动点位
Change the motion points.

ErrorCode.Description: 规划轨迹中第10关节有触发限位
The 10th joint in the planned trajectory has trigger limit
ErrorCode.Reason: 规划轨迹中第10关节有触发限位
The 10th joint in the planned trajectory has trigger limit
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 更换运动点位
Change the moving point

ErrorCode.Description: 规划轨迹中第11关节有触发限位
The 11th joint in the planned trajectory has trigger limit
ErrorCode.Reason: 规划轨迹中第11关节有触发限位
The 11th joint in the planned trajectory has trigger limit
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 更换运动点位
Change the moving point

ErrorCode.Description: 规划轨迹中第12关节有触发限位
The 12th joint in the planned trajectory has trigger limit
ErrorCode.Reason: 规划轨迹中第12关节有触发限位
The 12th joint in the planned trajectory has trigger limit
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 更换运动点位
Change the moving point

ErrorCode.Description: 规划轨迹中第13关节有触发限位
The 13th joint in the planned trajectory has trigger limit
ErrorCode.Reason: 规划轨迹中第13关节有触发限位
The 13th joint in the planned trajectory has trigger limit
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 更换运动点位
Change the moving point

ErrorCode.Description: 规划轨迹中第14关节有触发限位
The 14th joint in the planned trajectory has trigger limit
ErrorCode.Reason: 规划轨迹中第14关节有触发限位
The 14th joint in the planned trajectory has trigger limit
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 更换运动点位
Change the moving point

ErrorCode.Description: 规划轨迹中姿态运动角度过大
Too large orientation motion angle.
ErrorCode.Reason: 四关节：规划轨迹中姿态运动角度大于360°；六关节：规划轨迹中姿态运动角度大于180°。
J4: The orientation motion angle in the planned trajectory is greater than 360°; J6: The orientation motion angle in the planned trajectory is greater than 180°.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 重新选取合适的运动起始点和目标点
Re-select appropriate starting and target points for motion.

ErrorCode.Description: 圆弧运动的中间点不合适导致倒装轴1的运动范围超过180°
J1 motion range exceeds 180° due to improper intermediate point in circular motion.
ErrorCode.Reason: 倒装四关节机器人执行圆弧运动时，起始点与中间点的J1轴角度差值加上中间点与终点的J1轴角度差值超过180°

When the ceiling-mounted SCARA robots performs circular motion, the difference in angle of the J1 axis between the starting point and the intermediate point plus the difference in angle of the J1 axis between the intermediate point and the end point exceeds 180°.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 重新选取合适的圆弧运动中间点
Re-select an appropriate intermediate point of the circular motion.

ErrorCode.Description: 无法到达预定的目标关节角度
Unable to reach the predetermined target angle.
ErrorCode.Reason: 无法到达预定的目标关节角度
Unable to reach the predetermined target angle.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 修改“J4范围”的臂参数
Modify the arm parameters of “J4 range”.

ErrorCode.Description: 在过渡时，机器人规划点位无法逆解，请缩小过渡或重新取点
During the transition movement, the robot's planned points cannot be solved inversely. Please reduce the transition or get the points again.
ErrorCode.Reason: 在过渡时，机器人规划点位无法逆解，请缩小过渡或重新取点
During the transition movement, the robot's planned points cannot be solved inversely. Please reduce the transition or get the points again.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 在过渡时，机器人规划点位无法逆解，请缩小过渡或重新取点
During the transition movement, the robot's planned points cannot be solved inversely. Please reduce the transition or get the points again.

ErrorCode.Description: Movc中间点姿态模式下中间点不在圆弧1/4至3/4之间
When using the CirPointOri mode of Movc，the middle point is not between the 1/4 and 3/4 of the arc.
ErrorCode.Reason: 中间点姿态模式下中间点不在圆弧1/4至3/4之间，请重新取圆弧运动中间点
When using the CirPointOri mode of Movc，the middle point is not between the 1/4 and 3/4 of the arc. Please re-select the appropriate middle point of Movc.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 重新选取合适的运动中间点
Re-select the appropriate middle point of Movc.

ErrorCode.Description: Movc中间点姿态模式姿态规划失败
When using the CirPointOri mode of Movc, posture planning failed.
ErrorCode.Reason: Movc中间点姿态模式下姿态运动过大
When using the CirPointOri mode of Movc, posture difference is too large.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 重新选取合适的运动起始点、中间点和目标点
Re-select the start, middle and end points of Movc.

stopping time too long

ErrorCode.Description: 指令空间不足
Insufficient instruction space.
ErrorCode.Reason: 关节速度过小而空间速度过大
The joint speed is too small while the spatial speed is too large.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: (1)增大关节速度过小(2)减小空间速度
1. Increase the joint speed. 2. Reduce the spatial speed.

ErrorCode.Description: 规划位置空间不足
Insufficient space for planned positions.
ErrorCode.Reason: 关节速度过小而空间速度过大
The joint speed is too small while the spatial speed is too large.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: (1)增大关节速度过小(2)减小空间速度
1. Increase the joint speed. 2. Reduce the spatial speed.

ErrorCode.Description: 插补数据异常
Interpolation data error.
ErrorCode.Reason: (1)关节速度和加速度设置不合理；(2)运动轨迹过长；
1. The joint speed and acceleration are not reasonably set. 2. The motion trajectory is too long.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: (1)合理设置关节速度和加速度(2)如果运动轨迹很长，请拆分成多段
1. Set the joint speed and acceleration appropriately. 2. Split the trajectory into multiple segments.

ErrorCode.Description: 样条空间不足
Insufficient spline space.
ErrorCode.Reason: (1)样条距离过长；(2)过渡时速度过低；
1. The spline distance is too large. 2. The speed is too low during transition.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: (1)减小过渡长度；(2)增大设置速度；(3)错误信息保存联系厂家；
1. Reduce the transition length. 2. Increase the set speed. 3. Save the error message and contact the manufacturer.

ErrorCode.Description: 样条插补规划错误

If possible, fine-tune the points or motion parameters.

ErrorCode.Description: 进行普通模式的过渡时，关节速度或加速度超出设定值
Joint speed or acceleration exceeds the set value during normal transition.
ErrorCode.Reason: CP模式下的普通过渡有可能超出设定的关节速度
The set joint speed may be exceeded during a normal transition in CP mode.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: (1)将位置速度和姿态速度适当改小或将关节速度改大(2)调整点位，远离奇异区。减小过渡等级和过渡长度
1. Decrease the position speed and orientation speed or increase the joint speed appropriately. 2. Ensure that points are out of singular area, and reduce the transition level and transition length.

ErrorCode.Description: 跟随运动中关节速度超出设定值
The joint speed in tracking motion exceeds the set value.
ErrorCode.Reason: 跟随运动中关节速度超出设定值
The joint speed in tracking motion exceeds the set value.

ErrorCode.Description: 平滑停止异常

ErrorCode.Reason: 进行平滑停止时，减速距离不够

ErrorCode.Description: CP指令过渡挨近奇异区域超加速度
Joint‘s acceleration overlimit
ErrorCode.Reason: CP指令之间的过渡轨迹靠近奇异区域时关节加速度超限
When the transition trajectory between CP instructions approaches to the singular area, the acceleration of the joint exceeds the limit.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 调整指令轨迹或调整过渡参数避开奇异
Adjust the instruction's trajectory or the transition parameters to avoid singularities.

ErrorCode.Description: 奇异位置报警
Robot approaches to singularity
ErrorCode.Reason: 靠近奇异位置导致关节速度、加速度过大
The joint speed and acceleration are too large due to the robot approaching the singular position.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 1、调整运动点位，远离奇异区；2、奇异区附近的运动速度设小；
1. Adjust the motion points to avoid singularities. 2. Set the motion speed near the singularities to a small value.

ErrorCode.Description: CP指令过渡进入奇异区域
Transition trajectory enters the singular area.
ErrorCode.Reason: CP指令之间的过渡轨迹进入奇异区域
The transition trajectory between CP instructions enters the singular area.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 调整指令轨迹或调整过渡参数避开奇异
Adjust commands trajectory or adjust transition parameters to avoid singularity

ErrorCode.Description: 示教状态中，规划轨迹中有无法逆解的位置
Teach path planning: inverse kinematics error.
ErrorCode.Reason: 规划轨迹中间点无法逆解计算
Inverse kinematic solution cannot be executed at an intermediate point of the planned trajectory.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 修改出错段的位置取点
Modify points in the erroneous segment.

ErrorCode.Description: 示教状态中，直线输入参数计算错误
Error in calculating linear input parameters in teaching mode.
ErrorCode.Reason: 无法计算出直线插补信息
Unable to calculate linear interpolation information.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 重新示教其他点计算直线
Re-teach the robot with other points to calculate the linear interpolation information.

ErrorCode.Description: 示教状态中，预处理时发现臂型与当前点不一致，不能进行空间插补。
The arm type is inconsistent with the current point during preprocessing in teaching state and space interpolation cannot be performed.
ErrorCode.Reason: 预处理时发现ARM_TYPE与当前点不一致，不能进行空间插补
The ARM_TYPE parameter is inconsistent with the current point during preprocessing and spatial interpolation cannot be performed.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 修改出错段的位置取点
Modify points in the erroneous segment.

ErrorCode.Description: 示教状态中，发现姿态运动过大
In teaching state, the orientation change is too large.
ErrorCode.Reason: 规划轨迹中发现姿态运动角度大于180度
The orientation motion angle is found to be greater than 180 degrees in the planned trajectory.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: (1)减小单次运动的姿态变动范围(2)检查报警行与上一行点位的ARM_TYPE差异
1. Reduce the orientation change during a single motion. 2. Check the difference in ARM_TYPE of points between the alarming program line and the previous program line.

ErrorCode.Description: 手动模式，轨迹速度约束过小
The constraint of velocity in trajectory is very low in manual mode.
ErrorCode.Reason: 轨迹速度约束过小
The constraint of velocity in trajectory is too small.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 手动模式，规划中，计算出的空间速度约束过小，速度参数设置不正确，或遇到奇异区
In teaching mode, the spatial velocity constraint calculated in the planning is too small due to incorrect speed parameter setting or singularities.

ErrorCode.Description: 急停的硬件信号有效

ErrorCode.Description: 模式切换超时
Mode switch timeout.
ErrorCode.Reason: 1、机器人加速度设置过小导致停机时间过长；\n2、运动状态下切换模式；
1. The robot's acceleration setting, resulting in the robot stop overtime. \n2. The robot is moving while switching mode.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 1、检查运动参数设置是否正确；将当前运动停止并确保机器人处于静止时再切换模式；\n2、将当前运动停止并确保机器人处于静止时再切换模式
1. Check that the motion parameters are set correctly. \n2. Stop the current motion and make sure the robot is stationary before switching the mode.

ErrorCode.Description: 电源异常

ErrorCode.Reason: 1、输入电源异常；\n2、系统硬件故障；

ErrorCode.Resolvent: 查看伺服功能H0B-45，根据手册-伺服故障处理内容来处理问题
View the servo parameter H0B-45 and handle the problem according to the user guide.

ErrorCode.Description: 风扇异常

ErrorCode.Reason: 1、风扇未接\n2、风扇线缆接触不良或断线

ErrorCode.Resolvent: 查看伺服功能H0B-45，根据手册-伺服故障处理内容来处理问题

ErrorCode.Description: 泄放管短路或泄放电阻未接
Discharge tube shorted or regenerative resistor not connected.
ErrorCode.Reason: 1、泄放电阻未接\n2、泄放管短路
1. The regenerative resistor is not connected. \n2. The discharge tube is shorted.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 查看伺服功能H0B-45，根据手册-伺服故障处理内容来处理问题
View the servo parameter H0B-45 and handle the problem according to the user guide.

ErrorCode.Description: 泄放管断路

ErrorCode.Reason: 泄放管断路
Discharge tube open circuit.

1. Exception in line number processing for trajectory recovery. 2. Exception in data communication for trajectory recovery.

1. Exception in line number processing for trajectory recovery. 2. Exception in data communication for trajectory recovery.

Trace recover initialization error
ErrorCode.Reason: 1、轨迹恢复行号处理异常；2、轨迹恢复相关数据通讯异常
1. Handling line number anomalies in trace recover; 2. Data communication anomalies related to trace recover
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 1、重新设置行号；2、保存错误信息联系厂家
1. Reset the line number. 2. Save the error message and contact the manufacturer.

ErrorCode.Description: 轨迹恢复轨迹指令行号段号下发错误
Trace recover: Error in track command line number and segment number issuance
ErrorCode.Reason: 1、轨迹恢复行号处理异常；2、轨迹恢复相关数据通讯异常
1. Handling line number anomalies in trace recover; 2. Data communication anomalies related to trace recover

1. Reset the line number. 2. Save the error message and contact the manufacturer.

Trace recover: Current point deviation from the stopping point
ErrorCode.Reason: 轨迹恢复当前点偏离停机点
Track recover: Current point deviation from the stopping point
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 1、重新设置行号；2、保存错误信息联系厂家
1. Reset the line number. 2. Save the error message and contact the manufacturer.

Trace recover target pos error
ErrorCode.Reason: 轨迹恢复目标点改变
Track recover target pos error
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 1、重新设置行号；2、保存错误信息联系厂家
