ErrorCode.Description: 跟随工艺下的轨迹恢复接收指令错误
Trace recover receives instruction error in following process
ErrorCode.Reason: 系统下发的轨迹恢复指令不正确，未接收到 RefSys Conveyor或者 CnvFastCatch
The trajectory recovery command issued by the system is incorrect, and no response is received from either RefSys Conveyor or CnvFastCatch
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 保存错误信息联系厂家
Save error information and contact the manufacturer

ErrorCode.Description: 跟随工艺下的轨迹恢复异常
Trace recover error in following process
ErrorCode.Reason: 1、轨迹恢复行号处理异常；2、轨迹恢复相关数据通讯异常
1、Handle exceptional cases in track recovery row numbering; 2、Address related data communication anomalies in track recovery;
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 保存错误信息联系厂家
Save error information and contact the manufacturer

ErrorCode.Description: 跟随工艺下的轨迹恢复不支持 Movs
Following the process of trajectory recovery does not support Movs
ErrorCode.Reason: 跟随工艺下的轨迹恢复不支持 Movs
Following the process of trajectory recovery does not support Movs
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 跟随工艺下的暂停再启动，避免在 Movs 指令处执行
Follow the pause and restart under the process to avoid execution at the Movs command

ErrorCode.Description: 数据采集板连接失败
Data acquisition board communication failure.
ErrorCode.Reason: 机器人控制器和数据采集板之间的通讯断开
Communication between robot controller and data acquisition board is disconnected.
ErrorCode.Resolvent:
请按如下顺序检查确认：
1、检测控制柜上面的编码器线是否连接牢固；
2、检查数据采集板上的线缆和插头是否连接完好；
3、检查是否安装了数据采集板；
4、检查数据采集板连接的灯是否正常（绿灯闪烁）；
5、检查数据采集板是否有刷固件；
若检查确认后还是发生报警，可以尝试更换数据采集板；

1. Check that the signal cable is connected. 
2. Check that data acquisition board cable is connected. 
3. Check that data acquisition board is installed. 
4. Check that data acquisition board light is working improperly (green light flashing). 
5. Check that data acquisition board has firmware. 
If the alarm persists, replace the data acquisition board.

ErrorCode.Description: 数据采集板数据异常
Data acquisition board data error.
ErrorCode.Reason: 数据采集板损坏
The data collection board is damaged.
ErrorCode.Resolvent:
请按如下顺序检查确认：
1、检查数据采集板连接的灯是否正常（绿灯闪烁）；
2、检查重新上电后报警是否可消除；
3、检查控制柜上电时序是否正常；
若检查确认后还是发生报警，可以尝试更换数据采集板；

1. Check that data acquisition board light is working improperly (green light flashing). 
2. Check whether the alarm can be cleared after restart. 
3. Check that the controller's power-up timing is normal. 
If the alarm persists, replace the data acquisition board.

ErrorCode.Description: 数据采集板通讯异常
Data acquisition board communication error.
ErrorCode.Reason: 数据采集板通讯数据丢帧
The data acquisition board encounters data frame loss.
ErrorCode.Resolvent:
请按如下顺序检查确认：
1、检测控制柜上面的编码器线是否连接牢固；
2、检查数据采集板上的线缆和插头是否连接完好；
3、检查机器人运动过程中是否会导致数据采集板插头受力接触不良；
4、检查数据采集板硬件电路是否正常工作 ；
5、检查重新上电后报警是否可消除；
若检查确认后还是发生报警，可以尝试更换数据采集板；

1. Check that signal cable is connected. 
2. Check that data acquisition board cable is connected. 
3. Check that the robot motion does not result in poor contact with the data acquisition board connector due to force during robot motion. 
4. Check that the data acquisition board hardware circuit works properly. 
5. Check whether the alarm can be cleared after restart. 
If the alarm persists, replace the data acquisition board.

ErrorCode.Description: 数据采集板数据变化过快
Data acquisition board data changed significantly.
ErrorCode.Reason: 机器人与环境发生碰撞；机器人运动过程中存在明显异响；
Robot collides with environment; robot moves with abnormal sound.
ErrorCode.Resolvent:
请按如下顺序检查确认：
1、检查机器人是否与环境发生碰撞；
2、检测机器人运动速度和加速度是否过大；
若检查确认后还是发生报警，可以尝试更换数据采集板；
1. Check whether robot collides with environment. \n2. Check whether robot speed and acceleration is too high. \nIf the alarm persists, replace the data acquisition board.

ErrorCode.Description: 数据采集板温度超限
Data acquisition board overtemperature.
ErrorCode.Reason: 数据采集板温度超限
Data acquisition board overtemperature.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 请按如下顺序检查确认：1、检查机器人工作环境的温度是否满足要求；\n若检查确认后还是发生报警，可以尝试降低机器人运动速度或加速度；
1. Check that the temperature of the robot's working environment meets the requirements. \n. If the alarm persists, reduce the speed and acceleration of the robot.

ErrorCode.Description: 机器人振动过大
Excessive robot vibration.
ErrorCode.Reason: 机器人振动过大
Excessive robot vibration.
ErrorCode.Resolvent:
请按如下顺序检查确认：
1、检查机器人是否出现明显振动；
2、检查机器人各关节是否存在明显传动间隙；
若检查确认后还是发生报警，可以尝试降低机器人运动速度或加速度；
1. Check the robot for visible vibrations. \n2. Check the robot joints for obvious transmission clearance. \nIf the alarm persists, reduce the speed and acceleration of the robot.

ErrorCode.Description: 机器人定位时间过长
Robot positioning time too long.
ErrorCode.Reason: 机器人残余振动明显，定位时间过长
Residual robot vibration is significant, resulting in long positioning time.
ErrorCode.Resolvent:
请按如下顺序检查确认：
1、检查机器人是否出现明显振动；
2、检查机器人各关节是否存在明显传动间隙；
若检查确认后还是发生报警，可以尝试降低机器人运动速度或加速度；
1. Check the robot for visible vibrations. \n2. Check the robot joints for obvious transmission clearance. \nIf the alarm persists, reduce the speed and acceleration of the robot.

ErrorCode.Description: 碰撞检测
Collision detected.
ErrorCode.Reason: 机器人与环境发生碰撞；机器人运动过程中存在明显异响
Robot collides with environment; robot moves with abnormal sound.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查机器人是否与环境发生碰撞，检测机器人运动过程中是否存在异响
Check whether the robot collides with the environment; check whether there are abnormal noises during the robot motion.

ErrorCode.Description: 振动抑制功能失效
Vibration reduction failure.
ErrorCode.Reason: 振动抑制功能失效
Vibration reduction failure.
ErrorCode.Resolvent:
请按如下顺序检查确认：
1、检测控制柜上面的编码器线是否连接牢固；
2、检查数据采集板上的线缆和插头是否连接完好；
3、检查重新上电后报警是否可消除；
若检查确认后还是发生报警，可以尝试关闭闭环振动抑制功能；

1. Check that signal cable is connected. 
2. Check that data acquisition board cable is connected. 
3. Check whether the alarm can be cleared after restart;
If the alarm persists, turn off the closed loop vibration suppression function.

ErrorCode.Description: 机器人运动状态异常
Robot motion state error.
ErrorCode.Reason:
1、软件机型号与实际不一致；
2、机械原因：如发生碰撞，传动机构松动或卡滞；
3、机器人零点偏差过大；
4、关节减速比设置错误；
5、关节运动方向反向；
6、数据采集板安装方向错误；

1. The robot model in software is not consistent with actual one. 
2. Mechanical causes: collision or loose or stuck transmission mechanism. 
3. Home position deviation is too large. 
4. Reduction ratio setting error. 
5. Joint motion direction error. 
6. Data acquisition board install direction error.
ErrorCode.Resolvent:
请按如下顺序检查确认：
1、确保控制器软件机型号与实际一致；
2、检查是否存在机械异常：如发生碰撞，传动机构松动或卡滞；\3、检查机器人零点是否准确无误；
4、检查设置的减速比参数是否与设计一致；
5、检查关节运动方向是否与定义一致；
6、检查板数据采集板安装方向是否准确；
若检查确认后还是发生报警，可以尝试关闭数据采集板报警功能；

1. Make sure the robot model in software is the same as with the actual one. 
2. Check for mechanical anomalies such as collision, loose or stuck drive mechanism. 
3. Check that the zero point of the robot is accurate. 
4. Check that the reduction ratio parameter is correctly set. 
5. Check that the direction of joint movement is correct. 
6. Check that the data acquisition board is mounted in the correct direction. 
If the alarm persists, turn off data acquisition board alarm function.

ErrorCode.Description: 自学习振动抑制功能计算错误
Self-learning vibration reduction function calculation error.
ErrorCode.Reason: 自学习振动抑制功能计算错误；
Self-learning vibration reduction function calculation error.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 降低运动速度；关闭自学习振动抑制功能；
Reduce the motion speed; turn off the self-learning vibration suppression function.

ErrorCode.Description: 自学习振动抑制功能学习超时
Self-learning vibration suppression learning timeout.
ErrorCode.Reason: 自学习振动抑制功能学习超时；
Self-learning vibration suppression learning timeout.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 1、将运动指令中的自学习标志改为SLOff；\n2、联系厂家处理；
1. Change the self-learning flag in the motor instruction to SLOff. \n2. Contact the manufacturer.

ErrorCode.Description: 数据采集板硬件异常
Data acquisition board hardware failure.
ErrorCode.Reason: 数据采集板ID检查失败
Data acquisition board hardware ID check failure.
ErrorCode.Resolvent:
请按如下顺序检查确认：
1、检查数据采集板是否有元器件损坏；
2、检查数据采集板硬件版本是否匹配；
若检查确认后还是发生报警，可以尝试更换数据采集板；

1. Check the data acquisition board for component damage. \n2. Check that the data acquisition board hardware version and software version match. \nIf the alarm persists, replace the data acquisition board.

ErrorCode.Description: 数据采集板自测异常
Data acquisition board self-test failure.
ErrorCode.Reason: 数据采集板自测不通过
Data acquisition board self-test failure.
ErrorCode.Resolvent:
请按如下顺序检查确认：
1、检查是否有热拔插编码器线和数据采集板线缆；
2、检查数据采集板芯片是否损坏；
3、检查重新上电后报警是否可消除；
若检查确认后还是发生报警，可以尝试更换数据采集板；

1. Check if the encoder cable and data acquisition board cable are hot swapped. 
2. Check whether data acquisition board chips are damaged. 
3. Check whether the alarm can be cleared after restart. 
If the alarm persists, replace the data acquisition board.

ErrorCode.Description: 机器人安装形态设置错误或零点偏大过大，请检查安装形态和零点设置是否正确；该报警不可清除，请重启电控柜。

Robot installation pose is set incorrectly or zero pose deviation is too large, please check whether the installation pose and zero pose setting are correct; this alarm can not be cleared, please restart the control cabinet.
ErrorCode.Reason: 机器人安装形态设置错误或零点偏差过大
Robot installation pose is set incorrectly or zero pose deviation is excessive.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 请正确设置机器人安装形态以及正确设置机器人零点位置
Please set the robot installation pose and the robot zero position correctly.

ErrorCode.Description: 工具负载质量设置超出限制
Tool load mass exceeds limit.
ErrorCode.Reason: 工具负载质量设置值超过限定值
The mass setting of the tool load exceeds the limit.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 1.减少工具负载质量设置值至限定范围
1. Reduce the mass setting of the tool load to the limit range.

ErrorCode.Description: 工具负载质心位置设置超出限制
Tool load centroid position exceeds limit.
ErrorCode.Reason: 工具负载质心位置设置值超过限定值
The centroid position setting of the tool load exceeds the limit.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 1.减少工具负载质心位置设置值至限定范围
1. Reduce the centroid position setting of the tool load to the limit range.

ErrorCode.Description: 工具负载质心姿态设置超出限制
Tool load centroid orientation exceeds limit.
ErrorCode.Reason: 工具负载质心姿态设置值超过限定值
The centroid orientation setting of the tool load exceeds the limit.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 1.减少工具负载质心姿态设置值至限定范围
1. Reduce the centroid orientation setting of the tool load to the limit range.

ErrorCode.Description: 工具负载惯量设置超出限制
Tool load inertia exceeds limit.
ErrorCode.Reason: 工具负载惯量设置值超过限定值
The inertia setting of the tool load exceeds the limit.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 1、减少工具负载惯量设置值至限定范围
1. Reduce the inertia setting of the tool load to the limit range.

ErrorCode.Description: 负载质量设置超出限制
Load mass exceeds the limit.
ErrorCode.Reason: 负载质量设置值超过限定值
The mass setting of the load exceeds the limit.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 1、减少负载质量设置值至限定范围
1. Reduce the mass setting of the load to the limit range.

ErrorCode.Description: 负载质心位置设置超出限制
Load centroid position exceeds limit.
ErrorCode.Reason: 负载质心位置设置值超过限定值
The centroid position setting of the load exceeds the limit.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 1、减少负载质心位置设置值至限定范围
1. Reduce the centroid position setting of the load to the limit range.

ErrorCode.Description: 负载质心姿态设置超出限制
Load centroid orientation exceeds limit.
ErrorCode.Reason: 负载质心姿态设置值超过限定值
The centroid orientation setting of the load exceeds the limit.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 1、减少负载质心姿态设置值至限定范围
1. Reduce the centroid orientation setting of the load to the limit range.

ErrorCode.Description: 负载惯量设置超出限制
Load centroid orientation exceeds limit.
ErrorCode.Reason: 负载惯量设置值超过限定值
The inertia setting of the load exceeds the limit.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 1、减少负载惯量设置值至限定范围
1. Reduce the inertia setting of the load to the limit range.

ErrorCode.Description: 臂上负载质量设置超出限制
Arm load mass exceeds the limit.
ErrorCode.Reason: 臂上负载质量设置值超过限定值
The mass setting of the arm load exceeds the limit.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 1、减少臂上负载质量设置值至限定范围
1. Reduce the mass setting of the arm load to the limit range.

ErrorCode.Description: 臂上负载质心位置设置超出限制
Arm load centroid position exceeds limit.
ErrorCode.Reason: 臂上负载质心位置设置值超过限定值
The centroid position setting of the arm load exceeds the limit.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 1、减少臂上负载质心位置设置值至限定范围
1. Reduce the centroid position setting of the arm load to the limit range.

ErrorCode.Description: 臂上负载质心姿态设置超出限制
Arm load centroid orientation exceeds limit.
ErrorCode.Reason: 臂上负载质心姿态设置值超过限定值
The centroid orientation setting of the arm load exceeds the limit.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 1、减少臂上负载质心姿态设置值至限定范围
1. Reduce the centroid orientation setting of the arm load to the limit range.

ErrorCode.Description: 臂上负载惯量设置超出限制
Arm load inertia exceeds limit.
ErrorCode.Reason: 臂上负载惯量设置值超过限定值
The inertia setting of the arm load exceeds the limit.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 1、减少臂上负载惯量设置值至限定范围
1. Reduce the inertia setting of the arm load to the limit range.

ErrorCode.Description: 检测到J1轴异常，请确认是否发生碰撞；如无碰撞，请确认该轴电机是否发生故障，排查外部线缆干涉、拉扯的情况；如无异常，确认负载参数设置是否正确、确认碰撞检测参数是否已调试；若仍无异常请参考说明书排查原因或调试碰撞检测参数。

An abnormality has been detected on the J1 axis. Please confirm if a collision has occurred. If no collision has occurred, please check if the motor of this axis has malfunctioned,check for any external cable interference or pulling issues. If no issues are found, verify if the load parameters are correctly set and if the collision detection parameters have been properly calibrated. If no abnormalities are found, please refer to the manual to troubleshoot the cause or adjust the collision detection parameters.
ErrorCode.Reason: 请确认是否发生碰撞；如无碰撞，请确认该轴电机是否发生故障；如无异常，确认负载参数设置是否正确、确认碰撞检测参数是否已调试、确认是否由于伺服跟踪能力有限造成；如无异常，确认机器人是否存在长时间冷机或长时间运行后摩擦力显著变化的情况；若仍无异常请参考说明书排查原因或调试碰撞检测参数。

Check whether collision occurs; if there is no collision, check whether the motor on the axis fails; if there is no abnormality, check whether the load parameters are set correctly, check whether the collision detection parameters have been debugged, and check whether it is due to the limited servo tracking capability; if there is no abnormality, check whether the robot has experienced significant changes in friction after prolonged cooling or operation; if there is still no abnormality, refer to the instruction manual to investigate the cause or debug the collision detection parameters.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 请确认是否发生碰撞，若未发生碰撞，请：1）检查负载参数是否设置正确；2）检查控制器中的机器人型号是否与本体一致；3）检查机器人是否出现电机卡死、抱闸未打开等情况；4）若存在机器人长时间冷机后突然启动的情况，请适当热机后再运行；若存在长时间运行后机器人摩擦力显著降低的情况，须联系厂商重新辨识摩擦力；5）若工作在高速重载等工况下，导致电流出现了饱和现象，此时也很容易发生误报警，这种工况已经超出机器人的负载能力，需要避免工作在这种条件下；也可尝试通过指令进入中等精度模式或手动打开所有轴的速度前馈在一定程度上解决该问题。6）若确定为误报，可适当调大该轴的碰撞检测灵敏度，建议使用碰撞检测灵敏度推荐值；7）若仍无效，可尝试关闭该轴的碰撞检测开关.

Check whether a collision has occurred, if not: 1) Check that the load parameters are set correctly; 2) Check that the robot model in the controller matches the actual robot; 3) Check the robot for motor jam, brake not opened, etc.; 4) If there is a situation where the robot suddenly starts after being cold for a long time, please warm up the machine appropriately before running; If there is a significant decrease in the friction force of the robot after prolonged operation; contact the manufacturer to tune the friction parameters; 5) If the robot operates at high speed and heavy load, it will cause current saturation phenomenon, which is prone to false alarms, so prevent the robot from operating under such conditions; You can also try to enter the medium precision mode through commands or manually turn on the speed feedforward of all axes to solve this problem to some extent; 6) If it is determined to be a false alarm, the collision detection sensitivity of the axis can be appropriately increased, and it is recommended to use the recommended collision detection sensitivity value; 7) If the alarm persists, turn off the collision detection switch for that axis.

ErrorCode.Description: 检测到J2轴异常，请确认是否发生碰撞；如无碰撞，请确认该轴电机是否发生故障，排查外部线缆干涉、拉扯的情况；如无异常，确认负载参数设置是否正确、确认碰撞检测参数是否已调试；若仍无异常请参考说明书排查原因或调试碰撞检测参数。

An abnormality has been detected on the J2 axis. Please confirm if a collision has occurred. If no collision has occurred, please check if the motor of this axis has malfunctioned,check for any external cable interference or pulling issues. If no issues are found, verify if the load parameters are correctly set and if the collision detection parameters have been properly calibrated. If no abnormalities are found, please refer to the manual to troubleshoot the cause or adjust the collision detection parameters.
ErrorCode.Reason: 请确认是否发生碰撞；如无碰撞，请确认该轴电机是否发生故障；如无异常，确认负载参数设置是否正确、确认碰撞检测参数是否已调试、确认是否由于伺服跟踪能力有限造成；如无异常，确认机器人是否存在长时间冷机或长时间运行后摩擦力显著变化的情况；若仍无异常请参考说明书排查原因或调试碰撞检测参数。

Check whether collision occurs; if there is no collision, check whether the motor on the axis fails; if there is no abnormality, check whether the load parameters are set correctly, check whether the collision detection parameters have been debugged, and check whether it is due to the limited servo tracking capability; if there is no abnormality, check whether the robot has experienced significant changes in friction after prolonged cooling or operation; if there is still no abnormality, refer to the instruction manual to investigate the cause or debug the collision detection parameters.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 请确认是否发生碰撞，若未发生碰撞，请：1）检查负载参数是否设置正确；2）检查控制器中的机器人型号是否与本体一致；3）检查机器人是否出现电机卡死、抱闸未打开等情况；4）若存在机器人长时间冷机后突然启动的情况，请适当热机后再运行；若存在长时间运行后机器人摩擦力显著降低的情况，须联系厂商重新辨识摩擦力；5）若工作在高速重载等工况下，导致电流出现了饱和现象，此时也很容易发生误报警，这种工况已经超出机器人的负载能力，需要避免工作在这种条件下；也可尝试通过指令进入中等精度模式或手动打开所有轴的速度前馈在一定程度上解决该问题。6）若确定为误报，可适当调大该轴的碰撞检测灵敏度，建议使用碰撞检测灵敏度推荐值；8）若仍无效，可尝试关闭该轴的碰撞检测开关.

Check whether a collision has occurred, if not: 1) Check that the load parameters are set correctly; 2) Check that the robot model in the controller matches the actual robot; 3) Check the robot for motor jam, brake not opened, etc.; 4) If there is a situation where the robot suddenly starts after being cold for a long time, please warm up the machine appropriately before running; If there is a significant decrease in the friction force of the robot after prolonged operation; contact the manufacturer to tune the friction parameters; 5)If the robot operates at high speed and heavy load, it will cause current saturation phenomenon, which is prone to false alarms, so prevent the robot from operating under such conditions; You can also try to enter the medium precision mode through commands or manually turn on the speed feedforward of all axes to solve this problem to some extent; 6) If it is determined to be a false alarm, the collision detection sensitivity of the axis can be appropriately increased, and it is recommended to use the recommended collision detection sensitivity value; 7) If the alarm persists, turn off the collision detection switch for that axis.

ErrorCode.Description: 检测到J3轴异常，请确认是否发生碰撞；如无碰撞，请确认该轴电机是否发生故障，排查外部线缆干涉、拉扯的情况；如无异常，确认负载参数设置是否正确、确认碰撞检测参数是否已调试；若仍无异常请参考说明书排查原因或调试碰撞检测参数。

If no issues are found, verify if the load parameters are correctly set and if the collision detection parameters have been properly calibrated. If no abnormalities are found, please refer to the manual to troubleshoot the cause or adjust the collision detection parameters.
ErrorCode.Reason: 请确认是否发生碰撞；如无碰撞，请确认该轴电机是否发生故障；如无异常，确认负载参数设置是否正确、确认碰撞检测参数是否已调试、确认是否由于伺服跟踪能力有限造成；如无异常，确认机器人是否存在长时间冷机或长时间运行后摩擦力显著变化的情况；若仍无异常请参考说明书排查原因或调试碰撞检测参数。

Check whether collision occurs; if there is no collision, check whether the motor on the axis fails; if there is no abnormality, check whether the load parameters are set correctly, check whether the collision detection parameters have been debugged, and check whether it is due to the limited servo tracking capability; if there is no abnormality, check whether the robot has experienced significant changes in friction after prolonged cooling or operation; if there is still no abnormality, refer to the instruction manual to investigate the cause or debug the collision detection parameters.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 请确认是否发生碰撞，若未发生碰撞，请：1）检查负载参数是否设置正确；2）检查控制器中的机器人型号是否与本体一致；3）检查机器人是否出现电机卡死、抱闸未打开等情况；4）若存在机器人长时间冷机后突然启动的情况，请适当热机后再运行；若存在长时间运行后机器人摩擦力显著降低的情况，须联系厂商重新辨识摩擦力；5）若工作在高速重载等工况下，导致电流出现了饱和现象，此时也很容易发生误报警，这种工况已经超出机器人的负载能力，需要避免工作在这种条件下；也可尝试通过指令进入中等精度模式或手动打开所有轴的速度前馈在一定程度上解决该问题。6）若确定为误报，可适当调大该轴的碰撞检测灵敏度，建议使用碰撞检测灵敏度推荐值；9）若仍无效，可尝试关闭该轴的碰撞检测开关.

Check whether a collision has occurred, if not: 1) Check that the load parameters are set correctly; 2) Check that the robot model in the controller matches the actual robot; 3) Check the robot for motor jam, brake not opened, etc.; 4) If there is a situation where the robot suddenly starts after being cold for a long time, please warm up the machine appropriately before running; If there is a significant decrease in the friction force of the robot after prolonged operation; contact the manufacturer to tune the friction parameters; 5)If the robot operates at high speed and heavy load, it will cause current saturation phenomenon, which is prone to false alarms, so prevent the robot from operating under such conditions; You can also try to enter the medium precision mode through commands or manually turn on the speed feedforward of all axes to solve this problem to some extent; 6) If it is determined to be a false alarm, the collision detection sensitivity of the axis can be appropriately increased, and it is recommended to use the recommended collision detection sensitivity value; 7) If the alarm persists, turn off the collision detection switch for that axis.

ErrorCode.Description: 检测到J4轴异常，请确认是否发生碰撞；如无碰撞，请确认该轴电机是否发生故障，排查外部线缆干涉、拉扯的情况；如无异常，确认负载参数设置是否正确、确认碰撞检测参数是否已调试；若仍无异常请参考说明书排查原因或调试碰撞检测参数。

An abnormality has been detected on the J4 axis. Please confirm if a collision has occurred. If no collision has occurred, please check if the motor of this axis has malfunctioned,check for any external cable interference or pulling issues. If no issues are found, verify if the load parameters are correctly set and if the collision detection parameters have been properly calibrated. If no abnormalities are found, please refer to the manual to troubleshoot the cause or adjust the collision detection parameters.
ErrorCode.Reason: 请确认是否发生碰撞；如无碰撞，请确认该轴电机是否发生故障；如无异常，确认负载参数设置是否正确、确认碰撞检测参数是否已调试、确认是否由于伺服跟踪能力有限造成；如无异常，确认机器人是否存在长时间冷机或长时间运行后摩擦力显著变化的情况；若仍无异常请参考说明书排查原因或调试碰撞检测参数。

ErrorCode.Resolvent: 请确认是否发生碰撞，若未发生碰撞，请：1）检查负载参数是否设置正确；2）检查控制器中的机器人型号是否与本体一致；3）检查机器人是否出现电机卡死、抱闸未打开等情况；4）若存在机器人长时间冷机后突然启动的情况，请适当热机后再运行；若存在长时间运行后机器人摩擦力显著降低的情况，须联系厂商重新辨识摩擦力；5）若工作在高速重载等工况下，导致电流出现了饱和现象，此时也很容易发生误报警，这种工况已经超出机器人的负载能力，需要避免工作在这种条件下；也可尝试通过指令进入中等精度模式或手动打开所有轴的速度前馈在一定程度上解决该问题。6）若确定为误报，可适当调大该轴的碰撞检测灵敏度，建议使用碰撞检测灵敏度推荐值；10）若仍无效，可尝试关闭该轴的碰撞检测开关.

Check whether a collision has occurred, if not: 1) Check that the load parameters are set correctly; 2) Check that the robot model in the controller matches the actual robot; 3) Check the robot for motor jam, brake not opened, etc.; 4) If there is a situation where the robot suddenly starts after being cold for a long time, please warm up the machine appropriately before running; If there is a significant decrease in the friction force of the robot after prolonged operation; contact the manufacturer to tune the friction parameters; 5)If the robot operates at high speed and heavy load, it will cause current saturation phenomenon, which is prone to false alarms, so prevent the robot from operating under such conditions; You can also try to enter the medium precision mode through commands or manually turn on the speed feedforward of all axes to solve this problem to some extent; 6) If it is determined to be a false alarm, the collision detection sensitivity of the axis can be appropriately increased, and it is recommended to use the recommended collision detection sensitivity value; 7) If the alarm persists, turn off the collision detection switch for that axis.

ErrorCode.Resolvent: 请确认是否发生碰撞，若未发生碰撞，请：1）检查负载参数是否设置正确；2）检查控制器中的机器人型号是否与本体一致；3）检查机器人是否出现电机卡死、抱闸未打开等情况；4）若存在机器人长时间冷机后突然启动的情况，请适当热机后再运行；若存在长时间运行后机器人摩擦力显著降低的情况，须联系厂商重新辨识摩擦力；5）若工作在高速重载等工况下，导致电流出现了饱和现象，此时也很容易发生误报警，这种工况已经超出机器人的负载能力，需要避免工作在这种条件下；也可尝试通过指令进入中等精度模式或手动打开所有轴的速度前馈在一定程度上解决该问题。6）若确定为误报，可适当调大该轴的碰撞检测灵敏度，建议使用碰撞检测灵敏度推荐值；12）若仍无效，可尝试关闭该轴的碰撞检测开关.

Check whether a collision has occurred, if not: 1) Check that the load parameters are set correctly; 2) Check that the robot model in the controller matches the actual robot; 3) Check the robot for motor jam, brake not opened, etc.; 4) If there is a situation where the robot suddenly starts after being cold for a long time, please warm up the machine appropriately before running; If there is a significant decrease in the friction force of the robot after prolonged operation; contact the manufacturer to tune the friction parameters; 5) If the robot operates at high speed and heavy load, it will cause current saturation phenomenon, which is prone to false alarms, so prevent the robot from operating under such conditions; You can also try to enter the medium precision mode through commands or manually turn on the speed feedforward of all axes to solve this problem to some extent; 6) If it is determined to be a false alarm, the collision detection sensitivity of the axis can be appropriately increased, and it is recommended to use the recommended collision detection sensitivity value; 7) If the alarm persists, turn off the collision detection switch for that axis.

ErrorCode.Description: 检测到J10轴异常，请确认是否发生碰撞；如无碰撞，请确认该轴电机是否发生故障，排查外部线缆干涉、拉扯的情况；如无异常，确认负载参数设置是否正确、确认碰撞检测参数是否已调试；若仍无异常请参考说明书排查原因或调试碰撞检测参数。

An abnormality has been detected on the J10 axis. Please confirm if a collision has occurred. If no collision has occurred, please check if the motor of this axis has malfunctioned,check for any external cable interference or pulling issues. If no issues are found, verify if the load parameters are correctly set and if the collision detection parameters have been properly calibrated. If no abnormalities are found, please refer to the manual to troubleshoot the cause or adjust the collision detection parameters.
ErrorCode.Reason: 请确认是否发生碰撞；如无碰撞，请确认该轴电机是否发生故障；如无异常，确认负载参数设置是否正确、确认碰撞检测参数是否已调试、确认是否由于伺服跟踪能力有限造成；如无异常，确认机器人是否存在长时间冷机或长时间运行后摩擦力显著变化的情况；若仍无异常请参考说明书排查原因或调试碰撞检测参数。

ErrorCode.Description: 接收到碰撞信号
Received collision signal
ErrorCode.Reason: 接收到碰撞信号
Received collision signal
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 清除碰撞信号
Clear collision signal

ErrorCode.Description: 检测到J1轴运动状态异常
Abnormal motion state is detected in axis 1
ErrorCode.Reason: 1、机器人发生碰撞；或因负载参数、机型参数严重错误、零点严重偏离导致电流异常。\n2、伺服故障，可能的故障类型有：动力线UVW相序错误、电机电角度错误、编码器型号不匹配、编码器接线故障、伺服增益不匹配等。 \n3、机器人运动速度、加速度过大，超出当前机器人的运动能力，造成速度偏差和转矩偏差过大。

1. Robot collision; or abnormal current due to serious errors in load parameters, model parameters, and serious deviation of zero point. \n2. Servo faults, including: power line UVW phase sequence error, motor angle error, encoder model mismatch, encoder wiring failure, servo gain mismatch, etc. \n3. Robot motion speed and acceleration are too large, exceeding the robot's motion capability, resulting in excessive speed deviation and torque deviation.
ErrorCode.Resolvent:
在排查此故障时，当任一轴电机上使能前，请务必确保相关人员在机器人的工作范围之外！
1、首先确认是否发生过剧烈碰撞，若未发生碰撞，检查是否正确设置负载参数，检查机器人本体与控制器中显示的机型是否匹配，检查机器人零点是否有严重偏离。
2、若未发生碰撞且无明显异常，尝试增大伺服增益、打开伺服速度前馈（可通过指令进入中等精度模式打开速度前馈），看是否仍然报警。
3、若排除碰撞和控制器端的因素，接下来依次排查伺服端的因素。
1）、U V W相序接线错误。处理措施：按照正确U V W相序接线。
2）、上电时，干扰信号导致电机转子初始相位检测错误。处理方法：重新上电。
4、编码器型号错误或接线错误。处理方法：重新确认电机型号，确认H00-00参数是否正确，编码器类型，编码器接线。
5、编码器接线错误、老化腐蚀，编码器插头松动。处理方法：重新焊接、插紧或更换编码器线缆。
6、参数设置不合理导致伺服运行振动过大。处理方法：设置合适的参数避免伺服运行振动过大。
更多参见手册中附录《机器人报警及处理方法》

When troubleshooting, always make sure that the person is outside the robot's operating range before activating the motor on any axis! 
1. First check if a violent collision has occurred, if no collision occurs, check that the load parameters are set correctly, check that the robot matches the model displayed in the controller, and check if there is a serious deviation from the zero point of the robot. 
2. If there is no collision and no obvious abnormality, try increasing the servo gain and turning on the servo speed feedforward (which can be turned on through the command to enter the medium precision mode) to see if the alarm still persists. 
3. If the collision and controller side factors are excluded, then investigate the servo side factors in order. 
1). The UVW phase sequence is incorrect. Connect the U/V/W cables in the correct phase sequence. 
2). An error occurs on the initial phase detection of the motor rotor due to disturbing signals upon power-on. Power on the system again. 
4. The encoder model is wrong or the encoder is wired improperly. Confirm the motor model, the parameter H00-00, the encoder type, and the encoder wiring are correct. 
5. The encoder is wired improperly, aged, or connected loosely. Re-solder, tighten or replace the encoder cable. 
6. Improper parameter setting leads to excessive vibration. Set the parameters appropriately to avoid excessive vibration. 
 For more information, see "Robot Alarms and Handling Method" in the manual.

ErrorCode.Description: 检测到J2轴运动状态异常
Abnormal motion state detected on J2 axis.
ErrorCode.Reason: 1、机器人发生碰撞；或因负载参数、机型参数严重错误、零点严重偏离导致电流异常。\n2、伺服故障，可能的故障类型有：动力线UVW相序错误、电机电角度错误、编码器型号不匹配、编码器接线故障、伺服增益不匹配等。 \n3、机器人运动速度、加速度过大，超出当前机器人的运动能力，造成速度偏差和转矩偏差过大。

1. Robot collision; or abnormal current due to serious errors in load parameters, model parameters, and serious deviation of zero point. \n2. Servo faults, including: power line UVW phase sequence error, motor angle error, encoder model mismatch, encoder wiring failure, servo gain mismatch, etc. \n3. Robot motion speed and acceleration are too large, exceeding the robot's motion capability, resulting in excessive speed deviation and torque deviation.
ErrorCode.Resolvent:
在排查此故障时，当任一轴电机上使能前，请务必确保相关人员在机器人的工作范围之外！
1、首先确认是否发生过剧烈碰撞，若未发生碰撞，检查是否正确设置负载参数，检查机器人本体与控制器中显示的机型是否匹配，检查机器人零点是否有严重偏离。
2、若未发生碰撞且无明显异常，尝试增大伺服增益、打开伺服速度前馈（可通过指令进入中等精度模式打开速度前馈），看是否仍然报警。
3、若排除碰撞和控制器端的因素，接下来依次排查伺服端的因素。
1）、U V W相序接线错误。处理措施：按照正确U V W相序接线。
2）、上电时，干扰信号导致电机转子初始相位检测错误。处理方法：重新上电。
4、编码器型号错误或接线错误。处理方法：重新确认电机型号，确认H00-00参数是否正确，编码器类型，编码器接线。
5、编码器接线错误、老化腐蚀，编码器插头松动。处理方法：重新焊接、插紧或更换编码器线缆。
6、参数设置不合理导致伺服运行振动过大。处理方法：设置合适的参数避免伺服运行振动过大。
更多参见手册中附录《机器人报警及处理方法》

在排查此故障时，当任一轴电机上使能前，请务必确保相关人员在机器人的工作范围之外！
1、首先确认是否发生过剧烈碰撞，若未发生碰撞，检查是否正确设置负载参数，检查机器人本体与控制器中显示的机型是否匹配，检查机器人零点是否有严重偏离。
2、若未发生碰撞且无明显异常，尝试增大伺服增益、打开伺服速度前馈（可通过指令进入中等精度模式打开速度前馈），看是否仍然报警。
3、若排除碰撞和控制器端的因素，接下来依次排查伺服端的因素。
1）、U V W相序接线错误。处理措施：按照正确U V W相序接线。
2）、上电时，干扰信号导致电机转子初始相位检测错误。处理方法：重新上电。
4、编码器型号错误或接线错误。处理方法：重新确认电机型号，确认H00-00参数是否正确，编码器类型，编码器接线。
5、编码器接线错误、老化腐蚀，编码器插头松动。处理方法：重新焊接、插紧或更换编码器线缆。
6、参数设置不合理导致伺服运行振动过大。处理方法：设置合适的参数避免伺服运行振动过大。
更多参见手册中附录《机器人报警及处理方法》

When troubleshooting, always make sure that the person is outside the robot's operating range before activating the motor on any axis! 
1. First check if a violent collision has occurred, if no collision occurs, check that the load parameters are set correctly, check that the robot matches the model displayed in the controller, and check if there is a serious deviation from the zero point of the robot. 
2. If there is no collision and no obvious abnormality, try increasing the servo gain and turning on the servo speed feedforward (which can be turned on through the command to enter the medium precision mode) to see if the alarm still persists. 
3. If the collision and controller side factors are excluded, then investigate the servo side factors in order. 
1). The UVW phase sequence is incorrect. Connect the U/V/W cables in the correct phase sequence. 
2). An error occurs on the initial phase detection of the motor rotor due to disturbing signals upon power-on. Power on the system again. 
4. The encoder model is wrong or the encoder is wired improperly. Confirm the motor model, the parameter H00-00, the encoder type, and the encoder wiring are correct. 
5. The encoder is wired improperly, aged, or connected loosely. Re-solder, tighten or replace the encoder cable. 
6. Improper parameter setting leads to excessive vibration. Set the parameters appropriately to avoid excessive vibration. 
 For more information, see "Robot Alarms and Handling Method" in the manual.

ErrorCode.Description: 检测到J4轴运动状态异常
Abnormal motion state detected on J4 axis.
ErrorCode.Reason: 1、机器人发生碰撞；或因负载参数、机型参数严重错误、零点严重偏离导致电流异常。\n2、伺服故障，可能的故障类型有：动力线UVW相序错误、电机电角度错误、编码器型号不匹配、编码器接线故障、伺服增益不匹配等。 \n3、机器人运动速度、加速度过大，超出当前机器人的运动能力，造成速度偏差和转矩偏差过大。

1. Robot collision; or abnormal current due to serious errors in load parameters, model parameters, and serious deviation of zero point. \n2. Servo faults, including: power line UVW phase sequence error, motor angle error, encoder model mismatch, encoder wiring failure, servo gain mismatch, etc. \n3. Robot motion speed and acceleration are too large, exceeding the robot's motion capability, resulting in excessive speed deviation and torque deviation.
ErrorCode.Resolvent:
在排查此故障时，当任一轴电机上使能前，请务必确保相关人员在机器人的工作范围之外！
1、首先确认是否发生过剧烈碰撞，若未发生碰撞，检查是否正确设置负载参数，检查机器人本体与控制器中显示的机型是否匹配，检查机器人零点是否有严重偏离。
2、若未发生碰撞且无明显异常，尝试增大伺服增益、打开伺服速度前馈（可通过指令进入中等精度模式打开速度前馈），看是否仍然报警。
3、若排除碰撞和控制器端的因素，接下来依次排查伺服端的因素。
1）、U V W相序接线错误。处理措施：按照正确U V W相序接线。
2）、上电时，干扰信号导致电机转子初始相位检测错误。处理方法：重新上电。
4、编码器型号错误或接线错误。处理方法：重新确认电机型号，确认H00-00参数是否正确，编码器类型，编码器接线。
5、编码器接线错误、老化腐蚀，编码器插头松动。处理方法：重新焊接、插紧或更换编码器线缆。
6、参数设置不合理导致伺服运行振动过大。处理方法：设置合适的参数避免伺服运行振动过大。
更多参见手册中附录《机器人报警及处理方法》

ErrorCode.Description: 不支持的功能
Unsupported feature
ErrorCode.Reason: 22版本第一阶段暂不支持的功能（如跟随工艺）
Features not currently supported in the first phase of version 22 (such as tracking).
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 删除含有不支持功能的相关指令；
Delete related instructions containing unsupported features.

ErrorCode.Description: 接收到碰撞信号，执行急停停机
Receiving collision signal, and emergency stop action has been executed
ErrorCode.Reason: 接收到碰撞信号
Receiving collision signal
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 清除碰撞信号
Clear collision signal

ErrorCode.Description: 快抓指令预处理规划错误
CnvFastCatch instruction preprocessing planning error.
ErrorCode.Reason: 进行快抓指令预处理时无水平规划段
There is no horizontal planning section during preprocessing of CnvFastCatch instruction.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 适当修改快抓指令的运动起点，保证快抓指令在运动过程中存在水平段的运动
Modify the starting point of the CnvFastCatch instruction appropriately to ensure that there is a horizontal movement during the movement of the CnvFastCatch instruction.

ErrorCode.Description: 传送带编号不一致
Conveyor index inconsistent.
ErrorCode.Reason: GetCnvObject指令与RefSys Conveyor、CnvFastCatch指令之间的传送带编号不一致
Conveyor index is inconsistent between GetCnvObject instruction and RefSys Conveyor instruction, or between GetCnvObject instruction and CnvFastCatch instruction.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 将GetCnvObject指令与RefSys Conveyor、CnvFastCatch指令之间的传送带编号修改为一致
Modify conveyor index to be consistent between the GetCnvObject instruction and the RefSys Conveyor and CnvFastCatch instructions.

ErrorCode.Description: 传送带指令使用冲突
Conveyor instruction conflict.
ErrorCode.Reason: 同时使用了RefSys Conveyor指令与CnvFastCatch指令
RefSys Conveyor instruction and CnvFastCatch instruction are used at the same time.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: RefSys Conveyor指令和CnvFastCatch指令之间必须要有RefSys Base指令隔开
RefSys Conveyor instruction and CnvFastCatch instruction must be separated by RefSys Base instruction.

ErrorCode.Description: 传送带指令工具参数错误
Error in tool parameter of conveyor instruction.
ErrorCode.Reason: 跟随运动中的运动指令所使用的工具为非夹持属性
The tool used in tracking motion instruction is not a gripping tool.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 将跟随运动中的运动指令所使用的工具切换为夹持属性的工具
Switch the tool used in tracking motion instruction to a gripping tool.

ErrorCode.Description: 激活的传送带所关联的工件坐标系参数错误
Error in parameter of workobject frame associated with the active conveyor.
ErrorCode.Reason: 激活的传送带所关联的工件属性为工件夹持或用户坐标系非固定
The attribute of workobject frame associated with the active conveyor: (1) the workobject is not held; or (2) the user frame is not fixed.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 激活的传送带所关联的工件切换为工件非夹持且用户坐标系固定的工件
Switch the workobject frame connected with the active conveyor to the workobject frame whose workobject is held and user frame is fixed.

ErrorCode.Description: 跟随工艺不支持“机器人位于可移动导轨上”的安装方式
The tracking process does not support the installation of robot on a movable guide rail.
ErrorCode.Reason: 跟随工艺不支持“机器人位于可移动导轨上”的安装方式
The tracking process does not support the installation of robot on a movable guide rail.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 在“机械单元配置”的属性页面中修改为“机器人在固定位置”选项
Change the installation mode of the robot to "Robot in Fixed Position" on the mechanical unit configuration interface.

ErrorCode.Description: 传感器触发频率过高
Sensor triggered too frequently.
ErrorCode.Reason: 来料过密，导致传感器触发周期 小于 0.6 s，从而会导致拍照频率过高
The material is fed too fast, resulting in a sensor triggering cycle of less than 0.6s, which can lead to excessively high photography frequency.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 减小传感器触发的频率
Reduce the trigger frequency of sensor.

ErrorCode.Description: DO电平保持时间过长
The holding time of DO level is too long
ErrorCode.Reason: 存在 DO电平保持时间 大于 传感器触发周期的情况，则会导致传感器触发拍照不及时
The holding time of the DO level is less than the trigger cycle of sensor, which will cause that the sensor does not trigger to take pictures in time
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 减小参数“I/O电平保持时间”的值，或者减小传感器触发的频率
Reduce the value of the parameter " holding time of I/O level ", or reduce the trigger frequency of sensor

ErrorCode.Description: 快抓指令不支持非SCARA机型
The CnvFastCatch instruction does not robots other than SCARA robots.
ErrorCode.Reason: 快抓指令不支持非SCARA机型
The CnvFastCatch instruction does not robots other than SCARA robots.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 非SCARA机型，不得使用快抓指令
Do not use nvFastCatch instruction for non-SCARA robots.

ErrorCode.Description: SetCnvVisOTMode使用错误
SetCnvVisOTMode instruction use error.
ErrorCode.Reason: 非“视觉”、“视觉+传感器”、“视觉+指令”检测方式，不允许使用指令SetCnvVisOTMode
The SetCnvVisOTMode instruction is not allowed if the detection mode is not "vision", "vision+sensor", or "vision+instruction".
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 将对应传送带的检测方式切换为“视觉”、“视觉+传感器”或“视觉+指令”
Switch the detection method of the conveyor to "vision", "vision+sensor", or "vision+instruction".

ErrorCode.Description: 软浮动功能已开启，不允许开启跟随工艺
The tracking process cannot be enabled when the soft float is enabled.
ErrorCode.Reason: 软浮动功能与跟随工艺功能互斥
The soft float function and tracking process function are mutually exclusive.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 关闭软浮动功能再开启跟随工艺
Turn off the soft float function and then turn on the tracking process.

ErrorCode.Description: 编码器分辨率不应为0
The encoder resolution should not be zero.
ErrorCode.Reason: 开启虚拟传送带速度后，编码器分辨率不应为 0
When the virtual conveyor speed is enabled, the encoder resolution should not be set to zero.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 调整编码器分辨率为非 0 值，或者关闭虚拟传送带速度
Adjust the encoder resolution to a non-zero value, or disable the virtual conveyor speed.

ErrorCode.Description: 跟随状态下超出速度设定值
The speed setting is exceeded in the tracking state.
ErrorCode.Reason: 跟随状态下机器人接近奇异区附近
The robot approaches the singular position in the tracking state.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 调整工作下界，使得机器人奇异区不在跟随工艺的工作范围内
Adjust the lower bound of workspace so that the robot's singularity is not within the workspace of the tracking process.

ErrorCode.Description: 跟随状态下超出加速度设定值
The acceleration setting is exceeded in the tracking state.
ErrorCode.Reason: 跟随状态下机器人接近奇异区附近
The robot approaches the singular position in the tracking state.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 调整工作下界，使得机器人奇异区不在跟随工艺的工作范围内
Adjust the lower workspace boundary so that the robot's singularity is not within the workspace of the tracking process.

ErrorCode.Description: ECP不支持Jump/JumpL指令
Jump/JumpL motion is forbidden in ECP frame.
ErrorCode.Reason: ECP不支持Jump/JumpL指令
Jump/JumpL motion is forbidden in ECP frame.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 更换坐标系或运动指令
Change the frame or change the motion instructions.

ErrorCode.Description: 工具和工件坐标系不匹配
Tool frame and wobj frame do not match.
ErrorCode.Reason: 工具和工件坐标系不匹配
Tool frame and wobj frame do not match.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 更换坐标系
Change the frame.

ErrorCode.Description: ECP不支持外部轴运动
External axis motion is forbidden in ECP frame.
ErrorCode.Reason: ECP不支持外部轴运动
External axis motion is forbidden in ECP frame.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 更换坐标系或运动指令
Change the frames or change the motion instructions.

ErrorCode.Description: ECP不支持动态跟随指令
Tracking motion is forbidden in ECP frame.
ErrorCode.Reason: ECP不支持动态跟随指令
Tracking motion is forbidden in ECP frame.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 更换坐标系或运动指令
Change the frame or change the motion instructions.

ErrorCode.Description: 系统时间波动异常
Abnormal system time fluctuation.
ErrorCode.Reason: 系统调度时间波动过大
Excessive fluctuation of system scheduling time.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 请导出诊断信息，联系厂家处理
Export the diagnostic information and contact the manufacturer.

ErrorCode.Description: nc线程调度时间异常
NC thread scheduling time exception.
ErrorCode.Reason: nc线程调度时间波动过大
NC thread scheduling time fluctuates too much.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 请导出诊断信息，联系厂家处理
Export the diagnostic information and contact the manufacturer.

ErrorCode.Description: nrt线程执行时间异常
NRT thread execution time exception.
ErrorCode.Reason: nrt线程执行时间超时
NRT thread execution timeout.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 请导出诊断信息，联系厂家处理
Export the diagnostic information and contact the manufacturer.

ErrorCode.Description: 实时任务执行时间异常
Real time task execution time exception.
ErrorCode.Reason: 实时任务执行时间超时
Real time task execution timeout.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 请导出诊断信息，联系厂家处理
Export the diagnostic information and contact the manufacturer.

ErrorCode.Description: 系统定时器反馈异常
Abnormal system timer feedback.
ErrorCode.Reason: 系统clock_nanosleep返回值异常
System clock_nanosleep return value exception.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 请导出诊断信息，联系厂家处理
Export the diagnostic information and contact the manufacturer.

ErrorCode.Description: rtBus线程执行时间异常
Rtbus thread execution time exception.
ErrorCode.Reason: rtBus线程执行时间超时
Rtbus thread execution timeout.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 请导出诊断信息，联系厂家处理
Export the diagnostic information and contact the manufacturer.

ErrorCode.Description: 细分配置信息校验错误
Subdivision configuration information verification error.
ErrorCode.Reason: 细分配置信息校验错误
Subdivision configuration information verification error.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 请导出诊断信息，联系厂家处理
Export the diagnostic information and contact the manufacturer.

ErrorCode.Description: 奇异穿越功能无法到达示教的关节角度
Singularity crossing function fails to reach the taught joint positions
ErrorCode.Reason: 奇异穿越功能无法到达示教的关节角度
Singularity crossing function fails to reach the taught joint positions
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 关闭奇异穿越功能或者更改目标点
Turn off singularity crossing function or change the target point.

ErrorCode.Description: MCU配置信息校验错误
MCU configuration information verification error
ErrorCode.Reason: MCU配置信息校验错误
MCU configuration information verification error
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 联系厂家解决
Contact the manufacturer to resolve the issue

ErrorCode.Description: 轴1正限位报警
J1 axis positive limit alarm
ErrorCode.Reason: 到达关节极限位置
The joint limit position is reached.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 反向运动清除
Perform negative motion to clear the alarm.

ErrorCode.Description: 轴1负限位报警
J1 axis negative limit alarm
ErrorCode.Reason: 到达关节极限位置
The joint limit position is reached.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 正向运动清除
Perform positive motion to clear the alarm.

ErrorCode.Description: 轴1驱动报警
J1 axis drive alarm
ErrorCode.Reason: 驱动器出现报警
The drive has an alarm.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 根据报警码查阅伺服手册做相应的故障排除
Perform troubleshooting by referring to the servo manual according to fault codes.

ErrorCode.Description: 轴1规划溢出报警
J1 axis path planning out of range
ErrorCode.Reason: The planned value exceeds the maximum calculation range (-1073741823 to 1073741824).
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查绝对原点位置是否选择在靠近计数极限边沿位置，若是，则在原点位置时，将驱动器位置清圈数
Check whether the absolute origin position is selected to be near the counting limit. If the zero point is near the limit, clear the drive turns.

ErrorCode.Description: 轴1跟随误差过大报警
Excessive tracking error of J1 axis
ErrorCode.Reason: 规划位置和实际位置差过大
The difference between the planned and actual positions is too large.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: (1)查看跟随误差阈值(2)检查机械是否有卡滞(3)检查动力线缆连接是否正常(4)检查负载于伺服增益是否匹配(5)查询跟随误差排障手册

1. View the tracking error threshold. 2. Check for mechanical stuck. 3. Check that the power lines are properly connected. 4. Check that the load matches the servo gain. 5. Consult the troubleshooting guide.

ErrorCode.Description: 轴1速度过大报警
J1 axis overspeed
ErrorCode.Reason: 运行速度大于设定的最大速度
The running speed is greater than the set maximum speed.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 降低第1关节速度
Reduce the speed of the J1 axis.

ErrorCode.Description: 轴1的驱动强电未上
Strong current of J1 axis is not switched on.
ErrorCode.Reason: 强电未上
Strong current is not switched on.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查驱动器电路，是否强电未上
Check the drive circuit for whether strong current is not switched on.

ErrorCode.Description: 第1关节转矩超限
J1 axis torque overlimit
ErrorCode.Reason: 关节转矩超出允许值
The actual maximum current exceeds the limit.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: (1)适当减小加速度参数；\n(2)检测负载参数设置是否合适，将其适当改大；\n(3)如果开启最优轨迹，参考最优轨迹的调制指导，

1. Reduce the acceleration parameters appropriately. \N2. Check that the load parameter settings are appropriate. \n3. If the optimal trajectory is enabled, refer to the modulation guidance of the optimal trajectory.

ErrorCode.Description: 第1关节平均负载率超限
J1 axis average load rate overlimit
ErrorCode.Reason: 平均负载率超出温升、寿命的限制；
The average load rate exceeds the limits of temperature rise and lifespan.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: (1)排查抱闸问题、机械卡死、驱动器问题;\n(2)适当降低速度或加速度百分比；\n(3)延长非运动时间；纯运动节拍测试时可能会出现平均负载率超限，此时不代表实际应用时超限，可将实际应用中的等待、逻辑交互等延时加入测试程序再测试；

1. Investigate brake, mechanical jamming, and drive. \n2. Reduce the speed or acceleration percentage appropriately. \n3. Extend the non-motion time. In the pure motion beat test, the average load rate may exceed the limit, which does not mean that it exceeds the limit in actual application. You can add delay such as waiting and logical interaction in actual application to the test program and test again.

ErrorCode.Description: 第1关节速度超出设定值
J1 axis speed overlimit
ErrorCode.Reason: 对规划输出进行校验时发现超出了设定的关节速度。
When verifying the planned output, it was found that the set joint speed was exceeded.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: (1)如果是CP运动，适当降低位置速度或增大关节速度，或调整点位远离奇异区(2)查看报警记录是否有其他伴随报警

1. In case of CP motion, reduce position speed or increase joint speed appropriately, or adjust the points to move away from singularities. 2. Check if there are any other accompanying alarms in the alarm record.

ErrorCode.Description: 第1关节加速度超出设定值
J1 axis acceleration overlimit
ErrorCode.Reason: 规划输出进行校验时发现超出了设定的关节速度
When verifying the planned output, it was found that the set joint acceleration was exceeded.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: (1)如果是CP运动，适当降低位置速度或增大关节速度，或调整点位远离奇异区(2)查看报警记录是否有其他伴随报警。

1. In case of CP motion, reduce position speed or increase joint speed appropriately, or adjust the points to move away from singularities. 2. Check if there are any other accompanying alarms in the alarm record.

ErrorCode.Description: 第1关节使能同步异常
J1 axis enable synchronization error
ErrorCode.Reason: 上使前机器人有振动或上使能过程中因外部原因对机器人造成运动
The robot vibrates before it is enabled, or the robot moves due to external reasons during the enabling process.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查上电时刻是否关节有运动，检查上使能过程中是否有外力因素干扰
Check whether there is joint movement during power on, and whether there is external interference during the enabling process.

ErrorCode.Description: 第1关节到位超时
J1 axis arrival timeout
ErrorCode.Reason: 伺服到位时间过长
The servo takes too long to arrive the target position.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查到位误差是否过小或者伺服增益
Check whether the arrival error threshold is too small or whether the servo gain is not proper.

ErrorCode.Description: 关节1位置反馈异常
J1 axis position feedback error
ErrorCode.Reason: (1)圈值发生变化(2)码器位置跳变
1. Multi-turn value changes. 2. Encoder position jumps.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查是否人为清除，若不是，请检查干扰源
Check if the multi turn value has been manually cleared. If not, check for the interference source.

ErrorCode.Description: 第1关节下使能状态异常
J1 axis disable status error
ErrorCode.Reason: 机器人未能在规定的时间与距离内下使能
The robot failed to be disabled at the specified time and distance.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 1、检查伺服参数6084参数，抱闸设置，0209是否正确\n2、查看负载是否超规格使用
1. Check that servo parameter 6084 and brake parameter 0209 are correctly set. \n2. Check if the load exceeds the limit.

ErrorCode.Description: 轴2正限位报警
J2 axis positive limit alarm
ErrorCode.Reason: 到达关节极限位置
The joint limit position is reached.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 反向运动清除
Perform negative motion to clear the alarm.

ErrorCode.Description: 轴2负限位报警
J2 axis negative limit alarm
ErrorCode.Reason: 到达关节极限位置
The joint limit position is reached.

Perform positive motion to clear the alarm.

The drive has an alarm.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 根据报警码查阅伺服手册做相应的故障排除
Perform troubleshooting by referring to the servo manual according to fault codes.

ErrorCode.Description: 轴2规划溢出报警
J2 axis path planning out of range
ErrorCode.Reason: 规划值超出了最大计算范围
The planned value exceeds the maximum calculation range.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查绝对原点位置是否选择在靠近计数极限边沿位置，若是，则在原点位置时，将驱动器位置清圈数
Check whether the absolute origin position is selected to be near the counting limit. If the zero point is near the limit, clear the drive turns.

Excessive tracking error of J2 axis

The difference between the planned and actual positions is too large.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: (1)查看跟随误差阈值(2)检查机械是否有卡滞(3)检查动力线缆连接是否正常(4)检查负载于伺服增益是否匹配(5)查询跟随误差排障手册

ErrorCode.Description: 轴2速度过大报警
J2 axis overspeed
ErrorCode.Reason: 运行速度大于设定的最大速度
The running speed is greater than the set maximum speed.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 降低第2关节速度
Reduce the speed of J2 axis.

ErrorCode.Description: 轴2的驱动强电未上
Strong current of J2 axis is not switched on.
ErrorCode.Reason: 强电未上
Strong current is not switched on.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查驱动器电路，是否强电未上
Check the drive circuit for whether strong current is not switched on.

ErrorCode.Description: 第2关节转矩超限
J2 axis torque overlimit
ErrorCode.Reason: 关节转矩超出允许值
The actual maximum current exceeds the limit.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: (1)适当减小加速度参数；\n(2)检测负载参数设置是否合适，将其适当改大；\n(3)如果开启最优轨迹，参考最优轨迹的调制指导，

1. Reduce the acceleration parameters appropriately. \N2. Check that the load parameter settings are appropriate. \n3. If the optimal trajectory is enabled, refer to the modulation guidance of the optimal trajectory.

ErrorCode.Description: 第2关节平均负载率超限
J2 axis average load rate overlimit
ErrorCode.Reason: 平均负载率超出温升、寿命的限制；
The average load rate exceeds the limits of temperature rise and lifespan.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: (1)排查抱闸问题、机械卡死、驱动器问题;\n(2)适当降低速度或加速度百分比；\n(3)延长非运动时间；纯运动节拍测试时可能会出现平均负载率超限，此时不代表实际应用时超限，可将实际应用中的等待、逻辑交互等延时加入测试程序再测试；

1. Investigate brake, mechanical jamming, and drive. \n2. Reduce the speed or acceleration percentage appropriately. \n3. Extend the non-motion time. In the pure motion beat test, the average load rate may exceed the limit, which does not mean that it exceeds the limit in actual application. You can add delay such as waiting and logical interaction in actual application to the test program and test again.

ErrorCode.Description: 第2关节速度超出设定值
J2 axis speed overlimit
ErrorCode.Reason: 对规划输出进行校验时发现超出了设定的关节速度
When verifying the planned output, it was found that the set joint acceleration was exceeded.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: (1)如果是CP运动，适当降低位置速度或增大关节速度，或调整点位远离奇异区(2)查看报警记录是否有其他伴随报警

1. In case of CP motion, reduce position speed or increase joint speed appropriately, or adjust the points to move away from singularities. 2. Check if there are any other accompanying alarms in the alarm record.

J2 axis acceleration overlimit

J2 axis arrival timeout
ErrorCode.Reason: 伺服到位时间过长
The servo takes too long to arrive the target position.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查到位误差是否过小或者伺服增益不合适
Check whether the arrival error threshold is too small or whether the servo gain is not proper.

ErrorCode.Description: 关节2位置反馈异常
J2 axis position feedback error
ErrorCode.Reason: (1)圈值发生变化(2)码器位置跳变
1. Multi-turn value changes. 2. Encoder position jumps.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查是否人为清除，若不是，请检查干扰源

ErrorCode.Description: 第2关节下使能状态异常
J2 axis disable status error
ErrorCode.Reason: 机器人未能在规定的时间与距离内下使能
The robot failed to be disabled at the specified time and distance.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 1、检查伺服参数6084参数，抱闸设置，0209是否正确\n2、查看负载是否超规格使用
1. Check that servo parameter 6084 and brake parameter 0209 are correctly set. \n2. Check if the load exceeds the limit.

ErrorCode.Description: 第1关节电机/减速器过热
J1 axis motor/reducer overheat.
ErrorCode.Reason: 电机/减速器温度过高，超过报警阈值
The motor/reducer temperature is too high, exceeding alarm threshold.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 1、检查速度、加速度值、负载是否过大，降低运动速度、加速度或负载；2、降低运动占空比；3、检测机器人的环境温度是否过高，降低机器人环境温度。

1. Check whether the speed, acceleration, and load values are too large, and reduce the motion speed, acceleration, or load if necessary. 2. Reduce the duty cycle. 3. Check whether the ambient temperature of the robot is too high and reduce the temperature if necessary.

ErrorCode.Description: 第1关节编码器过热
J1 axis encoder overheat.
ErrorCode.Reason: 编码器温度过高，超过报警阈值
The encoder temperature is too high, exceeding alarm threshold.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 1、检查速度、加速度值、负载是否过大，降低运动速度、加速度或负载；2、降低运动占空比；3、检测机器人的环境温度是否过高，降低机器人环境温度。

The motor/reducer temperature is too high, exceeding alarm threshold.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 1、检查速度、加速度值、负载是否过大，降低运动速度、加速度或负载；2、降低运动占空比；3、检测机器人的环境温度是否过高，降低机器人环境温度。

1. Check whether the speed, acceleration, and load values are too large, and reduce the motion speed, acceleration, or load if necessary. 2. Reduce the duty cycle. 3. Check whether the ambient temperature of the robot is too high and reduce the temperature if necessary.

ErrorCode.Description: 第6关节编码器过热
J6 axis encoder overheat.
ErrorCode.Reason: 编码器温度过高，超过报警阈值
The encoder temperature is too high, exceeding alarm threshold.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 1、检查速度、加速度值、负载是否过大，降低运动速度、加速度或负载；2、降低运动占空比；3、检测机器人的环境温度是否过高，降低机器人环境温度。

1. Check whether the speed, acceleration, and load values are too large, and reduce the motion speed, acceleration, or load if necessary. 2. Reduce the duty cycle. 3. Check whether the ambient temperature of the robot is too high and reduce the temperature if necessary.

ErrorCode.Reason: 当前位置已进入干涉区0

ErrorCode.Resolvent: 关闭干涉区0，并调整机器人当前位置
The operator shall turn off the interference zone 0, adjust the robot's current position

ErrorCode.Description: 轴3正限位报警
J3 axis positive limit alarm
ErrorCode.Reason: 到达关节极限位置
The joint limit position is reached.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 反向运动清除
Perform negative motion to clear the alarm.

ErrorCode.Description: 轴3负限位报警
J3 axis negative limit alarm
ErrorCode.Reason: 到达关节极限位置
The joint limit position is reached.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 正向运动清除
Perform positive motion to clear the alarm.

ErrorCode.Description: 轴3驱动报警
J3 axis drive alarm
ErrorCode.Reason: 驱动器出现报警
The drive has an alarm.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 根据报警码查阅伺服手册做相应的故障排除
Perform troubleshooting by referring to the servo manual according to fault codes.

ErrorCode.Description: 轴3规划溢出报警
J3 axis path planning out of range
ErrorCode.Reason: The planned value exceeds the maximum calculation range (-1073741823 to 1073741824).
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查绝对原点位置是否选择在靠近计数极限边沿位置，若是，则在原点位置时，将驱动器位置清圈数
Check whether the absolute origin position is selected to be near the counting limit edge. If the zero point is near the boundary, clear the driver turns.

ErrorCode.Description: 轴3跟随误差过大报警
Excessive tracking error of J3 axis
ErrorCode.Reason: 规划位置和实际位置差过大
The difference between the planned and actual positions is too large.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: (1)查看跟随误差阈值(2)检查机械是否有卡滞(3)检查动力线缆连接是否正常(4)检查负载于伺服增益是否匹配(5)查询跟随误差排障手册

1. View the tracking error threshold. 2. Check for mechanical stuck. 3. Check that the power lines are properly connected. 4. Check that the load matches the servo gain. 5. Consult the troubleshooting guide.

ErrorCode.Description: 轴3速度过大报警
J3 axis overspeed
ErrorCode.Reason: 运行速度大于设定的最大速度
The running speed is greater than the set maximum speed.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 降低第3关节速度
Reduce the speed of J3 axis.

ErrorCode.Description: 轴3的驱动强电未上
Strong current of J3 axis is not switched on.
ErrorCode.Reason: 强电未上
Strong current is not switched on.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查驱动器电路，是否强电未上
Check the drive circuit for whether strong current is not switched on.

ErrorCode.Description: 第3关节转矩超限
J3 axis torque overlimit
ErrorCode.Reason: 关节转矩超出允许值
The actual maximum current exceeds the limit.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: (1)适当减小加速度参数；\n(2)检测负载参数设置是否合适，将其适当改大；\n(3)如果开启最优轨迹，参考最优轨迹的调制指导，

1. Reduce the acceleration parameters appropriately. \N2. Check that the load parameter settings are appropriate. \n3. If the optimal trajectory is enabled, refer to the modulation guidance of the optimal trajectory.

ErrorCode.Description: 第3关节平均负载率超限
J3 axis average load rate overlimit
ErrorCode.Reason: 平均负载率超出温升、寿命的限制；
The average load rate exceeds the limits of temperature rise and lifespan.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: (1)排查抱闸问题、机械卡死、驱动器问题;\n(2)适当降低速度或加速度百分比；\n(3)延长非运动时间；纯运动节拍测试时可能会出现平均负载率超限，此时不代表实际应用时超限，可将实际应用中的等待、逻辑交互等延时加入测试程序再测试；

1. Investigate brake, mechanical jamming, and drive. \n2. Reduce the speed or acceleration percentage appropriately. \n3. Extend the non-motion time. In the pure motion beat test, the average load rate may exceed the limit, which does not mean that it exceeds the limit in actual application. You can add delay such as waiting and logical interaction in actual application to the test program and test again.

ErrorCode.Description: 第3关节速度超出设定值
J3 axis speed overlimit
ErrorCode.Reason: 对规划输出进行校验时发现超出了设定的关节速度
When verifying the planned output, it was found that the set joint acceleration was exceeded.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: (1)如果是CP运动，适当降低位置速度或增大关节速度，或调整点位远离奇异区(2)查看报警记录是否有其他伴随报警

1. In case of CP motion, reduce position speed or increase joint speed appropriately, or adjust the points to move away from singularities. 2. Check if there are any other accompanying alarms in the alarm record.

ErrorCode.Description: 第3关节加速度超出设定值
J3 axis acceleration overlimit
ErrorCode.Reason: 对规划输出进行校验时发现超出了设定的关节加速度
When verifying the planned output, it was found that the set joint acceleration was exceeded.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: (1)如果是CP运动，适当降低位置速度或增大关节速度，或调整点位远离奇异区(2)查看报警记录是否有其他伴随报警

1. In case of CP motion, reduce position speed or increase joint speed appropriately, or adjust the points to move away from singularities. 2. Check if there are any other accompanying alarms in the alarm record.

ErrorCode.Description: 第3关节使能同步异常
J3 axis enable synchronization error
ErrorCode.Reason: 上使前机器人有振动或上使能过程中因外部原因对机器人造成运动
The robot vibrates before it is enabled, or the robot moves due to external reasons during the enabling process.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查上电时刻是否关节有运动，检查上使能过程中是否有外力因素干扰
Check whether there is joint movement during power on, and whether there is external interference during the enabling process.

ErrorCode.Description: 第3关节到位超时
J3 axis arrival timeout
ErrorCode.Reason: 伺服到位时间过长
The servo takes too long to arrive the target position.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查到位误差是否过小或者伺服增益不合适
Check whether the arrival error threshold is too small or whether the servo gain is not proper.

ErrorCode.Description: 关节3位置反馈异常
J3 axis position feedback error
ErrorCode.Reason: (1)圈值发生变化(2)码器位置跳变
1. Multi-turn value changes. 2. Encoder position jumps.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查是否人为清除，若不是，请检查干扰源
Check if the multi turn value has been manually cleared. If not, check for the interference source.

ErrorCode.Description: 第3关节下使能状态异常
J3 axis disable status error
ErrorCode.Reason: 机器人未能在规定的时间与距离内下使能
The robot failed to be disabled at the specified time and distance.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 1、检查伺服参数6084参数，抱闸设置，0209是否正确\n2、查看负载是否超规格使用
1. Check that servo parameter 6084 and brake parameter 0209 are correctly set. \n2. Check if the load exceeds the limit.

ErrorCode.Description: 轴4正限位报警
J4 axis positive limit alarm
ErrorCode.Reason: 到达关节极限位置
The joint limit position is reached.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 请往反向运动，报警会自动清除
Perform negative motion to clear the alarm.

ErrorCode.Description: 轴4负限位报警
J4 axis negative limit alarm
ErrorCode.Reason: 到达关节极限位置
The joint limit position is reached.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 请往反向运动，报警会自动清除
Perform negative motion to clear the alarm.

ErrorCode.Description: 轴4驱动报警
J4 axis drive alarm
ErrorCode.Reason: 驱动器出现报警
The drive has an alarm.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 根据报警码查阅伺服手册做相应的故障排除
Perform troubleshooting by referring to the servo manual according to fault codes.

ErrorCode.Description: 轴4规划溢出报警
J4 axis path planning out of range
ErrorCode.Reason: The planned value exceeds the maximum calculation range (-1073741823 to 1073741824).
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查绝对原点位置是否选择在靠近计数极限边沿位置，若是，则在原点位置时，将驱动器位置清圈数
Check whether the absolute origin position is selected to be near the counting limit. If the zero point is near the limit, clear the drive turns.

ErrorCode.Description: 轴4跟随误差过大报警
Excessive tracking error of J4 axis
ErrorCode.Reason: 规划位置和实际位置差过大
The difference between the planned and actual positions is too large.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: (1)查看跟随误差阈值(2)检查机械是否有卡滞(3)检查动力线缆连接是否正常(4)检查负载于伺服增益是否匹配(5)查询跟随误差排障手册

1. View the tracking error threshold. 2. Check for mechanical stuck. 3. Check that the power lines are properly connected. 4. Check that the load matches the servo gain. 5. Consult the troubleshooting guide.

ErrorCode.Description: 轴4速度过大报警
J4 axis overspeed
ErrorCode.Reason: 运行速度大于设定的最大速度
The running speed is greater than the set maximum speed.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 降低第4关节速度
Reduce the speed of J4 axis.

ErrorCode.Description: 轴4的驱动强电未上
Strong current of J4 axis is not switched on.
ErrorCode.Reason: 强电未上
Strong current is not switched on.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查驱动器电路，是否强电未上
Check the drive circuit for whether strong current is not switched on.

ErrorCode.Description: 第4关节转矩超限
J4 axis torque overlimit
ErrorCode.Reason: 关节转矩超出允许值
The actual maximum current exceeds the limit.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: (1)适当减小加速度参数；\n(2)检测负载参数设置是否合适，将其适当改大；\n(3)如果开启最优轨迹，参考最优轨迹的调制指导，

1. Reduce the acceleration parameters appropriately. \N2. Check that the load parameter settings are appropriate. \n3. If the optimal trajectory is enabled, refer to the modulation guidance of the optimal trajectory.

ErrorCode.Description: 第4关节平均负载率超限
J4 axis average load rate overlimit
ErrorCode.Reason: 平均负载率超出温升、寿命的限制；
The average load rate exceeds the limits of temperature rise and lifespan.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: (1)排查抱闸问题、机械卡死、驱动器问题;\n(2)适当降低速度或加速度百分比；\n(3)延长非运动时间；纯运动节拍测试时可能会出现平均负载率超限，此时不代表实际应用时超限，可将实际应用中的等待、逻辑交互等延时加入测试程序再测试；

1. Investigate brake, mechanical jamming, and drive. \n2. Reduce the speed or acceleration percentage appropriately. \n3. Extend the non-motion time. In the pure motion beat test, the average load rate may exceed the limit, which does not mean that it exceeds the limit in actual application. You can add delay such as waiting and logical interaction in actual application to the test program and test again.

ErrorCode.Description: 第4关节速度超出设定值
J4 axis speed overlimit
ErrorCode.Reason: 对规划输出进行校验时发现超出了设定的关节速度
When verifying the planned output, it was found that the set joint acceleration was exceeded.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: (1)如果是CP运动，适当降低位置速度或增大关节速度，或调整点位远离奇异区(2)查看报警记录是否有其他伴随报警

1. In case of CP motion, reduce position speed or increase joint speed appropriately, or adjust the points to move away from singularities. 2. Check if there are any other accompanying alarms in the alarm record.

ErrorCode.Description: 第4关节加速度超出设定值
J4 axis acceleration overlimit
ErrorCode.Reason: 对规划输出进行校验时发现超出了设定的关节加速度
When verifying the planned output, it was found that the set joint acceleration was exceeded.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: (1)如果是CP运动，适当降低位置速度或增大关节速度，或调整点位远离奇异区(2)查看报警记录是否有其他伴随报警

1. In case of CP motion, reduce position speed or increase joint speed appropriately, or adjust the points to move away from singularities. 2. Check if there are any other accompanying alarms in the alarm record.

ErrorCode.Description: 第4关节使能同步异常
J4 axis enable synchronization error
ErrorCode.Reason: 上使前机器人有振动或上使能过程中因外部原因对机器人造成运动
The robot vibrates before it is enabled, or the robot moves due to external reasons during the enabling process.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查上电时刻是否关节有运动，检查上使能过程中是否有外力因素干扰
Check whether there is joint movement during power on, and whether there is external interference during the enabling process.

ErrorCode.Description: 第4关节到位超时
J4 axis arrival timeout
ErrorCode.Reason: 伺服到位时间过长
The servo takes too long to arrive the target position.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查到位误差是否过小或者伺服增益不合适
Check whether the arrival error threshold is too small or whether the servo gain is not proper.

ErrorCode.Description: 关节4位置反馈异常
J4 axis position feedback error
ErrorCode.Reason: (1)圈值发生变化(2)码器位置跳变
1. Multi-turn value changes. 2. Encoder position jumps.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查是否人为清除，若不是，请检查干扰源
Check if the multi turn value has been manually cleared. If not, check for the interference source.

ErrorCode.Description: 第4关节下使能状态异常
J4 axis disable status error
ErrorCode.Reason: 机器人未能在规定的时间与距离内下使能
The robot failed to be disabled at the specified time and distance.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 1、检查伺服参数6084参数，抱闸设置，0209是否正确\n2、查看负载是否超规格使用
1. Check that servo parameter 6084 and brake parameter 0209 are correctly set. \n2. Check if the load exceeds the limit.

ErrorCode.Description: 检测到J1轴异常，且机器人和基座都在运动的过程中，判断第1关节发生随动碰撞，请确认外部轴是否运动并检查是否发生碰撞；如无碰撞，请确认该轴电机是否发生故障，排查外部线缆干涉、拉扯的情况；如无异常，确认负载参数设置是否正确、确认碰撞检测参数是否已调试；若仍无异常请参考说明书排查原因或调试碰撞检测参数。

Upon detecting an anomaly in J1 while both the robot and its base are in motion, indicating that J1 is experiencing follow-up collision, please verify if the external axis are moving and check for any collisions. If no collision is detected, confirm whether there is a malfunction with the motor of this axis,check for any external cable interference or pulling issues. Assuming everything seems normal without any issues, ensure that the load parameters are correctly set and that the collision detection parameters have been properly tuned. Should you still not encounter any anomalies, please refer to the user manual for troubleshooting steps or adjust the collision detection parameters accordingly.
ErrorCode.Reason: 检测到J1轴异常，且机器人和基座都在运动的过程中，判断第1关节发生随动碰撞，请确认外部轴是否运动并检查是否发生碰撞；如无碰撞，请确认该轴电机是否发生故障；如无异常，确认负载参数设置是否正确、确认碰撞检测参数是否已调试、确认是否由于伺服跟踪能力有限造成；如无异常，确认机器人是否存在长时间冷机或长时间运行后摩擦力显著变化的情况；若仍无异常请参考说明书排查原因或调试碰撞检测参数。

Upon detecting an anomaly in J1 while both the robot and its base are in motion, indicating that the first joint is experiencing follow-up collision, please verify if the external axis are moving and check for any collisions. If no collision is detected, confirm whether there is a malfunction with the motor of this axis. Assuming everything seems normal without any issues, ensure that the load parameters are correctly set and that the collision detection parameters have been properly tuned. Should you still not encounter any anomalies, please refer to the user manual for troubleshooting steps or adjust the collision detection parameters accordingly,and confirm whether it is due to the limited servo tracking ability.If there is no abnormality, confirm whether the robot has a long period of cold machine or a long period of operation after a significant change in friction; if there is still no abnormality, please refer to the manual to troubleshoot the cause or debug the collision detection parameters.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 请确认外部轴是否运动并检查是否发生碰撞，若未发生碰撞，请：1）检查负载参数是否设置正确；2）检查控制器中的机器人型号是否与本体一致；3）检查机器人是否出现电机卡死、抱闸未打开等情况；4）若存在机器人长时间冷机后突然启动的情况，请适当热机后再运行；若存在长时间运行后机器人摩擦力显著降低的情况，须联系厂商重新辨识摩擦力；5）若工作在高速重载等工况下，导致电流出现了饱和现象，此时也很容易发生误报警，这种工况已经超出机器人的负载能力，需要避免工作在这种条件下；也可尝试通过指令进入中等精度模式或手动打开所有轴的速度前馈在一定程度上解决该问题。6）若确定为误报，可适当调大该轴的碰撞检测灵敏度，建议使用碰撞检测灵敏度推荐值；7）若仍无效，可尝试关闭该轴的碰撞检测开关.

Please confirm whether the external axis is moving and check whether collision occurs, if no collision occurs, please: 1) check whether the load parameters are set correctly; 2) check whether the robot model in the controller is the same as the body; 3) check whether the robot is stuck in the motor, the holding brake is not opened, etc.; 4) if there is a long time after the robot is cold and then suddenly start the case, please warm up the machine and then run; if there is a long time after running the robot friction significantly reduced, it is necessary to contact the manufacturer to re-identify the friction; 5) if working under high speed and heavy load conditions, resulting in current saturation, this is also likely to occur false alarms. If there is a significant reduction in the friction of the robot after a long period of operation, contact the manufacturer to re-identify the friction; 5) If the work in the high-speed heavy-duty conditions, resulting in saturation of the current phenomenon, it is also easy to false alarms, this condition has exceeded the robot's loading capacity, you need to avoid working in such conditions; you can also try to enter the medium-precision mode through the instruction or manually open the speed of all the axes of the speed feedforward to a certain extent to solve this problem. (6) If it is determined to be a false alarm, you can appropriately adjust the axis of the collision detection sensitivity, it is recommended to use the recommended value of the collision detection sensitivity; (7) If it is still not effective, you can try to turn off the axis of the collision detection switch.

Assuming everything seems normal without any issues, ensure that the load parameters are correctly set and that the collision detection parameters have been properly tuned. Should you still not encounter any anomalies, please refer to the user manual for troubleshooting steps or adjust the collision detection parameters accordingly.

If there is a significant reduction in the friction of the robot after a long period of operation, contact the manufacturer to re-identify the friction; 5) If the work in the high-speed heavy-duty conditions, resulting in saturation of the current phenomenon, it is also easy to false alarms, this condition has exceeded the robot's loading capacity, you need to avoid working in such conditions; you can also try to enter the medium-precision mode through the instruction or manually open the speed of all the axes of the speed feedforward to a certain extent to solve this problem. If there is a significant reduction in the friction of the robot after a long period of operation, contact the manufacturer to re-identify the friction; 5) If the work in the high-speed heavy-duty conditions, resulting in saturation of the current phenomenon, it is also easy to false alarms, this condition has exceeded the robot's loading capacity, you need to avoid working in such conditions; you can also try to enter the medium-precision mode through the instruction or manually open the speed of all the axes of the speed feedforward to a certain extent to solve this problem. (6) If it is determined to be a false alarm, you can appropriately adjust the axis of the collision detection sensitivity, it is recommended to use the recommended value of the collision detection sensitivity; (7) If it is still not effective, you can try to turn off the axis of the collision detection switch.

ErrorCode.Description: 检测到J5轴异常，且机器人和基座都在运动的过程中，判断第5关节发生随动碰撞，请确认外部轴是否运动并检查是否发生碰撞；如无碰撞，请确认该轴电机是否发生故障，排查外部线缆干涉、拉扯的情况；如无异常，确认负载参数设置是否正确、确认碰撞检测参数是否已调试；若仍无异常请参考说明书排查原因或调试碰撞检测参数。

Upon detecting an anomaly in J5 while both the robot and its base are in motion, indicating that J5 is experiencing follow-up collision, please verify if the external axis are moving and check for any collisions. If no collision is detected, confirm whether there is a malfunction with the motor of this axis,check for any external cable interference or pulling issues. Assuming everything seems normal without any issues, ensure that the load parameters are correctly set and that the collision detection parameters have been properly tuned. Should you still not encounter any anomalies, please refer to the user manual for troubleshooting steps or adjust the collision detection parameters accordingly.
ErrorCode.Reason: 检测到J5轴异常，且机器人和基座都在运动的过程中，判断第5关节发生随动碰撞，请确认外部轴是否运动并检查是否发生碰撞；如无碰撞，请确认该轴电机是否发生故障；如无异常，确认负载参数设置是否正确、确认碰撞检测参数是否已调试、确认是否由于伺服跟踪能力有限造成；如无异常，确认机器人是否存在长时间冷机或长时间运行后摩擦力显著变化的情况；若仍无异常请参考说明书排查原因或调试碰撞检测参数。

Upon detecting an anomaly in J5 while both the robot and its base are in motion, indicating that J5 is experiencing follow-up collision, please verify if the external axis are moving and check for any collisions. If no collision is detected, confirm whether there is a malfunction with the motor of this axis. Assuming everything seems normal without any issues, ensure that the load parameters are correctly set and that the collision detection parameters have been properly tuned. Should you still not encounter any anomalies, please refer to the user manual for troubleshooting steps or adjust the collision detection parameters accordingly,and confirm whether it is due to the limited servo tracking ability.If there is no abnormality, confirm whether the robot has a long period of cold machine or a long period of operation after a significant change in friction; if there is still no abnormality, please refer to the manual to troubleshoot the cause or debug the collision detection parameters.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 请确认外部轴是否运动并检查是否发生碰撞，若未发生碰撞，请：1）检查负载参数是否设置正确；2）检查控制器中的机器人型号是否与本体一致；3）检查机器人是否出现电机卡死、抱闸未打开等情况；4）若存在机器人长时间冷机后突然启动的情况，请适当热机后再运行；若存在长时间运行后机器人摩擦力显著降低的情况，须联系厂商重新辨识摩擦力；5）若工作在高速重载等工况下，导致电流出现了饱和现象，此时也很容易发生误报警，这种工况已经超出机器人的负载能力，需要避免工作在这种条件下；也可尝试通过指令进入中等精度模式或手动打开所有轴的速度前馈在一定程度上解决该问题。6）若确定为误报，可适当调大该轴的碰撞检测灵敏度，建议使用碰撞检测灵敏度推荐值；12）若仍无效，可尝试关闭该轴的碰撞检测开关.

Please confirm whether the external axis is moving and check whether collision occurs, if no collision occurs, please: 1) check whether the load parameters are set correctly; 2) check whether the robot model in the controller is the same as the body; 3) check whether the robot is stuck in the motor, the holding brake is not opened, etc.; 4) if there is a long time after the robot is cold and then suddenly start the case, please warm up the machine and then run; if there is a long time after running the robot friction significantly reduced, it is necessary to contact the manufacturer to re-identify the friction; 5) if working under high speed and heavy load conditions, resulting in current saturation, this is also likely to occur false alarms. If there is a significant reduction in the friction of the robot after a long period of operation, contact the manufacturer to re-identify the friction; 5) If the work in the high-speed heavy-duty conditions, resulting in saturation of the current phenomenon, it is also easy to false alarms, this condition has exceeded the robot's loading capacity, you need to avoid working in such conditions; you can also try to enter the medium-precision mode through the instruction or manually open the speed of all the axes of the speed feedforward to a certain extent to solve this problem. (6) If it is determined to be a false alarm, you can appropriately adjust the axis of the collision detection sensitivity, it is recommended to use the recommended value of the collision detection sensitivity; (7) If it is still not effective, you can try to turn off the axis of the collision detection switch.

Please confirm whether the external axis is moving and check whether collision occurs, if no collision occurs, please: 1) check whether the load parameters are set correctly; 2) check whether the robot model in the controller is the same as the body; 3) check whether the robot is stuck in the motor, the holding brake is not opened, etc.; 4) if there is a long time after the robot is cold and then suddenly start the case, please warm up the machine and then run; if there is a long time after running the robot friction significantly reduced, it is necessary to contact the manufacturer to re-identify the friction; 5) if working under high speed and heavy load conditions, resulting in current saturation, this is also likely to occur false alarms. If there is a significant reduction in the friction of the robot after a long period of operation, contact the manufacturer to re-identify the friction; 5) If the work in the high-speed heavy-duty conditions, resulting in saturation of the current phenomenon, it is also easy to false alarms, this condition has exceeded the robot's loading capacity, you need to avoid working in such conditions; you can also try to enter the medium-precision mode through the instruction or manually open the speed of all the axes of the speed feedforward to a certain extent to solve this problem. (6) If it is determined to be a false alarm, you can appropriately adjust the axis of the collision detection sensitivity, it is recommended to use the recommended value of the collision detection sensitivity; (7) If it is still not effective, you can try to turn off the axis of the collision detection switch.

ErrorCode.Description: 检测到J10轴异常，且机器人和基座都在运动的过程中，判断第10关节发生随动碰撞，请确认外部轴是否运动并检查是否发生碰撞；如无碰撞，请确认该轴电机是否发生故障，排查外部线缆干涉、拉扯的情况；如无异常，确认负载参数设置是否正确、确认碰撞检测参数是否已调试；若仍无异常请参考说明书排查原因或调试碰撞检测参数。

Upon detecting an anomaly in J10 while both the robot and its base are in motion, indicating that J10 is experiencing follow-up collision, please verify if the external axis are moving and check for any collisions. If no collision is detected, confirm whether there is a malfunction with the motor of this axis,check for any external cable interference or pulling issues. Assuming everything seems normal without any issues, ensure that the load parameters are correctly set and that the collision detection parameters have been properly tuned. Should you still not encounter any anomalies, please refer to the user manual for troubleshooting steps or adjust the collision detection parameters accordingly.
ErrorCode.Reason: 检测到J10轴异常，且机器人和基座都在运动的过程中，判断第10关节发生随动碰撞，请确认外部轴是否运动并检查是否发生碰撞；如无碰撞，请确认该轴电机是否发生故障；如无异常，确认负载参数设置是否正确、确认碰撞检测参数是否已调试、确认是否由于伺服跟踪能力有限造成；如无异常，确认机器人是否存在长时间冷机或长时间运行后摩擦力显著变化的情况；若仍无异常请参考说明书排查原因或调试碰撞检测参数。

Upon detecting an anomaly in J10 while both the robot and its base are in motion, indicating that J10 is experiencing follow-up collision, please verify if the external axis are moving and check for any collisions. If no collision is detected, confirm whether there is a malfunction with the motor of this axis. Assuming everything seems normal without any issues, ensure that the load parameters are correctly set and that the collision detection parameters have been properly tuned. Should you still not encounter any anomalies, please refer to the user manual for troubleshooting steps or adjust the collision detection parameters accordingly,and confirm whether it is due to the limited servo tracking ability.If there is no abnormality, confirm whether the robot has a long period of cold machine or a long period of operation after a significant change in friction; if there is still no abnormality, please refer to the manual to troubleshoot the cause or debug the collision detection parameters.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 请确认外部轴是否运动并检查是否发生碰撞，若未发生碰撞，请：1）检查负载参数是否设置正确；2）检查控制器中的机器人型号是否与本体一致；3）检查机器人是否出现电机卡死、抱闸未打开等情况；4）若存在机器人长时间冷机后突然启动的情况，请适当热机后再运行；若存在长时间运行后机器人摩擦力显著降低的情况，须联系厂商重新辨识摩擦力；5）若工作在高速重载等工况下，导致电流出现了饱和现象，此时也很容易发生误报警，这种工况已经超出机器人的负载能力，需要避免工作在这种条件下；也可尝试通过指令进入中等精度模式或手动打开所有轴的速度前馈在一定程度上解决该问题。6）若确定为误报，可适当调大该轴的碰撞检测灵敏度，建议使用碰撞检测灵敏度推荐值；12）若仍无效，可尝试关闭该轴的碰撞检测开关.
