ErrorCode.Description: 轴5正限位报警
J5 axis positive limit alarm
ErrorCode.Reason: 到达关节极限位置
The joint limit position is reached.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 反向运动清除
Perform negative motion to clear the alarm.

ErrorCode.Description: 轴5负限位报警
J5 axis negative limit alarm
ErrorCode.Reason: 到达关节极限位置
The joint limit position is reached.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 正向运动清除
Perform positive motion to clear the alarm.

ErrorCode.Description: 轴5驱动报警
J5 axis drive alarm
ErrorCode.Reason: 驱动器出现报警
The drive has an alarm.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 根据报警码查阅伺服手册做相应的故障排除
Perform troubleshooting by referring to the servo manual according to fault codes.

ErrorCode.Description: 轴5规划溢出报警
J5 axis path planning out of range
ErrorCode.Reason: The planned value exceeds the maximum calculation range (-1073741823 to 1073741824).
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查绝对原点位置是否选择在靠近计数极限边沿位置，若是，则在原点位置时，将驱动器位置清圈数
Check whether the absolute origin position is selected to be near the counting limit. If the zero point is near the limit, clear the drive turns.

ErrorCode.Description: 轴5跟随误差过大报警
Excessive tracking error of J5 axis
ErrorCode.Reason: 规划位置和实际位置差过大
The difference between the planned and actual positions is too large.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: (1)查看跟随误差阈值(2)检查机械是否有卡滞(3)检查动力线缆连接是否正常(4)检查负载于伺服增益是否匹配(5)查询跟随误差排障手册

1. View the tracking error threshold. 2. Check for mechanical stuck. 3. Check that the power lines are properly connected. 4. Check that the load matches the servo gain. 5. Consult the troubleshooting guide.

ErrorCode.Description: 轴5速度过大报警
J5 axis overspeed
ErrorCode.Reason: 运行速度大于设定的最大速度
The running speed is greater than the set maximum speed.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 降低第5关节速度
Reduce the speed of J5 axis.

ErrorCode.Description: 轴5的驱动强电未上
Strong current of J5 axis is not switched on.
ErrorCode.Reason: 强电未上
Strong current is not switched on.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查驱动器电路，是否强电未上
Check the drive circuit for whether strong current is not switched on.

ErrorCode.Description: 第5关节转矩超限
J5 axis torque overlimit
ErrorCode.Reason: 关节转矩超出允许值
The actual maximum current exceeds the limit.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: (1)适当减小加速度参数；\n(2)检测负载参数设置是否合适，将其适当改大；\n(3)如果开启最优轨迹，参考最优轨迹的调制指导，

1. Reduce the acceleration parameters appropriately. \N2. Check that the load parameter settings are appropriate. \n3. If the optimal trajectory is enabled, refer to the modulation guidance of the optimal trajectory.

ErrorCode.Description: 第5关节平均负载率超限
J5 axis average load rate overlimit
ErrorCode.Reason: 平均负载率超出温升、寿命的限制；
The average load rate exceeds the limits of temperature rise and lifespan.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: (1)排查抱闸问题、机械卡死、驱动器问题;\n(2)适当降低速度或加速度百分比；\n(3)延长非运动时间；纯运动节拍测试时可能会出现平均负载率超限，此时不代表实际应用时超限，可将实际应用中的等待、逻辑交互等延时加入测试程序再测试；

1. Investigate brake, mechanical jamming, and drive. \n2. Reduce the speed or acceleration percentage appropriately. \n3. Extend the non-motion time. In the pure motion beat test, the average load rate may exceed the limit, which does not mean that it exceeds the limit in actual application. You can add delay such as waiting and logical interaction in actual application to the test program and test again.

ErrorCode.Description: 第5关节速度超出设定值
J5 axis speed overlimit
ErrorCode.Reason: 对规划输出进行校验时发现超出了设定的关节速度
When verifying the planned output, it was found that the set joint acceleration was exceeded.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: (1)如果是CP运动，适当降低位置速度或增大关节速度，或调整点位远离奇异区(2)查看报警记录是否有其他伴随报警

1. In case of CP motion, reduce position speed or increase joint speed appropriately, or adjust the points to move away from singularities. 2. Check if there are any other accompanying alarms in the alarm record.

ErrorCode.Description: 第5关节加速度超出设定值
J5 axis acceleration overlimit
ErrorCode.Reason: 对规划输出进行校验时发现超出了设定的关节加速度
When verifying the planned output, it was found that the set joint acceleration was exceeded.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: (1)如果是CP运动，适当降低位置速度或增大关节速度，或调整点位远离奇异区(2)查看报警记录是否有其他伴随报警

1. In case of CP motion, reduce position speed or increase joint speed appropriately, or adjust the points to move away from singularities. 2. Check if there are any other accompanying alarms in the alarm record.

ErrorCode.Description: 第5关节使能同步异常
J5 axis enable synchronization error
ErrorCode.Reason: 上使前机器人有振动或上使能过程中因外部原因对机器人造成运动
The robot vibrates before it is enabled, or the robot moves due to external reasons during the enabling process.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查上电时刻是否关节有运动，检查上使能过程中是否有外力因素干扰
Check whether there is joint movement during power on, and whether there is external interference during the enabling process.

ErrorCode.Description: 第5关节到位超时
J5 axis arrival timeout
ErrorCode.Reason: 伺服到位时间过长
The servo takes too long to arrive the target position.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查到位误差是否过小或者伺服增益不合适
Check whether the arrival error threshold is too small or whether the servo gain is not proper.

ErrorCode.Description: 关节5位置反馈异常
J5 axis position feedback error
ErrorCode.Reason: (1)圈值发生变化(2)码器位置跳变
1. Multi-turn value changes. 2. Encoder position jumps.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查是否人为清除，若不是，请检查干扰源
Check if the multi turn value has been manually cleared. If not, check for the interference source.

ErrorCode.Description: 第5关节下使能状态异常
J5 axis disable status error
ErrorCode.Reason: 机器人未能在规定的时间与距离内下使能
The robot failed to be disabled at the specified time and distance.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 1、检查伺服参数6084参数，抱闸设置，0209是否正确\n2、查看负载是否超规格使用
1. Check that servo parameter 6084 and brake parameter 0209 are correctly set. \n2. Check if the load exceeds the limit.

ErrorCode.Description: 轴6正限位报警
J6 axis positive limit alarm
ErrorCode.Reason: 到达关节极限位置
The joint limit position is reached.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 反向运动清除
Perform negative motion to clear the alarm.

ErrorCode.Description: 轴6负限位报警
J6 axis negative limit alarm
ErrorCode.Reason: 到达关节极限位置
The joint limit position is reached.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 正向运动清除
Perform positive motion to clear the alarm.

ErrorCode.Description: 轴6驱动报警
J6 axis drive alarm
ErrorCode.Reason: 驱动器出现报警
The drive has an alarm.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 根据报警码查阅伺服手册做相应的故障排除
Perform troubleshooting by referring to the servo manual according to fault codes.

ErrorCode.Description: 轴6规划溢出报警
J6 axis path planning out of range
ErrorCode.Reason: The planned value exceeds the maximum calculation range (-1073741823 to 1073741824).
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查绝对原点位置是否选择在靠近计数极限边沿位置，若是，则在原点位置时，将驱动器位置清圈数
Check whether the absolute origin position is selected to be near the counting limit. If the zero point is near the limit, clear the drive turns.

ErrorCode.Description: 轴6跟随误差过大报警
Excessive tracking error of J6 axis
ErrorCode.Reason: 规划位置和实际位置差过大
The difference between the planned and actual positions is too large.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: (1)查看跟随误差阈值(2)检查机械是否有卡滞(3)检查动力线缆连接是否正常(4)检查负载于伺服增益是否匹配(5)查询跟随误差排障手册

1. View the tracking error threshold. 2. Check for mechanical stuck. 3. Check that the power lines are properly connected. 4. Check that the load matches the servo gain. 5. Consult the troubleshooting guide.

ErrorCode.Description: 轴6速度过大报警
J6 axis overspeed
ErrorCode.Reason: 运行速度大于设定的最大速度
The running speed is greater than the set maximum speed.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 降低第6关节速度
Reduce the speed of J6 axis.

ErrorCode.Description: 轴6的驱动强电未上
Strong current of J6 axis is not switched on.
ErrorCode.Reason: 强电未上
Strong current is not switched on.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查驱动器电路，是否强电未上
Check the drive circuit for whether strong current is not switched on.

ErrorCode.Description: 第6关节转矩超限
J6 axis torque overlimit
ErrorCode.Reason: 关节转矩超出允许值
The actual maximum current exceeds the limit.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: (1)适当减小加速度参数；\n(2)检测负载参数设置是否合适，将其适当改大；\n(3)如果开启最优轨迹，参考最优轨迹的调制指导，

1. Reduce the acceleration parameters appropriately. \N2. Check that the load parameter settings are appropriate. \n3. If the optimal trajectory is enabled, refer to the modulation guidance of the optimal trajectory.

ErrorCode.Description: 第6关节平均负载率超限
J6 axis average load rate overlimit
ErrorCode.Reason: 平均负载率超出温升、寿命的限制；
The average load rate exceeds the limits of temperature rise and lifespan.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: (1)排查抱闸问题、机械卡死、驱动器问题;\n(2)适当降低速度或加速度百分比；\n(3)延长非运动时间；纯运动节拍测试时可能会出现平均负载率超限，此时不代表实际应用时超限，可将实际应用中的等待、逻辑交互等延时加入测试程序再测试；

1. Investigate brake, mechanical jamming, and drive. \n2. Reduce the speed or acceleration percentage appropriately. \n3. Extend the non-motion time. In the pure motion beat test, the average load rate may exceed the limit, which does not mean that it exceeds the limit in actual application. You can add delay such as waiting and logical interaction in actual application to the test program and test again.

ErrorCode.Description: 第6关节速度超出设定值
J6 axis speed overlimit
ErrorCode.Reason: 对规划输出进行校验时发现超出了设定的关节速度
When verifying the planned output, it was found that the set joint acceleration was exceeded.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: (1)如果是CP运动，适当降低位置速度或增大关节速度，或调整点位远离奇异区(2)查看报警记录是否有其他伴随报警

1. In case of CP motion, reduce position speed or increase joint speed appropriately, or adjust the points to move away from singularities. 2. Check if there are any other accompanying alarms in the alarm record.

ErrorCode.Description: 第6关节加速度超出设定值
J6 axis acceleration overlimit
ErrorCode.Reason: 对规划输出进行校验时发现超出了设定的关节加速度
When verifying the planned output, it was found that the set joint acceleration was exceeded.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: (1)如果是CP运动，适当降低位置速度或增大关节速度，或调整点位远离奇异区(2)查看报警记录是否有其他伴随报警

1. In case of CP motion, reduce position speed or increase joint speed appropriately, or adjust the points to move away from singularities. 2. Check if there are any other accompanying alarms in the alarm record.

ErrorCode.Description: 第6关节使能同步异常
J6 axis enable synchronization error
ErrorCode.Reason: 上使能时刻跟随误差过大
Enable moment following error is too large
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查上电时刻是否关节有运动
Check if there is any joint movement at the moment of power-up.

ErrorCode.Description: 第6关节到位超时
J6 axis arrival timeout
ErrorCode.Reason: 伺服到位时间过长
The servo takes too long to arrive the target position.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查到位误差是否过小或者伺服增益不合适
Check whether the arrival error threshold is too small or whether the servo gain is not proper.

ErrorCode.Description: 关节6位置反馈异常
J6 axis position feedback error
ErrorCode.Reason: (1)圈值发生变化(2)码器位置跳变
1. Multi-turn value changes. 2. Encoder position jumps.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查是否人为清除，若不是，请检查干扰源
Check if the multi turn value has been manually cleared. If not, check for the interference source.

ErrorCode.Description: 第6关节下使能状态异常
J6 axis disable status error
ErrorCode.Reason: 机器人未能在规定的时间与距离内下使能
The robot failed to be disabled at the specified time and distance.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 1、检查伺服参数6084参数，抱闸设置，0209是否正确\n2、查看负载是否超规格使用
1. Check that servo parameter 6084 and brake parameter 0209 are correctly set. \n2. Check if the load exceeds the limit.

ErrorCode.Description: 检测到J1轴异常，且机器人本身没运动，然而检测到基座在运动，判断第1关节发生被动碰撞，请确认基座是否运动（如导轨带着机器人在运动）并检查是否发生碰撞；如无碰撞，请确认该轴电机是否发生故障，排查外部线缆干涉、拉扯的情况；如无异常，确认负载参数设置是否正确、确认碰撞检测参数是否已调试；若仍无异常请参考说明书排查原因或调试碰撞检测参数。

Detected abnormality on J1 axis with the robot itself not moving, but detecting movement of the base. Judging that there is a passive collision on the J1 axis, please confirm if the base (such as the rail carrying the robot) is moving and check for any collision. if there is no collision, please confirm that the axis motor is not faulty,check for any external cable interference or pulling issues; if there is no abnormality, please confirm that the load parameter settings are correct, and confirm that the collision detection parameter has been debugged; if there is no abnormality, please refer to the instruction manual to troubleshoot the cause or debug the collision detection parameter; if there is no abnormality, please refer to the instruction manual to troubleshoot the cause or debug the collision detection parameter. If there is no abnormality, please refer to the instruction manual to investigate the cause or debug the collision detection parameters.
ErrorCode.Reason: 检测到J1轴异常，且机器人本身没运动，然而检测到基座在运动，请确认基座是否运动（如导轨带着机器人在运动）并检查是否发生碰撞；如无碰撞，请确认该轴电机是否发生故障；如无异常，确认负载参数设置是否正确、确认碰撞检测参数是否已调试、确认是否由于伺服跟踪能力有限造成；如无异常，确认机器人是否存在长时间冷机或长时间运行后摩擦力显著变化的情况；若仍无异常请参考说明书排查原因或调试碰撞检测参数。

Upon detecting an anomaly in J1 while both the robot and its base are in motion, indicating that J1 is experiencing follow-up collision, please verify if the external axis are moving and check for any collisions. If no collision is detected, confirm whether there is a malfunction with the motor of this axis. Assuming everything seems normal without any issues, ensure that the load parameters are correctly set and that the collision detection parameters have been properly tuned. Should you still not encounter any anomalies, please refer to the user manual for troubleshooting steps or adjust the collision detection parameters accordingly,and confirm whether it is due to the limited servo tracking ability.If there is no abnormality, confirm whether the robot has a long period of cold machine or a long period of operation after a significant change in friction; if there is still no abnormality, please refer to the manual to troubleshoot the cause or debug the collision detection parameters.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 请确认基座是否运动（如导轨带着机器人在运动）并检查是否发生碰撞，若未发生碰撞，请：1）检查负载参数是否设置正确；2）检查控制器中的机器人型号是否与本体一致；3）检查机器人是否出现电机卡死、抱闸未打开等情况；4）若存在机器人长时间冷机后突然启动的情况，请适当热机后再运行；若存在长时间运行后机器人摩擦力显著降低的情况，须联系厂商重新辨识摩擦力；5）若工作在高速重载等工况下，导致电流出现了饱和现象，此时也很容易发生误报警，这种工况已经超出机器人的负载能力，需要避免工作在这种条件下；也可尝试通过指令进入中等精度模式或手动打开所有轴的速度前馈在一定程度上解决该问题。6）若确定为误报，可适当调大该轴的碰撞检测灵敏度，建议使用碰撞检测灵敏度推荐值；19）若仍无效，可尝试关闭该轴的碰撞检测开关.

Please confirm whether the external axis is moving and check whether collision occurs, if no collision occurs, please: 1) check whether the load parameters are set correctly; 2) check whether the robot model in the controller is the same as the body; 3) check whether the robot is stuck in the motor, the holding brake is not opened, etc.; 4) if there is a long time after the robot is cold and then suddenly start the case, please warm up the machine and then run; if there is a long time after running the robot friction significantly reduced, it is necessary to contact the manufacturer to re-identify the friction; 5) if working under high speed and heavy load conditions, resulting in current saturation, this is also likely to occur false alarms. If there is a significant reduction in the friction of the robot after a long period of operation, contact the manufacturer to re-identify the friction; 5) If the work in the high-speed heavy-duty conditions, resulting in saturation of the current phenomenon, it is also easy to false alarms, this condition has exceeded the robot's loading capacity, you need to avoid working in such conditions; you can also try to enter the medium-precision mode through the instruction or manually open the speed of all the axes of the speed feedforward to a certain extent to solve this problem. (6) If it is determined to be a false alarm, you can appropriately adjust the axis of the collision detection sensitivity, it is recommended to use the recommended value of the collision detection sensitivity; (7) If it is still not effective, you can try to turn off the axis of the collision detection switch.

ErrorCode.Description: 检测到J2轴异常，且机器人本身没运动，然而检测到基座在运动，判断第2关节发生被动碰撞，请确认基座是否运动（如导轨带着机器人在运动）并检查是否发生碰撞；如无碰撞，请确认该轴电机是否发生故障，排查外部线缆干涉、拉扯的情况；如无异常，确认负载参数设置是否正确、确认碰撞检测参数是否已调试；若仍无异常请参考说明书排查原因或调试碰撞检测参数。

Detected abnormality on J2 axis with the robot itself not moving, but detecting movement of the base. Judging that there is a passive collision on the J2 axis, please confirm if the base (such as the rail carrying the robot) is moving and check for any collision. if there is no collision, please confirm that the axis motor is not faulty,check for any external cable interference or pulling issues; if there is no abnormality, please confirm that the load parameter settings are correct, and confirm that the collision detection parameter has been debugged; if there is no abnormality, please refer to the instruction manual to troubleshoot the cause or debug the collision detection parameter; if there is no abnormality, please refer to the instruction manual to troubleshoot the cause or debug the collision detection parameter. If there is no abnormality, please refer to the instruction manual to investigate the cause or debug the collision detection parameters.
ErrorCode.Reason: 检测到J2轴异常，且机器人本身没运动，然而检测到基座在运动，请确认基座是否运动（如导轨带着机器人在运动）并检查是否发生碰撞；；如无碰撞，请确认该轴电机是否发生故障；如无异常，确认负载参数设置是否正确、确认碰撞检测参数是否已调试、确认是否由于伺服跟踪能力有限造成；如无异常，确认机器人是否存在长时间冷机或长时间运行后摩擦力显著变化的情况；若仍无异常请参考说明书排查原因或调试碰撞检测参数。

Upon detecting an anomaly in J2 while both the robot and its base are in motion, indicating that J2 is experiencing follow-up collision, please verify if the external axis are moving and check for any collisions. If no collision is detected, confirm whether there is a malfunction with the motor of this axis. Assuming everything seems normal without any issues, ensure that the load parameters are correctly set and that the collision detection parameters have been properly tuned. Should you still not encounter any anomalies, please refer to the user manual for troubleshooting steps or adjust the collision detection parameters accordingly,and confirm whether it is due to the limited servo tracking ability.If there is no abnormality, confirm whether the robot has a long period of cold machine or a long period of operation after a significant change in friction; if there is still no abnormality, please refer to the manual to troubleshoot the cause or debug the collision detection parameters.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 请确认基座是否运动（如导轨带着机器人在运动）并检查是否发生碰撞，若未发生碰撞，请：1）检查负载参数是否设置正确；2）检查控制器中的机器人型号是否与本体一致；3）检查机器人是否出现电机卡死、抱闸未打开等情况；4）若存在机器人长时间冷机后突然启动的情况，请适当热机后再运行；若存在长时间运行后机器人摩擦力显著降低的情况，须联系厂商重新辨识摩擦力；5）若工作在高速重载等工况下，导致电流出现了饱和现象，此时也很容易发生误报警，这种工况已经超出机器人的负载能力，需要避免工作在这种条件下；也可尝试通过指令进入中等精度模式或手动打开所有轴的速度前馈在一定程度上解决该问题。6）若确定为误报，可适当调大该轴的碰撞检测灵敏度，建议使用碰撞检测灵敏度推荐值；19）若仍无效，可尝试关闭该轴的碰撞检测开关.

Please confirm whether the external axis is moving and check whether collision occurs, if no collision occurs, please: 1) check whether the load parameters are set correctly; 2) check whether the robot model in the controller is the same as the body; 3) check whether the robot is stuck in the motor, the holding brake is not opened, etc.; 4) if there is a long time after the robot is cold and then suddenly start the case, please warm up the machine and then run; if there is a long time after running the robot friction significantly reduced, it is necessary to contact the manufacturer to re-identify the friction; 5) if working under high speed and heavy load conditions, resulting in current saturation, this is also likely to occur false alarms. If there is a significant reduction in the friction of the robot after a long period of operation, contact the manufacturer to re-identify the friction; 5) If the work in the high-speed heavy-duty conditions, resulting in saturation of the current phenomenon, it is also easy to false alarms, this condition has exceeded the robot's loading capacity, you need to avoid working in such conditions; you can also try to enter the medium-precision mode through the instruction or manually open the speed of all the axes of the speed feedforward to a certain extent to solve this problem. (6) If it is determined to be a false alarm, you can appropriately adjust the axis of the collision detection sensitivity, it is recommended to use the recommended value of the collision detection sensitivity; (7) If it is still not effective, you can try to turn off the axis of the collision detection switch.

If there is no abnormality, please refer to the instruction manual to investigate the cause or debug the collision detection parameters.
ErrorCode.Reason: 检测到J3轴异常，且机器人本身没运动，然而检测到基座在运动，请确认基座是否运动（如导轨带着机器人在运动）并检查是否发生碰撞；如无碰撞，请确认该轴电机是否发生故障；如无异常，确认负载参数设置是否正确、确认碰撞检测参数是否已调试、确认是否由于伺服跟踪能力有限造成；如无异常，确认机器人是否存在长时间冷机或长时间运行后摩擦力显著变化的情况；若仍无异常请参考说明书排查原因或调试碰撞检测参数。

If there is a significant reduction in the friction of the robot after a long period of operation, contact the manufacturer to re-identify the friction; 5) If the work in the high-speed heavy-duty conditions, resulting in saturation of the current phenomenon, it is also easy to false alarms, this condition has exceeded the robot's loading capacity, you need to avoid working in such conditions; you can also try to enter the medium-precision mode through the instruction or manually open the speed of all the axes of the speed feedforward to a certain extent to solve this problem. ErrorCode.Description: 检测到J4轴异常，且机器人本身没运动，然而检测到基座在运动，判断第4关节发生被动碰撞，请确认基座是否运动（如导轨带着机器人在运动）并检查是否发生碰撞；如无碰撞，请确认该轴电机是否发生故障，排查外部线缆干涉、拉扯的情况；如无异常，确认负载参数设置是否正确、确认碰撞检测参数是否已调试；若仍无异常请参考说明书排查原因或调试碰撞检测参数。

Detected abnormality on J4 axis with the robot itself not moving, but detecting movement of the base. Judging that there is a passive collision on the J4 axis, please confirm if the base (such as the rail carrying the robot) is moving and check for any collision. if there is no collision, please confirm that the axis motor is not faulty,check for any external cable interference or pulling issues; if there is no abnormality, please confirm that the load parameter settings are correct, and confirm that the collision detection parameter has been debugged; if there is no abnormality, please refer to the instruction manual to troubleshoot the cause or debug the collision detection parameter; if there is no abnormality, please refer to the instruction manual to troubleshoot the cause or debug the collision detection parameter. If there is no abnormality, please refer to the instruction manual to investigate the cause or debug the collision detection parameters.
ErrorCode.Reason: 检测到J4轴异常，且机器人本身没运动，然而检测到基座在运动，请确认基座是否运动（如导轨带着机器人在运动）并检查是否发生碰撞；如无碰撞，请确认该轴电机是否发生故障；如无异常，确认负载参数设置是否正确、确认碰撞检测参数是否已调试、确认是否由于伺服跟踪能力有限造成；如无异常，确认机器人是否存在长时间冷机或长时间运行后摩擦力显著变化的情况；若仍无异常请参考说明书排查原因或调试碰撞检测参数。

Upon detecting an anomaly in J4 while both the robot and its base are in motion, indicating that J4 is experiencing follow-up collision, please verify if the external axis are moving and check for any collisions. If no collision is detected, confirm whether there is a malfunction with the motor of this axis. Assuming everything seems normal without any issues, ensure that the load parameters are correctly set and that the collision detection parameters have been properly tuned. Should you still not encounter any anomalies, please refer to the user manual for troubleshooting steps or adjust the collision detection parameters accordingly,and confirm whether it is due to the limited servo tracking ability.If there is no abnormality, confirm whether the robot has a long period of cold machine or a long period of operation after a significant change in friction; if there is still no abnormality, please refer to the manual to troubleshoot the cause or debug the collision detection parameters.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 请确认基座是否运动（如导轨带着机器人在运动）并检查是否发生碰撞，若未发生碰撞，请：1）检查负载参数是否设置正确；2）检查控制器中的机器人型号是否与本体一致；3）检查机器人是否出现电机卡死、抱闸未打开等情况；4）若存在机器人长时间冷机后突然启动的情况，请适当热机后再运行；若存在长时间运行后机器人摩擦力显著降低的情况，须联系厂商重新辨识摩擦力；5）若工作在高速重载等工况下，导致电流出现了饱和现象，此时也很容易发生误报警，这种工况已经超出机器人的负载能力，需要避免工作在这种条件下；也可尝试通过指令进入中等精度模式或手动打开所有轴的速度前馈在一定程度上解决该问题。6）若确定为误报，可适当调大该轴的碰撞检测灵敏度，建议使用碰撞检测灵敏度推荐值；19）若仍无效，可尝试关闭该轴的碰撞检测开关.

Please confirm whether the external axis is moving and check whether collision occurs, if no collision occurs, please: 1) check whether the load parameters are set correctly; 2) check whether the robot model in the controller is the same as the body; 3) check whether the robot is stuck in the motor, the holding brake is not opened, etc.; 4) if there is a long time after the robot is cold and then suddenly start the case, please warm up the machine and then run; if there is a long time after running the robot friction significantly reduced, it is necessary to contact the manufacturer to re-identify the friction; 5) if working under high speed and heavy load conditions, resulting in current saturation, this is also likely to occur false alarms. If there is a significant reduction in the friction of the robot after a long period of operation, contact the manufacturer to re-identify the friction; 5) If the work in the high-speed heavy-duty conditions, resulting in saturation of the current phenomenon, it is also easy to false alarms, this condition has exceeded the robot's loading capacity, you need to avoid working in such conditions; you can also try to enter the medium-precision mode through the instruction or manually open the speed of all the axes of the speed feedforward to a certain extent to solve this problem. (6) If it is determined to be a false alarm, you can appropriately adjust the axis of the collision detection sensitivity, it is recommended to use the recommended value of the collision detection sensitivity; (7) If it is still not effective, you can try to turn off the axis of the collision detection switch.

If there is no abnormality, please refer to the instruction manual to investigate the cause or debug the collision detection parameters.

Please confirm whether the external axis is moving and check whether collision occurs, if no collision occurs, please: 1) check whether the load parameters are set correctly; 2) check whether the robot model in the controller is the same as the body; 3) check whether the robot is stuck in the motor, the holding brake is not opened, etc.; 4) if there is a long time after the robot is cold and then suddenly start the case, please warm up the machine and then run; if there is a long time after running the robot friction significantly reduced, it is necessary to contact the manufacturer to re-identify the friction; 5) if working under high speed and heavy load conditions, resulting in current saturation, this is also likely to occur false alarms. If there is a significant reduction in the friction of the robot after a long period of operation, contact the manufacturer to re-identify the friction; 5) If the work in the high-speed heavy-duty conditions, resulting in saturation of the current phenomenon, it is also easy to false alarms, this condition has exceeded the robot's loading capacity, you need to avoid working in such conditions; you can also try to enter the medium-precision mode through the instruction or manually open the speed of all the axes of the speed feedforward to a certain extent to solve this problem. (6) If it is determined to be a false alarm, you can appropriately adjust the axis of the collision detection sensitivity, it is recommended to use the recommended value of the collision detection sensitivity; (7) If it is still not effective, you can try to turn off the axis of the collision detection switch.

ErrorCode.Description: 检测到J9轴异常，且机器人本身没运动，然而检测到基座在运动，判断第9关节发生被动碰撞，请确认基座是否运动（如导轨带着机器人在运动）并检查是否发生碰撞；如无碰撞，请确认该轴电机是否发生故障，排查外部线缆干涉、拉扯的情况；如无异常，确认负载参数设置是否正确、确认碰撞检测参数是否已调试；若仍无异常请参考说明书排查原因或调试碰撞检测参数。

Detected abnormality on J9 axis with the robot itself not moving, but detecting movement of the base. Judging that there is a passive collision on the J9 axis, please confirm if the base (such as the rail carrying the robot) is moving and check for any collision. if there is no collision, please confirm that the axis motor is not faulty,check for any external cable interference or pulling issues; if there is no abnormality, please confirm that the load parameter settings are correct, and confirm that the collision detection parameter has been debugged; if there is no abnormality, please refer to the instruction manual to troubleshoot the cause or debug the collision detection parameter; if there is no abnormality, please refer to the instruction manual to troubleshoot the cause or debug the collision detection parameter. If there is no abnormality, please refer to the instruction manual to investigate the cause or debug the collision detection parameters.

Assuming everything seems normal without any issues, ensure that the load parameters are correctly set and that the collision detection parameters have been properly tuned. Should you still not encounter any anomalies, please refer to the user manual for troubleshooting steps or adjust the collision detection parameters accordingly,and confirm whether it is due to the limited servo tracking ability.If there is no abnormality, confirm whether the robot has a long period of cold machine or a long period of operation after a significant change in friction; if there is still no abnormality, please refer to the manual to troubleshoot the cause or debug the collision detection parameters.

ErrorCode.Description: 手动模式下，机器人第1关节转矩超限
Axis 1 torque overload in manual mode
ErrorCode.Reason: 关节转矩超出允许值
Joint torque exceeds the permissible value
ErrorCode.Resolvent: (1)适当减小加速度参数；\n(2)检测负载参数设置是否合适，将其适当改大；\n(3)如果开启最优轨迹，参考最优轨迹的调制指导，

1) Reduce the acceleration parameter appropriately; 2) Detect whether the load parameter setting is appropriate, and change it to a larger size appropriately; 3) If the optimal trajectory is turned on, refer to the modulation guide for the optimal trajectory.

Axis 12 torque overload in manual mode
ErrorCode.Reason: 关节转矩超出允许值
Joint torque exceeds the permissible value
ErrorCode.Resolvent: (1)适当减小加速度参数；\n(2)检测负载参数设置是否合适，将其适当改大；\n(3)如果开启最优轨迹，参考最优轨迹的调制指导，

1) Reduce the acceleration parameter appropriately; 2) Detect whether the load parameter setting is appropriate, and change it to a larger size appropriately; 3) If the optimal trajectory is turned on, refer to the modulation guide for the optimal trajectory.

ErrorCode.Description: 轴7正限位报警
J7 axis positive limit alarm
ErrorCode.Reason: 到达关节极限位置
The joint limit position is reached.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 反向运动清除
Perform negative motion to clear the alarm.

ErrorCode.Description: 轴7负限位报警
J2 axis negative limit alarm
ErrorCode.Reason: 到达关节极限位置
The joint limit position is reached.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 正向运动清除
Perform positive motion to clear the alarm.

ErrorCode.Description: 轴7驱动报警
J7 axis drive alarm
ErrorCode.Reason: 驱动器出现报警
The drive has an alarm.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 根据报警码查阅伺服手册做相应的故障排除
Perform troubleshooting by referring to the servo manual according to fault codes.

ErrorCode.Description: 轴7规划溢出报警
J7 axis path planning out of range
ErrorCode.Reason: The planned value exceeds the maximum calculation range (-1073741823 to 1073741824).
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查绝对原点位置是否选择在靠近计数极限边沿位置，若是，则在原点位置时，将驱动器位置清圈数
Check whether the absolute origin position is selected to be near the counting limit. If the zero point is near the limit, clear the drive turns.

ErrorCode.Description: 轴7跟随误差过大报警
Excessive tracking error of J7 axis
ErrorCode.Reason: 规划位置和实际位置差过大
The difference between the planned and actual positions is too large.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: (1)查看跟随误差阈值(2)检查机械是否有卡滞(3)检查动力线缆连接是否正常(4)检查负载于伺服增益是否匹配(5)查询跟随误差排障手册

1. View the tracking error threshold. 2. Check for mechanical stuck. 3. Check that the power lines are properly connected. 4. Check that the load matches the servo gain. 5. Consult the troubleshooting guide.

ErrorCode.Description: 轴7速度过大报警
J7 axis overspeed
ErrorCode.Reason: 运行速度大于设定的最大速度
The running speed is greater than the set maximum speed.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 降低第7关节速度
Reduce the speed of J7 axis.

ErrorCode.Description: 轴7的驱动强电未上
Strong current of J7 axis is not switched on.
ErrorCode.Reason: 强电未上
Strong current is not switched on.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查驱动器电路，是否强电未上
Check the drive circuit for whether strong current is not switched on.

ErrorCode.Description: 第7关节转矩超限
J7 axis torque overlimit
ErrorCode.Reason: 关节转矩超出允许值
The actual maximum current exceeds the limit.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: (1)适当减小加速度参数；\n(2)检测负载参数设置是否合适，将其适当改大；\n(3)如果开启最优轨迹，参考最优轨迹的调制指导，

1. Reduce the acceleration parameters appropriately. \N2. Check that the load parameter settings are appropriate. \n3. If the optimal trajectory is enabled, refer to the modulation guidance of the optimal trajectory.

ErrorCode.Description: 第7关节平均负载率超限
J7 axis average load rate overlimit
ErrorCode.Reason: 平均负载率超出温升、寿命的限制；
The average load rate exceeds the limits of temperature rise and lifespan.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: (1)排查抱闸问题、机械卡死、驱动器问题;\n(2)适当降低速度或加速度百分比；\n(3)延长非运动时间；纯运动节拍测试时可能会出现平均负载率超限，此时不代表实际应用时超限，可将实际应用中的等待、逻辑交互等延时加入测试程序再测试；

1. Investigate brake, mechanical jamming, and drive. \n2. Reduce the speed or acceleration percentage appropriately. \n3. Extend the non-motion time. In the pure motion beat test, the average load rate may exceed the limit, which does not mean that it exceeds the limit in actual application. You can add delay such as waiting and logical interaction in actual application to the test program and test again.

ErrorCode.Description: 第7关节规划速度异常
J7 axis planned speed error
ErrorCode.Reason: 规划速度超限过大
The planned speed exceeds the limit too much.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 降低关节或笛卡尔空间的最大速度
Reduce the maximum speed in joint or Cartesian space.

ErrorCode.Description: 第7关节规划加速度异常
J7 axis planned acceleration error
ErrorCode.Reason: 规划加速度超限过大
The planned acceleration exceeds the limit too much.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 降低关节或笛卡尔空间的最大加速度或者速度
Reduce the maximum acceleration or velocity in joint or Cartesian space.

ErrorCode.Description: 第7关节使能同步异常
J7 axis enable synchronization error
ErrorCode.Reason: 上使前机器人有振动或上使能过程中因外部原因对机器人造成运动
The robot vibrates before it is enabled, or the robot moves due to external reasons during the enabling process.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查上电时刻是否关节有运动，检查上使能过程中是否有外力因素干扰
Check whether there is joint movement during power on, and whether there is external interference during the enabling process.

ErrorCode.Description: 第7关节到位超时
J7 axis arrival timeout
ErrorCode.Reason: 伺服到位时间过长
The servo takes too long to arrive the target position.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查到位误差是否过小或者伺服增益不合适
Check whether the arrival error threshold is too small or whether the servo gain is not proper.

ErrorCode.Description: 关节7位置反馈异常
J7 axis position feedback error
ErrorCode.Reason: (1)圈值发生变化(2)码器位置跳变
1. Multi-turn value changes. 2. Encoder position jumps.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查是否人为清除，若不是，请检查干扰源
Check if the multi turn value has been manually cleared. If not, check for the interference source.

ErrorCode.Description: 第7关节下使能状态异常
J7 axis disable status error
ErrorCode.Reason: 机器人未能在规定的时间与距离内下使能
The robot failed to be disabled at the specified time and distance.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 1、检查伺服参数6084参数，抱闸设置，0209是否正确\n2、查看负载是否超规格使用
1. Check that servo parameter 6084 and brake parameter 0209 are correctly set. \n2. Check if the load exceeds the limit.

ErrorCode.Description: 轴8正限位报警
J8 axis positive limit alarm
ErrorCode.Reason: 到达关节极限位置
The joint limit position is reached.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 反向运动清除
Perform negative motion to clear the alarm.

ErrorCode.Description: 轴8负限位报警
J8 axis negative limit alarm

Check whether the absolute origin position is selected to be near the counting limit. If the zero point is near the limit, clear the drive turns.

Excessive tracking error of J8 axis

J8 axis overspeed

The actual maximum current exceeds the limit.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: (1)适当减小加速度参数；\n(2)检测负载参数设置是否合适，将其适当改大；\n(3)如果开启最优轨迹，参考最优轨迹的调制指导，

1. Reduce the acceleration parameters appropriately. \N2. Check that the load parameter settings are appropriate. \n3. If the optimal trajectory is enabled, refer to the modulation guidance of the optimal trajectory.

ErrorCode.Reason: 平均负载率超出温升、寿命的限制；
The average load rate exceeds the limits of temperature rise and lifespan.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: (1)排查抱闸问题、机械卡死、驱动器问题;(2)适当降低速度或加速度百分比；(3)延长非运动时间；纯运动节拍测试时可能会出现平均负载率超限，此时不代表实际应用时超限，可将实际应用中的等待、逻辑交互等延时加入测试程序再测试；

1. Investigate brake, mechanical jamming, and drive. 2. Reduce the speed or acceleration percentage appropriately. 3. Extend the non-motion time. In the pure motion beat test, the average load rate may exceed the limit, which does not mean that it exceeds the limit in actual application. You can add delay such as waiting and logical interaction in actual application to the test program and test again.

ErrorCode.Description: 第9关节规划速度异常
J9 axis planned speed error
ErrorCode.Reason: 规划速度超限过大
The planned speed exceeds the limit too much.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 降低关节或笛卡尔空间的最大速度
Reduce the maximum speed in joint or Cartesian space.

ErrorCode.Description: 第9关节规划加速度异常
J9 axis planned acceleration error
ErrorCode.Reason: 规划加速度超限过大
The planned acceleration exceeds the limit too much.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 降低关节或笛卡尔空间的最大加速度或者速度
Reduce the maximum acceleration or velocity in joint or Cartesian space.

ErrorCode.Description: 第9关节使能同步异常
J9 axis enable synchronization error
ErrorCode.Reason: 上使前机器人有振动或上使能过程中因外部原因对机器人造成运动
The robot vibrates before it is enabled, or the robot moves due to external reasons during the enabling process.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查上电时刻是否关节有运动，检查上使能过程中是否有外力因素干扰
Check whether there is joint movement during power on, and whether there is external interference during the enabling process.

ErrorCode.Description: 第9关节到位超时
J9 axis arrival timeout
ErrorCode.Reason: 伺服到位时间过长
The servo takes too long to arrive the target position.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查到位误差是否过小或者伺服增益不合适
Check whether the arrival error threshold is too small or whether the servo gain is not proper.

ErrorCode.Description: 第9关节编码器反馈异常
J9 axis encoder feedback error
ErrorCode.Reason: (1)圈值发生变化(2)码器位置跳变
1. Multi-turn value changes. 2. Encoder position jumps.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查是否人为清除，若不是，请检查干扰源
Check if the multi turn value has been manually cleared. If not, check for the interference source.

ErrorCode.Description: 第9关节下使能状态异常
J9 axis disable status error
ErrorCode.Reason: 机器人未能在规定的时间与距离内下使能
The robot failed to be disabled at the specified time and distance.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 1、检查伺服参数6084参数，抱闸设置，0209是否正确 2、查看负载是否超规格使用
1. Check that servo parameter 6084 and brake parameter 0209 are correctly set. 2. Check if the load exceeds the limit.

ErrorCode.Description: 轴10正限位报警
Axis 10 positive limit alarm
ErrorCode.Reason: 到达关节极限位置
Reach the limit position of the joint
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 反向运动清除
Reverse motion clear

ErrorCode.Description: 轴10负限位报警
Axis 10 negative limit alarm
ErrorCode.Reason: 到达关节极限位置
Reach the limit position of the joint
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 正向运动清除
Forward motion clear

ErrorCode.Description: 轴10驱动报警
Axis 10 drive alarm
ErrorCode.Reason: 驱动器出现报警
Drive alarm
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 根据报警码查阅伺服手册做相应的故障排除
Refer to the servo manual for troubleshooting according to the alarm code

ErrorCode.Description: 轴10规划溢出报警
Axis 10 planning overflow alarm
ErrorCode.Reason: Planning value exceeds the maximum calculation range
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查绝对原点位置是否选择在靠近计数极限边沿位置，若是，则在原点位置时，将驱动器位置清圈数
Check whether the absolute origin position is selected close to the counting limit edge. If yes, when it is at the origin position, clear the number of turns of the driver position

ErrorCode.Description: 轴10跟随误差过大报警
Alarm for excessive follow-up error of Axis 10
ErrorCode.Reason: 规划位置和实际位置差过大
Too large difference between planned position and actual position
ErrorCode.Resolvent: (1)查看跟随误差阈值(2)检查机械是否有卡滞(3)检查动力线缆连接是否正常(4)检查负载于伺服增益是否匹配(5)查询跟随误差排障手册

(1) Check the following error threshold (2) Check whether the machine is stuck (3) Check whether the power cable connection is normal (4) Check whether the load matches the servo gain (5) Query the following error troubleshooting manual

ErrorCode.Description: 轴10速度过大报警
Alarm for excessive speed of Axis 10
ErrorCode.Reason: 运行速度大于设定的最大速度
The running speed is greater than the set maximum speed
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 降低第10关节速度
Reduce the speed of the 10th joint

ErrorCode.Description: 轴10的驱动强电未上
Drive power of shaft 10 is not on
ErrorCode.Reason: 强电未上
Strong current is not on
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查驱动器电路，是否强电未上
Check whether the driver circuit is not powered on

ErrorCode.Description: 第10关节转矩超限
The 10th joint torque exceeds the limit
ErrorCode.Reason: 关节转矩超出允许值
Joint torque exceeds allowable value
ErrorCode.Resolvent: (1)适当减小加速度参数；(2)检测负载参数设置是否合适，将其适当改大；(3)如果开启最优轨迹，参考最优轨迹的调制指导

(1) Reduce the acceleration parameter appropriately;(2) Check whether the load parameters are set properly and increase them appropriately;(3) If the optimal trajectory is enabled, refer to the modulation guidance of the optimal trajectory

ErrorCode.Description: 第10关节平均负载率超限
Average load rate of the 10th joint exceeds the limit
ErrorCode.Reason: 平均负载率超出温升、寿命的限制；
The average load rate exceeds the limit of temperature rise and service life;
ErrorCode.Resolvent: (1)排查抱闸问题、机械卡死、驱动器问题;(2)适当降低速度或加速度百分比；(3)延长非运动时间；纯运动节拍测试时可能会出现平均负载率超限，此时不代表实际应用时超限，可将实际应用中的等待、逻辑交互等延时加入测试程序再测试；

(1) Troubleshoot the problems of the band brake, mechanical jamming and driver;(2) Reduce the speed or acceleration percentage appropriately;(3) Prolonging non exercise time; The average load rate may exceed the limit during the pure motion beat test, which does not mean that the actual application time exceeds the limit. You can add the waiting, logical interaction and other delays in the actual application to the test program for retesting;

ErrorCode.Description: 第10关节规划速度异常
The 10th joint planning speed is abnormal
ErrorCode.Reason: 规划速度超限过大
Excessive planning speed
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 降低关节或笛卡尔空间的最大速度
Reduce the maximum speed of joints or Cartesian space

ErrorCode.Description: 第10关节规划加速度异常
The 10th joint planning acceleration is abnormal
ErrorCode.Reason: 规划加速度超限过大
The planned acceleration exceeds the limit too much
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 降低关节或笛卡尔空间的最大加速度或者速度
Reduce the maximum acceleration or velocity in joint or Cartesian space

ErrorCode.Description: 第10关节使能同步异常
Abnormal 10th joint enabling synchronization
ErrorCode.Reason: 上使前机器人有振动或上使能过程中因外部原因对机器人造成运动
The up enabling front robot vibrates or moves due to external reasons during the up enabling process
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查上电时刻是否关节有运动，检查上使能过程中是否有外力因素干扰
Check whether there is joint movement at the time of power on and whether there is interference of external force factors during the process of power on

ErrorCode.Description: 第10关节到位超时
Timeout of the 10th joint in place
ErrorCode.Reason: 伺服到位时间过长
Servo in place time is too long
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查到位误差是否过小或者伺服增益不合适
Check whether the positioning error is too small or the servo gain is inappropriate

ErrorCode.Description: 第10关节编码器反馈异常
Abnormal feedback of the 10th joint position
ErrorCode.Reason: (1)圈值发生变化(2)码器位置跳变
(1) Circle value changes (2) Coder position jumps
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查是否人为清除，若不是，请检查干扰源
Check whether it is cleared manually; if not, check the interference source

ErrorCode.Description: 第10关节下使能状态异常
Abnormal enabling state under the 10th joint
ErrorCode.Reason: 机器人未能在规定的时间与距离内下使能
The robot fails to enable within the specified time and distance
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 1、检查伺服参数6084参数，抱闸设置，0209是否正确 2、查看负载是否超规格使用
1. Check whether servo parameter 6084, band brake setting and 0209 are correct2. Check whether the load exceeds the specification

ErrorCode.Reason: 规划位置和实际位置差过大
Too large difference between planned position and actual position
ErrorCode.Resolvent: (1)查看跟随误差阈值(2)检查机械是否有卡滞(3)检查动力线缆连接是否正常(4)检查负载于伺服增益是否匹配(5)查询跟随误差排障手册

(1) Check the following error threshold (2) Check whether the machine is stuck (3) Check whether the power cable connection is normal (4) Check whether the load matches the servo gain (5) Query the following error troubleshooting manual

ErrorCode.Description: 轴13速度过大报警
Alarm for excessive speed of Axis 13
ErrorCode.Reason: 运行速度大于设定的最大速度
The running speed is greater than the set maximum speed
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 降低第13关节速度
Reduce the speed of the 13th joint

ErrorCode.Description: 轴13的驱动强电未上
Drive power of shaft 13 is not on
ErrorCode.Reason: 强电未上
Strong current is not on
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查驱动器电路，是否强电未上
Check whether the driver circuit is not powered on

ErrorCode.Description: 第13关节转矩超限
The 13th joint torque exceeds the limit
ErrorCode.Reason: 关节转矩超出允许值
Joint torque exceeds allowable value
ErrorCode.Resolvent: (1)适当减小加速度参数；(2)检测负载参数设置是否合适，将其适当改大；(3)如果开启最优轨迹，参考最优轨迹的调制指导

(1) Reduce the acceleration parameter appropriately;(2) Check whether the load parameters are set properly and increase them appropriately;(3) If the optimal trajectory is enabled, refer to the modulation guidance of the optimal trajectory

ErrorCode.Description: 第13关节平均负载率超限
Average load rate of the 13th joint exceeds the limit
ErrorCode.Reason: 平均负载率超出温升、寿命的限制；
The average load rate exceeds the limit of temperature rise and service life;
ErrorCode.Resolvent: (1)排查抱闸问题、机械卡死、驱动器问题;(2)适当降低速度或加速度百分比；(3)延长非运动时间；纯运动节拍测试时可能会出现平均负载率超限，此时不代表实际应用时超限，可将实际应用中的等待、逻辑交互等延时加入测试程序再测试；

(1) Troubleshoot the problems of the band brake, mechanical jamming and driver;(2) Reduce the speed or acceleration percentage appropriately;(3) Prolonging non exercise time; The average load rate may exceed the limit during the pure motion beat test, which does not mean that the actual application time exceeds the limit. You can add the waiting, logical interaction and other delays in the actual application to the test program for retesting;

ErrorCode.Description: 第13关节规划速度异常
The 13th joint planning speed is abnormal
ErrorCode.Reason: 规划速度超限过大
Excessive planning speed
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 降低关节或笛卡尔空间的最大速度
Reduce the maximum speed of joints or Cartesian space

ErrorCode.Description: 第13关节规划加速度异常
The 13th joint planning acceleration is abnormal
ErrorCode.Reason: 规划加速度超限过大
The planned acceleration exceeds the limit too much
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 降低关节或笛卡尔空间的最大加速度或者速度
Reduce the maximum acceleration or velocity in joint or Cartesian space

ErrorCode.Description: 第13关节使能同步异常
Abnormal 13th joint enabling synchronization
ErrorCode.Reason: 上使前机器人有振动或上使能过程中因外部原因对机器人造成运动
The up enabling front robot vibrates or moves due to external reasons during the up enabling process
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查上电时刻是否关节有运动，检查上使能过程中是否有外力因素干扰
Check whether there is joint movement at the time of power on and whether there is interference of external force factors during the process of power on

ErrorCode.Description: 第13关节到位超时
Timeout of the 13th joint in place
ErrorCode.Reason: 伺服到位时间过长
Servo in place time is too long
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查到位误差是否过小或者伺服增益不合适
Check whether the positioning error is too small or the servo gain is inappropriate

ErrorCode.Description: 第13关节编码器反馈异常
Abnormal feedback of the 13th joint position
ErrorCode.Reason: (1)圈值发生变化(2)码器位置跳变
(1) Circle value changes (2) Coder position jumps
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查是否人为清除，若不是，请检查干扰源
Check whether it is cleared manually; if not, check the interference source

ErrorCode.Description: 第13关节下使能状态异常
Abnormal enabling state under the 13th joint
ErrorCode.Reason: 机器人未能在规定的时间与距离内下使能
The robot fails to enable within the specified time and distance
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 1、检查伺服参数6084参数，抱闸设置，0209是否正确 2、查看负载是否超规格使用
1. Check whether servo parameter 6084, band brake setting and 0209 are correct2. Check whether the load exceeds the specification

ErrorCode.Description: 轴14正限位报警
Axis 14 positive limit alarm
ErrorCode.Reason: 到达关节极限位置
Reach the limit position of the joint
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 反向运动清除
Reverse motion clear

ErrorCode.Description: 轴14负限位报警
Axis 14 negative limit alarm
ErrorCode.Reason: 到达关节极限位置
Reach the limit position of the joint
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 正向运动清除
Forward motion clear

ErrorCode.Description: 轴14驱动报警
Axis 14 drive alarm
ErrorCode.Reason: 驱动器出现报警
Drive alarm
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 根据报警码查阅伺服手册做相应的故障排除
Refer to the servo manual for troubleshooting according to the alarm code

ErrorCode.Description: 轴14规划溢出报警
Axis 14 planning overflow alarm
ErrorCode.Reason: Planning value exceeds the maximum calculation range
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查绝对原点位置是否选择在靠近计数极限边沿位置，若是，则在原点位置时，将驱动器位置清圈数
Check whether the absolute origin position is selected close to the counting limit edge. If yes, when it is at the origin position, clear the number of turns of the driver position

ErrorCode.Description: 轴14跟随误差过大报警
Alarm for excessive follow-up error of Axis 14
ErrorCode.Reason: 规划位置和实际位置差过大
Too large difference between planned position and actual position
ErrorCode.Resolvent: (1)查看跟随误差阈值(2)检查机械是否有卡滞(3)检查动力线缆连接是否正常(4)检查负载于伺服增益是否匹配(5)查询跟随误差排障手册

(1) Check the following error threshold (2) Check whether the machine is stuck (3) Check whether the power cable connection is normal (4) Check whether the load matches the servo gain (5) Query the following error troubleshooting manual

ErrorCode.Description: 轴14速度过大报警
Alarm for excessive speed of Axis 14
ErrorCode.Reason: 运行速度大于设定的最大速度
The running speed is greater than the set maximum speed
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 降低第14关节速度
Reduce the speed of the 14th joint

ErrorCode.Description: 轴14的驱动强电未上
Drive power of shaft 14 is not on
ErrorCode.Reason: 强电未上
Strong current is not on
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查驱动器电路，是否强电未上
Check whether the driver circuit is not powered on

ErrorCode.Description: 第14关节转矩超限
The 14th joint torque exceeds the limit
ErrorCode.Reason: 关节转矩超出允许值
Joint torque exceeds allowable value
ErrorCode.Resolvent: (1)适当减小加速度参数；(2)检测负载参数设置是否合适，将其适当改大；(3)如果开启最优轨迹，参考最优轨迹的调制指导

(1) Reduce the acceleration parameter appropriately;(2) Check whether the load parameters are set properly and increase them appropriately;(3) If the optimal trajectory is enabled, refer to the modulation guidance of the optimal trajectory

ErrorCode.Description: 第14关节平均负载率超限
Average load rate of the 14th joint exceeds the limit
ErrorCode.Reason: 平均负载率超出温升、寿命的限制；
The average load rate exceeds the limit of temperature rise and service life;
ErrorCode.Resolvent: (1)排查抱闸问题、机械卡死、驱动器问题;(2)适当降低速度或加速度百分比；(3)延长非运动时间；纯运动节拍测试时可能会出现平均负载率超限，此时不代表实际应用时超限，可将实际应用中的等待、逻辑交互等延时加入测试程序再测试；

(1) Troubleshoot the problems of the band brake, mechanical jamming and driver;(2) Reduce the speed or acceleration percentage appropriately;(3) Prolonging non exercise time; The average load rate may exceed the limit during the pure motion beat test, which does not mean that the actual application time exceeds the limit. You can add the waiting, logical interaction and other delays in the actual application to the test program for retesting;

ErrorCode.Description: 第14关节规划速度异常
The 14th joint planning speed is abnormal
ErrorCode.Reason: 规划速度超限过大
Excessive planning speed
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 降低关节或笛卡尔空间的最大速度
Reduce the maximum speed of joints or Cartesian space

ErrorCode.Description: 第14关节规划加速度异常
The 14th joint planning acceleration is abnormal
ErrorCode.Reason: 规划加速度超限过大
The planned acceleration exceeds the limit too much
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 降低关节或笛卡尔空间的最大加速度或者速度
Reduce the maximum acceleration or velocity in joint or Cartesian space

ErrorCode.Description: 第14关节使能同步异常
Abnormal 14th joint enabling synchronization
ErrorCode.Reason: 上使前机器人有振动或上使能过程中因外部原因对机器人造成运动
The up enabling front robot vibrates or moves due to external reasons during the up enabling process
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查上电时刻是否关节有运动，检查上使能过程中是否有外力因素干扰
Check whether there is joint movement at the time of power on and whether there is interference of external force factors during the process of power on

ErrorCode.Description: 第14关节到位超时
Timeout of the 14th joint in place
ErrorCode.Reason: 伺服到位时间过长
Servo in place time is too long
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查到位误差是否过小或者伺服增益不合适
Check whether the positioning error is too small or the servo gain is inappropriate

ErrorCode.Description: 第14关节编码器反馈异常
Abnormal feedback of the 14th joint position
ErrorCode.Reason: (1)圈值发生变化(2)码器位置跳变
(1) Circle value changes (2) Coder position jumps
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查是否人为清除，若不是，请检查干扰源
Check whether it is cleared manually; if not, check the interference source

ErrorCode.Description: 第14关节下使能状态异常
Abnormal enabling state under the 14th joint
ErrorCode.Reason: 机器人未能在规定的时间与距离内下使能
The robot fails to enable within the specified time and distance
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 1、检查伺服参数6084参数，抱闸设置，0209是否正确 2、查看负载是否超规格使用
1. Check whether servo parameter 6084, band brake setting and 0209 are correct2. Check whether the load exceeds the specification

ErrorCode.Description: 伺服模式切换失败
Failed to switch servo drive to speed mode.
ErrorCode.Reason: 伺服模式切换为速度模式失败
Failed to switch servo drive to speed mode.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 请检查伺服驱动器是否有异常或联系厂家
Check that the servo drive is normal or contact the manufacturer.

ErrorCode.Description: 伺服模式切换为回零模式失败
Failed to switch servo drive to homing mode.
ErrorCode.Reason: 伺服模式切换为回零模式失败
Failed to switch servo drive to homing mode.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 请检查伺服驱动器是否有异常或联系厂家
Check that the servo drive is normal or contact the manufacturer.

ErrorCode.Description: 伺服模式切换为位置模式失败
Failed to switch servo drive to position mode.
ErrorCode.Reason: 伺服模式切换为位置模式失败
Failed to switch servo drive to position mode.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 请检查伺服驱动器是否有异常或联系厂家
Check that the servo drive is normal or contact the manufacturer.

ErrorCode.Description: 指令中使用了未激活的独立轴
An inactive independent axis is used in the instruction.
ErrorCode.Reason: 指令中使用了未激活的独立轴
An inactive independent axis is used in the instruction.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 请将该轴配置为可设为独立轴，并激活该轴为独立轴后，再使用
Activate the independent axis before using it.

ErrorCode.Description: 切换独立轴模式时，该轴仍处于运动状态
When switching to the independent axis mode, the axis is still in motion.
ErrorCode.Reason: 切换独立轴模式时，该轴仍处于运动状态
When switching to the independent axis mode, the axis is still in motion.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 请在轴完全停止时，再切换轴模式
Switch the axis mode after the axis stops completely.

ErrorCode.Description: 独立轴回零参考位置错误
Reference position error for independent axis homing.
ErrorCode.Reason: 独立轴回零参考位置错误
Reference position error for independent axis homing.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 请检查独立轴回零参考位置是否在规格内
Check that the reference position for independent axis homing is within the specification.

ErrorCode.Description: 独立轴模式错误
Independent axis mode error.
ErrorCode.Reason: 当前版本没有位置模式的独立轴，但独立轴模式被切为位置模式的独立轴
The current version has no independent axis of position mode, but the independent axis mode is switched to the position mode.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 请联系厂家
Contact the manufacturer.

ErrorCode.Description: J6为激活的独立轴时不支持ECP功能
ECP function is not supported when J6 is an active independent axis.
ErrorCode.Reason: 在J6轴为独立轴时，使用了ECP功能
The ECP function is used when J6 is used as an active independent axis.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 请将J6轴切为正常轴后再使用ECP功能
Switch J6 axis to normal axis before using the ECP function.

ErrorCode.Description: J6为激活的独立轴时不支持工具与法兰不同心
When J6 is an active independent axis, the tool and flange are not concentric.
ErrorCode.Reason: J6为激活的独立轴时不支持工具与法兰不同心
When J6 is an active independent axis, the tool and flange are not concentric.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: J6为激活的独立轴时请使用与法兰同心的工具
When J6 is an active independent axis, use a tool concentric with the flange.

ErrorCode.Description: 不支持在处于动态跟随模式下使用独立轴指令
The use of independent axis instructions in dynamic tracking mode is not supported.
ErrorCode.Reason: 不支持在处于动态跟随模式下使用独立轴指令
The use of independent axis instructions in dynamic tracking mode is not supported.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 不要在动态跟随模式下使用独立轴指令
Do not use independent axis instructions in dynamic tracking mode.

ErrorCode.Description: 软浮动功能已开启，不允许开启独立轴功能
Independent axis function cannot be enabled when the soft float function is enabled.
ErrorCode.Reason: 软浮动功能与独立轴功能互斥
The soft float function and the independent axis function are mutually exclusive.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 关闭软浮动功能再开启独立轴功能
Disable the soft float function and then enable the independent axis function.

ErrorCode.Description: J6为激活的独立轴时不支持自由曲线功能
Free curve function is not supported when J6 is an active independent axis.
ErrorCode.Reason: 在J6轴为独立轴时，使用了自由曲线功能
Free curve function is not supported when J6 is an active independent axis.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 请将J6轴切为正常轴后再使用自由曲线功能
Switch J6 axis to normal axis before using free curve function.

ErrorCode.Description: 清除独立轴关节多圈值时，检测到控制器处于未使能状态
When clearing the multi-turn value of the independent axis joint, it is detected that the controller is in the non-enabled state.
ErrorCode.Reason: 清除独立轴关节多圈值时，检测到控制器处于未使能状态
When clearing the multi-turn value of the independent axis joint, it is detected that the controller is in the non-enabled state.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 请在控制器处于使能状态时，再清除独立轴关节多圈值
Clear the multi-turn value of independent axis joint when the controller is in the enabled state.

ErrorCode.Description: 位置模式，机器人运动点位的脉冲过大
The pulse at the robot's motion point is too large in the position mode.
ErrorCode.Reason: 位置模式，机器人运动点位的脉冲过大
The pulse at the robot's motion point is too large in the position mode.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 请检查起点和终点关节角是否过大，请将关节多圈值清掉后，再重新取点
Check if the joint angles at the starting and ending points are too large. If so, clear the multi-turn value of joint and then get new points.

ErrorCode.Description: 取当前点作为外部轴零点时，当前脉冲过大
When taking the current point as zero point of the external axis, the current pulse is too large.
ErrorCode.Reason: 取当前点作为外部轴零点时，当前脉冲过大
When taking the current point as zero point of the external axis, the current pulse is too large.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 在外部轴伺服后台上把H0536设置为0， 然后把H0530设置成6，然后再取外部轴零点。
Set H0536 to 0 through the backend of the external axis servo, then set H0530 to 6, and then get the zero point of the external axis.

ErrorCode.Description: 取当前点作为机器人零点时，检测到机器人轴脉冲过大
When taking the current point as the robot zero point, it was detected that the robot axis pulse was too large.
ErrorCode.Reason: 取当前点作为机器人零点时，检测到机器人轴脉冲过大
When taking the current point as the robot zero point, it was detected that the robot axis pulse was too large.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 在伺服后台上把脉冲过大的轴的H0D20设置为2，重启控制柜后，再取当前点作为机器人零点。
Set H0D20 of the axis with excessive pulse to 2 through the servo backend, restart the controller, and then take the current point as the robot zero point.

ErrorCode.Description: 机器人进入禁止运动区域
Robot entered non-movement areas.
ErrorCode.Reason: 机器人进入禁止运动区域
Robot entered non-movement areas.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 将机器人移出禁止运动区域
Move the robot out of the area where movement is prohibited.

ErrorCode.Description: 伺服模式切换为力矩模式失败
Failed to switch servo mode to torque mode
ErrorCode.Reason: 伺服模式切换为力矩模式失败
Failed to switch servo mode to torque mode
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 请检查伺服驱动器是否有异常或联系厂家
Please check whether the servo drive is abnormal or contact the manufacturer

ErrorCode.Description: 安全模块触发一类急停
Security module triggers Class 1 emergency stop
ErrorCode.Reason: 安全模块监控到异常行为
The security module has detected abnormal behavior
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 解除安全模块监控，清除报警
Release security module monitoring and clear alarms

ErrorCode.Description: 手动低速模式下速度超过250mm/s
The speed exceeds 250mm/s in manual low speed mode.
ErrorCode.Reason: 速度规划错误
Speed planning error.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 保存错误信息，联系厂家
Save error information and contact the manufacturer.

ErrorCode.Description: 手动低速模式下传送带速度过高
The conveyor speed is too high in manual low speed mode.
ErrorCode.Reason: 手动模式下，使用RefSys Conveyor传送带速度超过200mm/s，使用CnvFastCatch传送带速度超过100mm/s
In manual mode, the RefSys Conveyor belt operates at speeds over 200mm/s, while the CnvFastCatch conveyor belt exceeds 100mm/s
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 降低传送带速度
Reduce conveyor belt speed

ErrorCode.Description: 手动低速模式下快抓指令规划错误
CnvFastCatch instruction planning error in manual low speed mode.
ErrorCode.Reason: 手动低速模式下传送带速度过高（超过100mm/s）或者快抓指令运动较短，导致快抓指令中的补偿段规划异常
In manual low speed mode, the conveyor speed is too high(more than 100mm/s) or the CnvFastCatch movement is too short, resulting in error in the compensation section of the CnvFastCatch instruction.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 降低传送带速度，或者增加快抓指令的运动距离
Reduce the speed of the conveyor or increase the movement distance of the CnvFastCatch instruction.

ErrorCode.Description: 手动低速模式下的传送带跟随动作速度超过250mm/s
In manual low speed mode, the conveyor tracking speed exceeds 250mm/s.
ErrorCode.Reason: 手动模式下传送带速度过高
The conveyor speed is too high in manual low speed mode.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 降低传送带速度
Reduce conveyor speed.

ErrorCode.Description: 机器人进入干涉区0
Robot enters interference zone 0
ErrorCode.Reason: 机器人进入干涉区0
Robot enters interference zone 0
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 关闭干涉区0，将机器人移出干涉区0
Close the interference zone 0 and move the robot out of the interference zone 0

ErrorCode.Description: 机器人进入干涉区1
Robot enters interference zone 1
ErrorCode.Reason: 机器人进入干涉区1
Robot enters interference zone 0
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 关闭干涉区1，将机器人移出干涉区1
Close the interference zone 1 and move the robot out of the interference zone 1

ErrorCode.Description: 机器人进入干涉区2
Robot enters interference zone 2
ErrorCode.Reason: 机器人进入干涉区2
Robot enters interference zone 2
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 关闭干涉区2，将机器人移出干涉区2
Close the interference zone 2 and move the robot out of the interference zone 2

ErrorCode.Description: 机器人进入干涉区3
Robot enters interference zone 3
ErrorCode.Reason: 机器人进入干涉区3
Robot enters interference zone 3
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 关闭干涉区3，将机器人移出干涉区3
Close the interference zone 3 and move the robot out of the interference zone 3

ErrorCode.Description: 机器人进入干涉区4
Robot enters interference zone 4
ErrorCode.Reason: 机器人进入干涉区4
Robot enters interference zone 4
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 关闭干涉区4，将机器人移出干涉区4
Close the interference zone 4 and move the robot out of the interference zone 4

ErrorCode.Description: 机器人进入干涉区5
Robot enters interference zone 5
ErrorCode.Reason: 机器人进入干涉区5
Robot enters interference zone 5
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 关闭干涉区5，将机器人移出干涉区5
Close the interference zone 5 and move the robot out of the interference zone 5

ErrorCode.Description: 机器人进入干涉区6
Robot enters interference zone 6
ErrorCode.Reason: 机器人进入干涉区6
Robot enters interference zone 6
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 关闭干涉区6，将机器人移出干涉区6
Close the interference zone 6 and move the robot out of the interference zone 6

ErrorCode.Description: 机器人进入干涉区7

ErrorCode.Description: 无效的曲线起点，实际起点与曲线指令起点距离过大
Invalid curve starting point.
ErrorCode.Reason: 无效的曲线起点，当前点与曲线指令起点距离过大
The current point is too far from the starting point in the curve instruction.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 请添加其他运动指令使机械臂移动到曲线指令中的起点
Move the robotic arm to the starting point first.

ErrorCode.Description: 曲线数据传输错误
Curve data transmission error.
ErrorCode.Reason: 曲线数据传输错误，内部原因
Internal error.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 内部错误，联系厂家
Contact the manufacturer.

ErrorCode.Description: 曲线数据空间不足
Insufficient curve data space
ErrorCode.Reason: DSP曲线数据存入失败，内部原因
Curve data storage failed due to internal reasons
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 保存错误信息，联系厂家
Save error information and contact the manufacturer

ErrorCode.Description: 速度约束空间不足
Insufficient queue space for speed constraints.
ErrorCode.Reason: DSP内部速度约束队列空间不足，内部原因
Insufficient queue space in DSP for speed constraints.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 内部错误，联系厂家
Contact the manufacturer.

ErrorCode.Description: 无效的曲线起点，实际起点与曲线指令起点形成的夹角过小
Invalid curve starting point due to too small angle.
ErrorCode.Reason: 无效的曲线起点，当前点与曲线指令起点形成的夹角过小
Current point of the robot cannot be the starting point of the curve instruction.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 请添加其他运动指令使机械臂移动到曲线指令中的起点
Move the robotic arm to the starting point first.

ErrorCode.Description: 无效的曲线起点，实际起点与曲线指令起点臂参数类型冲突
Invalid curve starting point due to conflicting arm type.
ErrorCode.Reason: 无效的曲线起点，当前点与曲线指令起点臂参数类型冲突
Current point of the robot cannot be the starting point of the curve instruction.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 请添加其他运动指令使机械臂移动到曲线指令中的起点
Move the robotic arm to the starting point first.

ErrorCode.Description: 运行自由曲线时不允许外部轴移动
Do not allow the external joint to move while running a free curve
ErrorCode.Reason: 运行自由曲线时不允许外部轴移动
Do not allow the external joint to move while running a free curve
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 运行自由曲线时不允许外部轴移动
Keep the external jointl stationary during the operation of the free curve

ErrorCode.Description: 曲线轨迹偏移预期轨迹过大
The curve trajectory deviates too much from the expected trajectory
ErrorCode.Reason: 局部曲线扭曲造成偏移
Local curve distortion
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 调整局部路径点约束使之尽量均匀变化，避免位姿变化集中
Adjust local path point constraints to make them as uniform as possible and avoid concentrated pose changes

ErrorCode.Description: 软浮动奇异位置
Soft float at singular position.
ErrorCode.Reason: 笛卡尔软浮动补偿后的位置会在奇异区域内
The position compensated by Cartesian soft float is in the singular position.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 避免在奇异区域附近开启笛卡尔软浮动功能
Avoid enabling Cartesian soft float near singular position.

ErrorCode.Description: 软浮动笛卡尔补偿位置超限
Soft float Cartesian compensation position exceeded limit.
ErrorCode.Reason: 推动机器人运动距离过大
The driving distance of the robot is too large.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 增大笛卡尔补偿位置变量值或减小机器人软浮动笛卡尔运动的距离
Increase the value of Cartesian compensation position variable or reduce the distance of soft float Cartesian motion of robot.

ErrorCode.Description: 软浮动笛卡尔补偿速度超限
Soft float Cartesian compensation speed exceeded limit.
ErrorCode.Reason: 推动机器人运动的速度过大
The robot motion speed is too large.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 减小推动机器人笛卡尔方向的速度
Reduce the speed at which the robot is pushed in the Cartesian direction.

ErrorCode.Description: 软浮动笛卡尔补偿加速度超限
Soft float Cartesian compensation acceleration exceeded limit.
ErrorCode.Reason: 推动机器人运动的加速度过大
The robot motion acceleration is too large.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 减小推动机器人笛卡尔方向的加速度
Reduce the acceleration at which the robot is pushed in the Cartesian direction.

ErrorCode.Description: 软浮动关节补偿角度超限
Soft float joint compensation angle exceeded limit.
ErrorCode.Reason: 推动机器人关节运动角度过大
The motion angle of robot joint is too large.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 减小机器人软浮动关节运动角度
Reduce the motion angle of robot joint.

ErrorCode.Description: 软浮动关节补偿角速度超限
Soft float joint compensation angular speed exceeded limit.
ErrorCode.Reason: 推动机器人运动的角速度过大
The angular speed at which the robot is pushed is too large.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 减小推动机器人的关节角速度
Reduce the angular speed of the robot.

ErrorCode.Description: 软浮动关节补偿角加速度超限
Soft float joint compensation angular acceleration exceeded limit.
ErrorCode.Reason: 推动机器人运动的角加速度过大
The angular acceleration at which the robot is pushed is too large.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 减小推动机器人的关节角加速度
Reduce the angular acceleration of the robot.

ErrorCode.Description: 软浮动关节脉冲补偿值超限
Soft float joint pulse compensation value exceeded limit.
ErrorCode.Reason: 推动机器人关节运动角度过大，导致补偿脉冲过大
The motion angle of the robot joint is too large, resulting in excessive compensation pulse.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 减小机器人软浮动关节运动角度
Reduce the joint motion angle of the robot.

ErrorCode.Description: 软浮动关节脉冲补偿速度超限
Soft float joint pulse compensation speed exceeded limit.
ErrorCode.Reason: 推动机器人运动的角速度过大，导致补偿脉冲速度过大
The angular speed of the robot is too large, resulting in excessive compensation pulse speed.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 减小推动机器人的关节角速度
Reduce the joint angular velocity of the robot.

ErrorCode.Description: 软浮动关节脉冲补偿加速度超限
Soft float joint pulse compensation acceleration exceeded limit.
ErrorCode.Reason: 推动机器人运动的角加速度过大，导致补偿脉冲角速度过大
The angular acceleration of the robot is too large, resulting in excessive compensation pulse angular speed.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 减小推动机器人的关节角加速度
Reduce the angular acceleration of the robot.

ErrorCode.Description: 软浮动状态机错误
Soft float state machine error.
ErrorCode.Reason: 软浮动状态设置错误
Soft float status was incorrectly set.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 重新设置软浮动功能命令
Reset the soft float function.

ErrorCode.Description: 软浮动停止关节补偿角度超限
Soft float stop joint compensation angle exceeded limit.
ErrorCode.Reason: 机器人停止时运动的关节角度过大
The joint angle of the robot is too large when the robot stops.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 重启启动软浮动
Restart the soft float function.

ErrorCode.Description: 软浮动停止关节补偿角速度超限
Soft float stop joint compensation angular speed exceeded limit.
ErrorCode.Reason: 机器人停止时运动的关节角速度过大
The joint angular speed of the robot is too large when the robot stops.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 重启启动软浮动
Restart The soft float function.

ErrorCode.Description: 软浮动停止关节补偿角加速度超限
Soft float stop joint compensation angular acceleration exceeded limit.
ErrorCode.Reason: 机器人停止时运动的关节角加速度过大
The joint angular acceleration of the robot is too large when the robot stops.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 重启启动软浮动
Restart The soft float function.

ErrorCode.Resolvent: 重新开启和关闭软浮动相关的指令

ErrorCode.Description: 软浮动停止关节脉冲补偿值超限

ErrorCode.Reason: 机器人停止时运动的关节脉冲过大

ErrorCode.Reason: 机器人停止时运动的关节脉冲速度过大

ErrorCode.Description: 软浮动停止关节脉冲补偿加速度超限

ErrorCode.Resolvent: 重启启动软浮动
Restart the soft float function.

ErrorCode.Description: 跟随工艺已开启，不允许开启软浮动功能
The soft float function cannot be enabled when the tracking process is enabled.
ErrorCode.Reason: 软浮动功能与跟随工艺功能互斥
The soft float function and tracking process function are mutually exclusive.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 关闭跟随工艺后再开启软浮动功能
Disable the tracking process and then enable the soft float function.

ErrorCode.Description: 软浮动功能与独立轴功能互斥
The soft float function and the independent axis function are mutually exclusive.
ErrorCode.Reason: 独立轴功能已开启
Independent axis function is enabled.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 关闭独立轴功能后再开启软浮动功能
Disable the independent axis function and then enable the soft float function.

ErrorCode.Description: 最优轨迹已开启，不允许开启软浮动功能
The Soft float function cannot be enabled when the optimal trajectory function is enabled.
ErrorCode.Reason: 软浮动功能与最优轨迹功能互斥
The soft float function and the optimal trajectory function are mutually exclusive.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 关闭最优轨迹功能后再开启软浮动功能
Disable the optimal trajectory function and then enable the optimal trajectory function.

ErrorCode.Description: 软浮动功能已开启，不允许开启最优轨迹
The optimal trajectory function cannot be enabled when the soft float function is enabled.
ErrorCode.Reason: 软浮动功能与最优轨迹功能互斥

ErrorCode.Resolvent: 关闭软浮动功能后再开启最优轨迹功能

ErrorCode.Description: 软浮动雅克比矩阵逆解错误

ErrorCode.Description: 软浮动功能开启后，参考工具号发生变化

ErrorCode.Reason: 软浮动功能开启后，不允许更换工具号

ErrorCode.Resolvent: 软浮动功能开启后，不更换工具号
Do not change the tool number after the soft float function is enabled.

ErrorCode.Description: 软浮动功能开启后，参考工件号发生变化

ErrorCode.Reason: 软浮动功能开启后，不允许更换工件号

ErrorCode.Resolvent: 软浮动功能开启后，不更换工件号

ErrorCode.Description: 软浮动功能开启前机器人未运动
The robot does not move before the soft float function is enabled.
ErrorCode.Reason: 软浮动功能开启前机器人未运动
The robot does not move before the soft float function is enabled.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 软浮动功能开启前需要机器人运动
Move the robot before enabling the soft float function.

ErrorCode.Description: 软浮动功能开启后，机器人实际位置超过关节的限位值
When the soft float function is enabled, the actual position of the robot exceeds the limit value of the joint.
ErrorCode.Reason: 软浮动功能开启后，机器人实际位置超过关节的限位值

ErrorCode.Resolvent: 示教模式下点动机器人，将机器人移出关节限位的位置
Jog the robot out of the joint limit position in the teaching mode.

ErrorCode.Description: 软浮动功能不支持倒装机型

ErrorCode.Reason: 软浮动功能不支持倒装机型

ErrorCode.Description: 手动模式下不允许使用导轨和变位机外部轴

DSP real-time feedback queue is full
