Please contact the manufacturer

ErrorCode.Description: 共享内存上传队列满
The shared memory upload queue is full
ErrorCode.Reason: ARM未及时获取实时反馈信息
ARM did not get real-time feedback in time
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 请联系厂家
Please contact the manufacturer

ErrorCode.Description: 共享内存上传队列空
The shared memory upload queue is empty
ErrorCode.Reason: 共享内存上传队列空
The shared memory upload queue is empty
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 请联系厂家
Please contact the manufacturer

ErrorCode.Description: 下发点位个数累积偏差较大
The cumulative deviation of the number of command points is large
ErrorCode.Reason: 下发点位个数累积偏差较大
The cumulative deviation of the number of lower points is large
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 请检查点位实际下发周期
Please check the actual delivery period of the command points

ErrorCode.Description: 插补位置超限
PrfPos out of bounds
ErrorCode.Reason: 插补位置超限
PrfPos out of bounds
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 请联系厂家
Please contact the manufacturer

ErrorCode.Description: 插补速度反向
PrfPos direction error
ErrorCode.Reason: 插补速度反向
PrfPos direction error
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 请联系厂家
Please contact the manufacturer

ErrorCode.Description: 插补速度超限
PrfVel out of bounds
ErrorCode.Reason: 插补速度超限
PrfVel out of bounds
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 请联系厂家
Please contact the manufacturer

ErrorCode.Description: 同时激活了多种现场总线
Multiple fieldbuses active simultaneously.
ErrorCode.Reason: 同时激活了多种现场总线
Multiple fieldbuses active simultaneously.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 关闭其他现场总线，只保留一个
Keep only one fieldbus active.

ErrorCode.Description: EtherNet/IP连接被一方主动断开
EtherNet/IP connection actively disconnected by one party.
ErrorCode.Reason: EtherNet/IP客户端或服务器主动断开了连接
EtherNet/IP client or server actively disconnected.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 重新发起EtherNet/IP连接
Re-initiate the EtherNet/IP connection.

ErrorCode.Description: EtherNet/IP连接因网络超时断开
EtherNet/IP disconnected due to network timeout.
ErrorCode.Reason: EtherNet/IP连接的网络通讯不通
Network communication on EtherNet/IP connection does not work.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查网线是否插好或者接触不良
Check whether the network cable is properly plugged in or has poor contact.

ErrorCode.Description: EtherCAT(现场总线)与主站连接断开
EtherCAT disconnected from master.
ErrorCode.Reason: EtherCAT连接的网线松动、EtherCAT主站故障、机器人系统故障
Loose EtherCAT cable connection, EtherCAT master failure, or robot system failure.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查网线是否插好或者接触不良、检查EtherCAT主站、联系厂家处理
Check whether the network cable is plugged in properly or has poor contact, check the EtherCAT master, or contact the manufacturer.

ErrorCode.Description: Modbus TCP连接因网络超时断开
Modbus TCP was disconnected since network timeout
ErrorCode.Reason: Modbus TCP连接的网络通讯不通
Network communication on Modbus TCP connection does not work.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查网线是否插好或者接触不良
Check whether the network cable is plugged in properly or has poor contact.

ErrorCode.Description: PROFINET扩展卡设备缺失
PROFINET expansion card missing.
ErrorCode.Reason: 已激活的PN扩展卡与控制柜通信断开
The activated PROFINET expansion card has lost communication with the controller.
ErrorCode.Resolvent:
1. Check that the PN expansion card is securely connected to the card slot. 
2. Check that the NS indicator light on the front panel of the PN expansion card is solid green or flashing green. 
3. Check that the PN expansion card can be activated after the controller is powered on again. 
 If the problem persists, replace the PN expansion card.

ErrorCode.Description: 当前激活的从站与配置的从站不匹配, 请重新配置从站
The currently activated slave station does not match the configured slave station. Please reconfigure the slave station
ErrorCode.Reason: 更换过N2L小板；进行过刷机
Replaced the N2L small board; performed firmware flashing
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 重新激活从站，并重启电柜
Reactivate the slave station and restart the electrical cabinet

ErrorCode.Description: 当前激活的从站与配置的从站不匹配, 请重新配置从站
The currently activated slave station does not match the configured slave station. Please reconfigure the slave station
ErrorCode.Reason: 更换过N2L小板；进行过刷机
Replaced the N2L small board; performed firmware flashing
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 重新激活从站，并重启电柜
Reactivate the slave station and restart the electrical cabinet

ErrorCode.Description: Ethernet/IP小板报警信息未定义
Ethernet/IP small board alarm message is not defined
ErrorCode.Reason: EIP故障码未定义
EIP fault code is undefined
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 定义新故障码
Check if the link is disconnected

ErrorCode.Description: Ethernet/IP从站连接超时
Ethernet/IP slave connection timed out
ErrorCode.Reason: EIP从站连接超时
EIP slave connection timed out
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查链路是否断开
Return to Factory for Repair

ErrorCode.Description: Ethernet/IP从站协议栈硬件故障
Ethernet/IP slave protocol stack hardware failure
ErrorCode.Reason: EIP从站硬件故障
EIP slave Hardware Failure
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 返厂维修
Program a unique MAC address

ErrorCode.Description: Ethernet/IP从站硬件MAC地址未烧录
Hardware MAC Address of Ethernet/IP slave not programmed
ErrorCode.Reason: EIP从站MAC地址错误
EIP slave MAC Address Error
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 烧录唯一的MAC地址
Reactivate the slave station and restart the electrical cabinet

ErrorCode.Description: Ethernet/IP从站网络层IP地址冲突
IP Address conflict in Ethernet/IP slave network layer
ErrorCode.Reason: IP地址冲突
IP Address Conflict
ErrorCode.Resolvent: EIP激活界面修改设备IP地址
Modify the device IP Address on the EIP Activation Interface

ErrorCode.Description: N2L小板EIP从站地址长度与控制器端地址长度配置不一致
The configuration of the N2L small board EIP slave address length does not match that of the controller address length
ErrorCode.Reason: N2L小板EIP从站地址长度与控制器端地址长度配置不一致
The configuration of the N2L small board EIP slave address length does not match that of the controller address length
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 重新配置EIP从站地址，并重启控制器
Reconfigure the EIP slave address and restart the controller

ErrorCode.Description: EtherCAT(现场总线)通讯同步失败
EtherCAT (fieldbus) communication synchronization failed.
ErrorCode.Reason: 由于硬件原因导致同步信号不产生
The synchronization signal is not generated due to hardware errors.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 联系厂家返厂维修
Contact the manufacturer.

ErrorCode.Description: EtherCAT(现场总线)通讯IRQ丢失超限
EtherCAT(Fieldbus) IQR Over Lose
ErrorCode.Reason: 1、数据帧在前端站点已经丢失，或者被丢弃\n2、主站的性能较差，IRQ的抖动超过设置值（H0E-22）* 通讯周期的值
1. The data frame has been lost or discarded at an upstream station. \n2. The performance of the host station is poor, the jitter of the IRQ exceeds the set value (H0E-22) * communication cycle.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 1、检查主站CPU运行负载\n2、降低通讯时间\n3、检查前面站点是否存在link丢失
1. Check the CPU usage of the master. \n2. Reduce the communication time. \n3. Check whether link loss occurs on the upstream slave.

ErrorCode.Description: EtherCAT(现场总线) EEPROM 加载出错
EtherCAT(Fieldbus) EEPROM Load Error
ErrorCode.Reason: 程序启动过程中，EEPROM中前8个字节数据错误，导致EtherCAT从站启动失败
During program start-up, the first 8 bytes of data in the EEPROM were wrong, causing EtherCAT slave to fail to start.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 联系厂家处理（重新烧录XML文件）
Contact the manufacturer to re-burn the XML file.

ErrorCode.Description: EtherCAT(现场总线) 初始化错误
EtherCAT(Fieldbus) Initial Error
ErrorCode.Reason: EtherCAT(现场总线) 初始化错误
EtherCAT (fieldbus) initialization error.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 硬件故障，请联系厂家处理
Hardware failure, please contact the manufacturer.

ErrorCode.Description: EtherCAT(现场总线）状态切换错误
EtherCAT(Fieldbus) State Switch Error
ErrorCode.Reason: 由于主站的误操作，或者人为的误操作导致状态切换错误
Bad state switching due to incorrect operation of the master or human error.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 联系厂家处理
Contact the manufacturer.

ErrorCode.Description: EtherCAT(现场总线)从站未使能DC错误
DC not enabled for EtherCAT slave.
ErrorCode.Reason: 在DC模式中，没有同步信号导致运动不正常，原因是：主站故障或主站操作不当
In DC mode, there is no synchronization signal causing abnormal movement due to master fault or improper master operation.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 联系厂家处理
Contact the manufacturer.

ErrorCode.Description: EtherCAT(现场总线)PDO配置个数超限
EtherCAT (fieldbus) PDO overlimit.
ErrorCode.Reason: EtherCAT(现场总线)PDO配置个数超限
EtherCAT (fieldbus) PDO overlimit.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查主站的PDO配置个数是否超限
Check whether the number of PDOs configured for the master exceeds the limit.

ErrorCode.Description: EtherCAT(现场总线)Link丢失
EtherCAT (fieldbus) link missing.
ErrorCode.Reason: 由于数据链路的物理连接不稳定，或者拨插网线导致的过程数据丢失
The physical connection of the data link is unstable or the process data is lost due to plug-in/plug-out of the network cable.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查网线连接是否可靠、牢固、现场是否震动激烈
Check whether the network cable is connected properly and whether the application site suffers from strong vibration.

ErrorCode.Description: EtherCAT(现场总线)连接存在链路干扰
EtherCAT (fieldbus) link interfered.
ErrorCode.Reason: 由于EMC干扰，或者网线质量不良，连接不良导致的数据丢失
The data is lost due to EMC interference, poor quality of the network cable or improper connection.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检测是否可靠接地，整改EMC，检查网线是否为汇川指定网线，检查网线连接是否可靠
Check whether proper grounding is performed and rectify EMC measures. Check whether the network cable used is provided by Inovance and whether the network cable is properly connected.

ErrorCode.Description: EtherCAT(现场总线)转发错误
EtherCAT (fieldbus) data forward error.
ErrorCode.Reason: 由于前端站点就已经检测出数据帧被破坏，导致数据无效
The upstream station detects that the data frame has been corrupted, leading to a data transfer error.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查前端站点，具体问题需要通过前端站点定位
Check the upstream station to locate the fault cause.

ErrorCode.Description: EtherCAT(现场总线)未接收到数据
EtherCAT(Fieldbus) Data Lose
ErrorCode.Reason: 1、数据帧在前端站点已经丢失，或者被丢弃\n由于主站的性能较差，IRQ的抖动超过设置值（H0E-22）* 通讯周期的值
1. The data frame has been lost or discarded at an upstream station. \n2. The performance of the host station is poor, the jitter of the IRQ exceeds the set value (H0E-22) * communication cycle.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 1、检查主站CPU运行负载\n2、降低通讯时间\n3、检查前面站点是否存在link丢失
1. Check the CPU usage of the master. \n2. Reduce the communication time. \n3. Check whether link loss occurs on the upstream slave.

ErrorCode.Description: EtherCAT(现场总线)邮箱配置错误（preop）
EtherCAT(Fieldbus) Email configuration error(preop)
ErrorCode.Reason: 1、由于主站配置错误; 2、从站XML文件有误
1. Due to configuration errors on the main site, 2. Error in the slave XML file
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 故障停机
Fault shutdown

ErrorCode.Description: EtherCAT(现场总线)SM2配置错误
EtherCAT(Fieldbus) SM2 configuration error
ErrorCode.Reason: 1、由于主站配置错误; 2、从站XML文件有误
1. Due to configuration errors on the main site, 2. Error in the slave XML file
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 故障停机
Fault shutdown

ErrorCode.Description: EtherCAT(现场总线)SM3配置错误
EtherCAT(Fieldbus)SM3 configuration error
ErrorCode.Reason: 1、由于主站配置错误; 2、从站XML文件有误
1. Due to configuration errors on the main site, 2. Error in the slave XML file
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 故障停机
Fault shutdown

ErrorCode.Description: PROFINET扩展卡MAC地址不合法
Illegal MAC address of PROFINET expansion card.
ErrorCode.Reason: PN扩展卡MAC地址未烧录，检测到MAC地址不合法
The MAC address of the PN expansion card was not burned, or an illegal MAC address was detected.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 为PN扩展卡烧录唯一的MAC地址
Burn a unique MAC address for the PN expansion card.

ErrorCode.Description: PROFINET扩展卡网络无连接
PROFINET expansion card has no network connection.
ErrorCode.Reason: PN扩展卡未与主站建立连接
PROFINET expansion card is not connected to the master.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查PN扩展卡与主站之间的线缆
Check the cable between the PROFINET expansion card and the master.

ErrorCode.Description: PROFINET扩展卡组态参数错误
Wrong configuration parameters of PROFINET expansion card.
ErrorCode.Reason: PN扩展卡组态参数设置错误
Configuration parameters of Profnet expansion card are not correctly set.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查PN扩展卡组态参数配置
Check the configuration parameters of the PROFINET expansion card.

ErrorCode.Description: PROFINET扩展卡主站网络掉线
PROFINET expansion card disconnected from master.
ErrorCode.Reason: PN扩展卡与主站连接中断
PROFINET expansion card is disconnected from master.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查PN扩展卡与主站之间的线缆
Check the cable connection between PROFINET expansion card and master.

ErrorCode.Description: 未检测到PROFINET扩展卡芯片
PROFINET expansion card chip not detected.
ErrorCode.Reason: 未检测到PN扩展卡从站芯片
PROFINET expansion card chip not detected.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 拔插PN扩展卡，或重启控制柜
Reinstall the PROFINET expansion card or restart the controller.

ErrorCode.Description: PROFINET扩展卡主站停机
Master shutdown indicated in PROFINET expansion card.
ErrorCode.Reason: 检测PNIO数据帧中IOPS状态，若为 bad，代表该数据帧无效，主站状态为停机
It is detected that the IOPS state in the PNIO data frame is bad, indicating that the data frame is invalid and the master is stopped.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查PN主站是否为STOP状态，若为STOP状态将其切换到RUN状态
Check if the PROFINET master is in the STOP state, and if it is in the STOP state, switch it to the RUN state.

ErrorCode.Description: PROFINET扩展卡设备名不存在
PROFINET expansion card name does not exist.
ErrorCode.Reason: 未检测到PN扩展卡的设备名称
Device name of the PROFINET expansion card was not detected.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 通过组态软件为PN扩展卡分配设备名称
Assign a device name to the PROFINET expansion cards through configuration software.

ErrorCode.Description: PROFINET扩展卡PDO长度与配置不一致
PDO length of the PROFINET expansion card is inconsistent with the configuration.
ErrorCode.Reason: Inobus数据帧长度校验错误
Inobus data frame length verification error.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查Inobus标准帧的数据区设定长度与真实长度是否一致
Check that the set length of the data area of the Inobus standard frame matches the actual length.

ErrorCode.Description: PROFINET扩展卡Inobus接收CRC错误
PROFINET expansion card Inobus CRC error.
ErrorCode.Reason: Inobus接收CRC错误
Inobus CRC error.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查并排除Inobus链路干扰
Eliminate Inobus link interference.

ErrorCode.Description: PROFINET扩展卡主从站数据地址长度不一致
The master and slave data of the PROFINET expansion card are inconsistent in length.
ErrorCode.Reason: 机器人端上位机配置PN总线数据地址长度与PLC端组态时配置的数据长度不一致
The length of the PN bus data configured on the host controller of the robot is inconsistent with the data length configured on the PLC.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 修改机器人端或PLC端的总线通信数据长度，使两端保持一致
Modify the bus communication data length at the robot or PLC end to ensure consistency between the two ends.

ErrorCode.Description: EtherCAT(现场总线)看门狗配置错误
EtherCAT(Fieldbus)Watchdog configuration error
ErrorCode.Reason: 由于主站配置错误
Due to configuration errors on the main site
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 故障停机
Fault shutdown

ErrorCode.Description: EtherCAT(现场总线)无sync信号
EtherCAT(Fieldbus)No sync signal
ErrorCode.Reason: 1、主站设置0x990寄存器dc启动时间及0x981寄存器DC激活小于从站本地系统时间; 2、主站设置0x990寄存器dc启动时间及0x981寄存器DC激活时间过大，超过从站本地系统时间17.2s; 3、0x982寄存器sync信号脉宽长度为0

1. The master station sets the start time of the 0x990 register DC and the activation time of the 0x981 register DC to be less than the local system time of the slave station 2. The starting time of 0x990 register DC and the activation time of 0x981 register DC set by the master station are too large, exceeding the local system time of the slave station by 17.2 seconds 3. 0x982 register sync signal pulse width length is 0
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 故障停机
Fault shutdown

ErrorCode.Description: EtherCAT(现场总线)phy初始化配置失败
EtherCAT(Fieldbus)Phy initialization configuration failed
ErrorCode.Reason: 1、在读取phy ID之前ESC未正常工作 2、phy芯片损坏 3、数据收到干扰 4、配置的型号与实际phy的型号不同
1. ESC did not function properly before reading the phy ID 2. The phy chip is damaged 3. Data received interference 4. The configured model is different from the actual phy model
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 更换伺服，返厂维修
Replace the servo and return to the factory for repair

ErrorCode.Description: Eeprom配置数据Sync限号脉宽长度异常
Eeprom configuration data Sync limit pulse width length abnormality
ErrorCode.Reason: 1、主站误操作写eeprom配置数据 2、ESI文件异常
1. Master Station Misoperation Writing EEPROM Configuration Data 2. ESI file exception
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 通过功能码复位ESI文件或者重新烧录ESI文件
Reset the ESI file or re burn the ESI file through the function code

ErrorCode.Description: PROFINET 从站掉线
PROFINET slave dropout.
ErrorCode.Reason: PROFINET 通讯错误
PROFINET communication error.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查并排除链路异常
Eliminate PROFINET link error.

ErrorCode.Description: PROFINET 主站初始化失败
PROFINET master initialization failure.
ErrorCode.Reason: PROFINET 主站配置错误
PROFINET master configuration error.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 联系厂家处理
Contact the manufacturer.

ErrorCode.Description: PN从站MAC地址不合法
PN Slave MAC address is invalid.
ErrorCode.Reason: 未烧录MAC地址
Unprogrammed MAC address.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 给N2L小板烧录MAC地址
Burn its MAC address.

ErrorCode.Description: PN从站未与主站连接
PN slave station is not connected to the master station.
ErrorCode.Reason: 没有连接主站
No connection to the master station.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 连接主站并正常运行
Connect to the master station and operate normally.

ErrorCode.Description: PN从站参数错误
PN slave parameter error.
ErrorCode.Reason: 组态参数错误
Configuration parameter error.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查配置参数活GSD是否匹配
Check if the configuration parameters or GSD match.

ErrorCode.Description: PN从站与主站连接中断
PN slave station is not disconnected from the master station.
ErrorCode.Reason: PN链路断开
PN Link Disconnected.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查恢复PN链路
Check the recovery of the PN link.

ErrorCode.Description: PN从站连接的PN主站停机故障
PN master station connected to PN slave station has a shutdown fault.
ErrorCode.Reason: 主站被切到stop状态
The main station has been switched to the stop state.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 将主站切到run状态
Switch the master station to the run state.

ErrorCode.Description: PN设备名称不存在
PN device name does not exist.
ErrorCode.Reason: 设备中没有设备名：1.未给该设备分配过设备名；2.设备flash参数失效
There is no device name in the device: 1. No device name has been assigned to this device; 2. The device flash parameters have failed.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 主站为从站分配设备名称
The master station assigns device names to slave stations.

ErrorCode.Description: N2L小板PN从站数据地址长度与主站不一致
N2L PN slave data address length does not match that of the master station
ErrorCode.Reason: N2L小板PN从站数据地址长度与主站不一致
N2L PN slave data address length does not match that of the master station
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 修改地址PN从站或主站地址长度，使两者长度一致
Modify the address length of the PN slave or master station to make the lengths of both consistent

ErrorCode.Description: 配置文件保存失败
Fail to save configuration file.
ErrorCode.Reason: 系统繁忙或文件系统有问题
The system is busy or there is a problem with the file system.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 1、尝试重新保存\n2、联系厂家处理
1. Try to save again. \n2. Contact the manufacturer.

ErrorCode.Description: DSP0固件加载失败
Fail to Load the DSP0 Firmware.
ErrorCode.Reason: DSP0固件错误或启动异常
FPGA firmware error or startup abnormality
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 1、重新启动机器人\n2、联系厂家处理
1. Restart the robot. \n2. Contact the manufacturer.

ErrorCode.Description: EtherCAT从站xml文件加载失败
Fail to Load the EtherCAT slave Xml File.
ErrorCode.Reason: Xml文件错误或启动异常
Xml file error or startup exception
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 1、重新启动机器人\n2、联系厂家处理
1. Restart the robot. \n2. Contact the manufacturer.

ErrorCode.Description: CANopen:CAN从站离线
CANopen: CANopen slave offline.
ErrorCode.Reason: CANopen从站处于掉线状态
CANopen slave is in a disconnected state
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 1、 检查CAN网络连接\n2、检查并排除CAN网络干扰
1. Check the CAN network connection\n 2. Check and eliminate CAN network interference

ErrorCode.Description: CANopen:CAN从站未知状态
CANopen: Unknown status of CANopen slave.
ErrorCode.Reason: CANopen主站状态异常
CANopen master station status abnormal
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 1、重新启动机器人\n 2、联系厂家处理
1. Restart the robot\n 2. Contact the manufacturer for handling

ErrorCode.Description: CANopen:组态配置未知错误
CANopen: Unknown configuration error.

ErrorCode.Reason: 与主站连接的目标从站掉线

Please reduce file read and write operations, including SavePoints, FWrite, FWriteALine, etc., and replace the core board

ErrorCode.Description: EMMC寿命已耗尽，请联系厂家

ErrorCode.Reason: EMMC寿命已耗尽，请联系厂家

ErrorCode.Reason: PROFINET主站加载失败

Please confirm if the configuration file is loaded correctly

PROFINET Master Shutdown Failed
ErrorCode.Reason: 关闭PROFINET主站失败
PROFINET Master Shutdown Failed

ErrorCode.Description: 事件机制中事件列表已满
The event list in the event mechanism is full.
ErrorCode.Reason: 上位机未及时读取事件列表中的事件
The host controller does not read the events in the event list in time.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 及时读取事件列表
Read the event list in time.

ErrorCode.Description: 事件机制中，控制器发给上位机的若干事件与上位机回传的同等事件进行对比时，事件信息比对不一致
In the event mechanism, when several events sent by the controller to the host controller are compared with the same events sent back by the host computer, the event information is inconsistent.
ErrorCode.Reason: 上下位机通信错误
The communication between the controller and host controller is incorrect.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查上下位机通信是否正常
Check whether the communication between the controller and host controller is normal.

ErrorCode.Description: 事件机制中事件ID范围超限
The range of event ids in the event mechanism exceeds the limit.
ErrorCode.Reason: 未正确填充事件机制中的初始化数组，内部错误
The initialization array in the event mechanism was not properly filled, an internal error.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 在系统诊断页面保存错误信息，然后联系厂家
Save the error message on the system diagnosis page and contact the manufacturer.

ErrorCode.Description: 多机跟随工艺已更新主站总线配置，需重启生效
The function of “Multi-robot follow craft” has updated the configuration of EtherCAT, need to restart.
ErrorCode.Reason: 已更新多机跟随工艺EtherCAT配置
Multi-robot follow craft EtherCAT configuration updated.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 掉电重启
Restart.

ErrorCode.Description: 多机跟随工艺EtherCAT在线从站与配置不一致
Multi-robot follow craft the number of EtherCAT online slaves does not match the configured quantity.
ErrorCode.Reason: EtherCAT连接断开
The connection of EtherCAT is error.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查EtherCAT通道是否正常连接
Check whether EtherCAT channels are properly connected.

ErrorCode.Description: 多机跟随工艺从机TCP连接断开
Multi-robot follow craft the connection of TCP is error.
ErrorCode.Reason: TCP通讯连接异常
The connection of TCP is error.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 1.检查EtherNet端口网线是否连接正常；2.检查局域网是否存在异常
1.Check whether the EtherNet port is properly connected;\n2.Check whether the LAN is normal.

ErrorCode.Description: 多机跟随工艺物体数据缓存满
Multi-robot follow craft object data cache full.
ErrorCode.Reason: 主从之间物体数据传输负载较大
The object data transmission load between master and slave devices is substantial.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 1. 检查是否正常抓取物体；2.减少单位时间内传送带上的工件数量
1. Check whether objects are being grasped correctly;\n2. Reduce the number of workpieces on the conveyor belt per unit time.

ErrorCode.Description: 视觉一拖多监控缓存队列满
The cache queue of detect data is full.
ErrorCode.Reason: 视觉数据传输负载较大
The transmission load of vision data is large.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 1.降低传送带速度 2.减少传送带工件数量
1.Reduce conveyor speed 2.Reduce the count of workpiece.

ErrorCode.Description: 多机跟随工艺从机与主机服务器通信异常
Multi-robot follow craft slave communication error with master server.
ErrorCode.Reason: 从机已连接了其它主机，或连接目标主机服务器异常，或以太网通信错误
The slave is already connected to another master, or the connection to the target master server is abnormal, or there is an EtherNet communication error.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 1. 检查目标主机是否打开了主从功能；\n2. 检查主机服务器是否正常打开；\n3. 检查以太网通信线路环境
1. Check whether the target master has master-slave function turned on;\n2. Check whether the server is running properly;\n3. Check the EtherNet communication line environment.

ErrorCode.Description: 视觉一拖多数据处理错误
The processing of vision data is error.
ErrorCode.Reason: 工件像素坐标和传送带坐标标定矩阵错误
Error in the calibration matrix of workpiece pixel coordinates and conveyor coordinates.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查标定矩阵是否正确
Check the calibration matrix.

ErrorCode.Description: 多机跟随工艺从机未全部与主机建立TCP连接
Multi-robot follow craft not all slave devices have established TCP connections with the master device.
ErrorCode.Reason: 从机未全部与主机建立TCP连接，主机运行多机跟随工艺相关API
Not all slave devices have established TCP connections with the master device, then the master device runs API related to multi-robot follow craft.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 保证所有从机与主机成功建立TCP连接
Ensure all slave devices successfully establish TCP connections with the master device.

ErrorCode.Description: 多机跟随工艺主从TCP通信数据校验错误
Multi-robot follow craft master-slave TCP communication data verification error.
ErrorCode.Reason: 主从TCP通信数据错误
Master-slave TCP communication data verification error.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查局域网是否被干扰
Check whether the LAN is interfered.

ErrorCode.Description: 多机跟随工艺从设 ECAT(S)-IN 连接状态异常
Multi-robot follow craft the ECAT(S)-IN connection status of the slave device is abnormal.
ErrorCode.Reason: 从设 ECAT(S)-IN 连接断开
Disconnection of slave device ECAT-IN.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查ECAT连接是否正常
Check the connection of ECAT.

ErrorCode.Description: 多机跟随工艺从设 ECAT(S)-OUT 连接状态异常
Multi-robot follow craft the ECAT(S)-OUT connection status of the slave device is abnormal.
ErrorCode.Reason: 从设 ECAT(S)-OUT 连接断开
Disconnection of slave device ECAT(S)-OUT.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查ECAT连接是否正常
Check the connection of ECAT.

ErrorCode.Description: 多机跟随工艺从设 ECAT(S)-IN-OUT 连接状态异常
Multi-robot follow craft the ECAT(S)-IN and ECAT(S)-OUT connection states of the slave device are abnormal.
ErrorCode.Reason: 从设 ECAT(S)-IN-OUT 连接断开
Disconnection of slave device ECAT(S)-IN-OUT.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查ECAT连接是否正常
Check the connection of ECAT.

ErrorCode.Description: 多机跟随工艺从设ESC状态异常（本站ECAT连接正常）
Multi-robot follow craft the ESC status of the slave device is abnormal-(ECAT connection is normal).
ErrorCode.Reason: ECAT从站状态异常
The ECAT status of slave device is abnormal.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查ECAT连接是否正常
Check the connection of ECAT.

ErrorCode.Description: 多机跟随工艺配置从机数量和在线从机数量不匹配
Multi-robot follow craft the number of configuration slave devices does not match the number of online slave devices.
ErrorCode.Reason: 多机跟随工艺配置从机数量和在线从机数量不匹配
Multi-robot follow craft the number of configuration slave devices does not match the number of online slave devices.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查多机跟随工艺配置，修复后重启控制器
Check the multi-robot follow craft configuration, fix it, and restart the controller.

ErrorCode.Description: 多机跟随工艺从机检测方式错误
Multi-robot follow craft slave detection method error.
ErrorCode.Reason: 从机的检测方式与主机的不一致
The slave's detection method is not consistent with the master's.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 确保从机的检测方式与主机的一致，主机为视觉类时从机为视觉，主机为传感器时从机也为传感器
Ensure that the detection method of the slave is the same as that of the master, the slave is visual when the master is visual, and the slave is sensor when the master is sensor.

ErrorCode.Description: 多机跟随工艺从机配置错误
Multi-robot follow craft slave configuration error.
ErrorCode.Reason: 未设定本机为从机，或设置的从机索引号已被其它从机设备占用
The device is not set as a slave, or the slave index number is already occupied by another slave device.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 1. 检查本机是否打开主从功能且设定为从机；\n2. 检查设定的从机索引号是否已被其它从机设备占用
1. Check that the device has the master-slave function turned on and is set as a slave;\n2. Check whether the slave index number is already occupied by another slave device.

ErrorCode.Description: 长期未接收到视觉返回数据，超时
Vision data waiting timeout.
ErrorCode.Reason: 发送视觉触发信号后长期未收到返回数据，视觉处理周期大于拍照时间间隔
No returned data is received for a long period of time after vision triggering signals are sent, and the vision processing cycle is greater than the photographing interval.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 1. 检查视觉触发信号是否下发成功；\n2. 若视觉触发信号每次都下发成功，则检查相机是否每次都会进行正常拍照，即排查相机是否发生漏拍现象；\n3. 视觉软件处理时间太长，或数据发送延迟太长；

1. Check whether the vision trigger signal is delivered successfully;\n2. If the vision trigger signal is delivered successfully every time, check whether the camera will take pictures normally every time;\n3. The processing time of vision software is too long, or the delay time of data transmission is too long.

ErrorCode.Description: 视觉数据发送次数过多
Vision data sent too many times.
ErrorCode.Reason: 机器人接收到的视觉数据量超过了I/O触发拍照次数
The amount of vision data received by the robot exceeds the number of times the I/O triggers to take pictures.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 查看是否视觉数据多发，或者发生了不正常的视觉拍照，以及参数【相机触发信号】是否选择有误
Check whether the visual data is sent multiple times or whether the photographing is abnormal, and whether the camera trigger signal is selected correctly.

ErrorCode.Description: 传感器触发频率过高
Sensor triggered too frequently.
ErrorCode.Reason: 来料过密，导致传感器触发周期 小于 0.6 s，从而会导致拍照频率过高
The material is fed too fast, resulting in a sensor triggering cycle of less than 0.6s, which can lead to excessively high photography frequency.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 减小传感器触发的频率
Reduce the trigger frequency of sensor.

ErrorCode.Description: DO电平保持时间过长
The holding time of DO level is too long
ErrorCode.Reason: 存在 DO电平保持时间 大于 传感器触发周期的情况，则会导致传感器触发拍照不及时
The holding time of the DO level is less than the trigger cycle of sensor, which will cause that the sensor does not trigger to take pictures in time
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 减小参数“I/O电平保持时间”的值，或者减小传感器触发的频率
Reduce the value of the parameter " holding time of I/O level ", or reduce the trigger frequency of sensor

ErrorCode.Description: 传送带视觉端口错误
Conveyor vision port error.
ErrorCode.Reason: 使用了多个视觉传送带
Multiple conveyors adopting vision detection are used.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查是否同时使用了2个以上视觉输入
Check whether more than two vision inputs are used at the same time.

ErrorCode.Description: 指令中使用了未使能的传送带
A disabled conveyor is used in the instruction.
ErrorCode.Reason: 指令中使用了未使能的传送带
A disabled conveyor is used in the instruction.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查程序中使用的传送带编号，看是否使能
Check whether the conveyor used in the program is disabled.

ErrorCode.Description: CnvTrigVis指令使用错误
CnvTrigVis instruction use error.
ErrorCode.Reason: 非“视觉+指令”检测方式的传送带不允许使用CnvTrigVis指令
The CnvTrigVis instruction is not allowed for the conveyor whose detection mode is not "vision+instruction".
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 将该传送带的检测方式改为“视觉+指令”或者切换成检测方式为“视觉+指令”的传送带
Change the detection mode of the conveyor to "vision+instruction" or switch to a conveyor with the detection mode of "vision+instruction".

ErrorCode.Description: 传送带跟随指令语法错误
Syntax error in conveyor tracking instruction.
ErrorCode.Reason: 传送带跟随指令Refsys Conveyor或CnvFastCatch未与Refsys Base配对使用
Refsys Conveyor or CnvFastCatch is not used in combination with Refsys Base.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查传送带跟随指令是否和Refsys Base配对使用
Check that conveyor tracking instruction and Refsys Base are jointly used.

ErrorCode.Description: 建立抓取工件坐标系失败
Failed to establish coordinate system for grasping the work object.
ErrorCode.Reason: 没执行GetCnvObject就执行Refsys Convyor
The Refsys Convyor instruction is executed before the GetCnvObject instruction is executed.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 先调用GetCnvObject指令，后跟随
Call the GetCnvObject instruction first.

ErrorCode.Description: 传送带编码器位置异常为0
Conveyor belt encoder position abnormality: 0.
ErrorCode.Reason: 传送带上检测到有物体时，编码器位置异常为0
When objects are present on the conveyor belt, the encoder position abnormally reads as zero.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 1. 检查传送带编码器是否正常；\n2. 若运行多机跟随工艺，从机报警时需检查ECAT通信是否正常

1. Check whether the conveyor belt encoder is functioning correctly;\n2. When operating a multi-robot follow craft, should a slave device trigger an alarm, verify that ECAT communication remains operational.

ErrorCode.Description: 传送带物体缓存队列新物体入队失败
The new object failed to be enqueued in the conveyor belt object cache queue.
ErrorCode.Reason: 内部原因，联系厂家处理
Due to internal reasons, please contact the manufacturer for handling.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 内部原因，请及时保存系统诊断，并联系厂家处理
Due to internal reasons, please save the system diagnosis in time and contact the manufacturer for handling.

ErrorCode.Description: 视觉识别的物体类型错误
Wrong object type for visual recognition.
ErrorCode.Reason: 发送过来的视觉数据中的物体类型不在范围 [0,15] 内
The object type of the sent visual data is not within the range [0,15].
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 修改视觉发送过来的物体类型编号，使其在范围 [0,15] 内
Modify the object type number sent by vision to make it within the range [0,15].

ErrorCode.Description: 长期未接收到视觉返回数据，超时
Vision data waiting timeout.
ErrorCode.Reason: 发送视觉触发信号后长期未收到返回数据，视觉处理周期大于拍照时间间隔
No returned data is received for a long period of time after vision triggering signals are sent, and the vision processing cycle is greater than the photographing interval.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 1. 检查视觉触发信号是否下发成功；\n2. 若视觉触发信号每次都下发成功，则检查相机是否每次都会进行正常拍照，即排查相机是否发生漏拍现象；\n3. 视觉软件处理时间太长，或数据发送延迟太长；

1. Check whether the vision trigger signal is delivered successfully;\n2. If the vision trigger signal is delivered successfully every time, check whether the camera will take pictures normally every time;\n3. The processing time of vision software is too long, or the delay time of data transmission is too long.

ErrorCode.Description: 第1关节转矩超限警告
J1 axis torque overlimit warning.
ErrorCode.Reason: 实际最大电流超警告规格
The actual maximum current exceeds the limit for warning.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查速度、加速度值是否过大
Check whether the speed or acceleration is too large.

ErrorCode.Description: 第1关节平均负载率超限警告
J1 axis average load rate overlimit warning.
ErrorCode.Reason: 平均负载率超警告规格
The average load rate exceeds the limit for warning.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查速度、加速度值是否过大，排查抱闸异常、机械卡死以及驱动器问题
Check whether speed and acceleration are too large. Troubleshoot the brake, mechanical parts and drive.

ErrorCode.Description: 第2关节转矩超限警告
J2 axis torque overlimit warning.
ErrorCode.Reason: 实际最大电流超警告规格
The actual maximum current exceeds the limit for warning.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查速度、加速度值是否过大
Check whether the speed or acceleration is too large.

ErrorCode.Description: 第2关节平均负载率超限警告
J2 axis average load rate overlimit warning.
ErrorCode.Reason: 平均负载率超警告规格
The average load rate exceeds the limit for warning.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查速度、加速度值是否过大，排查抱闸异常、机械卡死以及驱动器问题
Check whether speed and acceleration are too large. Troubleshoot the brake, mechanical parts and drive.

ErrorCode.Reason: 实际最大电流超警告规格

Check whether the speed or acceleration is too large.

ErrorCode.Description: 第3关节平均负载率超限警告
J3 axis average load rate overlimit warning.
ErrorCode.Reason: 平均负载率超警告规格
The average load rate exceeds the limit for warning.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查速度、加速度值是否过大，排查抱闸异常、机械卡死以及驱动器问题
Check whether speed and acceleration are too large. Troubleshoot the brake, mechanical parts and drive.

ErrorCode.Reason: 平均负载率超警告规格

ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查速度、加速度值是否过大，排查抱闸异常、机械卡死以及驱动器问题
Check whether speed and acceleration are too large. Troubleshoot the brake, mechanical parts and drive.

ErrorCode.Description: 轴1伺服警告
J1 axis servo warning.
ErrorCode.Reason: 轴1伺服存在警告
Warning occurs on the servo of J1 axis.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 查看伺服功能H0B-45，根据手册-伺服故障处理内容来处理问题
View the parameter H0B-45 and handle the problem according to the user guide.

ErrorCode.Description: 轴2伺服警告
J2 axis servo warning.
ErrorCode.Reason: 轴2伺服存在警告
Warning occurs on the servo of J2 axis.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 查看伺服功能H0B-45，根据手册-伺服故障处理内容来处理问题
View the parameter H0B-45 and handle the problem according to the user guide.

ErrorCode.Description: 轴3伺服警告
J3 axis servo warning.
ErrorCode.Reason: 轴3伺服存在警告
Warning occurs on the servo of J3 axis.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 查看伺服功能H0B-45，根据手册-伺服故障处理内容来处理问题
View the parameter H0B-45 and handle the problem according to the user guide.

ErrorCode.Description: 轴4伺服警告
J4 axis servo warning.
ErrorCode.Reason: 轴4伺服存在警告
Warning occurs on the servo of J4 axis.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 查看伺服功能H0B-45，根据手册-伺服故障处理内容来处理问题
View the parameter H0B-45 and handle the problem according to the user guide.

J5 axis servo warning.
ErrorCode.Reason: 轴5伺服存在警告
Warning occurs on the servo of J5 axis.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 查看伺服功能H0B-45，根据手册-伺服故障处理内容来处理问题
View the parameter H0B-45 and handle the problem according to the user guide.

ErrorCode.Description: 轴6伺服警告
J6 axis servo warning.
ErrorCode.Reason: 轴6伺服存在警告
Warning occurs on the servo of J6 axis.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 查看伺服功能H0B-45，根据手册-伺服故障处理内容来处理问题
View the parameter H0B-45 and handle the problem according to the user guide.

ErrorCode.Description: 轴7伺服警告
J7 axis servo warning.
ErrorCode.Reason: 轴7伺服存在警告
Warning occurs on the servo of J7 axis.

ErrorCode.Reason: 轴8伺服存在警告

ErrorCode.Description: 轴9伺服警告
J9 axis servo warning.
ErrorCode.Reason: 轴9伺服存在警告
Warning occurs on the servo of J9 axis.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 查看伺服功能H0B-45，根据手册-伺服故障处理内容来处理问题
View the parameter H0B-45 and handle the problem according to the user guide.

ErrorCode.Description: 跟随工艺视觉数据点超过50个，超过部分将忽略
The number of vision data points of tracking process exceeds 50, the excessive points will be ignored.
ErrorCode.Reason: 视觉发送数据点位数量过多
The number of vision data points is out of range.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 限制视觉数据发送数据点在50个以内
Limit the number of vision data points to be no more than 50.

ErrorCode.Description: 第1关节电机/减速器过热警告
J1 axis motor/reducer overheated.
ErrorCode.Reason: 电机/减速器温度过高，超过警告阈值
Motor/reducer temperature is too high, exceeding warning threshold.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 1、检查速度、加速度值、负载是否过大，降低运动速度、加速度或负载；2、降低运动占空比；3、检测机器人的环境温度是否过高，降低机器人环境温度。

1. Check whether the speed, acceleration, and load values are too large, and reduce the motion speed, acceleration, or load if necessary. 2. Reduce the duty cycle. 3. Check whether the ambient temperature of the robot is too high and reduce the temperature if necessary.

ErrorCode.Description: 第1关节编码器过热警告
J1 axis encoder overheated.
ErrorCode.Reason: 编码器温度过高，超过警告阈值
Encoder temperature is too high, exceeding warning threshold.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 1、检查速度、加速度值、负载是否过大，降低运动速度、加速度或负载；2、降低运动占空比；3、检测机器人的环境温度是否过高，降低机器人环境温度。

1. Check whether the speed, acceleration, and load values are too large, and reduce the motion speed, acceleration, or load if necessary. 2. Reduce the duty cycle. 3. Check whether the ambient temperature of the robot is too high and reduce the temperature if necessary.

ErrorCode.Description: 第1关节电机/减速器过载警告
J1 axis motor/reducer overloaded.
ErrorCode.Reason: 电机/减速器稳态预测温度较高，超过警告阈值
The steady-state predicted temperature of the motor/reducer is high, exceeding the warning threshold.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 1、检查是否正确设置环境温度；2、检查速度、加速度值、负载是否过大，降低运动速度、加速度或负载；3、降低运动占空比.

1. Check that the ambient temperature is set correctly. 2. Check whether the speed, acceleration, and load values are too large, and reduce the motion speed, acceleration, or load if necessary. 3. Reduce the duty cycle.

ErrorCode.Description: 第2关节电机/减速器过热警告
J2 axis motor/reducer overheated.
ErrorCode.Reason: 电机/减速器温度过高，超过警告阈值
Motor/reducer temperature is too high, exceeding warning threshold.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 1、检查速度、加速度值、负载是否过大，降低运动速度、加速度或负载；2、降低运动占空比；3、检测机器人的环境温度是否过高，降低机器人环境温度。

1. Check whether the speed, acceleration, and load values are too large, and reduce the motion speed, acceleration, or load if necessary. 2. Reduce the duty cycle. 3. Check whether the ambient temperature of the robot is too high and reduce the temperature if necessary.

ErrorCode.Description: 当前力控目标力为0，且未绑定快速触发器
The FCtrl target force is 0 and no force trigger is used
ErrorCode.Reason: 当前力控目标力为0，且未绑定快速触发器
The FCtrl target force is 0 and no force trigger is used
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 请检查力控参数设置是否正确
Please check if the force control parameter is set correctly

ErrorCode.Description: 当前快速触发器无激活条件，触发器无效
The force trigger has no activated condition, trigger is invalid
ErrorCode.Reason: 当前快速触发器无激活条件，触发器无效
The force trigger has no activated condition, trigger is invalid
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 请检查快速触发器参数设置是否正确
Please check if the force trigger parameter is set correctly

ErrorCode.Description: 系统未读取力控日志队列数据
The system did not read the force control log queue data
ErrorCode.Reason: dsp队列数据in超过out
DSP queue data in exceeds out
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 1.该次力控日志数据会部分丢失，但不影响机器人生产，若不影响实际生产，可以忽略;2.若影响实际生产，请联系厂家进行处理

1. The force control log data will be partially lost, but it will not affect robot production.If it does not affect actual production, it can be ignored;2. If it affects actual production, please contact the manufacturer for handling

ErrorCode.Description: 跟随工艺检测函数运行时间过长
The execution time of the follow process detection function is excessively long
ErrorCode.Reason: 跟随工艺业务繁忙
Following process is busy
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 保存错误信息联系厂家
Save error information and contact the manufacturer

ErrorCode.Description: 前瞻错误
Lookahead error
ErrorCode.Reason: 前瞻错误
Look-ahead error
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 请在系统诊断页面保存错误信息，然后联系厂家
Save the error message on the system diagnostics page and contact the manufacturer.

ErrorCode.Description: 自适应速度规划校验错误
Adaptive speed planning verification error.
ErrorCode.Reason: 自适应速度规划校验错误
Adaptive speed planning verification error.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 请在系统诊断页面保存错误信息，然后联系厂家
Save the error message on the system diagnostics page and contact the manufacturer.

ErrorCode.Description: 通用速度规划校验错误
General speed planning verification error.
ErrorCode.Reason: 通用速度规划校验错误
General speed planning verification error.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 请在系统诊断页面保存错误信息，然后联系厂家
Save the error message on the system diagnostics page and contact the manufacturer.

ErrorCode.Description: 轨迹时间太长
Trajectory time too long.
ErrorCode.Reason: 单段轨迹时间超过了1000s；
The time of a single trajectory exceeds 100 seconds.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 不影响运行，但可能引起意想不到的问题，应将速度、加速度增大来减小单条指令的执行时间。
It does not affect operation, but may cause unexpected problems. Increase the speed and acceleration to reduce the execution time of a single instruction.

ErrorCode.Description: 指令间平滑过渡退化为零
No smooth curve at a fly point.
ErrorCode.Reason: 由于各种条件的限制，指令平滑过渡变为0
Position and motion parameters constrain the smooth length.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 不影响正常使用，但要注意过渡失效会降低执行效率。
Normal work is not affected, but cycle time can be optimized.

ErrorCode.Description: 停机时间过长
Stop time too long.
ErrorCode.Reason: 由于加速度太小等原因，暂停或停止时，停机时间超过了500ms.
Stop time exceeded 500 milliseconds.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 不影响正常使用，但要注意停机完成前不能再次运行。
Normal work is not affected, but be aware that the robot cannot be operated again before it is completely stopped.

ErrorCode.Description: 最优轨迹模式下，负载质量设置过小，机器人将低速运动。请确认负载设置是否正确。
The load mass setting is too small when the optimal trajectory mode is turned on, the robot will move at low speed. Please confirm whether the load setting is correct.
ErrorCode.Reason: 开启最优轨迹时负载质量设置过小；
The load mass setting is too small when the optimal trajectory mode is turned on.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查负载参数设置是否正确；
Check that the load parameters are set properly.

ErrorCode.Description: EtherCAT通信反馈异常
EtherCAT communication feedback error.
ErrorCode.Reason: 平滑停止时，速度异常
The speed is abnormal when the robot coasts to stop.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 请在系统诊断页面保存错误信息，然后联系厂家
Save the error message on the system diagnostics page and contact the manufacturer.

ErrorCode.Description: 实时任务执行时间过长警告
Real time task execution time too long.
ErrorCode.Reason: 实时任务执行时间超时
Real time task execution timeout.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 请导出诊断信息，联系厂家处理
Export the diagnostic information and contact the manufacturer.

ErrorCode.Reason: 机器人进入干涉区0
Robot enters interference zone 0
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 关闭干涉区0，将机器人移出干涉区0

ErrorCode.Description: 力控参数切换目标参数编号超限
Force control parameter switching target parameter number exceeds the limit
ErrorCode.Reason: 力控参数切换目标参数编号超限
Force control parameter switching target parameter number exceeds the limit
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 请检查参数号码设置是否超限
Please check if the parameter number setting exceeds the limit

ErrorCode.Description: 力控参数切换触发器编号超限
Force control parameter switching trigger number exceeds the limit
ErrorCode.Reason: 力控参数切换触发器编号超限
Force control parameter switching trigger number exceeds the limit
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 请检查参数号码设置是否超限
Please check if the parameter number setting exceeds the limit

ErrorCode.Description: 机器人初始化参数错误
Robot initialization parameter error.
ErrorCode.Reason: 机器人初始化参数非法
Robot initialization parameters are illegal.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 根据诊断提示信息重新配置机器人初始化参数
Reconfigure robot initialization parameters according to diagnostic prompts.

ErrorCode.Description: 错误的初始化状态
Incorrect initialization status.
ErrorCode.Reason: 机器人初始化未成功
Robot initialization failed.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 根据诊断提示信息对机器人重新初始化
Reinitialize the robot according to diagnostic prompts.

ErrorCode.Description: 机械单元初始化参数错误
Mechanical unit initialization parameter error.
ErrorCode.Reason: 机械单元初始化参数非法
Mechanical unit initialization parameters are illegal.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 根据诊断提示信息重新配置机械单元初始化参数
Reinitialize the mechanical unit initialization parameters according to diagnostic prompts.

ErrorCode.Description: 外部轴初始化参数错误
External axis initialization parameter error.
ErrorCode.Reason: 外部轴初始化参数非法
External axis initialization parameters are illegal.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 根据诊断提示信息重新配置外部轴初始化参数
Reinitialize the external axis initialization parameters according to diagnostic prompts.

ErrorCode.Description: 机械单元或外部轴初始化数量错误
Incorrect mechanical unit or external axis count for initialization.
ErrorCode.Reason: 机械单元或外部轴初始化数量错误
Incorrect mechanical unit or external axis count for initialization.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 根据诊断提示信息重新配置机械单元或外部轴数量
Reconfigure the number of mechanical units or external axes according to diagnostic prompts.

ErrorCode.Description: 非法的位置点
Illegal position points.
ErrorCode.Reason: 传入的点位参数非法
The passed in point parameters are illegal.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查点位欧拉角值是否超过180度
Check if the Euler angle value of the point exceeds 180 degrees.

ErrorCode.Description: 非法的工具参数
Illegal tool parameters.
ErrorCode.Reason: 传入的工具参数非法
The passed in tool parameters are illegal.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 1、检查输入的工具安装位置欧拉角是否正确\n2、负载参数是否合法
1. Check that the input tool installation position Euler angle is correct. \n2. Check that the load parameters are legal.

ErrorCode.Description: 非法的工件参数
Illegal wobj parameters.
ErrorCode.Reason: 传入的工件参数非法
The passed in wobj parameters are illegal.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 1、检查输入的工件安装位置欧拉角是否正确\n2、固定属性和机械单元是否匹配
1. Check that the input work object installation position Euler angle is correct. \n2. Check that the fixing properties match the mechanical unit.

ErrorCode.Description: 非法的负载参数
Illegal load parameters.
ErrorCode.Reason: 传入的负载参数非法
The passed in load parameters are illegal.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查输入的负载参数中质量惯量是否存在负值
Check if there is a negative value of mass inertia in the input load parameters.

ErrorCode.Description: 非法的关节角
Illegal joint position.
ErrorCode.Reason: 传入的关节位置非法
The passed in joint position is illegal.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查输入的关节角位置是否超限
Check if the input joint position exceeds the limit.

ErrorCode.Description: 激活的工具和工件参数不匹配（运动学）
The active tool and wobj parameters do not match (kinematics).
ErrorCode.Reason: 激活的工具和工件的RobHold相同
The active tool and work object have the same RobHold parameter.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 1、切换RobHold参数匹配的激活工具、工件号\n2、修改工具、工件的RobHold参数为不同的值
1. Switch the active tool and wobj number that match the RobHold parameter. \n2. Modify the RobHold parameter of tool and work object to different values.

ErrorCode.Description: 非法的位姿点
Illegal pose parameter.
ErrorCode.Reason: 传入的位姿参数非法
The passed in pose parameters are illegal.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查点位欧拉角值是否超过180度
Check if the Euler angle value of the point exceeds 180 degrees.

ErrorCode.Description: 位姿偏差计算类型标志错误
Pose deviation calculation type flag error.
ErrorCode.Reason: 位姿差计算函数标志位错误
The flag bit of the pose deviation calculation function is incorrect.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 系统故障请联系厂家
System error, please contact the manufacturer.

ErrorCode.Description: 世界坐标系转参考系时，世界坐标系类型错误
Wrong world frame type
ErrorCode.Reason: 世界坐标系转参考系时，传入的世界坐标系类型错误
The world frame type passed in is incorrect when converting the world frame to a reference frame.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 系统故障请联系厂家
System error, please contact the manufacturer.

ErrorCode.Description: 世界坐标系转参考系时，机械单元类型错误
Wrong mechanical unit type.
ErrorCode.Reason: 世界坐标系转参考系时，传入的机械单元类型错误
The mechanical unit type passed in is incorrect when converting the world frame to a reference frame.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 系统故障请联系厂家
System error, please contact the manufacturer.

ErrorCode.Description: 参考坐标系转世界坐标系时，参考坐标系类型错误
Wrong reference frame type.
ErrorCode.Reason: 参考坐标系转世界坐标系时，传入的参考坐标系类型错误
The reference frame type passed in is incorrect when converting the reference frame type to world frame.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 系统故障请联系厂家
System error, please contact the manufacturer.

ErrorCode.Description: 参考坐标系转世界坐标系时，机械单元类型错误
Wrong mechanical unit type.
ErrorCode.Reason: 参考坐标系转世界坐标系时，传入的机械单元类型错误
The mechanical unit type passed in is incorrect when converting the reference frame to world frame.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 系统故障请联系厂家
System error, please contact the manufacturer.

ErrorCode.Description: 工件关联的机械单元未标定
The mechanical unit associated with the workobject is not calibrated.
ErrorCode.Reason: 工件关联的机械单元未标定
The mechanical unit associated with the workobject is not calibrated.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 标定工件关联的机械单元
Calibrate the mechanical unit associated with the workobject.

ErrorCode.Description: 工具或工件的参数配置错误
Tool or wobj parameter error.
ErrorCode.Reason: 当前所使用的工具和工件的参数“是否夹持”为相同；
The RobHold parameter is the same for both the tool and the workobject currently in use.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 保证当前使用的工具和工件的属性有且仅有1个夹持
Ensure that the obHold parameter is set to true for only one of tool and workobject.

ErrorCode.Description: 计算末端参数错误
End parameter calculation error.
ErrorCode.Reason: 当前所使用的工具和工件的参数“是否夹持”为相同；
The RobHold parameter is the same for both the tool and the workobject currently in use.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 保证当前使用的工具和工件的属性有且仅有1个夹持
Ensure that the obHold parameter is set to true for only one of tool and workobject.

ErrorCode.Description: 获取外部参考系错误
Error getting external reference frame.
ErrorCode.Reason: 当前所使用的工具和工件的参数“是否夹持”为相同；
The RobHold parameter is the same for both the tool and the workobject currently in use.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 保证当前使用的工具和工件的属性有且仅有1个夹持
Ensure that the RobHold parameter is set to true for only one of tool and workobject.

ErrorCode.Description: 转换工件坐标系出错
Wobj frame conversion error.
ErrorCode.Reason: 当前所使用的工具和工件的参数“是否夹持”为相同；
The RobHold parameter is the same for both the tool and the workobject currently in use.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 保证当前使用的工具和工件的属性有且仅有1个夹持
Ensure that the RobHold parameter is set to true for only one of tool and workobject.

ErrorCode.Description: 转换参考系坐标出错
Reference frame conversion error.
ErrorCode.Reason: 当前所使用的工具和工件的参数“是否夹持”为相同；
The RobHold parameter is the same for both the tool and the workobject currently in use.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 保证当前使用的工具和工件的属性有且仅有1个夹持
Ensure that the RobHold parameter is set to true for only one of tool and workobject.

ErrorCode.Description: 工具标定错误
Tool calibration error.
ErrorCode.Reason: 工具标定点不规范或其他原因导致的标定计算错误
Calibration calculation errors caused by non-standard tool calibration points or other reasons.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 1、检查标定点位是否符合标定规则；\n2、检查机器人参数初始化是否正确。
1. Check that the calibration points comply with the calibration rules. \n2. Check that the robot parameter initialization is correct.

ErrorCode.Description: 导轨-机器人标定错误
Guide rail-robot calibration error.
ErrorCode.Reason: 导轨标定点不规范或其他原因导致的标定计算错误
Calibration calculation errors caused by non-standard guide rail calibration points or other reasons.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查标定点位是否符合标定规则；
Check that the calibration points comply with the calibration rules.

ErrorCode.Description: 变位机标定错误
Positioner calibration error.
ErrorCode.Reason: 变位机标定点不规范或其他原因导致的标定计算错误
Calibration calculation errors caused by non-standard position calibration points or other reasons.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 1、检查标定点位是否符合标定规则；\n2、检查变位机标定顺序是否正确。
1. Check that the calibration points comply with the calibration rules. \n2. Check that the positioner calibration sequence is correct.

ErrorCode.Description: 用户坐标系标定错误
User frame calibration error.
ErrorCode.Reason: 标定用户坐标系的点位不规范或其他原因导致的标定计算错误
Calibration calculation errors caused by non-standard user frame calibration points or other reasons.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查标定点位是否符合标定规则。
Check that the calibration points comply with the calibration rules.

ErrorCode.Description: 工具标定点位不合适
Improper tool calibration points.
ErrorCode.Reason: 工具标定点位不合适
Improper tool calibration points.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 重新选取标定点位, 使标定点位的姿态相差较大
Re-select the calibration points having significant difference in orientation.

ErrorCode.Description: 标定点位重合
Calibration points too close.
ErrorCode.Reason: 标定点位重合
Calibration points too close.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 重新选取标定点位
Re-select the calibration points.

ErrorCode.Description: 标定点位共线
Calibration points collinear.
ErrorCode.Reason: 标定点位共线
Calibration points collinear.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 重新选取标定点位
Re-select the calibration points.

ErrorCode.Description: 两点臂参数相差太大，会导致逆解的目标关节角出现偏差
The difference in arm type parameters between two points is too large, which can lead to deviation in the target joint angle.
ErrorCode.Reason: 两点臂参数相差太大，会导致逆解的目标关节角出现偏差
The difference in arm type parameters between two points is too large, which can lead to deviation in the target joint angle.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 修改点位的臂参数
Modify arm type parameter of the points.

ErrorCode.Description: 输入的标定点相同
Same calibration points input.
ErrorCode.Reason: 输入的标定点相同
Same calibration points input.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 重新选取标定点
Reselect calibration points.

ErrorCode.Description: TCP模式下，相对于法兰的点位无法转为wobj的点位
In TCP mode, points relative to flange cannot be converted to wobj points.
ErrorCode.Reason: TCP模式下，相对于法兰的点位无法转为wobj中的点位
In TCP mode, points relative to flange cannot be converted to wobj points.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 重新取点
Reselect points.

ErrorCode.Description: 姿态校准目标位置逆解错误
Error in inverse solution of target position in orientation calibration.
ErrorCode.Reason: 姿态校准的目标位置奇异或不可达
The target position for orientation calibration is singular or unreachable.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 判断姿态校准目标位置是否处于奇异位姿
Check whether the target position for orientation calibration is a singular position.

ErrorCode.Description: 姿态校准路径中存在奇异位姿
Singular pose present in the orientation calibration path.
ErrorCode.Reason: 姿态校准导致机器人将经过奇异位姿
Orientation calibration causes the robot to go through singular pose.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 调节原始点位，使得姿态校准过程中机器人不会经过奇异位姿
Adjust the original points so that the robot does not go through singular pose during the orientation calibration process.

ErrorCode.Description: 臂参数类型错误
Incorrect arm type parameter.
ErrorCode.Reason: 传入的臂参数错误
The passed in arm type parameter is incorrect.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查点位对应臂参数类型配置是否正常
Check that the arm type parameter configuration corresponding to the point is correct.

ErrorCode.Description: 奇异或不可达位姿
Singular or unreachable position.
ErrorCode.Reason: 点位处于奇异位置或不可达位姿
The points are at singular or unreachable positions.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查输入点位是否在奇异区域或不可达位姿并修改
Check whether the input points are at singular or unreachable positions, and modify the points if necessary.

ErrorCode.Description: SCARA奇异位置
SCARA singularity
ErrorCode.Reason: SCARA肘部奇异
SCARA elbow singularity
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 调整点位避开奇异
Adjust points to avoid singularity.

ErrorCode.Description: 肩部奇异
Shoulder singularity
ErrorCode.Reason: 肩部奇异
Shoulder singularity
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 调整点位避开奇异
Adjust points to avoid singularity.

ErrorCode.Description: 肘部奇异
Elbow singularity
ErrorCode.Reason: 肘部奇异
Elbow singularity
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 调整点位避开奇异
Adjust points to avoid singularity.

ErrorCode.Description: 腕部奇异
Wrist singularity
ErrorCode.Reason: 腕部奇异
Wrist singularity
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 调整点位避开奇异
Adjust points to avoid singularity.

ErrorCode.Description: 曲线路径拐点夹角过小
Curve path angle too small.
ErrorCode.Reason: 自由曲线路径中位置或姿态存在过小角度的折转
Position or orientation in the free curve path has sharp turning.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 修改曲线路径点位，避免尖锐折转的位置或姿态路径特征
Modify the points in curve path to avoid sharp turning positions or orientations.

ErrorCode.Description: 曲线路径中存在间距过大的点
Excessive spacing between trajectory points.
ErrorCode.Reason: 自由曲线路径中存在位置或姿态间距超出规格的点位
Position or orientation spacing exceeds the specification.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 调整轨迹点位间距或添加中间点位
Adjust the spacing between trajectory points or add intermediate points.

ErrorCode.Description: 曲线点位数量不符合规格
Illegal number of curve points.
ErrorCode.Reason: 曲线指令中输入的曲线点位数小于四个或大于五百个
The number of curve points input in the curve instruction is less than 4 or more than 500.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 调整曲线点位数量
Adjust the number of curve points.

ErrorCode.Description: 曲线组内无有效数据
No valid data within the curve group.
ErrorCode.Reason: Curve曲线组指令内无有效的曲线指令
No valid curve instruction within the curve group instruction.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 修改曲线组指令
Modify curve group instruction.

ErrorCode.Description: 曲线中存在间距过小点位
Points with too small spacing in curve.
ErrorCode.Reason: 曲线输入的点位重复或间距过小导致曲线不能构造
Repetitive or small spacing of input points on the curve results in the inability to construct the curve.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 调整去除重复或接近重复的点位
Remove duplicate or too close points.

ErrorCode.Description: 欧拉退化导致的姿态变化过大
Excessive orientation change caused by Euler degradation.
ErrorCode.Reason: 欧拉角B的绝对值接近90°时，AC角配置浮动过大导致的间距过大
When the absolute value of Euler angle B approaches 90 °, the AC angle configuration fluctuates too much, resulting in excessive spacing.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 避开退化位置，或者手动调整AC值，避免曲线点位姿态间距过大
Avoid degraded positions or manually adjust AC values to avoid excessive spacing between curve positions and orientations.

ErrorCode.Description: 曲线路径点关节运动量过大
Joints move too large.
ErrorCode.Reason: 路径中相邻两个点位关节运动量过大
Excessive joint motion between adjacent points in the path.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 点运动到位检查臂参数设置是否正确或选择合适的旋转优化
Check that the arm parameters are set correctly or select appropriate SlewMode.

ErrorCode.Description: 曲线路径点关节超出限位
Joint value overlimit.
ErrorCode.Reason: 路径中的点位对应臂参数下的关节角超出限位
A point in the curve path exceeds the joint angle limit in the set arm parameters.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 修改点位、修改点位臂参数、选择旋转优化，按情况而定
Modify the point position, modify the point arm parameters, select SlewMode, depending on the situation.

ErrorCode.Description: 冲突的状态
Conflict state
ErrorCode.Reason: 状态冲突，内部原因
Internal error
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 内部原因，联系厂家处理
Contact the manufacturer.

ErrorCode.Description: 冲突的段号
Conflict symbol
ErrorCode.Reason: 数据下发段号冲突，内部原因
Internal error
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 内部原因，联系厂家处理
Contact the manufacturer.

ErrorCode.Description: 冲突的重启状态
Conflict resume state
ErrorCode.Reason: 重启状态冲突，内部原因
Internal error
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 内部原因，联系厂家处理
Contact the manufacturer.

ErrorCode.Description: 冲突的行号
Conflict line number
ErrorCode.Reason: 数据行号冲突，内部原因
Internal error
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 内部原因，联系厂家处理
Contact the manufacturer.

ErrorCode.Description: 曲线同一点位I/O绑定数量超限
Too many I/Os bound to the same pointc on the curve.
ErrorCode.Reason: 同一个点或近似点绑定的I/O数量超出规格允许数量
The number of I/Os bound to the same or similar point exceeds the limit.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 减少或调整I/O数量
Reduce or adjust the number of I/Os.

ErrorCode.Description: 曲线有效点位不足
Insufficient effective points on the curve.
ErrorCode.Reason: 曲线有效点位不足
Insufficient effective points on the curve.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 添加曲线路点
Add curve points.

ErrorCode.Description: 曲线过长
Curve too long.
ErrorCode.Reason: 曲线总长超出规格
The total length of the curve exceeds the specification.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 分多条曲线指令执行
Execute the curve by multiple instructions.

ErrorCode.Description: I/O未绑定在曲线的点位上
I/O not bound to the point of curve.
ErrorCode.Reason: I/O绑定到了曲线指令外的点位
I/O is bound to a point outside the curve.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 修改I/O点位编号
Modify the I/O number.

ErrorCode.Description: 自由曲线不支持变位机协调
Positioner coordination not supported by free curve.
ErrorCode.Reason: 工件坐标系非固定
The wobj frame is not fixed.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 自由曲线指令请在固定工件坐标系下使用
Use the free curve instruction in a fixed wobj frame.

ErrorCode.Description: 无网络设备错误
No network device.

The FPGA module is not functioning properly.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 硬件设备错误，请联系厂家
Hardware device error, contact the manufacturer.

ErrorCode.Description: 无主站错误

Restart the controller. If the problem persists, it is a hardware device error, contact the manufacturer.

ErrorCode.Reason: ECAT网口0未连接
ECAT port 0 is not connected.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查ECAT网口0状态
Check the status of ECAT port 0.

ErrorCode.Description: ECAT网口1未连接错误
ECAT port 1 is not connected.
ErrorCode.Reason: ECAT网口1未连接
ECAT port 1 is not connected.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查ECAT网口1状态
Check the status of ECAT port 1.

ErrorCode.Description: 设置 ECAT启动时间错误
ECAT startup time setting error.
ErrorCode.Reason: 由于硬件错误导致设置ECAT启动时间错误
ECAT startup time is incorrectly set due to a hardware error.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 重启控制器看是否恢复正常，否则请联系厂家
Restart the controller. If the problem persists, contact the manufacturer.

ErrorCode.Description: ECAT从站状态有误
ECAT slave status error.
ErrorCode.Reason: 读取到 ECAT从站状态字，状态为不正常，可能由于与伺服模块不匹配
The read ECAT slave status word indicates that the status is abnormal,possibly due to mismatch with servo module.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 查看相关错误码，确认状态错误问题，掉电重启，或升级版本匹配的伺服模块
Check the error codes to troubleshoot and restart the system,or upgrade servo module with the matching version.

ErrorCode.Description: 打开EOE虚拟网卡设备失败
Failed to open EOE virtual NIC device.
ErrorCode.Reason: 系统驱动加载不正常
System driver loading is not normal.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 确认系统软件版本，掉电重启
Check the system software version and restart the system.

ErrorCode.Description: 从站IN/OUT反接
Slave IN/OUT reverse connection.
ErrorCode.Reason: 外部轴从站入口和出口接反
The IN and OUT of external axis are connected in reverse.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 请检查外部轴接线
Check the wiring of external axis.

ErrorCode.Description: 翻转位未改变错误
Toggle bit not changed.
ErrorCode.Reason: 由于从站反馈翻转位未改变错误
The slave feeds back that the toggle bit is not changed.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 重新发起访问，请联系厂家
Re-initiate a SDO access, or contact the manufacturer.

ErrorCode.Description: SDO 协议超时错误
SDO protocol timeout.
ErrorCode.Reason: 由于从站反馈SDO 协议超时错误
The slave feeds back that the SDO protocol timed out.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 重新发起访问，请联系厂家
Re-initiate a SDO access, or contact the manufacturer.

ErrorCode.Description: 命令无效或未知错误
Client/Server command specifier not valid or unknown.
ErrorCode.Reason: 由于从站反馈命令无效或未知错误
The slave feeds back that Client/Server command specifier is not valid or unknown.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 系统内部错误，请联系厂家
Internal system error, contact the manufacturer.

ErrorCode.Description: 对象不可被访问错误
Object inaccessible
ErrorCode.Reason: 由于从站反馈对象不可被访问错误
The slave feeds back that the object is not accessible.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 禁止该操作
This operation is prohibited.

ErrorCode.Description: 试图读一个只写对象错误
Error reading an write-only object.
ErrorCode.Reason: 由于从站反馈试图读一个只写对象错误
The slave feeds back that an error occurs while trying to read a write-only object.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 禁止该操作
This operation is prohibited.

ErrorCode.Description: 试图写一个只读对象错误
Error writing an read-only object.
ErrorCode.Reason: 由于从站反馈试图写一个只读对象错误
The slave feeds back that an error occurs while trying to write a read-only object.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 禁止该操作
This operation is prohibited.

ErrorCode.Description: 对象不存在对象字典中错误
Object does not exist in the object directory.
ErrorCode.Reason: 由于从站反馈对象不存在对象字典中错误
The slave feeds back that the object does not exist in the object directory.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查所访问对象存在对象字典
Check that the object exists in the object dictionary.

ErrorCode.Description: 对象不能被映射为过程数据错误
Object cannot be mapped into PDO.
ErrorCode.Reason: 由于从站反馈对象不能被映射为过程数据错误
The slave feeds back that the object cannot be mapped to the PDO.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查访问从站被映射对象是正确的
Check that the object to be mapped is correct.

ErrorCode.Description: 被映射的对象长度超出过程数据长度错误
The length of the object to be mapped exceeds the PDO length.
ErrorCode.Reason: 由于从站反馈被映射的对象长度超出过程数据长度错误
The slave feeds back that the length of the object to be mapped exceeds the PDO length.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查访问从站被映射对象长度是正确的
Check that the length of the object to be mapped is correct.

ErrorCode.Description: 基本参数不兼容错误
Basic parameter incompatible.
ErrorCode.Reason: 由于从站反馈基本参数不兼容错误
The slave feeds back that the base parameters are incompatible.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查从站基本参数是兼容的

ErrorCode.Description: 设备内部不兼容错误

ErrorCode.Reason: 由于从站反馈设备内部不兼容错误
The slave feeds back that the device is internally incompatible.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 重启控制器和从站设备，看是否恢复正常，否则请联系厂家
Restart the controller and slave. If the problem persists, contact the manufacturer.

ErrorCode.Description: 硬件导致访问失败错误
Access failure due to a hardware error.
ErrorCode.Reason: 由于从站反馈硬件导致访问失败错误
The slave feeds back that the access failed due to hardware causes.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 重启控制器和从站设备，看是否恢复正常，否则请联系厂家

ErrorCode.Description: 服务参数长度不匹配错误

The slave feeds back that the service parameter length mismatches.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查访问从站参数长度是正确的

ErrorCode.Description: 服务参数长度太长错误

ErrorCode.Reason: 由于从站反馈服务参数长度太长错误
The slave feeds back that the service parameter length is too long.

ErrorCode.Description: 服务参数长度太短错误

ErrorCode.Reason: 由于从站反馈服务参数长度太短错误
The slave feeds back that the service parameter length is too short.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查访问从站参数长度是正确的

ErrorCode.Description: 对象字典动态总错误或对象字典不存在错误

ErrorCode.Reason: 由于从站反馈对象字典动态总错误或对象字典不存在错误

ErrorCode.Description: IR-LINK初始化错误
IR-Link initialization error.

ErrorCode.Reason: IR-Link通信周期不是以250us为单位

ErrorCode.Description: 配置IR-LINK不支持错误

ErrorCode.Reason: 配置IR-LINK不支持

ErrorCode.Description: 配置IR-LINK内存申请错误

ErrorCode.Description: 配置IR-LINK报警共享内存错误

ErrorCode.Description: 配置IR-LINK从站操作模式错误

ErrorCode.Reason: IR-Link 从站控制模式不是MODE-8

ErrorCode.Description: 手动模式超速
Manual mode overspeed
ErrorCode.Reason: 手动模式下机器人的TCP速度超过250mm/s
The Cartesian speed of the robot in manual mode exceeds 250mm/s
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 清除报警
clear alarm

ErrorCode.Description: 1类急停时间过长
Emergency stop time too long

The emergency stop time of the robot exceeds the set value
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 1、将1类急停延时时间适当放大;2、联系厂家解决
1. Increase the delay time of Class 1 emergency stop appropriately;2. Contact the manufacturer to resolve the issue

ErrorCode.Reason: 检查到上次下电时断电保存区数据与当前断电保存区数据不一致
The data in the power-off save area from the last power-down does not match the current power-off save area data
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 联系厂家解决
Contact the manufacturer to resolve the issue

ErrorCode.Description: 断电重启失败
Power outage and restart failed
ErrorCode.Reason: 断电重启后检测到外部轴或断电点位当前不支持
After power failure and restart, it was detected that the external axis or power failure point is currently not supported
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 重新同步工程或设置起始行
Resynchronize the project or set the starting line

ErrorCode.Description: 上电前后机器人编码器数值差异过大
The difference between encoder of the robot before and after power on exceeds the limit
ErrorCode.Reason: 检测到上电前后机器人编码器值偏差过大
Detected excessive deviation in the encoder values of the robot before and after power on
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 在手动慢速下运行程序，若点位发生偏移，确认现场是否之前发生碰撞；若未发生碰撞，需要联系汇川技术支持进行排查定位；若轨迹正常，则可正常恢复生产

Run the program manually at a slow speed, and if there is a deviation in the point position, confirm whether there has been a collision on site before; If there is no collision, it is necessary to contact Huichuan technical support for troubleshooting and positioning; If the trajectory is normal, production can resume normally

ErrorCode.Description: 机器人掉电时刻与开机时刻编码器圈数存在一圈的差距
The discrepancy between the number of encoder revolutions at power-off and power-on for the robot is exactly one circle
ErrorCode.Reason: 机器人编码器圈数掉电时与开机时差一圈
When the robot encoder loses power and starts up, there is a time difference of one revolution
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 在手动慢速下运行程序，若点位发生偏移，确认现场是否之前发生碰撞；若未发生碰撞，需要联系汇川技术支持进行排查定位；若轨迹正常，则可正常恢复生产

Run the program manually at a slow speed, and if there is a deviation in the point position, confirm whether there has been a collision on site before; If there is no collision, it is necessary to contact Huichuan technical support for troubleshooting and positioning; If the trajectory is normal, production can resume normally

ErrorCode.Description: 机器人掉电时刻与开机时刻编码器圈数存在多圈的差距
The discrepancy in the number of encoder revolutions between the robot's power failure and startup times is multiple rotations
ErrorCode.Reason: 机器人编码器圈数掉电时与开机时差多圈
Robot encoder turns multiple times when power is off and when it is turned on
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 在手动慢速下运行程序，若点位发生偏移，确认现场是否之前发生碰撞；若未发生碰撞，需要联系汇川技术支持进行排查定位；若轨迹正常，则可正常恢复生产

Run the program manually at a slow speed, and if there is a deviation in the point position, confirm whether there has been a collision on site before; If there is no collision, it is necessary to contact Huichuan technical support for troubleshooting and positioning; If the trajectory is normal, production can resume normally

ErrorCode.Description: 存在运动状态下电的异常操作，编码器数据校验失败
Existence of abnormal operations under motion state, so encoder data verification failure
ErrorCode.Reason: 存在运动状态下电的异常操作，编码器数据校验失败
Existence of abnormal operations under motion state, so encoder data verification failure
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 避免在机器人运动状态进行下电的异常操作，会影响机器人一些校验功能正常运行
Avoiding abnormal power-off operations during robot motion can affect the normal operation of some calibration functions of the robot

ErrorCode.Description: ECAT通信异常，无法进行编码器数据校验
ECAT communication error, unable to perform encoder data verification
ErrorCode.Reason: 1.配置文件错误；\n2.EtherCAT从站与系统配置不符
1. Configuration file error;\n 2. EtherCAT slave does not match the system configuration
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 第一步：检查监控页面EtherCAT连接状态是否异常;\n第二步：请联系厂家
Step 1: Check if the EtherCAT connection status on the monitoring page is abnormal; \nStep 2: Please contact the manufacturer

ErrorCode.Description: 编码器数据读取异常，无法进行编码器数据校验
Decoder data reading anomaly, unable to validate the decoder data
ErrorCode.Reason: 编码器数据读取异常，无法进行编码器数据校验
Decoder data reading anomaly, unable to validate the decoder data
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 优化伺服与控制器连接环境
Optimize the connection environment between servo and controller

ErrorCode.Description: 工位预约模块调度失败
Starting station reservation service failed.
ErrorCode.Reason: 没有正常启动工位预约服务线程
The station reservation service thread was not started properly.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 重新启动，检查是否恢复正常，否则请联系厂家
Restart controller.

ErrorCode.Description: 工位预约配置文件校验失败
Check configure file of station reservation Failed.
ErrorCode.Reason: 工位预约配置文件内容校验失败
The station configure file verification failed.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 重新进行工位配置
Reconfigure the station.

ErrorCode.Description: 工位预约配置文件版本不匹配
The version of configure File of station reservation is not matched.
ErrorCode.Reason: 工位预约配置文件版本不匹配
The version of configure File of station reservation is not matched.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 重新进行工位配置
Reconfigure the station.

ErrorCode.Description: 工位程序启动失败，请检查工位配置
Fail to start the station program, please check the station configuration.
ErrorCode.Reason: 工位配置异常或者工位程序异常
Station configure error or station program error.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 检查工位配置和工位程序
Check the station configure and station program.

ErrorCode.Description: 程序停止功能对应的输入端口为高电平,无法启动工位
Fail to start station，because the input port corresponding to the program stop function is at a high level.
ErrorCode.Reason: 程序停止功能对应的输入端口为高电平
The input port corresponding to the program stop function is at a high level.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 保持程序停止功能对应的输入端口为低电平
Set the input port corresponding to the program stop function to low level.

ErrorCode.Description: 启用工位预约的逐一绑定模式时，程序启动功能无效
When enbling the one by one bingding mode for station reservation, the function of starting program is invalid.
ErrorCode.Reason: 工位配置页面中切换为工位预约逐一绑定模式时，采用程序启动功能启动主任务
When enbling the one by one bingding mode for station reservation on station configuration page, the function of starting program is used to start the main task.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 工位配置页面中切换为工位预约逐一绑定模式时，采用工位预约输入信号启动工位
When enbling the one by one bingding mode for station reservation on station configuration page, the station should be activated using the station input signal.

ErrorCode.Description: 启用工位预约的逐一绑定模式时，程序复位功能无效
When enbling the one by one bingding mode for station reservation, the function of resetting program is invalid.
ErrorCode.Reason: 工位配置页面中切换为工位预约逐一绑定模式时，使用了程序复位功能
When enbling the one by one bingding mode for station reservation on station configuration page, the function of resetting program is used.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 工位配置页面中切换为工位预约逐一绑定模式时，不允许使用程序复位功能
When enbling the one by one bingding mode for station reservation on station configuration page, the function of resetting program is not allowed to be used.

ErrorCode.Description: 关闭工位预约时，无法通过工位输入信号启动工位
When disabling the station reservation, the station cannot be started through the station input signal
ErrorCode.Reason: 工位配置页面中切换为关闭工位预约模式时，不允许使用工位输入信号启动工位
When disabling the station reservation on station configuration page, the station cannot be started through the station input signal.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 工位配置页面中切换为关闭工位预约模式时，不允许使用工位输入信号启动工位
When disabling the station reservation on station configuration page, the station cannot be started through the station input signal.

ErrorCode.Description: 重新启动工位失败，当前运行程序与工位程序不对应
Restarting the station failed, as the currently running program does not correspond to the station program
ErrorCode.Reason: 重新启动工位时，运行行号不在工位程序上
When restarting the station, the running line number is not on the station program.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 重新启动工位时，运行行号需要在工位程序上
When restarting the station, the running line number need to be on the station program.

ErrorCode.Description: 插件与控制器版本不兼容，插件已被删除
The plugin is incompatible with the controller version and has been removed.
ErrorCode.Reason: 插件与控制器版本不兼容
The plugin is incompatible with the controller version..
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 安装与当前控制器版本兼容的插件，若需恢复插件数据请导出诊断后联系厂家
Install plugins compatible with the current controller version. Should you require restoration of plug-in data, please export diagnostics and contact the manufacturer.

ErrorCode.Description: 运行正常
Normal operation
ErrorCode.Reason: 运行正常
Normal operation
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 无需操作
No action required.

ErrorCode.Description: 固件加载失败
Firmware loading failed.
ErrorCode.Reason: 无法从SD卡获取固件
Unable to get firmware from SD card.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 确认是否是测试模式，检查SD内容
Check whether it is in test mode, check the SD card content.

ErrorCode.Description: 固件加载失败
Firmware loading failed.
ErrorCode.Reason: 无法从Flash获取正确固件
Unable to get the correct firmware from Flash.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 重新升级系统
Re-upgrade the system.

Firmware loading failed.

FPGA failed to reset.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 重启控制器看是否恢复正常，否则请联系厂家

Error loading controller parameters.

Contact the manufacture.

Error loading machine model parameters.
ErrorCode.Reason: 机型参数加载错误
Error loading machine model parameters.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 请导入对应机型的机型参数
Import the parameters of the corresponding model.

Error loading machine parameter patch.
ErrorCode.Reason: 机型参数补丁加载错误
Error loading machine parameter patch.

Import the parameters of the corresponding model.

ErrorCode.Description: 机型参数版本和软件版本不兼容
The machine parameter version and software version are incompatible.
ErrorCode.Reason: 机型参数版本和软件版本不兼容
The machine parameter version and software version are incompatible.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 请导入与软件兼容的机型参数
Import machine parameters compatible with the software.

ErrorCode.Description: 写入伺服参数出错
Error writing servo parameter.
ErrorCode.Reason: 写入伺服参数出错
Error writing servo parameter.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 请联系厂商解决
Contact the manufacture

ErrorCode.Description: 伺服参数自动更新，请重启控制柜
Servo parameters updated automatically, please reboot the controller.
ErrorCode.Reason: 伺服参数自动更新，需要重启控制柜
Servo parameters updated automatically, please reboot the controller.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 重启控制柜
Restart the controller.

ErrorCode.Description: 控制器软件版本与本体参数版本不兼容
The controller software version is incompatible with the manipulator parameter version.
ErrorCode.Reason: 控制器软件版本与本体参数版本不兼容
The controller software version is incompatible with the manipulator parameter version.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 关闭通配开关、执行刷机或者升级操作
Turn off the universality switch, reprogram or upgrade the system.

ErrorCode.Description: 控制器第一次连接机器人本体、更换机器人控制柜或本体后，控制器参数与本体参数不一致，请进行通配操作

When the controller is first connected to the robot body, or after replacing the robot control cabinet or body, if the controller parameters do not match the body parameters, please perform a universal matching operation.
ErrorCode.Reason: 控制器参数与本体参数不一致
The controller parameters are inconsistent with the manipulator parameters.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 在控制权为示教器或PC编程平台，进行通配操作
Switch control to the teach pendant or InoRobotLab and enable universality configuration.

ErrorCode.Description: 控制器与本体硬件条件校验不通过，请排查编码器、IRLINK、EACT通信链路是否存在报错，以及控制器与本体是否配对

The controller failed the hardware condition verification with the main body. Please check whether there are any errors in the encoder, IRLink, and EACT communication links, as well as whether the controller is paired with the main body.
ErrorCode.Reason: 控制器与本体硬件条件校验不通过，或机型参数异常
The hardware condition verification between the controller and the main body fails, or the parameters are abnormal.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 请更换控制柜或本体
Replace the controller or manipulator.

ErrorCode.Description: 版本信息不匹配，建议使用与控制器版本相匹配的软件
Version information does not match, it is recommernded use software that matches your controller version.
ErrorCode.Reason: 示教器或InoRobotLab的版本与控制器的版本不匹配
The version of the InoTeachPad or InoRobotLab does not match the controller version.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 使用与控制器的版本相匹配的示教器或InoRobotLab
Use the InoTeachPad or InoRobotLab that matches the version of the controller.

ErrorCode.Reason: 机型参数配置文件缺失
Machine model parameters configuration file is missing.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 请联系厂商解决
Please contact the manufacture.

ErrorCode.Reason: 机型参数配置项缺失
Machine model parameters configuration items is missing.
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 请联系厂商解决
Please contact the manufacture.

ErrorCode.Resolvent: 重启控制器看是否恢复正常，否则请联系厂家

ErrorCode.Description: 长期未接收到视觉返回数据，超时
The data returned by the vision has not been received for a long time which causing timeout
ErrorCode.Reason: 发送视觉触发信号后长期未收到返回数据，视觉处理周期大于拍照时间间隔
After sending the visual trigger signal, the data returned by the vision is not received for a long time, and the visual processing cycle is greater than the photographing time interval；
ErrorCode.Resolvent: (1)检查视觉触发信号是否下发成功；\n(2)若视觉触发信号每次都下发成功，则检查相机是否每次都会进行正常拍照，即排查相机是否发生漏拍现象；\n(3)视觉软件处理时间太长，或数据发送延迟太长；

(1) Checking whether the visual trigger signal is delivered successfully;\n(2) If the visual trigger signal is delivered successfully every time, you can check whether the camera will take pictures normally every time, which is equivalent to checking whether the camera misses shooting;\n(3) The processing time of vision software is too long, or the delay time of data transmission is too long;

After the robot triggers a photo, it receives visual data more than once before the next photo is taken
ErrorCode.Resolvent: 查看是否视觉数据多发，或者发生了不正常的视觉拍照，以及参数【相机触发信号】是否选择有误
